Matthew19:30 Shin daroti ha77i dethan sinthe gididaysati guye gidana, qassi guye gididaysati sinthe gidana” yaagis." 
Matthew20:1 “Xoossaa kawotethay ba woyne gaden une oothiya asi oosisanaw wonta guura keyida ura daanees. 
Matthew20:2 I he une oothiya asa hachi hachi issi dinaare qanxanaw entara giigidi, enta ba woyne gadiya giddo yeddis." 
Matthew20:3 “Qassi wontafe heedzu saate gidishin keyidi ooso dhayidi giya bolla eqida hara asata demmis. 
Matthew20:4 I entako, ‘Hinteka ta woyne gadee giddo bidi oothite, taani hintew bessiya gatiya qanxana’ yaagis." 
Matthew20:5 Entika bidosona. Qassika I usupun saateninne uddufun saaten keyidi hessada oothis. 
Matthew20:6 Tammanne issi saate gidishin I keyiya wode harati yan eqidaysata demmidi, ‘Hinte ooso oothonna gallas kumethi haysan ayis eqidi pee7idetii?’ yaagis." 
Matthew20:7 “Enti zaaridi, ‘Nuna une oosisiya asi dhayida gishosa’ yaagidosona. “Ika, ‘Hinteka ta woyne gadiya giddo bidi oothite’ yaagis." 
Matthew20:8 “Sa7i omarsin, woyne gadiya goday oosanchota halaqaako, ‘Oosanchota xeegada wursethan ooso gelidaysatape doomada koyro gelidaysata gakanaw enta gatiya qanxa’ yaagis." 
Matthew20:9 Tammanne issi saaten ooso oykidaysati yidi, huuphen huuphen issi issi dinaare ekidosona." 
Matthew20:10 Koyro ooso oykidaysati yidi, bantaw daro imetana gidi qopidosona. Shin entika huuphen huuphen issi issi dinaare ekidosona." 
Matthew20:11 Banta miishiya eki simmidi godaa bolla zuuzumidosona. 
Matthew20:12 ‘Haysati guyepe yidi issi saate xalaala oothidosona. Shin gallas kumethi awa suulan daaburidi pee7ida nuura enti waanidi issino gidoona’ yaagidosona. 
Matthew20:13 “Woyniya goday oosanchotape issuwako, ‘Ta ishaw, taani nena qohabike; ne taara giigiday issi dinaaresa gidennee?" 
Matthew20:14 Ne miishiya ekada ne soo ba. Ta omarsi yidaysaska neysa mela immanaw koyayis. 
Matthew20:15 Taani ta miishiyan koydaba oothanaw taw maati baawee? Woyko taani keeha gidida gisho neeni qanaatay?’ yaagis. 
Matthew20:16 “Hessada ha77i dethan guye gididaysati sinthatana, sinthatidaysati qassi guyetana” yaagis." 
Matthew20:17 Yesuusi Yerusalaame bishe, tammanne nam7u tamaareta dumma gaxa kessidi entako yaagis:" 
Matthew20:18 “Heko, nuuni ha77i Yerusalaame buussaa bolla de7oos. Yan Asa Na7ay kahine halaqatasinne higge astamaaretas aadhidi imetana. Enti iya bolla hayqo pirda pirdana." 
Matthew20:19 Iya Ayhude gidonna deriyas aathidi immana. Enti iya kawushana, garaafana, yaatidi iya masqaliya bolla kaqana. Shin I heedzantho gallas hayqope dendana” yaagis." 
Matthew20:20 He wode Zabdiyoosa machiya ba nam7u adde naytara Yesuusako yada, iya sinthan gulbatada issiba iya woossasu." 
Matthew20:21 Yesuusi iiko, “Ne ay koyay?” yaagis. Iya zaarada, “Ne kawotethan ha ta nam7u nayti issoy ne ushachan issoy ne haddirsan utto garki!” yaagasu." 
Matthew20:22 Shin Yesuusi naytako zaaridi, “Hinte ay woossiyako ereketa; taani uyanaw de7iya waaye xuu7aa uyanaw danda7eetii?” yaagis. Entika, “Ee danda7oos” yaagidosona." 
Matthew20:23 Yesuusi, “Tumaka taani uyanaw de7iya xuu7ape hinte uyana. Shin ta ushachaninne haddirsan uttanayisata doorey tana gidike. He bessay imetey, ta aaway immanaw giigisida asatasa” yaagis." 
Matthew20:24 Attida tammu iya tamaareti hessa si7ida wode nam7u ishata bolla hanqetidosona. 
Matthew20:25 Shin Yesuusi enta ubbaa xeegidi haysada yaagis. “Ayhude gidonna asaa haareysati banta asaa bolla godateysanne enta kaaletheysati wolqan haareysa hinte ereeta. 
Matthew20:26 Shin hinte giddon hessada gidopo. Hintefe gitatanaw koyiya oonika hintew aylle gido. 
Matthew20:27 Hinte giddon ubbaafe bolla gidanaw koyiya oonika hintew aylle gidanaw bessees. 
Matthew20:28 Hessadaka, Asa Na7ay ase haggaazanawunne daro asaa wozanaw ba shempuwa immanaw yisipe attishin, asan haggaazetanaw yibeenna” yaagis." 
Matthew20:29 Hessafe guye, Yesuusi ba tamaaretara Iyaarkofe keyidi bishin, daro asay entana kaallidosona." 
Matthew20:30 Oge gaxan uttida nam7u qooqeti Yesuusi yaara aadheysa si7idi, “Godaw, Dawita Na7aw, nuus qadhetarki” yaagidi waassidosona." 
Matthew20:31 Daro asay entana, “Hayzite” yaagidi kaccidosona. Shin enti, “Godaw, Dawita na7aw, nuus qadhetarki” gidi guji waassidosona." 
Matthew20:32 Yesuusi eqidi, enta xeegidi, “Ta hintew ay oothana mela koyeetii?” yaagidi oychis." 
Matthew20:33 Entika, “Godaw, nu ayfey xeellana mela koyoos” yaagidosona." 
Matthew20:34 Yesuusi entaw qadhetidi, enta ayfiya bochis. Ellesidi enta ayfey xeellis; enti iya kaallidi bidosona." 
Matthew21:1 Yesuusaranne iya tamaaretara Yerusalaame matidi, Shamaho zuma bolla de7iya Beetefaage geetetiya gutaa gakishe, Yesuusi ba tamaaretape nam7ata baape sinthe yaagidi kiittis:" 
Matthew21:2 “Hintefe sinthan de7iya guta biite. Yan issi harey qashon de7iyaro I maarara hinte demmana. Enta billidi haa eki yiite. 
Matthew21:3 Oonika hintena oychiko, ‘Goday entana koyees’ yaagite. I entana iiraka yeddi aggana” yaagis." 
Matthew21:4 Hessika nabey," 
Matthew21:5 “Xiyoone katamaas, ‘Heko, ne kawoy ashke gididi, hare bollanne hare mara bolla uttidi, neeko yees’ yaagite” yaagidi xaafidaysi poletana mela hessi hanis." 
Matthew21:6 Iya tamaareti bidi Yesuusi enta kiitidaysada oothidosona. 
Matthew21:7 Hariiwunne hare maraa ehidi bollara ma7ida banta ma7uwa enta zokon yeggidosona. Yesuusi ma7ota bolla uttis. 
Matthew21:8 Daro asay banta ma7uwa ogiyan hiixidosona. Harati bonco tashidi oge bolla yeggidosona. 
Matthew21:9 Yesuusape sinthara hemeteysatinne iyape guyera kaalliya daro asay, “Hosaana! Dawita na7ay galatetto! Godaa sunthan yeysi anjetidaysa! Bonchoy Ubbaafe Dhoqa Saluwan Xoossaas gido!” yaagidi waassidosona." 
Matthew21:10 Yesuusi Yerusalaame katamaa gelida wode he kataman de7iya asa ubbay, “Haysi oonee?” yaagidi yarkidosona." 
Matthew21:11 Asay, “Haysi Galilan de7iya Naazirete katamaape yida nabiya Yesuusa” yaagidosona." 
Matthew21:12 Yesuusi Xoossa Keethi gelidi, yan bayzeysatanne shammeyisata ubbaa kare goodis. Miishe laammeyisata xarpheezatanne holleta bayziya oydeta shiri yeggis." 
Matthew21:13 Ika entako, “Xoossaa qaalan, ‘Ta keethay Xoossaa woossiya keethi geetetana’ geetetidi xaafetis. Shin hinte pangati qosetiya gongolo oothideta” yaagis." 
Matthew21:14 Yesuusi xoossa keethan de7ishin qooqetinne gundati iyako yin enta pathis. 
Matthew21:15 Shin kahine halaqatinne higge astamaareti Yesuusi oothida malaalsiyabata be7idaysasinne guutha nayti xoossa keethan, “Dawita na7ay, galatetto” yaagidi waasseysa si7idi hanqetidosona." 
Matthew21:16 Enti Yesuusako, “Haysati geysa ne si7ay?” yaagidosona. Yesuusi, “Ee si7ayis, Xoossaa qaalan, ‘Guutha nayta doonaninne dhammiya nayta doonan galata wothadasa’ geetetidi xaafetidaysa hinte nabbabibeketii?” yaagis." 
Matthew21:17 Entana yan aggidi Bitaane katamaa bidi aqis. 
Matthew21:18 Yesuusi wonta guura katama simmidi yishe koshatis. 
Matthew21:19 Oge gaxan issi balase mithi be7idi iiko bis. Shin haythafe attishin, hara aykoka demmibeenna. Hessa gisho, iyo, “Hizape nam7antho ayfe ayfopa!” yaagis. He balase mithiya ellesada mela aggasu." 
Matthew21:20 Iya tamaareti hessa be7idi, “Ha balasiya waanada ellesa meladee?” yaagidi malaaletidosona." 
Matthew21:21 Yesuusi zaaridi, “Taani hintew tuma odayis; hintew ammanoy de7iko, qassi hinte sidhonna ixiko balase bolla taani oothidaysa mela xalaala ootheketa, shin ‘Ha zumaa shodetada abban wodha’ yaagiko hanana." 
Matthew21:22 Ammanidi hinte woossiyaba aybiba gidikoka hinte ekana” yaagis. 
Matthew21:23 Yesuusi Xoossa Keetha gelidi tamaarsishin, kahine halaqatinne Ayhude cimati iyako yidi, “Neeni haysa oothana mela new ay maati de7ii? New ha maata immiday oonee?” yaagidi oychidosona." 
Matthew21:24 Yesuusi entako, “Taanika hintena issiba oychayis; hinte taw hessa zaariko, taani ay maatan oothiyako hintew odana." 
Matthew21:25 Yohaanisi xammaqana mela maatay awupe imetidee? Xoossafeye asapee?” yaagis. Enti banta giddon zoretidi, “Nuuni, ‘Xoossafe’ giiko, I nuna, ‘Yaatin ayis ammanibeketii?’ yaagana." 
Matthew21:26 Nuuni, ‘Asape’ giiko, asa ubbay Yohaanisa nabe oothi xeelliya gisho, asaa yayyoos” yaagidosona." 
Matthew21:27 Hessa gisho, “Nuuni eroko” yaagidi zaaridosona. Ika, “Hiza, taanika haysa ay maatan oothiyako hintew odike” yaagis." 
Matthew21:28 “Yesuusi kaallidika haysada yaagis: nam7u adde nayti de7iya issi uray de7ees. He uray bayra na7aako bidi, ‘Ta na7aw, hachi woyne giddo bada ootha’ yaagis." 
Matthew21:29 Na7ay zaaridi, ‘Atto biike’ yaagis. Shin guyepe ba wozanan qopi ekidi oothanaw bis." 
Matthew21:30 Aaway ba kaalo na7aako bidi, ba bayra na7aako gidaysada kiittis. Ika, ‘Ero, ta aawaw’ yaagis. Shin bibeenna." 
Matthew21:31 Ha nam7u naytape ba aawas kiitetidaysi awusee?” yaagis. Entika, “Bayra” yaagidosona. Yesuusi entako, “Ta hintew tuma odayis; qaraxa qanxiseysatinne laymateysati hintefe sinthatidi Xoossaa kawotethaa gelana." 
Matthew21:32 Xammaqiya Yohaanisi suure ogiya tamaarsishe yin I geysa ammanibeketa. Shin qaraxa qanxiseysatinne laymateysati ammanidosona. Hinte hari attoshin, enta be7idika hinte nagaraape simmidi ammanibeketa” yaagis." 
Matthew21:33 Qassika Yesuusi haysada yaagis; “Hara leemiso si7ite, woyne tokida issi uray de7ees. He woyniya yuushuwa diris. Woyne gum7iya olla bookis. Woyniya naaganaw shako shaakis. Hessafe guye, gadiya kothe immidi hara biitta bis." 
Matthew21:34 Woyne ayfiya maxiya wodey gakin bana gakiya baggaa ekidi yaana mela ba aylleta entako yeddis. 
Matthew21:35 Kothe aawati iya aylleta oykidi issuwa wadhidosona, hankuwa wodhidosona qassi attidaysa shuchan caddidosona." 
Matthew21:36 Woyne atakiltiya goday kaseysatape dariya hara aylleta kiittis. Kothe aawati enta bollaka hankoyisata bolla oothidaysada oothidosona. 
Matthew21:37 Wursethan I, ‘Ta na7aa enti bonchana!’ yaagidi ba na7aa entako kiittis." 
Matthew21:38 “Shin kothe aawati na7aa be7idi banta giddon ‘Gadiya laattanaysi haysa, iya wodhidi gadiya nuuni laattoos!’ yaagidosona." 
Matthew21:39 Na7a oykidi woyne gadiya giddofe gaxa kessidi wodhidosona. 
Matthew21:40 “Hiza, woyne gadiya goday yaa wode he kothe aawata waatanee?” yaagidi oychis." 
Matthew21:41 Enti zaaridi, “I he iita asata iita wodho wodhidi, woyney ayfiya wode iya gakiya baggaa woden woden immiya hara kothe aawatas immana” yaagidosona." 
Matthew21:42 Yesuusi zaaridi entako, Xoossaa qaalan, “ ‘Gimbeysati boridi ixida shuchay, godaa xaphuwa minthiya, ubbaafe aadhiya shuchaa gidis. Haysi Goday oothidaba; nu ayfiyas malaalsiyaba’ geetetidi xaafetidaysa nabbabibeketii?" 
Matthew21:43 “Hessa gisho, taani hintew odayis; Xoossaa kawotethay hintefe eketidi lo77o ayfe ayfiya asatas imetana." 
Matthew21:44 [Ha shucha bolla kundiya oonika meqeretana. Qassi ha shuchay iya bolla wodhiya urayka gaacetana”] yaagis. 
Matthew21:45 Kahine halaqatinne Farsaaweti Yesuusi odida leemisuwan bantana odidaysa eridosona. 
Matthew21:46 Enti Yesuusa oykanaw koydosona, shin asay Yesuusa nabe oothidi xeelliya gisho, asaas yayyidosona." 
Matthew22:1 Yesuusi asaas zaaridi haysada yaagidi leemiso odis. 
Matthew22:2 “Xoossaa kawotethay ba na7aas yaagano giigisida kawa daanees. 
Matthew22:3 He kawoy yaagano yaana mela odi wothida asata xeeganaw ba aylleta kiittis. Shin asati yaanaw koybookona. 
Matthew22:4 Qassi hara aylleta xeegidi, xeegetida asatako bidi, ‘Taani ta sangatanne modhida gatarmenthota shukas; ubbabay giigis. Ta yaaganuwa haa yiite yaagite’ yaagidi kiittis." 
Matthew22:5 Shin xeegetidaysati xeessaa ixidi, banta oosos oosos bidosona. Issoy ba goshshas, hankoy ba zal7iyas bis." 
Matthew22:6 Harati qassi kawa aylleta oykidi, kawushi wadhidi wodhidosona." 
Matthew22:7 “Kawoy daro yilotidi, ba wotaadareta yeddidi shempo wodhidaysata wodhisis, enta katamaka xuuggis." 
Matthew22:8 Hessafe guye, ba aylletako, ‘Yaaganoy giigis, shin xeegetidaysati yaaganuwas bessiya asi gidokona." 
Matthew22:9 Hessa gisho, wogga ogeta bidi, demmida asi ubbaa yaaganuwa yaana mela xeegite’ yaagis." 
Matthew22:10 Aylleti ogiya bolla bidi banta demmida asi ubbaa lo77otanne iitata ehidi yaagano shaqara gelsidi kunthidosona. 
Matthew22:11 “Shin kawoy kathaa maanaw uttida asaa be7anaw gelida wode yaagano ma7o ma7iboona issi asi demmis. 
Matthew22:12 Iyako, ‘La, ne yaagano ma7o ma7onna waanada haysa geladii?’ yaagis. Shin uray si77i gis." 
Matthew22:13 “Kawoy ba aylletako, ‘Ha uraa kushiyanne tohuwa qachidi, kare dhumaa kessi yeggite. Yan iyaw yeehonne acha garcethi gidana’ yaagis." 
Matthew22:14 “Hessadaka, Xoossaa kawotethaas xeegetidaysati daro shin dooretidaysati guutha” yaagis." 
Matthew22:15 Hessafe guye, Farsaaweti bidi, Yesuusa waati odan oykaneeko zoretidosona." 
Matthew22:16 Banta tamaaretanne Herodiisa baggatape issota issota kiittidosona. Entika, “Astamaariyaw, ne tuma odeysa nu eroos. Neeni asape ase shaakaka, asa woygandes gada aykoka oothaka, Xoossa oge tumatethan tamaarsaasa." 
Matthew22:17 Ane nuus oda, nuuni Roome Kawas giira giiranaw bessi bessennee?” yaagidosona." 
Matthew22:18 Shin Yesuusi enta iita qofaa eridi, “Ha cubboto, tana ayis paacetii?" 
Matthew22:19 Giira giiriya miishiya tana bessite” yaagis. Entika iyaw santime ehidosona. 
Matthew22:20 I, “Ha sunthaynne misiley oodebayee?” yaagis." 
Matthew22:21 Enti, “Roome Kawoysa” yaagidosona. Yaatin Yesuusi entako, “Hiza, Kawas besseysa kawas, Xoossas besseysa Xoossas immite” yaagis." 
Matthew22:22 Enti hessa si7ida wode malaaletidi iya matape aggidi bidosona. 
Matthew22:23 He gallas hayqope dendoy baawa giya Saduqaaweti Yesuusako yidi, yaagidi iya oychidosona." 
Matthew22:24 “Astamaariyaw, ‘Musey, issi asi na7a yelonna hayqiko, he hayqidaysa ishay iya machiw ekidi, ba ishaas na7a yelo’ yaagidi kiittis." 
Matthew22:25 Nu eriya laapun ishati de7oosona. Bayray macho ekidi na7a yelonna hayqis. Iya machiw iya kaalo ishay ekis. 
Matthew22:26 Hessadaka, he maccasiw ekida nam7anthoyka, heedzanthoyka, bidi laapunati wurana gakanaw ubbay hayqidosona." 
Matthew22:27 Ubbaafe guye he maccasiya hayqasu. 
Matthew22:28 Yaatin, laapunati ubbay iyo ekida gisho, hayqope dendiya gallas, he maccasiya laapunatape awusas macho gidanee?” yaagidosona." 
Matthew22:29 Yesuusi zaaridi, “Hinte Xoossaa qaalay tamaarsiyaba woyko iya wolqaa eronna gisho baleeta." 
Matthew22:30 Asay hayqope dendiya wode salon de7iya kiitanchota mela gidanaape attishin, ekokona gelokona." 
Matthew22:31 Qassi hayqida asati hayqope dendanaba Xoossay hintew odidaysa nabbabibeketii? 
Matthew22:32 Xoossay, ‘Taani Abrahaame Xoossaa, Yisaaqa Xoossaa, Yayqooba Xoossaa’ yaagis. Hessa gisho, Xoossay paxa de7eyisata Xoossaafe attishin, hayqidaysata Xoossaa gidenna” yaagis." 
Matthew22:33 Daro asay hessa si7idi, iya timirtiyan malaaletidosona." 
Matthew22:34 Yesuusi Saduqaawetas gaanaba dhaysidaysa Farsaaweti si7ida wode issife shiiqidosona. 
Matthew22:35 Enta giddofe issi higge astamaarey Yesuusa paace oysho oychis. 
Matthew22:36 “Astamaariyaw, higge ubbaafe aadheysi awusee?” yaagidi oychis." 
Matthew22:37 Yesuusi zaaridi, “ ‘Ne Godaa, ne Xoossaa, ne kumetha wozanape, ne kumetha shempuwafe, ne kumetha qofaape dosa." 
Matthew22:38 Ubbaafe aadheysinne bayra kiitay haysa. 
Matthew22:39 Nam7antho ubbaafe aadhiya kiitay, ase ubbaa ne huuphiya ne doseysada dosa’ yaageysa." 
Matthew22:40 Muse higgeynne nabeta timirtey ubbay ha kiitata bolla katoosona” yaagis. 
Matthew22:41 Farsaaweti issi bolla shiiqidi de7ishin, Yesuusi entana," 
Matthew22:42 “Kiristoosaba hinte woygetii? I oodde na7ee?” yaagidi oychis. Enti, “I Kawa Dawita na7a” yaagidi zaaridosona." 
Matthew22:43 Yesuusi entako, “Yaatin, Dawiti Geeshsha Ayyaanan gididi waatidi Kiristoosa, ‘Godaa’ gidi xeegii? Dawiti gishe," 
Matthew22:44 “ ‘Godaa Xoossay, ta Godaako, ne morketa ne tohoy yedhiyaso oothana gakanaw, haysan taape ushacha baggan utta’ gis." 
Matthew22:45 Hiza, Dawiti Kiristoosa Godaa gidi xeegiko, waanidi Kiristoosi Dawita na7a gidii?” yaagis." 
Matthew22:46 Yesuusas issi qaala zaaranaw danda7ida asi oonika baawa. Qassi he gallasape doomidi hara oysha oychanaw oonika danda7ibeenna. 
Matthew23:1 Hessafe guye, Yesuusi shiiqida asaasinne ba tamaaretas haysada yaagis." 
Matthew23:2 “Higge astamaaretinne Farsaaweti Muse higgiya billanaw maatara de7oosona. 
Matthew23:3 Hessa gisho, enti hintena kiittiya ubbaa oothitenne naagite. Shin enti ootheysada oothopite. Ayis giiko, enti odeysada oothokona." 
Matthew23:4 Enti tookanaw danda7etonna tooho qachidi asaa toossosona. Shin bantaw hari attoshin, he toohuwa asay tookiya wode biradhe xeeran bochanaw koyokona." 
Matthew23:5 “Shin enti banta ooso ubbaa asi be7onna mela oothosona. Banta som7oninne qesen qachiya maxaafaa xiqisey de7iya kitaafe dalgisoosona, banta ma7uwa macaraa adussosona." 
Matthew23:6 Moketiya bessan boncho bessinne ayhude woosa keethatan daro lo77iya oyde dosoosona. 
Matthew23:7 Asay giyan entana bonchon sarothanaysanne ‘Astamaariyaw’ gidi xeeganaysa koyoosona. 
Matthew23:8 “Shin hinte astamaarey issuwa xalaala gidida gishonne hinte ubbay ishata gidida gisho, ‘Astamaariyaw’ geetetidi xeegetofite." 
Matthew23:9 Hintew salon issi aawa xalaali de7iya gisho, ha sa7an oonaka ‘Aawaw’ gidi xeegopite." 
Matthew23:10 Hintew issi Goday Kiristoosa xalaali de7iya gisho ‘Godaw’ geetetidi xeegetofite. 
Matthew23:11 Hinte giddon bayratey hinte aylle gido. 
Matthew23:12 Bana gitaya oonika kawuyana; bana kawushiya oonika gitatana. 
Matthew23:13 “Hinteno, cubboto, higge astamaaretonne Farsaaweto, asa sinthan salo kawotethaa gordeysato hintena ayye! Hinte, hinte huuphen geleketa qassi harataka gelseketa." 
Matthew23:14 “[Hinteno cubboto, higge astamaaretonne, Farsaaweto, am7eta keetha hinte bonqishe, asi be7o gidi woosa adusseta. Hessa gisho, hintena ayye! Ubbaafe aadhiya pirday hintena naagees.]" 
Matthew23:15 “Hinteno, cubboto, higge astamaaretonne Farsaaweto, hinte issi uraa ammanthanaw abbaranne sa7ara yuuyeta. Shin hinte iya ammanthida wode he uraa hintefe aathidi Gaannames giigetidaysa oothiya gisho, hintena ayye!" 
Matthew23:16 “Oonika xoossa keethan caaqiko aykoyka baawa. Shin Xoossaa Keethan de7iya worqan caaqiko, he caaqoy iya gomana giya qooqeto, hintew qooqidi harata kaaletheysato, hintena ayye!" 
Matthew23:17 Hinteno, eeyato, qooqeto, worqay aadhiyee? Worqiya Xoossas dummaya xoossa keethay aadhii?" 
Matthew23:18 Qassi ‘Oonika yarsho bessan caaqiko, aykoyka baawa. Shin oonika iya bolla de7iya yarshuwan caaqiko, he caaqoy iya gomana’ yaagidi tamaarseeta." 
Matthew23:19 Hinteno, qooqeto, yarshoy aadhiyee? Yarshuwa Xoossas dummaya bessay aadhii?" 
Matthew23:20 Hessa gisho, yarsho bessan caaqiya uray, he yarsho bessaaninne iya bolla de7iya ubbaban caaqees." 
Matthew23:21 Xoossa keethan caaqiya uray, he xoossa keethaninne iyan de7iya Xoossan caaqees." 
Matthew23:22 Salon caaqiya uray Xoossaa araataninne he araata bolla uttiya Xoossan caaqees. 
Matthew23:23 “Hinteno, cubboto, higge astamaaretonne Farsaaweto, hintena ayye! Hinte kareetha sawope, naatiropenne okashepe asraata kesseeta. Shin higgen de7iya aadhidi koshsheyisata aggideta. Hessika, suure pirda, qadhetethinne ubbaban ammanetethi. Harataka aggonashin haysata hinte oothanaw bessees." 
Matthew23:24 Hintew qooqidi hara asi kaaletheysato, hinte ushshafe udunxe kessidi gimale miteeta." 
Matthew23:25 “Hinteno, cubboto, higge astamaaretonne Farsaaweto, hintena ayye! Hinte shaatiyasinne keriyas bolla baggaa geeshsheeta. Shin entaw garsan bonqeynne uuzetethi kumi uttis." 
Matthew23:26 Neno qooqe Farsaawiyaw, shaatiyasinne keriyas garsa kasetada geeshsha. Hessafe guye, bolla baggayka geeshshi gidana." 
Matthew23:27 “Hinteno, cubboto, higge astamaaretonne Farsaaweto, hintena ayye! Kare baggara qalame tiyetidi lo77idi, giddon meqethinne wooqidabay kumida duufota daaneta." 
Matthew23:28 Hessadaka, bolla baggara asas lo77o daaneta. Shin hinte garsan cubbotethinne iitatethi kumis." 
Matthew23:29 “Hinteno, cubboto, higge astamaaretonne Farsaaweto, hintena ayye! Hinte nabetas duufo keexeta, qassi xillota duufuwaka loytheeta." 
Matthew23:30 Qassi hinte, ‘Nuuni beni nu aawata wode de7idaba gidiyako, entara issife nabeta suuthaa gussokoshin’ yaageeta." 
Matthew23:31 Hessa gisho, hinte nabeta wodhida asaa nayta gideysa hinte hinte huuphen markateeta." 
Matthew23:32 Hiza, hinte aawati doomidaysa hinte polite." 
Matthew23:33 “Ha shooshato, shoosha nayto, hinte Gaanname pirdaafe waanidi attanee?" 
Matthew23:34 Hessa gisho, heko, taani nabeta, cinca asatanne astamaareta hinteko kiittana. Entafe issota issota hinte wodhananne masqala bolla kaqana. Baggata ayhude woosa keethatan lisson garaafananne katamaape katama gooddana." 
Matthew23:35 Hessa gisho, xilluwa Aabela wodhida wodepe doomidi, Xoossa Keethasinne yarsho bessaafe giddon hinte wodhida Baraka na7a Zakaryaasa wode gakanaw hayqida xillo asa ubba gisho, hinte seeretana." 
Matthew23:36 Taani hintew tuma odayis; hintenne hinte aawati oothida nagaraas ha pirda ubbay ha yeletethaa bolla gakana. 
Matthew23:37 “Yerusalaame, Yerusalaame, nabeta wodhiyare! Xoossay neeko kiittidaysata shuchan caddiyare! Kuttoy ba nayta ba qefen hapheysada taani ne asaa ta qesiyan gechanaw aapun toho koyadina! Shin tana diggadasa." 
Matthew23:38 Hiza, heko, hinte keethay kaysi gidana." 
Matthew23:39 Taani hintew odayis; ‘Godaa sunthan yeysi anjetidaysa’ hinte gaana gakanaw nam7antho tana be7eketa” yaagis. 
Matthew24:1 Yesuusi Xoossa Keethafe keyidi bishin, iya tamaareti iyako yidi, malaaletidi Xoossa Keetha gimbiya bessidosona." 
Matthew24:2 Yesuusi entako zaaridi, “Ee! Haysa ubbaa be7eetii? Taani hintew tumaa odayis; shuchi shucha bolla gimbetida mela laaletonna attenna” yaagis." 
Matthew24:3 Yesuusi Shamaho zuma bolla uttidashin, iya tamaareti bantarka iyako yidi, “Hessi awude hananeeko nuus oda. Qassi ne yuussasinne wodiya wursethaas malaatay aybee?” yaagidi oychidosona." 
Matthew24:4 Yesuusi zaaridi, “Hintena oonika balethonna mela naagetite!" 
Matthew24:5 Ayis giiko, daro asati ta sunthan, ‘Taani Kiristoosa, Xoossay asaa ashshanaw kiittidaysa’ yaagishe yidi daro asaa balethana." 
Matthew24:6 Matan de7iya ola girsaa, haahon de7iya ola wore si7anaw de7eeta. Hessa melabay hananaw bessiya gisho Hirgofite. Shin wursethay buroona." 
Matthew24:7 Derey deriyara, issi kawotethay hara kawotethaara oletana. Koshaynne biitta qaaxoy ubba bessan hanana." 
Matthew24:8 Hessi ubbay yelo iqethas zooke mela. 
Matthew24:9 “He wode asay hintena waayees aathidi immana, qachananne wodhana. Ta sunthaa gisho asa ubbay hintena ixana." 
Matthew24:10 He wode daroti ammano aggana. Banta giddon issoy issuwa aathidi immana, issoy issuwa ixana." 
Matthew24:11 Qassi daro wordo nabeti dendidi darota balethana. 
Matthew24:12 Geellatethi dariya gisho, daro asaa siiqoy irxana." 
Matthew24:13 Shin wursethi gakanaw genciya uray attana. 
Matthew24:14 Asa ubbaas marka gidana mela Xoossaa kawotethaa Wongelay biitta ubban odetana. Hessafe guye, wursethay yaana." 
Matthew24:15 “Hessa gisho, nabiya Daaneli odida dhayo tunatethay geeshsha bessan eqidaysa hinte be7ana. (Akeekiso: Hessi woy guusseko nabbabeysi akeeko!)" 
Matthew24:16 He wode Yihuda biittan de7eysati deriyako baqato. 
Matthew24:17 Keetha huuphen de7iya uray ba son de7iyaba ekanaw soo gelonna baqato. 
Matthew24:18 Gaden de7eysi ba ma7uwa ekanaw guye simmofo. 
Matthew24:19 He wode qantha maccasatasinne dhanthiya maccasatas daro un7a gidana. 
Matthew24:20 Balgon woyko Sambaatan hinte baqatoy gidonna mela Xoossaa woossite. 
Matthew24:21 Ayis giiko, sa7i medhetoosape hachi gakanaw hanonnabay, qassi sinthafeka ubbaraka hanonna waayey he wode hanana." 
Matthew24:22 Xoossay he gallasata taybuwa guuthonnaako ase gidida oonika attenna. Shin I ba doorida asata gisho, he gallasata taybuwa guuthana." 
Matthew24:23 “He wode oonika hintena, ‘Heko, Kiristoosi haysan’ woyko ‘Hinin de7ees’ yaagiko ammanopite." 
Matthew24:24 Ayis giiko, wordo Kiristoosatinne wordo nabeti dendana. Entaw danda7etiko, hari attoshin Xoossay dooridaysataka balethanaw gita malaatatanne malaalsiyabata oothana." 
Matthew24:25 Akeekite, taani hintew haysa kasetada odas." 
Matthew24:26 “Hessa gisho, asay hinteko, ‘Heko, Kiristoosi bazzon de7ees’ giiko, yaa boopite. Woyko hinteko, ‘Heko, qol7an de7ees’ giiko, entaba ammanopite." 
Matthew24:27 Ayis giiko, wol7anthi salon wol7amidi, dolohape wuloha gakanaw benteysada, Asa Na7aa yuussay hessada hanana." 
Matthew24:28 “Bawuti de7iyason ankoti shiiqana. 
Matthew24:29 “He wode he waaye gallasatape guye, ellesidi away dhumana, ageenay ba poo7uwa diggana. Xoolintoti salope wodhana, qassi salon de7iya wolqati buqettana." 
Matthew24:30 He wode Asa Na7aa yuussaa mallay saluwa bolla bentana. Sa7an de7iya asi ubbay yeekana. Qassi Asa Na7ay, wolqaranne gita bonchuwara saluwa shaara giddora yishin enti be7ana." 
Matthew24:31 I ba kiitanchota gita moyze punora kiittana. Enti sa7aa oyddu baggaa bidi, ha gaxape ya gaxa gakanaw de7iya iyaw dooretidaysata shiishana." 
Matthew24:32 “Balase mithafe tamaarite. Iya aacada hayxiya wode torchey matatidaysa hinte ereeta. 
Matthew24:33 Hessadaka, hinte ha ubbaba be7iya wode Yesuusi matidi pengen de7eysa erite." 
Matthew24:34 Taani hintew tuma odayis; ha ubbabay poletana gakanaw, ha yeletethay aadhenna." 
Matthew24:35 Saloynne sa7i aadhana, shin ta qaalay ubbaka aadhenna." 
Matthew24:36 “He gallasaanne he saatiya salon de7iya ta aawape attishin, hari salo kiitanchota gidin woyko Na7aa gidin oonika erenna." 
Matthew24:37 Asa Na7aa yuussay, Nohe wode hanidaysa mela gidana." 
Matthew24:38 He wode dhayo haathay yaanape sinthe Nohey markabiyan gelida gallasa gakanaw, asay mishenne uyishe, ekishenne gelishe gam7is." 
Matthew24:39 Dhayo haathay yidi, enta ubbaa dhaysana gakanaw akeekibokona. Asa Na7aa yuussayka hessada hanana." 
Matthew24:40 “He wode nam7u asati gaden oothana. Entafe issoy eketana, hankoy attana." 
Matthew24:41 Nam7u maccasati issife gaaccana. Entafe issiniya eketana hankiya attana. 
Matthew24:42 “Hiza, hinte Goday ay gallas yaaneko hinte eronna gisho, minnidi naagite." 
Matthew24:43 Shin kaysoy qammafe ay saaten yaaneko goday eriyako, ba keethay booketonna mela barkidi naaganashin." 
Matthew24:44 Hessadaka, Asa Na7ay hinte qoponna saaten yaana gisho, hinteka giigidi de7ite." 
Matthew24:45 “Yaatin, ba soo asaas kathaa koshshiya wodiyan immana mela iya goday doorida ammantheysinne wozanaama aylley oonee?" 
Matthew24:46 I ba goday kiittidaysa oothishin iya goday yidi demmiya aylley anjetidaysa. 
Matthew24:47 Taani hintew tuma odayis; goday he aylliya babaa ubbaa bolla shuumana. 
Matthew24:48 Shin he aylley iita gidiko, ‘Ta goday gam7idi yaana’ yaagidi ba wozanan qopidi," 
Matthew24:49 ba lagge oosanchota wadho doomiko, mathoteysatara miikonne uyiko," 
Matthew24:50 he aylliya goday I qoponna gallasinne I eronna saaten," 
Matthew24:51 yidi iya qanxerethana. Iya qaada cubbotara oothana. He bessan iyaw yeehonne ache garcethi gidana. 
Matthew25:1 “He wode salo kawotethay banta xompe oykidi, macho ehanaw bida addiya mokanaw keyida tammu geela7ota daanees." 
Matthew25:2 Entafe ichashati eeya, qassi ichashati cinca." 
Matthew25:3 Eeyati xompe oykidosona, shin guzha zayte oykibookona." 
Matthew25:4 Shin cincati banta xompenne hara guzha zayte oykidosona. 
Matthew25:5 Machiw ekeysi gam7in, he geela7oti bantana dhiskoy oykin dhiskidosona." 
Matthew25:6 “Giddi bilahe gidiya wode, ‘Heko, machiw eheysi gakis, iya mokanaw keyite’ giya gita caboy si7etis." 
Matthew25:7 “He wode he geela7oti ubbay barkidi, banta xompiya giigisidosona." 
Matthew25:8 Eeyati cincatako, ‘Nu xompey to7ana haniya gisho, hinte zaytiyape nuus immerketi’ yaagidosona." 
Matthew25:9 “Shin cincati zaaridi, ‘Akay, nuusinne hintew gidiya zaytey baawa. Hessa gisho, bidi hintew shammidi ekite’ yaagidosona." 
Matthew25:10 Eeya geela7oti zayte shammanaw bin, machiw ekeysi puttu gis. Giigeti uttida ichashu geela7oti iyara issife yaagano keethi gelidosona; kareyka gordeti aggis." 
Matthew25:11 “Guyepe hanko geela7oti yidi, ‘Godaw, godaw, nuus dooyarki’ yaagidosona." 
Matthew25:12 “Shin I zaaridi, ‘Taani hintew tuma odayis; ta hintena erike!’" 
Matthew25:13 “Hiza, Asa Na7ay yaana gallasaa woyko saatiya hinte eronna gisho barkidi naagite." 
Matthew25:14 “Xoossaa kawotethay ba oosanchota xeegidi baw de7iyaba entaw sheedhidi oge baanaw keyida uraa daanees. 
Matthew25:15 Entaw huuphen huuphen enta wolqaa mela issuwas ichashu karxiite bira, issuwas nam7u karxiite bira qassi issuwas issi karxiite bira immidi ba ogiya bis." 
Matthew25:16 Ichashu karxiite bira ekida aylley ellesi bidi zal7idi, hara ichashu karxiite bira wodhisis." 
Matthew25:17 Hessadaka, qassi nam7u karxiite bira ekida aylley hara nam7u karxiite bira wodhisis." 
Matthew25:18 Shin issi karxiite bira ekidaysi bidi, olla bookidi, ba godaa miishiya moogis." 
Matthew25:19 “Daro wodepe guye he aylleta goday yidi, ba miishiya entara salla7is." 
Matthew25:20 Ichashu karxiite bira ekida aylley yidi, hara ichashu karxiite bira ehidi, ‘Ta godaw, neeni taw ichashu karxiite bira immadasa. Shin taani hara ichashu karxiite bira wodhisas’ yaagis." 
Matthew25:21 Iya goday, ‘Zamboy! Neeni lo77onne ammanthiya aylle; neeni guuthaban ammanetadasa. Taani nena darobaa bolla shuumana; haa gelada ne godaara ufayta’ yaagis." 
Matthew25:22 “Qassi nam7u karxiite bira ekidaysi yidi, ‘Ta godaw, neeni taw nam7u karxiite bira immadasa. Shin taani hara nam7u karxiite bira wodhisas’ yaagis." 
Matthew25:23 Iya goday, ‘Zamboy! Neeni lo77onne ammanthiya aylle; neeni guuthaban ammanetadasa. Taani nena darobaa bolla shuumana; haa gelada ne godaara ufayta’ yaagis." 
Matthew25:24 “Qassi issi karxiite bira ekidaysi yidi, ‘Ta godaw, neeni zeronna bessafe cakiyanne dharcona bessafe maxiya iita asi gideysa taani erayis." 
Matthew25:25 Hessa gisho, yayyada ne bira biittan moogas. Ne miishey haysish’ yaagis." 
Matthew25:26 “Iya goday zaaridi, ‘Ha iita azalla aylliyaw, taani zeronna bessafe cakeysanne dharcona bessafe maxiya asi gideysa eradasa." 
Matthew25:27 Yaatin, neeni ta miishiya banken wothidaba gidiyako, taani simmiya wode ta miishiya wodhera ekanaysa diggadasa." 
Matthew25:28 Hessa gisho, miishiya iyape ekidi, tammu karxiite biri de7eysas immite." 
Matthew25:29 Ayis giiko, de7iya ubbaas guzhetananne darana. Shin baynaysafe hari attoshin, he iyaw de7iya guuthiyaka eketana." 
Matthew25:30 Ha maaddonna aylliya kare dhumaa kessi yeggite. Yan iyaw yeehonne ache garcethi gidana’ yaagis. 
Matthew25:31 “Asa Na7ay, kiitancho ubbatara, ba bonchuwara yaa wode I ba boncho kawotetha araata bolla uttana." 
Matthew25:32 Biittan de7iya asi ubbay iya sinthe shiiqana. Henthanchoy dorsata deeshatape shaakeysada I he asaa nam7an shaakana. 
Matthew25:33 Qassi dorsata ushacha baggara deeshata haddirsa baggara essana. 
Matthew25:34 “Hessafe guye, kawoy ushacha baggara de7eysatako haysada yaagana: ‘Ta Aaway anjidaysato, ha yidi sa7i medhetiya wodepe doomidi hintew giigida kawotetha laattite." 
Matthew25:35 Ayis giiko, taani koshatin muzideta, saamotin ushshideta, eretonna imatha asi gidada bin mokideta," 
Matthew25:36 kallotin mayzideta, hargetin hargisideta, qashetin tana oychideta’ yaagana." 
Matthew25:37 “Hessafe guye, xilloti zaaridi, ‘Godaw, neeni koshatin awude be7idi muzido? Woyko neeni saamotin awude be7idi ushshido?" 
Matthew25:38 Neeni imathe gidada yin awude be7idi mokido? Woyko neeni kallotin awude mayzido? 
Matthew25:39 Neeni hargin woyko qashetin neeko bidi nena awude oychido?’ yaagana. 
Matthew25:40 Kawoy zaaridi, ‘Taani hintew tuma odayis; hinte tana kaalliya ha ubbaafe guuxeysas oothidaysa taw oothideta’ yaagana." 
Matthew25:41 “He wode haddirsa baggara de7eysatako, ‘Ha baadetidaysato, ta matape haakite. Xalahesinne iya kiitanchotas giigida merinaa taman biite." 
Matthew25:42 Ayis giiko, koshatin tana muzibeeketa; saamotin ushshibeeketa." 
Matthew25:43 Taani imathe gidada bin tana mokibeketa, kallotin mayzibeeketa, hargininne qashetin tana oychibeeketa’ yaagana." 
Matthew25:44 “He wode enti, ‘Godaw, neeni koshatin woyko saamotin woyko imathe gidada bin woyko kallotin woyko hargin woyko qashetin be7idi nena awude maaddonna ixido?’ yaagidi zaarana." 
Matthew25:45 “He wode kawoy zaaridi entako, ‘Taani hintew tuma odayis; hinte tana kaalliya ha ubbaafe guuxeysa maaddonna ixidaysi, tana maaddonna ixidaysa’ yaagana." 
Matthew25:46 Hessa gisho, he asati merinaa pirdas qassi xilloti merinaa de7uwas baana” yaagis." 
Matthew26:1 Yesuusi ha timirtiya ubbaa wursida wode ba tamaaretako," 
Matthew26:2 “Nam7u gallasape guye, Paasika Ba7aale bonchiya gallas gideysa ereeta. He gallas Asa Na7i masqale bolla kaqetanaw asa kushen aadhidi imetana” yaagis." 
Matthew26:3 He wode kahine halaqatinne cimati, Qayyaafa geetetiya kahine halaqaa keethan shiiqidi," 
Matthew26:4 asi eronna Yesuusa oykidi, wodhanaw maqetidosona." 
Matthew26:5 Shin enti, “Asay ooshshi kessonna mela gidi, Paasika bonchiya gallas hessa oothoko” yaagidosona." 
Matthew26:6 Yesuusi Bitaane kataman baro hargida Simoona son de7ees. 
Matthew26:7 Yesuusi imatuwa bolla de7ishin issi maccasiya albasxiroosa philqaaxe kumetha daro al7o shitto eka yada Yesuusa huuphen tigasu. 
Matthew26:8 Shin Yesuusa tamaareti hessa be7idi hanqetidi, “Ha shittoy coo iitey aybisee?" 
Matthew26:9 Ha shittoy al7o gaten bayzetidi, miishey manqotas imetanaw danda7etees” yaagidosona." 
Matthew26:10 Yesuusi enti geysa eridi, entako, “Ha maccasiw ayis waaysetii? Iya taw lo77oba oothasu." 
Matthew26:11 Manqoti ubba wode hintera daana. Shin taani hintera ubba wode de7ike. 
Matthew26:12 Iya ha shittuwa ta bolla tigidaysi tana mooganaw giigisanaasa. 
Matthew26:13 Taani hintew tuma odayis; biitta ubban ha Wongelay sabbaketiya bessan awunka, asay iyo hassayana mela iya oothidaysi odetana” yaagis." 
Matthew26:14 He wode tammanne nam7u Yesuusa tamaaretape issoy, Asqoroota Yihuda geeteteysi kahine halaqatako," 
Matthew26:15 bidi, “Taani hintew Yesuusa aatha immiko, hinte taw ay immanee?” yaagidi enta oychis. Enti zoretidi hastamu bira santime immidosona." 
Matthew26:16 Hessafe guye, Yihudi Yesuusa aathidi immanaw injetiya wode wochees." 
Matthew26:17 Uytha Ba7aale bonchiya koyro gallas, Yesuusa tamaareti iyako yidi, “Paasika bonchiya gallas neeni maana kathi nuuni awun giigisino?” yaagidosona." 
Matthew26:18 Yesuusi entako, “Kataman de7iya addiyako bidi, ‘Astamaarey, taw wodey gakida gisho, ta tamaaretara Paasika bonchiya gallasa ne son aathana yaagees’ yaagite” yaagis." 
Matthew26:19 Iya tamaareti Yesuusi bantana kiitidaysada oothidi, Paasika Ba7aale gallas maana kathaa giigisidosona." 
Matthew26:20 Sa7ay omarsiya wode, Yesuusi tammanne nam7u hawaaretara kathi maanaw uttis." 
Matthew26:21 Enti mishin, Yesuusi entako, “Taani hintew tuma odayis; hintefe issi uray tana aathidi immana” yaagis." 
Matthew26:22 Enti daro dagammidi, issoy issoy, “Godaw, tuma taneshsha?” gidi iya oychidosona." 
Matthew26:23 Yesuusi zaaridi, “Ba kushiya taara issife shaatiyan yeddeysi I tana aathidi immana." 
Matthew26:24 Asa Na7ay, Xoossaa qaalan iyaw xaafetidaysada hayqana. Shin Asa Na7aa aathidi immiya uraa ayye! He uray yeletonna attidaako iyaw lo77oshin” yaagis." 
Matthew26:25 Iya aathidi immanaw de7iya Yihudi zaaridi, “Astamaariyaw, neeni gey taneyee?” yaagis. Yesuusi zaaridi, “Neeni ne huuphen gadasa” yaagis." 
Matthew26:26 Enti mishin, Yesuusi uythaa ekidi Xoossaa galatis. He uythaa menthidi ba tamaaretas immidi, “He7ite, miite, haysi ta ashuwa” yaagis." 
Matthew26:27 Xuu7aa ekidi, Xoossaa galatis. Entaw immidi, “Ubbay haysafe uyite." 
Matthew26:28 Haysi daro asa nagara atotethas mela gukiya ta suuthaa. Ha suuthay Xoossay hintera geliya caaquwa mintheysa. 
Matthew26:29 Shin taani hintew odayis; taani ta Aawa kawotethan ooratha woyne ushsha hintera uyana gallasa gakanaw nam7antho ha woyne ushsha uyike” yaagis. 
Matthew26:30 Galata mazmure yexidaape guye, Shamaho zuma bidosona." 
Matthew26:31 He wode Yesuusi entako, “ ‘Xoossay henthanchuwa shocana dorsatika laaletana’ geetetidi Xoossa qaalan xaafetidaysa mela hachi qamma hinte ubbay tana aggidi baqatana." 
Matthew26:32 Shin taani hayqope dendidaape guye hintefe sinthatada Galila baana” yaagis. 
Matthew26:33 Phexroosi zaaridi, “Enti ubbay nena aggidi baqatikoka, taani nena aggike” yaagis." 
Matthew26:34 Yesuusi Phexroosako, “Taani new tuma odayis; hachi qamma kuttoy waassanaape sinthe neeni tana heedzu toho kaddana” yaagis." 
Matthew26:35 Phexroosi zaaridi, “Taani neera issife hayqope attishin, nena ubbaka kaddike” yaagis. Hanko iya tamaareti ubbayka hessada gidoosona." 
Matthew26:36 Yaatidi, Yesuusi ba tamaaretara Geetasemaane geetetiya bessaa bidi, entako, “Taani hini bada Xoossaa woossashana, hinte haysan uttite” yaagis." 
Matthew26:37 Phexroosanne Zabdiyoosa nayta nam7ata baara eki bidi daro azzanonne un7etethi doomis. 
Matthew26:38 Qassika entako, “Taani hayqos gathiya un7a un7etas. Haysan taara gam7itenne minnidi naagite” yaagis." 
Matthew26:39 Guuthi sinthe bidi biittan gufannidi, “Ta Aawaw, danda7etiyaba gidiko ha waaye xuu7aa taape digga. Shin ne sheney hanope attishin, ta sheney hanopo” yaagidi Xoossaa woossis." 
Matthew26:40 Yesuusi ba tamaaretako simmi yidi enti dhiskidashin demmis. Phexroosako, “Hinte issi saatekoka dhiskonna taara minnanaw danda7ibeeketii?" 
Matthew26:41 Paacen hinte gelonna mela barkidi naagitenne Xoossaa woossite. Hintew lo77o amoy de7ees, shin hinte daaburancho asi” yaagis." 
Matthew26:42 Yesuusi qassi nam7antho bidi, “Ta Aawaw, taani ha waaye xuu7ape uyonna de7ishe aadhanaw danda7etonnaba gidiko ne sheney hano” yaagidi Xoossaa woossis." 
Matthew26:43 Qassika simmi yaa wode iya tamaareta ayfiya dhiskoy goozin, zin7idashin demmis." 
Matthew26:44 Qassika enta aggidi, bidi kase qaala zaari heedzantho woossis." 
Matthew26:45 Hessafe guye, ba tamaaretako yidi, “Ha77i gakanaw dhisketinne shempetii? Heko, Asa Na7i, nagaranchota kushen aadhidi imetiya saatey gakis." 
Matthew26:46 Dendidi yedhite, tana aathidi immeysi haysish gakis” yaagis." 
Matthew26:47 Yesuusi buroo hessa haasayishin, tammanne nam7u tamaaretape issoy, Yihudi gaki wodhis. Kahine halaqatinne deriya cimati kiitida daro asati mashshenne xam7a oykidi iyara issife yidosona." 
Matthew26:48 Yesuusa aathidi immiya Yihudi he daro asaako, “Taani yeereysi hinte koyeysi iya, iya oykite” yaagidi malla immi wothis." 
Matthew26:49 Iiraka Yesuusako shiiqidi, “Astamaariyaw, saro de7ay” yaagidi iya yeeris." 
Matthew26:50 Yesuusi iyako, “Ta laggiyaw, neeni oothanaba ootha agga” yaagis. Hessafe guye, shiiqidi, Yesuusa oykidosona." 
Matthew26:51 Yesuusara de7eysatape issoy ba mashsha shoddidi kahine halaqaa aylliya shocidi, iya haythaa qanxidi yeggis." 
Matthew26:52 Shin Yesuusi, “Ne mashsha guye shoohuwan zaara. Ayis giiko, mashsha shoddiya ubbay mashshan hayqana." 
Matthew26:53 Ta, ta Aawa woossiyako daro mukulun taybetiya kiitanchota yeddanaw danda7onnaba new daanii?" 
Matthew26:54 Yaatin, Xoossaa qaalan hessada hananaw bessees geetetidaysi waanidi poletanee?” yaagis." 
Matthew26:55 He saatiyan, Yesuusi he shiiqida daro asaako, “Tana panga oothidi oykanaw mashshanne xam7a oykidi yidetii? Taani xoossa keethan gallas gallas tamaarsashe hintera de7iya wode tana oykibeeketa." 
Matthew26:56 Shin haysi ubbay hanidaysi nabeti Xoossaa qaalan xaafidaysi poletana melasa” yaagis. He wode iya tamaareti ubbay iya aggidi baqatidosona. 
Matthew26:57 Yesuusa oykidaysati kahine halaqaa Qayyaafako iya efidosona. Yan higge astamaaretinne biitta cimati shiiqidi de7oosona. 
Matthew26:58 Shin Phexroosi kahine halaqaa zabbaa gakanaw haahon iya kaallis. Iya wursethay shaaketana gakanaw zabbaa gelidi naageysatara uttis. 
Matthew26:59 Kahine halaqatinne shiiqida asa ubbay Yesuusa wodhanaw iya bolla wordo marka koydosona. 
Matthew26:60 Daroti yidi iya bolla wordo marka markatidosona, shin aykoka demmibookona. Guyepe nam7u asati yidi," 
Matthew26:61 “Ha uray, ‘Taani Xoossa Keetha laallada heedzu gallasan zaara keexanaw danda7ayis’ yaagis” yaagidosona." 
Matthew26:62 Kahineta halaqay dendi eqidi Yesuusako, “Haysati nena mootiya mootuwas neeni zaariyabay baawee?” yaagis." 
Matthew26:63 Shin Yesuusi si77i gis. Qassika kahine halaqay, “Taani nena de7o Xoossaa sunthan oykayis; neeni Xoossaa Na7aa Kiristoosa gidiko nuus oda” yaagis." 
Matthew26:64 Yesuusi zaaridi, “Neeni ne huuphenka gadasa. Shin taani hintew odayis; hizape guye, Asa Na7ay wolqaama Xoossaa ushacha baggan uttidashin, qassi salo shaarara yishin hinte be7ana” yaagis." 
Matthew26:65 He wode kahine halaqay daro yilotidi ba ma7uwa peedhidi, “Haysa be7ite Xoossaa cayis! Nuna hara marka ay koshshii? I ha77i cayidaysa hinte si7ideta." 
Matthew26:66 Hinte qofay aybee?” yaagis. Entika, “Iyaw hayqo bessees” yaagidi zaaridosona." 
Matthew26:67 Yaatin, enti iya som7on cuttidi dechidosona. Harati iya baqidi," 
Matthew26:68 “Kiristoosa! Nena dechiday oonee? Ane nuus oda” yaagidosona. 
Matthew26:69 Phexroosi zabban uttidashin, issi aylliya iyako yada, “Neenika Galila Yesuusara issife de7aasa” yaagasu." 
Matthew26:70 Shin I enta ubbaa sinthan he aylleko, “Neeni giyabay aybeko taani erike” yaagidi kaddis." 
Matthew26:71 Qassi bidi dirsaa pengeko gakishin hara aylliya iya be7ada, yan de7iya asaako, “Ha uray Naazirete Yesuusara de7ees” yaagasu." 
Matthew26:72 Phexroosi nam7antho caaqidi, “Taani he uraa erike!” yaagis." 
Matthew26:73 Guuthu gam7ishin, yan eqida asati Phexroosako yidi, “Neka tuma entara issife de7aasa; neeni ne odan eretasa” yaagidosona." 
Matthew26:74 Hessafe guye, Phexroosi, “Taani he uraa erike!” yaagidi, bana baadethinne caaqo doomis. He wode iiraka kuttoy waassi aggis." 
Matthew26:75 Yesuusi iyako, “Neeni kuttoy waassanaape sinthe tana heedzu toho kaddana” gidaysa Phexroosi akeekidi, kare keyidi iita yeeho yeekis." 
Matthew27:1 Wonta guura kahine halaqatinne biitta cimati ubbay Yesuusa wodhisanaw maqetidosona. 
Matthew27:2 Enti Yesuusa qachi efidi deriya haariya Philaxoosas aathidi immidosona. 
Matthew27:3 He wode Yesuusa oythida Yihudi, Philaxoosi Yesuusa bolla pirdidaysa be7idi, qiirotidi, he hastamu bira santime kahine halaqatasinne deriya cimatas guye zaaris." 
Matthew27:4 “Taani xillo asi hayqos aatha immada nagara oothas” yaagis. Shin enti, “Hessi nu meto gidenna ne meto” yaagidosona." 
Matthew27:5 Yihudi miishiya Xoossa Keethan yeggi aggidi enta matape bidi, suletidi hayqis." 
Matthew27:6 Kahine halaqati miishiya ekidi, “Ha miishey suutha miishe gidiya gisho, nuuni Xoossa Keethaa miishiyara gatheysi woga gidenna” yaagidosona." 
Matthew27:7 Hessafe guye, issife zoretidi, bete asi mooganaw mana biitta shammidosona." 
Matthew27:8 Hessa gisho, he gadey hachi gakanaw suutha biitta geetetidi xeegetees." 
Matthew27:9 Nabiya Ermiyaasi, “Isra7eele asay iyaw qanxanaw gammatida hastamu bira santime ekidosona." 
Matthew27:10 Goday tana kiitidaysada mana biitta shammanaw immidosona” gidaysi he wode poletis. 
Matthew27:11 Yesuusi deriya haariya Philaxoosa sinthe shiiqin, Philaxoosi iyako, “Neeni Ayhude kawo?” yaagidi oychis. Yesuusi zaaridi, “Ne gadasa” yaagis." 
Matthew27:12 Kahine halaqatinne biitta cimati iya mootiya wode entaw aybi zaaroka immibeenna. 
Matthew27:13 He wode Philaxoosi Yesuusako, “Haysati nena mootiya mootuwa ubbaa si7ikii?” yaagis." 
Matthew27:14 Yesuusi hari attoshin, issi qaalaka zaaronna ixin, deriya haareysi daro malaaletis." 
Matthew27:15 Deriya haareysi laythan laythan Paasika Ba7aale bonchiya gallasan, asay koyiya issi asi qashope birshiya wogi de7ees." 
Matthew27:16 He wode issi Barbaana Yesuusa geetetiya daro eretida iita asi qasho keethan de7ees. 
Matthew27:17 Hessa gisho, daro asay shiiqidi de7ishin Philaxoosi, “Taani hintew Barbaana billoye woyko Yesuusa geetetiya Kiristoosa billo?” yaagidi asaa oychis." 
Matthew27:18 I hessa giday enti qanaatidi Yesuusa oythidaysa eriya gishosa. 
Matthew27:19 Philaxoosi pirda keethan uttidashin, iya machiya, “Taani hachi qamma amuhon iyabaa daro waayetashe aqida gisho, he xillo uraa bolla aybibaaka oothofa” yaagada kiittasu." 
Matthew27:20 He wode kahine halaqati, “Barbaani bileto, Yesuusi hayqo” gidi Philaxoosa woossana mela asaa cimmidosona." 
Matthew27:21 Philaxoosi zaaridi, “Taani enta nam7aafe hintew oona billana mela koyeetii?” yaagidi oychis. Enti, “Barbaana billana mela koyoos” yaagidosona." 
Matthew27:22 Philaxoosi, “Yaatin, Yesuusa geetetiya Kiristoosa waato?” yaagidi enta oychis. Ubbay zaaridi, “Masqaliya bolla iya kaqa” yaagidosona." 
Matthew27:23 Philaxoosi asaako, “Ayis? I ay iitabaa oothidee?” yaagidi oychis. Shin asay kaseysafe aathidi, “Masqaliya bolla iya kaqa” gidi waassidosona." 
Matthew27:24 Ooshshi denthethofe hara aybibaaka oothanaw danda7etonaysa Philaxoosi be7idi, haathe ekidi, “Ha uraa hayquwan taani de7ike. Hessa oothey hintena” yaagidi asaa sinthan ba kushiya meecetis." 
Matthew27:25 Asa ubbay zaaridi, “Iya suuthaa gomey nunanne nu nayta gako” yaagidosona." 
Matthew27:26 Yaatin, Philaxoosi Barbaana entaw billidi, Yesuusa lisson garaafidi, masqaliya bolla kaqetidi hayqana mela entaw aathidi immis." 
Matthew27:27 Hessafe guye, Philaxoosa wotaadareti Yesuusa deriya haareysa soo eki efin, wotaadareti ubbay iya yuushuwan eqidosona." 
Matthew27:28 Iya afilaa qaari ekidi zo7o afila mayzidosona. 
Matthew27:29 Qassi aguntha kallacha giigisidi, iya huuphen wothidosona. Iya ushacha kushiyan mayre xam7a oythidi, iya sinthan gulbatidi, “Ayhude kawaw, mukulu laythi kawota!” yaagidi, iya bolla qelqisidosona." 
Matthew27:30 Iya bolla cuttidosona. He mayre xam7aa ekidi, iya huuphen shocidosona." 
Matthew27:31 Enti iya bolla qelqisidaape guye, zo7o afilaa iyape qaari ekidi, iya afilaa iya mayzidosona. Masqaliya bolla iya kaqanaw eki efidosona." 
Matthew27:32 Enti kare keyidi, issi Simoona geetetiya Qereena biitta asi demmidi, Yesuusa masqaliya wolqan toossidosona." 
Matthew27:33 Golgota geetetiya bessi gakidosona. “Golgota” guussay “Guugge bessi” guussu. 
Matthew27:34 Hessan enti ciiye walaketida woyne ushsha uyo gidi iyaw immidosona. Shin I hessa ganxi ekidi, uyonna ixis." 
Matthew27:35 Enti masqaliya bolla iya kaqidaysafe guye, iya afilaa shaakidi, saama yeggidi ekidosona." 
Matthew27:36 Hessafe guye, yan uttidi iya naagidosona." 
Matthew27:37 Qassi, “Haysi Ayhude Kawa Yesuusa” giya mooto xuufiya iya huuphe son wothidosona." 
Matthew27:38 Yesuusara he wode nam7u pangata issuwa iyape ushacha baggan, hankuwa iyape haddirsa baggara, masqaliya bolla kaqidosona." 
Matthew27:39 Ogiyara aadhiya asay Yesuusa boridi, iya bolla cuttishe," 
Matthew27:40 “Xoossa Keethaa laallada heedzu gallasa giddon keexeyso, nena ashsha. Neeni Xoossaa Na7a gidiko, ane masqaliya bollafe wodha” yaagidosona." 
Matthew27:41 Hessadaka, kahine halaqati, higge astamaaretinne biitta cimati issife Yesuusa bolla qelqisidosona. Haysada yaagidosona:" 
Matthew27:42 “Harata ashshis, shin bana ashshanaw danda7ibeenna. I Isra7eele kawo gidiko, ane masqaliya bollafe ha77i wodho, nuka iya ammanana." 
Matthew27:43 Xoossan I ammanetees, Xoossay iya ashshanaw koyko ane ashsho. Ayis giiko, I bana, ‘Taani Xoossaa Na7a’ gees” yaagidosona." 
Matthew27:44 Qassi hari attoshin, iyara masqaliya bolla kaqetida pangatika hessada gidi iya bolla qelqisidosona." 
Matthew27:45 Usupun saatepe bidi, uddufun saate gakanaw biitta ubbay dhumis." 
Matthew27:46 Uddufun saate gidiya wode Yesuusi, “Elohe, Elohe, lama sabaqtanii?” gidi gita waaso waassis. “Elohe, Elohe, lama sabaqtanii?” geysa birshethay “Ta Xoossaw, ta Xoossaw, tana ayis aggadii?” guussu." 
Matthew27:47 Hessan eqida asaape issoti issoti hessa si7idi, “Ha uray Eeliyaasa xeegees” yaagidosona." 
Matthew27:48 Iira entafe issoy woxi bidi, isponje ekidi, caala woyne ushsha kunthis. Hessa mayre xam7a xeeran wothidi ushshanaw iya doonako shiishis." 
Matthew27:49 Shin hankoti, “Naaga, Eeliyaasi iya ashshanaw yaaneko ane be7oos” yaagidosona." 
Matthew27:50 Yesuusi nam7antho gita waaso waassidi, hayqi aggis." 
Matthew27:51 He saaten xoossa keethan kaqetida magaraajoy qommofe duge gakanaw nam7u keyidi, peedheti wodhis. Biittay qaaxis, zaallayka phalqetis." 
Matthew27:52 Duufoti dooyetin Xoossaa asatape daroti hayqope dendidosona. 
Matthew27:53 Enti duufope keyidi, Yesuusi hayqope dendidaape guye, geeshsha katamaa bidosona; yan enti daro asaas bentidosona." 
Matthew27:54 Mato halaqaynne iyara Yesuusa naagiya wotaadareti biittay qaaxidaysanne hessan hanidaba be7ida wode daro yayyidi “Tuma haysi Xoossaa Na7aa” yaagidosona. 
Matthew27:55 Hessan daro maccasati, Galilape doomidi Yesuusa haggaazishe kaallidaysati haahon eqidi xeelloosona." 
Matthew27:56 Enta giddon Magdela Mayraama, Yayqoobanne Yoosefa aayiya Mayraamanne Zabdiyoosa machiya de7oosona." 
Matthew27:57 Sa7ay omarsiya wode Yoosefa geetetiya issi dure aday, Armaate katamape yis. I ba huuphenka Yesuusa kaalliya asi." 
Matthew27:58 Yoosefi Philaxoosako bidi, Yesuusa aha ekanaw woossis. Philaxoosi ahay Yoosefas imetana mela kiittis." 
Matthew27:59 Yesuusa aha ekidi, geeshsha moogo afilan xaaxis." 
Matthew27:60 Baw moogetanaw shuchafe woocida ooratha gongolon iya aha wothis. Qassi he gongoluwa doonan gita shuchaa gondorsi wothidi, aggidi bis." 
Matthew27:61 Magdela Mayraamanne hanko Mayraama he gongoluwako simmidi uttidosona. 
Matthew27:62 Wontethe Sambaata gallas, kahine halaqatinne Farsaaweti Philaxoosako yidi, haysada yaagidosona:" 
Matthew27:63 “Godaw, ha wordanchoy paxa de7ishe, ‘Taani heedzu gallasape guye, hayqope dendana’ yaagidaysi nuus hassayetis." 
Matthew27:64 Hessa gisho, I moogetida gongoluwa heedzu gallas gakanaw, minthi naagana mela kiittarki. Hessi hanonna ixiko, iya tamaareti bidi iya aha kaysi dhaysidi, ‘Hayqope dendis’ yaagidi asaas odiko nam7antho balesoy koyroysafe ubba haa iitana” yaagidosona." 
Matthew27:65 Philaxoosi entako, “Hintew naageysati de7oosona; bidi hintew danda7etida mela naagisite” yaagis." 
Matthew27:66 Hessa gisho, enti bidi duufoy boshetonna mela shuchaa bolla maatame wothidi wotaadaretan naagisidosona." 
Matthew28:1 Sambaati aadhin, wogga wode wonta guura, Magdela Mayraamanne hanko Mayraama Yesuusi moogetida gongoluwa be7anaw bidosona." 
Matthew28:2 Qoponna wolqaama biitta qaaxoy hanis. Godaa kiitanchoy salope wodhidi duufuwa doonan de7iya shuchaa gondorsidi iya bolla uttis. 
Matthew28:3 Iya malay wol7anthi daanees. Iya ma7oyka shachada boothi. 
Matthew28:4 Naageysati kiitanchuwa be7idi, yashshan kokoridi, hayqida asada hanidosona." 
Matthew28:5 Kiitanchoy maccasatako, “Hinte masqaliya bolla kaqetida Yesuusa koyeysa taani eriya gisho, yayyofite." 
Matthew28:6 I kase odidaysa mela hayqope dendis; haysan deenna. Haa yidi iya zin7isida bessaa be7ite. 
Matthew28:7 Hinte ha77i ellesi bidi, iya tamaaretas, ‘Yesuusi hayqope dendis. Qassi I hintefe sinthatidi Galila baana; hinte iya yan be7ana’ yaagidi odite. Taani hintew haysa odanaw yas” yaagis." 
Matthew28:8 Enti yayyishenne daro ufaytishe, duufuwa matape ellessidi bidi, iya tamaaretas odanaw woxidosona." 
Matthew28:9 Qoponna Yesuusi entara gahetidi entako, “Saroy hintew gido” yaagis. Enti iyako shiiqidi, iya tohuwa oykidi iyaw goyinnidosona." 
Matthew28:10 He wode Yesuusi entako, “Yayyofite; bidi ta tamaareti Galila baana mela entaw odite. Enti yan tana be7ana” yaagis." 
Matthew28:11 He maccasati bishin, duufuwa naagiya wotaadaretape baggati katamaa bidi, hanidaba ubbaa kahine halaqatas odidosona." 
Matthew28:12 Kahine halaqatinne cimati shiiqidi zoretidi, wotaadaretas daro miishe immidi," 
Matthew28:13 “ ‘Nuuni dhiskidashin iya tamaareti qamma yidi, iya aha kaysidosona’ yaagite." 
Matthew28:14 Ha odaa deriya haareysi si7iko, hessi hinte bala gidonnaysa nuuni iya odi ammanthana. Hintena aybika Hirgisopo” yaagidosona." 
Matthew28:15 Wotaaddareti miishiya ekidi, kiitetidaysada oothidosona. Ha oday Ayhude matan hachi gakanaw odetishe de7ees." 
Matthew28:16 Tammanne issi iya tamaareti Yesuusi bantana biite gida Galila Zumaa bolla Keyidosona. 
Matthew28:17 Yan enti iya be7ida wode iyaw goyinnidosona, shin entafe issoti issoti sidhidosona." 
Matthew28:18 Yesuusi entako shiiqidi, “Saloninne sa7an maati ubbay taw imetis." 
Matthew28:19 Hiza, hinte ubba bessi bidi, Aawa, Na7aa, Geeshsha Ayyaana sunthan ase ubbaa xammaqidi tana kaalleyisata oothite." 
Matthew28:20 Taani hintena kiittidaba ubbaa enti naagana mela enta tamaarsite. Taani wodiya wursethaa gakanaw ubba wode hintera de7ayis” yaagis. 
Mark1:1 Haysi Xoossa Na7a Yesuus Kiristoosa wongelaa doomethi. 
Mark1:2 Nabiya Isayaasi xaafida maxaafan Xoossay, “Heko, taani ta kiitanchuwa taani neepe sinthe yeddana. I ne ogiya giigisana." 
Mark1:3 Issoy mela biittan ba qaala dhoqu oothidi, ‘Godaa ogiya giigisite; I hemetana horoga iyaw suurisite gis’ ” yaagees." 
Mark1:4 Xammaqiya Yohaanisi asaa xammaqishe, “Hinte nagaraape simmidi xammaqetite; Xoossay hinte nagaraa atto gaana” yaagidi qaala odishe mela biittafe yis." 
Mark1:5 Yihuda biittan de7iya asa ubbaynne Yerusalaame katamaa asa ubbay Yohaanisako yoosona. Banta nagara paaxin, Yohaanisi enta Yordaanose Shaafan xammaqees." 
Mark1:6 Yohaanisi gimale ikisepe dadetida afila ma77ees. Ba xeessan dafo dancees; qassi boolenne degera eessi mees. 
Mark1:7 Yohaanisi qaala odishe, “Taape guyera daro minneysi yees. Hari attoshin, taani iya caammaa wodoruwa hokada billanaw bessike." 
Mark1:8 Taani hintena haathan xammaqayis, shin I hintena Geeshsha Ayyaanan xammaqana” yaagis." 
Mark1:9 Yesuusi he wode Galila biittan de7iya Naazirete katamaape yin, Yohaanisi Yordaanose Shaafan iya xammaqis." 
Mark1:10 Yesuusi haathaafe keyiya wode saloy dooyetin, Geeshsha Ayyaanay ba bolla holleda wodhishin be7is." 
Mark1:11 Qassi salope, “Taani dosiya ta na7ay nena; ta nenan ufaytayis” giya qaalay yis." 
Mark1:12 Iira Geeshsha Ayyaanay Yesuusa mela biitta efis. 
Mark1:13 Yesuusi mela biittan Xalahen paacetishe oytamu gallas gam7is. Do7atara de7is, shin kiitanchoti yidi iya maaddidosona." 
Mark1:14 Yohaanisi qashetidaape guye, Yesuusi Xoossaa kawotethaa Wongela odishe Galila biitta bis." 
Mark1:15 Yan, “Wodey gakis; Xoossaa kawotethay matatis. Hinte nagaraape simmidi, Wongelan ammanite” yaagis." 
Mark1:16 Yesuusi Galila Abbaa matara aadhishe, molo oykiya, Simoonanne iya ishaa Indiriyasa, banta gitiya abban yeggeyisata be7is." 
Mark1:17 Entako, “Tana kaallite; taani hintena ase oythu tamaarsana” yaagis." 
Mark1:18 Enti ellesidi banta gitiya yeggi aggidi Yesuusa kaallidosona. 
Mark1:19 Yesuusi guuthi sinthe bidi, nam7u ishata Zabdiyoosa nayta, Yayqoobanne Yohaanisa wogoluwa giddon banta gitiya giigiseyisata be7is." 
Mark1:20 I enta be7ida mela xeegis. Enti banta aawa Zabdiyoosa, iya oosanchotara wogoluwa giddon yeggi aggidi Yesuusa kaallidi bidosona." 
Mark1:21 Enti Qifirnahooma katamaa gelidosona. Sambaati gelida mela Yesuusi ellesidi ayhude woosa keethi gelidi tamaarso oykis. 
Mark1:22 Maatara de7iya asada tamaarsesipe attishin, higge astamaaretatho tamaarsonna gisho, asay iya timirtiyan malaaletidosona." 
Mark1:23 He wode tuna ayyaanay oykida issi uray ayhude woosa keethi gelidi ba qaala dhoqu oothidi," 
Mark1:24 “Naazirete Yesuusa, neeni nuupe ay koyay? Nuna dhaysanaw yadii? Neeni ooneko ta erayis; neeni Xoossaa Geeshshaa gidikii?” yaagis." 
Mark1:25 Yesuusi he tuna ayyaana, “Hayza, ha addiyafe keya” gidi kiittis." 
Mark1:26 Tuna ayyaanay uraa daferethidi, waassidi iyape keyis." 
Mark1:27 Asa ubbay malaaletidi, “Haysi aybee? Ha uray ba maatan hari attoshin tuna ayyaanataka kiittees. Enti iyaw kiitetoosona; haysi aybi ooratha timirtee?” gidi, banta giddon issoy issuwa oychidosona." 
Mark1:28 Yesuusa sunthay ellesidi Galila biittan de7iya heera ubban keyis. 
Mark1:29 Yesuusi ayhude woosa keethafe keyidi, Yayqoobaranne Yohaanisara Simoona soonne Indiriyasa soo bis." 
Mark1:30 Simoona mache aayiya qoxo misha hargada zin7idaaro Yesuusi yaa gakiya wode iyaw odidosona. 
Mark1:31 I iiko shiiqidi, I kushiya oykidi, iyo denthidi essis. Qoxoynne mishay aggin iya enta mokasu." 
Mark1:32 Hargida asa ubbaanne tuna ayyaanati oykida asa ubbaa omarsi away wullidaape guye, iyako ehidosona." 
Mark1:33 Kataman de7iya asa ubbay he keetha kare shiiqidosona. 
Mark1:34 Yesuusi dumma dumma hargen oyketida daro asaa pathidi, daro tuna ayyaanata kessis. I ooneko tuna ayyaanati erida gisho, enta odisonna diggis." 
Mark1:35 Yesuusi wonta guura dendidi, asi bayna bessi bidi, yan Xoossaa woossis." 
Mark1:36 Simooninne iyara de7eysati iya koyishe bidosona. 
Mark1:37 Enti iya demmidi, “Asa ubbay nena koyees” yaagidosona." 
Mark1:38 Yesuusi qassi enta, “He heeran de7iya hara katamata yedhite. Taani yiday Wongela odanaw gidiya gisho yanka qaala odanaw bessees” yaagis." 
Mark1:39 Ayhude woosa keethatan qaala odishenne tuna ayyaanata kessishe, Galila biitta ubban yuuyis." 
Mark1:40 Baroy oykida issi uray Yesuusako yidi, iya sinthan gulbatidi, “Neeni koyko tana geeshshanaw danda7aasa” yaagidi woossis." 
Mark1:41 Yesuusi iyaw qadhetidi, ba kushiya yeddidi iya bochidi, “Taani koyayis, geeyiya” yaagis." 
Mark1:42 Ellesidi baroy uraa yeddin uray paxis. 
Mark1:43 Yesuusi uraa minthi naagisidi kessi yeddis. 
Mark1:44 Yesuusi iya, “Nena era, haysa oodeska odopa. Shin bada ne asatethaa kahine bessa. Neeni ha77i geeshshi gididaysa asaa erisanaw, Musey kiitida yarshuwa yarsha” yaagis." 
Mark1:45 Shin uray bidi, guta ubban asa ubbaas odis. Hessa gisho, Yesuusi qonce keyidi, katama gelanaw danda7ibeenna. Shin asi bayna bessan gaxan de7is; qassi asay ubba bessafe iyako yoosona." 
Mark2:1 Guutha gallasape guye, Yesuusi Qifirnahooma simmidi, son de7ees giya oday si7etis." 
Mark2:2 Asaa keethay ekonna ixin, hari attoshin kareyka xuummana gakanaw daro asay shiiqin, Yesuusi qaala tamaarsis." 
Mark2:3 Oyddu asati issi gunda uraa tookidi iyako ehidosona. 
Mark2:4 Asay darida gisho, uraa Yesuusako shiishanaw entaw danda7etonna ixin, Yesuusi de7iya ginara keetha qaaridi, kaara qawuxidi uraa I zin7ida algara duge yeddidi Yesuusa sinthan wodhisidosona." 
Mark2:5 Yesuusi enta ammanuwa be7idi, he gunda uraa, “Ta na7aw, ne nagaray atto geetetis” yaagis." 
Mark2:6 Higge astamaaretape he bessan uttida issoti issoti banta wozanan," 
Mark2:7 “La ha uray haysa mela iitabaa Xoossaa bolla ayis odeetii? Xoossaa xalaalape attishin, hari ooni nagara atto gaanaw danda7ii?” gidi qopidosona." 
Mark2:8 Enti banta wozanan hessada qopidaysa Yesuusi ellesidi ba ayyaanan eridi, entako, “Hinte hinte wozanan ayis hessada qopeetii?" 
Mark2:9 Gunda uraa, ‘Ne nagaray atto geetetis’ geysi mateyee? Woyko, ‘Denda eqada ne algaa tookada ba’ geysi matee?" 
Mark2:10 Shin taw, Asa Na7aas, sa7a bolla nagara atto gaanaw maati de7eysa hinte erana mela” gidi he gunda uraako," 
Mark2:11 “Nena gayis, denda eqada ne algaa tookada ne soo ba” yaagis." 
Mark2:12 Uray ellesi dendi eqidi, ba algaa tookidi asa ubbay be7ishin bis. Asa ubbay malaaletidi, “Nuuni haysa mela malaalsiyaba be7i eroko” yaagidi Xoossaa galatidosona." 
Mark2:13 Yesuusi qassi Galila Abbaa doona simmi bidi, baako yida asa ubbaa tamaarsis." 
Mark2:14 Yaara aadhishe, Ilfiyoosa na7aa Leewe geeteteysi qaraxa qanxisiya bessan uttidaysa be7idi, “Tana kaalla” yaagis. Leewey dendi eqidi iya kaallis." 
Mark2:15 Yesuusi kathi maanaw Leewe son uttis. Iya kaalliya asay daro gidiya gisho, qaraxa qanxisiya daro asaynne nagaranchoti iyaranne iya tamaaretara issife uttidosona." 
Mark2:16 Higge astamaare gidida issi issi Farsaaweti Yesuusi nagaranchotaranne qaraxa qanxiseysatara kathi mishin be7idi, “I ayis nagaranchotaranne qaraxa qanxiseysatara kathi mii?” yaagidi, iya tamaareta oychidosona." 
Mark2:17 Yesuusi enti geysa si7idi, “Harganchotape attishin, paxatas aakime koshshenna. Taani nagaranchota xeeganaw yasipe attishin, xillota xeeganaw yabiike” yaagidi entaw zaaris." 
Mark2:18 Xammaqiya Yohaanisa tamaaretinne Farsaaweti xoomosona. Issi issi asati Yesuusako yidi, “Yohaanisa tamaaretinne Farsaaweta tamaareti xoomosona, shin ne tamaareti ayis xoomokonaa?” yaagidosona." 
Mark2:19 Yesuusi entako, “Yaaganuwa yida asati machiw ekeysi entara de7ishin, xoomanaw danda7onna? Machiw ekeysi entara de7ishin, xoomanaw danda7okona." 
Mark2:20 Shin machiw ekeysi enta matape eketana wodey yaana, enti he wode xoomana." 
Mark2:21 “Gal7a ma7o bolla ooratha carqe wothidi sikiya asi baawa. Wothidi sikiko, oorathay ceega ma7uwa daakees; daakethayka kaseysafe darees." 
Mark2:22 Qassi mal7anto woyne ceega ogoron qoliya asi baawa. Shin qoliko, he woyney ogoruwa daakees, bawuka gukees, ogoroyka iitees. Shin mal7anto woyney ooratha ogoron qoletees” yaagis." 
Mark2:23 Yesuusi issi Sambaata gallas banga gade giddora aadhishin, iya tamaareti iyara bishe banga tiya shirkidi moosona." 
Mark2:24 Farsaaweti Yesuusako, “Heko, ne tamaareti Sambaata gallas woga gidonnaba ayis oothonna?” yaagidosona." 
Mark2:25 Yesuusi entako, “Dawiti koshatidi, miyaba koyida wode, baara de7eysatara oothidaysa nabbabibeketii?" 
Mark2:26 Abyataari kahine halaqa gididi de7iya wode Dawiti Xoossa keethi gelidi, kahineta xalaali maanape attishin, oonika maanaw woga gidonnaysa Godaa sinthan wothida daabbuwa mis, baara de7eystaska immis” yaagis." 
Mark2:27 Qassika Yesuusi entako, “Sambaati asa na7a go77as medhetisipe attishin, asi Sambaatas medhetibeenna." 
Mark2:28 Hessa gisho, Asa Na7ay, hari attoshin Sambaataska Godaa” yaagis." 
Mark3:1 Yesuusi ayhude woosa keethi simmi gelis. Yan kushey gundida issi uray de7ees. 
Mark3:2 Issi issi asay Yesuusa mootanaw koyidi, kushey gundida uraa Sambaata gallas I pathikonne aggiko be7anaw koyidi minthidi naagoosona." 
Mark3:3 Yesuusi kushey gundida uraa, “Denda eqada haa sinthe ya” yaagis." 
Mark3:4 Hessafe guye, asaako, “Sambaata gallas lo77oba ootheysi wogeye iitabaa ootheysi wogee? Asa shempo ashoye woyko wodho?” yaagidi oychis. Shin asay si77i gis." 
Mark3:5 Yesuusi hanqetidi, enta yuushshi aathi xeellidi, enti odin si7onnayisata gidiya gisho, enta bolla daro azzanis. He addiyako, “Ne kushiya piddi ootha” yaagis. Uray piddi oothin iya kushey paxis." 
Mark3:6 Ellesidi Farsaaweti ayhude woosa keethafe kare keyidi, Yesuusa waati wodhaneko maqetanaw Herodiisa baggatara issi soo shiiqidosona." 
Mark3:7 Yesuusi ba tamaaretara Galila Abbaako bis. Galilapenne Yihudape yida daro asay iya kaallidosona. 
Mark3:8 Qassika Yerusalaamepe, Edomiyaasape, Yordaanose Shaafa pinthafe, Xiroosa katamaapenne Sidoona katamaape Yesuusi oothidaba si7idi, daro asay iyako yidosona." 
Mark3:9 Asaa darotethaafe dendoysan iya un7ethonna mela iya tamaareti wogolo iyaw giigisana mela kiittis. 
Mark3:10 Daro asaa I pathida gisho, hargiya asa ubbay iya bochanaw sugetoosona." 
Mark3:11 Tuna ayyaanay oykida asati iya be7ida wode iya sinthan kundidi, banta qaala dhoqu oothidi, “Neeni Xoossaa Na7aa gidikii?” yaagosona." 
Mark3:12 He tuna ayyaanati iya oonatetha oodeska qoncisonna mela entaw minthidi odis. 
Mark3:13 Yesuusi deriya bolla keyidi, ba koyida asata baako xeegis; entika iyako bidosona." 
Mark3:14 Enti baara daana melanne qaala tamaarsana mela tammanne nam7ata dooridi, enta, “Hawaareta” gidi sunthis." 
Mark3:15 Tuna ayyaanataka kessana mela entaw maata immis. 
Mark3:16 I doorida tammanne nam7ati haysata: Phexroosa yaagidi sunthida Simoona," 
Mark3:17 Bo7anerges (Dada Nayta) yaagidi sunthidaysata, Zabdiyoosa nayta Yayqoobanne Yayqooba ishaa Yohaanisa," 
Mark3:18 Indiriyasa, Filphoosa, Bartelemoosa, Maatosa, Toomasa, Ilfiyoosa na7a Yayqooba, Taadiyosa, ba biittas mishetiya Simoonanne," 
Mark3:19 Yesuusa aathidi immida Asqoroota Yihuda. 
Mark3:20 Hessafe guye, Yesuusi soo bis. Qassi daro asay shiiqin, inne iya tamaareti hari attoshin kathi maanawuka danda7ibookona." 
Mark3:21 Asay iya, “Gooyees” giya gisho, iya dabboti hessa si7idi iya ekanaw bidosona." 
Mark3:22 Higge astamaaretape issoti issoti Yerusalaamepe yidi, “Iya bolla Bi7eel-Zebuuli de7ees”, I, “Xalahey wolqan tuna ayyaanata kessees” yaagidi odetidosona." 
Mark3:23 Yesuusi asaa baako xeegidi leemiso odis. “Xalahey Xalahe waati kessanaw danda7ii? 
Mark3:24 Issi kawotethay ba giddon shaaketiko he kawotethay eqanaw danda7enna. 
Mark3:25 Hessadaka, issi keetha asay banta giddon shaaketiko dhayanape attishin, daanaw danda7okona." 
Mark3:26 Hiza, Xalahey baara kacetidi shaaketiko dhayope attishin, daanaw danda7enna." 
Mark3:27 “Shin koyrottidi wolqaama uraa qachonna de7ishe iya keetha gelidi, iya miishiya bonqanaw danda7iya asi baawa. Qachi simmidi iya keetha bonqanaw danda7ees." 
Mark3:28 “Taani hintew tuma odayis; Xoossay asa naytas nagara ubbaanne enti cayiya cashshe ubbaa atto gaana. 
Mark3:29 Shin Geeshsha Ayyaana bolla iitabaa odetiya oodeska merinaa nagara gidanaape attishin, Xoossay ubbaraka iya maarenna” yaagis." 
Mark3:30 Yesuusi hessa giday, issi issi asati, “Iya bolla tuna ayyaanay de7ees” yaagida gishosa." 
Mark3:31 Iya aayanne iya ishati yidi karen eqidi, iyako ase kiittidi iya xeegidosona." 
Mark3:32 Iya matan uttida daro asati, “Heko, ne aayeranne ne ishatara karen eqidi nena koyoosona” yaagidosona." 
Mark3:33 Yesuusi zaaridi, “Ta aayiya oonee? Qassi ta ishati oonantee?” yaagis." 
Mark3:34 Ba matan uttida asa yuushshi aathi xeellidi, “Heko, ta aayanne ta ishati haysata." 
Mark3:35 Xoossay sheniya oothiya ubbay ta isha, ta michonne ta aayo” yaagis." 
Mark4:1 Yesuusi zaaridi Galila Abbaa matan tamaarsees. Daro asay iya matan yuushuwan shiiqin, abban de7iya wogoluwa giddo gelidi uttis, asa ubbay Abbaa matan de7ees." 
Mark4:2 I enta darobaa leemison tamaarsis. Tamaarsishe haysada yaagis: 
Mark4:3 “Si7ite! Issi uray zerethi zeranaw keyis. 
Mark4:4 I zerishin, issi issi zerethay oge gaxan wodhis; kafoti yidi midosona." 
Mark4:5 Issi issi zerethay garsan shaalloy de7iya biitta bolla wodhis. Daro biitti bayna gisho, he zerethay ellesidi dolis." 
Mark4:6 Shin awi keyida wode shullis. Loythidi xapho yeddiboonna gisho, ellesi melis." 
Mark4:7 Issi issi zerethay aguntha giddon wodhis. Dolidaysa agunthay diccidi cuullida gisho ayfe ayfonna attis. 
Mark4:8 Issi issi zerethay aradda biittan wodhidi dolis. Diccidi issoy hastama, issoy usupun tamma issoy xeeta ayfis” yaagis." 
Mark4:9 “Si7iya haythi de7iya oonika si7o” yaagis. 
Mark4:10 Yesuusi odidaysa si7ida issi issi asatinne tammanne nam7u tamaareti Yesuusi barka de7ishin, iyako shiiqidi he leemisuwa birshethaa oychidosona." 
Mark4:11 Yesuusi entako haysada yaagis: “Hintew Xoossaa kawotethaa xuuraa eroy imetis. Shin haratas kawotethaafe karen de7eysatas ubbabay leemison odetees. 
Mark4:12 Gaasoyka, “ ‘Enti xeelloosona, shin demmokona. Si7oosona, shin akeekokona. Enti demmiyakonne akeekiyako, Xoossaako simmana ika enta maaranashin’ ” yaagis." 
Mark4:13 Yesuusi entako, “Ha leemisoy hintew gelennee? Yaatin, leemiso ubbaa hinte waati akeekanee?" 
Mark4:14 Zereysi Xoossaa qaala zerees. 
Mark4:15 Qaalay zeretiya wode oge gaxan wodhidaysati qaala si7idaysata. Shin Xalahey ellesidi, yidi enta wozanan zeretida qaala maxi diggees." 
Mark4:16 Hessadaka, garsan shaalloy de7iya biittan zeretidaysi qaala si7idi, ellesidi ufaysan ekeysa." 
Mark4:17 Shin iyaw mino xaphoy bayna gisho ha77issafe attishin, gam7okona. Guutha wodepe guye qaala gaason waayey woyko goodi gakiya wode ellesidi dhubetoosona." 
Mark4:18 Aguntha giddon zeretidaysi qaala si7eyisata. 
Mark4:19 Shin ha sa7a de7uwas hirgoy, duretetha dosoynne haraba amotteysi iya wozanan gelidi qaala cuulliya gisho ayfe ayfonna attis." 
Mark4:20 Shin aradda biittan zeretidaysati qaala si7idi ekeyisata. Enti issoy hastama, issoy usupun tamma issoy xeeta ayfis” yaagis." 
Mark4:21 Yesuusi gujidi, “Xompe ekidi, daachofe woyko algafe garsan wothiya asi de7ii? Dhoqa bessan wothenneyee?" 
Mark4:22 Hiza, qosetidabay ubbay qonce keyana; geemmidabay ubbay eretonna attenna." 
Mark4:23 Si7iya haythi de7iya oonika si7o” yaagis. 
Mark4:24 Qassi entako, “Hinte si7iyaba akeekidi si7ite! Xoossaa qaala hinte si7eysa mela I hintew akeeka immana. Ubbaka hintew darsidi immana." 
Mark4:25 Issibay de7iya uraas guji imetana, baynaysafe hari attoshin, iyaw de7iya he guuthiyaka eketana” yaagis." 
Mark4:26 Yesuusi zaaridi, “Xoossaa kawotethay ba gaden zerethi zeriya asa mela." 
Mark4:27 He uray qamma dhiskees; wonta dendees. I ba huuphen waaniyako eronna de7ishin he zerethay doleesinne diccees. 
Mark4:28 Biittay kathi barka immees. Koyro dolidi diccees, kaallidi ayfanaw gambuxees, wursethan kumetha ayfe ayfees." 
Mark4:29 Shin kathay gakiya wode uray ellesidi baacara geli aggees” yaagis. 
Mark4:30 Yesuusi, “Nuuni Xoossaa kawotethaa ay daanees gaanee? Woyko aybira leemisanee?" 
Mark4:31 Xoossaa kawotethay ayfe guutha mithi daanees. He mithaa ayfiya zeriya wode sa7an de7iya mitha ayfe ubbaafe guuxees. 
Mark4:32 Zerin dolidi atakilte ubbaafe gitatees; daro daashshi daayees. Kafoti iya tashiya bolla keexidi uttana gakanaw daayees” yaagis. 
Mark4:33 Yesuusi haysa mela daro leemison asay akeekanaw danda7eysa mela qaala odis. 
Mark4:34 Asaas leemisoy bayna odenna. Shin Yesuusi ba tamaareta xalaalara de7iya wode, entaw ubbaba birshidi odis." 
Mark4:35 He gallas sa7i omarsin, Yesuusi ba tamaaretako, “Abbaafe hefinthi pinnoos” yaagis." 
Mark4:36 Iya tamaareti daro asa yeggi aggidi, Yesuusi kase geli uttida wogoluwan gelidi Yesuusa bantara efidosona. Hara wogolotika yan de7oosona." 
Mark4:37 Wolqaama gotey dendidi, hobbey wogoluwa shocin, kumana gakanaw wogoluwa giddo haathi gelis." 
Mark4:38 He wode Yesuusi wogoluwan guye baggara borkotidi dhiskis. Iya tamaareti iya denthidi, “Astamaariyaw, nuuni dhayiya wode ne si77i gada xeellay?” yaagidosona." 
Mark4:39 Yaatin, I barkidi gotiya, “Si7i ga” gidi, abbaaka, “Wopu ga” gis. Goteyka si77i gin ubbabay wopu gis." 
Mark4:40 Yesuusi ba tamaaretako, “Ayis haysada babetii? Hintew ammanoy waanidi dhayidee?” yaagis." 
Mark4:41 Enti daro babidi banta giddon, “Haysi hari attoshin, goteynne abbay kiiteteysi oonee?” yaagidosona." 
Mark5:1 Yesuusinne iya tamaareti abba pinnidi, Gergesoone biitta gakidosona." 
Mark5:2 Yesuusi wogoluwape wodhiya wode tuna ayyaanay oykida issi uray duufope keyidi iyara gahetis. 
Mark5:3 He uray aqi pee7idi de7ey duufona. Iya oonika santhalaatan qachanaw danda7enna. 
Mark5:4 I daro toho duthaninne santhalaatan qashetidi de7ees. Shin santhalaata duuserethees, dutha mentherethees. Iya teqanaw danda7iya oonika baawa." 
Mark5:5 I qammanne gallas he duufuwaninne dere bolla waassees, ba asatethaa shuchan gaarees." 
Mark5:6 Yesuusa haahon be7ida wode woxi bidi iya sinthan gulbatis. 
Mark5:7 He uray ba qaala dhoqu oothidi, “Ubbaafe Bolla Xoossaa Na7aw Yesuusa, nenanne tana aybe gathey? Tana dhaysona mela taani nena Xoossaa sunthan woossayis” yaagis." 
Mark5:8 I hessa giday Yesuusi iya, “La ha tuna ayyaanaw, ha addiyafe keya” yaagida gishosa." 
Mark5:9 Yesuusi iyako, “Ne sunthay oonee?” yaagidi oychis. I, “Nuuni daro gidiya gisho, ta sunthay Leegiyona” yaagis." 
Mark5:10 Tuna ayyaanati bantana he biittafe kessi yeddonna mela Yesuusa minthidi woossidosona. 
Mark5:11 He deriya bolla daro guduntho wudey hemetees. 
Mark5:12 Tuna ayyaanati Yesuusako, “Nuna hini guduntho wudiyako yeddarki, entan bidi geloos” yaagidi woossidosona." 
Mark5:13 Yesuusi entako, “Biite” yaagis. Yaatin tuna ayyaanati addiyafe keyidi gudunthotan gelidosona. Nam7u mukulu gidiya guduntho wudey aafo doonara dirgidi bidi abban gelidi mitetidosona." 
Mark5:14 Guduntho wudiya heemmeysati baqati bidi hanidaba katamaninne gaxariyan odidosona. Yaatin asay hanidaba be7anaw keyidosona. 
Mark5:15 Asay Yesuusako yaa wode tuna ayyaanan oyketida uraa be7idosona. I ba wozanaako simmidi, ma7o ma7idi, yan uttidaysa be7ida wode ubbay yayyidosona." 
Mark5:16 Hessa be7ida asati tuna ayyaanati oykida uraa bollanne gudunthota bolla hanidaba ubbaa asaas odidosona. 
Mark5:17 Hessa gisho, asay banta biittafe Yesuusi baana mela woossidosona." 
Mark5:18 Yesuusi wogoluwan geliya wode kase tuna ayyaanay oykidi yeddida uray, Yesuusa kaallanaw iya woossis." 
Mark5:19 Shin Yesuusi ixidi iyako, “Ne soo simmada, Goday new ay mela gitaba oothidaakonne new ay mela keehidaako ne soo asaas oda” yaagis." 
Mark5:20 Uray bidi Tammu Katamaa geetetiya bessan yuuyidi, Yesuusi baw ay mela gitaba oothidaako odis. I odidaysa si7ida asa ubbay malaaletidosona." 
Mark5:21 Yesuusi simmidi, wogoluwan gelidi, abba pinnidaape guye daro asay abba gaxan iya yuushuwan shiiqidosona." 
Mark5:22 Iyaroosa geetetiya ayhude woosa keetha halaqatape issoy, Yesuusa be7ida wode iyako yidi iya tohuwa bolla" 
Mark5:23 kundidi, “Ta na7iya hargada hayqana hanawusu. Iya paxada de7ana mela yada ne kushiya I bolla wotharki” yaagidi Yesuusa minthidi woossis." 
Mark5:24 Yesuusi Iyaroosara bis. I bishin daro asay iya kaallidi un7ethidosona. 
Mark5:25 Tammanne nam7u laythi Ipe suuthi dhohiya issi maccasiya de7awusu. 
Mark5:26 Daro aakimeti iyo aakimidosona, shin iya paxa kaa7etasu. Iya ba miishiya ubbaa wursinka iw haa iitisipe attishin, aykoka maaddibeenna." 
Mark5:27 He maccasiya Yesuusaba si7ada, asaa kanthada Yesuusa guyera yada iya ma7uwa bochasu." 
Mark5:28 Iya, “Taani hari attoshin iya ma7uwa bochiyako paxana” gada qopasu." 
Mark5:29 Iipe goggiya suuthay iiraka eqi aggis. Iya ba waayiyape paxidaysa ba asatethan erasu. 
Mark5:30 Yesuusi baape wolqi keydaysa ba huuphen eridi, ellesidi daro asa giddon guye simmidi, “Ta ma7uwa bochiday oonee?” yaagis." 
Mark5:31 Iya tamaareti, “Asay nena sugeysa be7ashe, ‘Woygada tana oone bochiday yaagay?’ ” yaagidosona." 
Mark5:32 Yesuusi hessa ooni oothidaako be7anaw yuushshi aathi xeellis. 
Mark5:33 Shin maccasiya baw hanidaba erada, yashshan kokorashe yada Yesuusa sinthan gufannasu; qassi hanidaba ubbaa tumaa iyaw odasu." 
Mark5:34 Yaanin, Yesuusi iiko, “Ta naatte, nena ne ammanoy pathis, saron ba, ne waayapeka paxa” yaagis." 
Mark5:35 Yesuusi buroo hessa odishin, ayhude woosa keetha halaqaa soope kiitetida asati yidi, “Ne na7iya hayqasu, astamaariya ayis daabursay?” yaagidosona." 
Mark5:36 Shin Yesuusi enti geysa si7idi, ayhude woosa keetha halaqaako, “Ammano xalaala ammanape attishin, babofa” yaagis." 
Mark5:37 Yesuusi Phexroosape, Yayqoobapenne Yayqooba ishaa Yohaanisape hari oonika bana kaallonna mela diggis." 
Mark5:38 Enti ayhude woosa keetha halaqaa soo gakiya wode Yesuusi asay kaha dhayidi yeekeysanne zeleeleysa be7is. 
Mark5:39 Gelidi asaako, “Ayis kaha dhayidi yeeketii? Na7iya dhiskasupe attishin, hayqabuuku” yaagis." 
Mark5:40 Asay iya bolla miicis. Shin asa ubbaa kare kessidi, na7e aawa, aayiwunne heedzu tamaareta baara ekidi na7iya de7iyasuwa gelis." 
Mark5:41 Yesuusi na7e kushiya oykidi, “Xaalita, quumi” (Guutha naatte, nena gayis denda) yaagis." 
Mark5:42 Na7iya ellesa denda eqada hemetasu. Iya tammanne nam7u laytha na7a. Hessan asay daro malaaletidosona. 
Mark5:43 Yesuusi hessa enti oodeska odonna mela enta minthi kiittis. Enti iw miyaba immana mela odis. 
Mark6:1 Yesuusi yaape keyidi, ba tamaareta kaalethidi, ba katama Naazirete bis." 
Mark6:2 Sambaata gallas ayhude woosa keethan tamaarso oykis. I tamaarseysa si7ida daro asay malaaletidi, “Haysi ha ubbaa awupe demmidee? Ha cincatethaa I awupe ekidee? Ha malaatata oothiya maata I awupe demmidee?" 
Mark6:3 Haysi anaaxiya gidennee? Mayraami na7a, Yayqooba, Yoosa, Yihudanne Simoona ishaa gidenneyee? Iya micheti nuura haysan de7okonayee?” yaagidi, I giyaba ekonna ixidosona." 
Mark6:4 Yesuusi he asaako, “Nabey ba biittan, ba dabbotaninne ba soo asan bonchetenafe attishin, harata matan bonchetees” yaagis." 
Mark6:5 I he bessan ba kushiya guutha asaa bolla wothidi pathidaysafe attishin, hara malaatata oothanaw danda7ibeenna." 
Mark6:6 Asay ammanibona gisho daro malaaletis. Hessafe guye, Yesuusi he heeran de7iya gutatan asaa tamaarsees." 
Mark6:7 Yesuusi tammanne nam7u tamaareta baako xeegidi, nam7aa nam7aa gathidi kiittis. Entaw tuna ayyaanata kessiya wolqaa immis." 
Mark6:8 Enta, “Oge xam7afe attishin, kathi, karxiita, hinte kiisen miishe aybibaaka oykofite." 
Mark6:9 Hinte tohuwan caamma aathite, shin nam7u afila oykofite” yaagis." 
Mark6:10 Qassika, “Hintena asi mokida soo awunka gidin he bessaa yeddidi baana gakanaw he keethan gam7ite." 
Mark6:11 Hintena asi mokonasuwa woyko hinte odiyaba si7onnasuwa awun gidikoka, he biittan de7iya asaas marka gidana mela he bessaafe keyishe, hinte tohuwape baana pitite” yaagis." 
Mark6:12 Tammanne nam7u tamaareti bidi, asay banta nagaraape simmanaada qaala odidosona." 
Mark6:13 Enti asape daro tuna Ayyaanata kessidosona. Daro harganchota zayte tiyidi pathidosona. 
Mark6:14 Yesuusa sunthay ubba bessan keyida gisho, Kawoy Herodiisi iyabaa si7is. Issi issi asay, “Xammaqiya Yohaanisi hayqope dendis, hessa gisho ha malaatata oothey iya” yaagidosona." 
Mark6:15 Baggati, “Haysi Eeliyaasa gidennee?” yaagidosona. Harati qassi, “Haysi beni wode nabetape issuwa gidonna aggenna” yaagidosona." 
Mark6:16 Shin Herodiisi hessa si7ida wode, “Haysi taani qoodhiya qanxisida Xammaqiya Yohaanisa gidennee? I hayqope dendis” yaagis." 
Mark6:17 Herodiisi ba ishaa Filphoosa machiw Herodiyada ekida gisho I gaason Yohaanisa oythidi qashisis. 
Mark6:18 Yohaanisi Herodiisa, “Neeni ne ishaa machiw ekanaw bessenna” yaagis." 
Mark6:19 Herodiyada Yohaanisa ba ulon morkada iya wodhisanaw koyasu, shin danda7abuku." 
Mark6:20 Yohaanisi xillonne geeshsha asi gididaysa Herodiisi erida gisho, iyaw babidi loythi naagisees. Herodiisi Yohaanisi giyaba si7anaw dosikoka I giyaba si7iya wode daro dagammees." 
Mark6:21 Herodiisi ba yeletida gallasa bonchanaw deriya haareysatas, shaalaqatasinne Galilan de7iya gita asaas imato giigisis. Hessi Herodiyadas inje gallas gidis." 
Mark6:22 Herodiyada na7iya imathay moketiya bessaa gela durada, Herodiisanne iya imathata ufaysasu. Kawoy na7iw, “Ne koyaba ayba gidikoka tana oycha, taani new immana” yaagis." 
Mark6:23 Qassi iw caaqidi, “Neeni oychiyaba ayba gidikoka, taani new immana. Hari attoshin, ta kawotethaa baggaa gidikoka taani new immana” yaagis." 
Mark6:24 Na7iya kare keyada ba aayeko, “Ay imma go?” gada oychasu. I aayiya, “Xammaqiya Yohaanisa huuphiya imma ga” yaagasu." 
Mark6:25 Na7iya ellesada kawako bada, “Xammaqiya Yohaanisa huuphiya saanen wothada ha77i taw immana mela koyayis” yaagasu." 
Mark6:26 Yaanin, kawoy daro qiirotis, shin ba imathata gisho iw caaqida ba caaquwa menthanaw koybeenna." 
Mark6:27 Hessa gisho, ellesidi naageysa Yohaanisa huuphiya ehana mela kiittis. Naageysi qasho keethi bidi Yohaanisa qoodhiya qanxis." 
Mark6:28 He qanxetida huuphiya saanen wothi ehidi na7ees immis. Na7iya qassi ba aayes immasu. 
Mark6:29 Yohaanisa tamaareti hessa si7ida wode bidi iya aha eki efidi moogidosona. 
Mark6:30 Tammanne nam7u hawaareti simmi yidi enti oothidabaanne tamaarsidaba ubbaa Yesuusas odidosona. 
Mark6:31 Entako yaa asaynne biya asay darida gisho, Yesuusaranne iya tamaaretara, hari attoshin kathi maanawuka enta gathonna ixis. Yaanin, Yesuusi entako, “Nurka guuthi shempi ekanaw asi bayna bessi yedhite” yaagis." 
Mark6:32 Hessa gisho, enti bantarka wogolon gelidi asi bayna bessi bidosona." 
Mark6:33 Enti bishin daro asay enta be7idi eridosona. Yaatin, katama ubbaafe asay tohora woxi bidi enti biya bessaa entafe sinthe gakidosona." 
Mark6:34 Yesuusi wogoluwape wodhidi daro asa be7is. Asay heemmiya asi bayna dorsa mela gididaysa be7idi entaw qadhetidi enta darobaa tamaarsis. 
Mark6:35 Sa7ay omarsiya wode Yesuusa tamaareti iyako yidi, “Haysi bessay asi bayna bessi; ha77i sa7ika qammis." 
Mark6:36 Asay gutatanne katamata bidi bantaw miyaba shammana mela asa yedda” yaagidosona. 
Mark6:37 Shin Yesuusi zaaridi entako, “Asaas miyaba hinte immite” yaagis. Enti, “Nuuni bidi nam7u xeetu dinaaren uythu shammidi asaa muzana mela koyay?” yaagidi oychidosona." 
Mark6:38 Yesuusi entako, “Hintew aapun uythi de7ii? Ane bidi be7ite” yaagis. Enti be7idi, “Ichashu uythunne nam7u molo” yaagidosona." 
Mark6:39 Yesuusi ba tamaareta asa ubbaa cugan cugan shaakidi maatan utisana mela kiittis. 
Mark6:40 Asay xeetu cuganinne ishatamu cugan shaaketi shaaketi uttidosona. 
Mark6:41 Yesuusi ichashu uythaanne nam7u molota ekidi, pude salo xeellidi Xoossaa galatis. Uythaa menthidi asaas gishana mela ba tamaaretas immis. Qassi nam7u molota enta ubbaas shaakis." 
Mark6:42 Asa ubbay midi kallidosona. 
Mark6:43 Attida uytha tiifiyanne molota tiifiya, iya tamaareti tammanne nam7u gayta kumethi denthidosona." 
Mark6:44 Uythaa mida adde asaa tayboy ichashu mukulu. 
Mark6:45 Ellesidi Yesuusi ba tamaareti wogoluwan gelidi, abbaafe hefinthan de7iya Beetesayda baape sinthatidi baana mela kiittis. Shin baw asaa moyzanaw guye attis." 
Mark6:46 Asaa moyzidaape guye, Xoossaa woossanaw zuma bolla keyis." 
Mark6:47 Sa7ay qammiya wode wogoloy abba giddon de7ees, shin Yesuusi abbaafe gaxan barka de7ees." 
Mark6:48 Carkoy iya tamaaretako carkiya gisho, abba pidhoy waayseysa Yesuusi be7is. Wontimaathe sa7i geeyana haniya wode I abba bolla hemetishe entako yidi, enta yeggidi aadhanaw koyis." 
Mark6:49 Shin I abba bolla hemetishin, enti be7idi, entaw moytille daanin waassidosona." 
Mark6:50 Enti ubbay iya be7idi, yashshan kokoridosona. Shin Yesuusi ellesidi entako, “Tana, aykoy baawa; yayyofite” yaagis."
