Mark6:51 Yesuusi wogoluwan gelidi entara issife uttin carkoy wopu gis. Enti daro malaaletidosona. 
Mark6:52 Enta wozanay zel7umida gisho, enti uythabaa akeekibokona." 
Mark6:53 Enti abba pinnidi, Gensareexe biitta gakidi, wogoluwa gaxa shiishidi qachidosona." 
Mark6:54 Enti wogoluwape wodhiya wode asay ellesidi Yesuusa eridosona. 
Mark6:55 Enti heeran de7iya biitta ubban woxeretidi harganchota halan tookidi, “Yesuusi de7ees” gin si7ida bessaa ehidosona." 
Mark6:56 Asay I bida soo ubban, gaxariyan gidin, kataman, de7iya harganchota dabaaba efoosona. Harganchoti iya afilaa macaraa gidikoka bochana mela asay iya woossidosona. Bochida ubbay paxis." 
Mark7:1 Yerusalaamepe yida guutha Farsaawetinne higge astamaareti Yesuusa matan shiiqidosona. 
Mark7:2 Yesuusa tamaaretape issoti issoti geeyonna kushiyan, hessika kushe meecetonna kathi meyisata be7idosona." 
Mark7:3 Farsaawetinne Ayhude asa ubbay banta aawata wogaatho banta kushiya meecetonna mookonna. 
Mark7:4 Hessadaka, enti giyape shametidaba meecconna de7ishe mokonna. Qassi enti banta aawatape ekida hara daro wogi de7ees: hessika sineta, kereta, birata miishetanne arsa meecciya wogaa naageysa." 
Mark7:5 Farsaawetinne higge astamaareti Yesuusa, “Ne tamaareti ayis aawata wogaa menthidi banta kushiya meecetonna kathi moonna?” yaagidi oychidosona." 
Mark7:6 Yesuusi entako, “Isayaasi hintena cubbota, “ ‘Haysi asay tana ba inxarsa xalaalan bonchees, shin enta wozanay taape haahon de7ees." 
Mark7:7 Asi medhida wogaa Xoossaa higge daanisidi tamaarsiya gisho, enti taw mela goyinnoosona’ ” gidi xaafidaysi tuma." 
Mark7:8 “Hinte Xoossaa kiitaa aggidi asa wogaa minthidi naageta” yaagis. 
Mark7:9 Qassika Yesuusi, “Hinte hinte wogaa naagidi Xoossaa kiitaa yeggi agganaw lo77o oge demmideta." 
Mark7:10 Musey, ‘Ne aawanne ne aayiw boncha’, qassi ‘Ba aawanne ba aayiw cayeysi hayqanaw bessees’ yaagis." 
Mark7:11 Shin issi asi ba aawa woyko ba aayiw maaddanaysa aggidi, ‘Haysi taani Xoossas immida yarsho’ giiko," 
Mark7:12 I ba aawa woyko ba aayiw maaddonna mela ootheeta. 
Mark7:13 Hessadaka, hinte harata tamaarsida hinte wogan Xoossaa qaala kadhideta. Hessa mela hara darobaa ootheeta” yaagis." 
Mark7:14 Yesuusi daro asaa qassika baako xeegidi, “Ubbay taani odeysa si7itenne akeekite." 
Mark7:15 Asa wozanape keyaabay ase tuniseesipe attishin, karepe asa ulo gelidi ase tunisiyabay aybika baawa." 
Mark7:16 Si7iya haythi de7iya oonika si7o” yaagis. 
Mark7:17 Yesuusi daro asaa yeggi aggidi soo gelin iya tamaareti he leemisuwaba iya oychidosona. 
Mark7:18 I entako, “Hintewuka qassi gelibeennee? Karepe asan geliyabay aybika ase tunisanaw danda7onnaysa akeeketii?" 
Mark7:19 Ayis giiko, kathi asa ulo giddo gelidi kanthidi aadhesipe attishin, asa wozana giddo gelenna” yaagis. Hessan Yesuusi kathi ubbay geeshshi gideysa erisis." 
Mark7:20 Kaallidika, Yesuusi, “Asa tunisiyabay asa wozana giddofe keyaaba." 
Mark7:21 Asa wozana giddofe keyaabay iita qofa, laymatethi, kayso, ase wodho, laame," 
Mark7:22 iita amo, iitatethi, gene, qayxe, cimo, qanaate, cashshe, otoronne boozatethi." 
Mark7:23 Ha iitabay ubbayka asa wozana giddofe keyidi ase tunisees” yaagis. 
Mark7:24 Yesuusi yaape keyidi, Xiroosa katama matan de7iya biitta bis. I issi keethi gelidi yan de7eysa oonika erana mela koybeenna. Shin qosetidi gam7anaw danda7ibeenna." 
Mark7:25 Shin I guutha na7iw tuna ayyaanay oykida issi maccasiya Yesuusaba si7ada ellesa iyako yada iya tohuwa bolla kundasu. 
Mark7:26 Iya Ayhude maccasi giduku; iya yeletiday Sirofinqe biittana. Iya, ba na7epe tuna ayyaana kessana mela Yesuusa woossasu." 
Mark7:27 Shin Yesuusi zaaridi, “Nayti koyrottidi kathaa kallo; nayta kathaa ekidi kanatas yeggeysi lo77o gidenna” yaagis." 
Mark7:28 Maccasiya zaarada, “Ta Godaw hessi tuma, shin gayta matan de7iya kanati naytape wodhiya tiifiya moosona” yaagasu." 
Mark7:29 Yesuusi qassi iiko, “Ha ne qaala gisho, ne soo ba; tuna ayyaanay ne na7epe keyis” yaagis." 
Mark7:30 Maccasiya ba soo biya wode tuna ayyaanay iipe keyin hiixan zin7idaaro demmasu. 
Mark7:31 Yesuusi Xiroosa katamaape keyidi, Sidoonaranne Tammu Katamata geetetiya biittara kanthidi Galila Abbaako bis." 
Mark7:32 Asay tullenne waayidi odetiya asi Yesuusako ehidi, ba kushiya iya bolla wothana mela iya woossidosona." 
Mark7:33 Yesuusi barka he uraa daro asape gaxa kessidi, ba biradhiya iya haythan yeddis. Qassi cuchu cuttidi iya inxarsaa bochis." 
Mark7:34 Salo pude xeellidi, tooki shempidi, “Eftah” gis. Birshethayka “Dooyeta” guussu." 
Mark7:35 Uraa haythay ellesidi dooyetis, qashetida inxarsayka birshetis, uray geeshshidi odetis." 
Mark7:36 Yesuusi asaako, “Haysa oodeska odopite” yaagis. Shin I daro minthidi odopite gin, asay odaa yaa darsis." 
Mark7:37 Hessa si7ida asa ubbay daro malaaletidi, “Ubbabaa I loythi oothees. Hari attoshin, tulliya sissees, muumiya odisees” yaagidosona." 
Mark8:1 Guutha wodepe guye, daro asay Yesuusako shiiqidosona. Asaas miyabay dhayin Yesuusi ba tamaareta baako xeegidi," 
Mark8:2 “Ha asay taara heedzu gallas gakanaw gam7idi, aykoka miyaba demmiboonna gisho, tana asay qadhethees." 
Mark8:3 Taani asaa koshara soo yeddiko asay bishe ogen daaburidi kundana, bagga asay haahosoope yidosona” yaagis." 
Mark8:4 Yesuusa tamaareti zaaridi, “Ha mela biittan ha asa ubbaa muzanaw gidiya kathi demmanaw danda7ey oonee?” yaagidosona." 
Mark8:5 Yesuusi entako, “Hintew aapun uythi de7ii?” yaagidi oychis. Enti zaaridi, “Laapun uythi de7ees” yaagidosona." 
Mark8:6 Yesuusi asay sa7an uttana mela kiittis. Yaatidi, laapun uythaa ekidi Xoossaa galati simmidi he uythaa menthidi, asaas gishana mela ba tamaaretas immis. Iya tamaareti asaas gishidosona." 
Mark8:7 Entaw qassi guutha laafa moloti de7oosona. Yesuusi he molota gisho Xoossaa galatidi, asaas gishana mela ba tamaareta kiittis." 
Mark8:8 Asa ubbay midi kallidosona. Iya tamaareti attida tiifiya laapun gayta kumethi denthidosona. 
Mark8:9 Kathaa mida asaa tayboy oyddu mukulu gidana. Hessafe guye, Yesuusi asa yeddis." 
Mark8:10 I qassi ba tamaaretara ellesi wogolon gelidi Dalmanuuta biitta bis. 
Mark8:11 Farsaaweti yidi Yesuusa paacanaw koyidi, salope bantana malaata bessaana mela Yesuusara palama oykidosona." 
Mark8:12 Yesuusi tooki shempidi, “Ha wodiya asay ayis malaata koyii? Taani hintew tuma odayis; ha wodiya asaas ay malaatika imetenna” yaagis." 
Mark8:13 I enta yan yeggi aggidi zaari wogolon gelidi abbaafe hefinthi pinnis. 
Mark8:14 Iya tamaareti kathi efanaysa dogidosona; entaw wogoluwa giddon issi uythaafe hari baawa. 
Mark8:15 Yesuusi entako, “Hintena erite. Farsaaweta irshuwafenne Herodiisa irshuwafe naagetite” yaagidi kiittis." 
Mark8:16 Enti banta giddon, “I haysa gey nuus uythi bayna gishosa” yaagidosona." 
Mark8:17 Yesuusi enti geysa eridi entako, “Hintew uythi bayna gisho ayis odeteetii? Ha77ika ereketii? Woyko akeekeketii? Hinte wozanay doccidee?" 
Mark8:18 Hintew ayfey de7ishin be7eketii? Haythi de7ishin si7eketii? Hinte akeeketii? 
Mark8:19 Taani ichashu uythaa ichashu mukulu asaas bathida wode aapun gayta kumethi tiife denthidetii?” yaagis. Entika, “Tammanne nam7u gayta kumethi” yaagidosona." 
Mark8:20 “Hessadaka, taani laapun uythaa oyddu mukulu asaas bathida wode aapun gayta kumetha tiife denthidetii?” yaagis. Enti, “Laapun gayta kumethi denthida” yaagidosona." 
Mark8:21 Yaatin, “Ha77ika akeekibeketii?” yaagis." 
Mark8:22 Enti Beetesayda katamaa bidosona. Guutha asati qooqe uraa Yesuusako ehidi he uraa bochana mela iya woossidosona. 
Mark8:23 Yesuusi qooqe uraa kushiya oykidi katamaape gaxa kessis. Iya ayfiyan cuttidi ba kushiya iya bolla wothidi, “New aykoy bentii?” yaagidi oychis." 
Mark8:24 Uray dhoqu gidi xeellidi, “Taw asay bentees, shin asay hemetishe mithi daanees” yaagis." 
Mark8:25 Hessafe guye, Yesuusi zaaridi, uraa ayfiyan ba kushiya wothis. Uray loythi xeellis, iya ayfey paxis, ubbaba geeshshidi be7is." 
Mark8:26 Yesuusi addiyako, “Ne soo ba, shin gutaa gelopa” yaagidi kiittis." 
Mark8:27 Yesuusi ba tamaaretara Qisaare Filphoosa matan de7iya gutaa bis. Enti bishin oge bolla Yesuusi, “Tana asay oona goonna?” yaagidi ba tamaareta oychis." 
Mark8:28 Iya tamaareti, “Issi issi asay nena, ‘Xammaqiya Yohaanisa’ goosona; harati, ‘Eeliyaasa goosona’ qassi harati, ‘Nabetape issuwa’ goosona” yaagidosona." 
Mark8:29 Yesuusi entako, “Yaatin hinte tana oona geetii?” yaagidi oychis. Phexroosi, “Neeni Kiristoosa” yaagidi zaaris." 
Mark8:30 Yesuusi, “Tabaa oodeska odopite” yaagidi enta kiittis." 
Mark8:31 Yesuusi ba tamaaretako, “Asa Na7ay, daro meto ekanaw bessees; cimati, kahine halaqatinne higge astamaareti iya ixanaw bessees. Enti iya wodhanawunne I, heedzu gallasape guye, hayqope dendanaw bessees” yaagidi enta tamaarsis." 
Mark8:32 I hessa entaw geeshshidi odis. Phexroosi iya issi bagga zaaridi hanqetis. 
Mark8:33 Shin Yesuusi guye simmidi, ba tamaareta xeellidi, Phexroosa hanqetidi, “Ha Xalahey, taape haaka. Neeni asi dosiyaba qopaasape attishin, Xoossay dosiyaba qopaka” yaagis." 
Mark8:34 Qassika Yesuusi daro asaanne ba tamaareta baako xeegidi, “Tana kaallanaw koyiya oonika bana kaddo; ba masqaliya tookidi tana kaalo." 
Mark8:35 Ba shempuwa ashshanaw koyiya uray dhaysana. Shin ta gishonne Wongela gisho ba shempuwa dhaysiya uray ashshana. 
Mark8:36 Issi asi sa7an de7iya ubbaba baw shiishidi, ba shempuwa dhaysiko iya ay maaddanee?" 
Mark8:37 Issi asi ba shempuwa wozanaw ay immanaw danda7ii? 
Mark8:38 Xoossaa ammanonna ha iita yeletethan, issi asi tananinne ta qaalan yeellatiko, Asa Na7ay, qassi ba Aawa bonchon geeshsha kiitanchotara yaa wode iyan yeellatana” yaagis." 
Mark9:1 Yesuusi entako, “Taani hintew tuma odayis; Xoossaa kawotethay wolqara yeysa be7onna hayqonna issi issi asati haysan de7oosona” yaagis." 
Mark9:2 Yesuusi usupun gallasape guye, baara Phexroosa, Yayqoobanne Yohaanisa ekidi, enta xalaala gita zuma bolla kessidi enta sinthan laametis." 
Mark9:3 Iya ma7oyka phoolis; sa7an ma7o meecciya oonika geeshshanaw danda7onnaysa mela daro booxis. 
Mark9:4 He heedzu tamaareti, Eeliyaasinne Musey Yesuusara odetishin be7idosona." 
Mark9:5 Phexroosi Yesuusa, “Astamaariyaw, nuuni haysan de7eysi nuus lo77o; nu heedzu shaqarata issuwa new, issuwa Muses, qassi issuwa Eeliyaasas shaqarana” yaagis." 
Mark9:6 Iyaranne hankotara daro yayyida gisho Phexroosi ay giyakoka eribeenna. 
Mark9:7 Hessafe guye, shaaray yidi enta kammin shaarape, “Haysi ta dosiya, ta Na7aa, I geysa si7ite” giya qaalay yis." 
Mark9:8 Ellesidi enti yuushshi aathidi xeelliya wode, Yesuusape attishin, haraa oonaka banta matan be7ibookona." 
Mark9:9 Enti zumaa bollafe wodhishin, Yesuusi entako, “Asa Na7ay, hayqope dendana gakanaw, hinte be7idaba oodeska odopite” yaagidi kiittis." 
Mark9:10 I kiittidaysa enti, “Ero” gidi, “Ha hayqope dendo guussay woyguuse” gidi, banta giddon odetidosona." 
Mark9:11 Enti zaaridi, “Higge astamaareti, ‘Eeliyaasi koyrottidi yaanaw bessees’ ayis goonna?” yaagidi oychidosona." 
Mark9:12 Yesuusi zaaridi “Eeliyaasi koyrottidi yidi, ubbaba giigisees; yaatin, Geeshsha Maxaafan, ‘Asa Na7i daro waayetana; ixetana’ yaagidi aybis xaafetidee?" 
Mark9:13 Shin taani hintew odayis; Eeliyaasi yis; qassi iyabay Geeshsha Maxaafan xaafetidaysada, asay iya bolla banta koydaba oothidosona” yaagis." 
Mark9:14 Yesuusi, Phexroosi, Yayqoobinne Yohaanisi hanko iya tamaaretako simmidi yaa wode, daro asay enta yuushuwan eqidaysatanne higge astamaare gidida guutha asati entara palameysa be7idosona." 
Mark9:15 He daro asay Yesuusa be7ida wode malaaletidi, ellesidi iyako woxi yidi, iya sarothidosona." 
Mark9:16 Yesuusi ba tamaaretako, “Entara ay palameetii?” yaagidi oychis." 
Mark9:17 He daro asa giddofe issi uray zaaridi, “Astamaariyaw, ta na7aa bolla odetethi diggiya tuna ayyaanay de7iya gisho, iya neeko ekada yas." 
Mark9:18 Ha tuna ayyaanay iya oykiya wode ubban, iya shoci yeggees; iya doonara gopontoy yees; qassi ache garcisees; asatethayka minnees. Iyape ha tuna ayyaana kessana mela, ne tamaaretas odas, shin kessanaw danda7ibookona” yaagis." 
Mark9:19 Yesuusi zaaridi entako, “Ammanonna ha wodiya asaw! Taani hintera awude gakanaw daanee? Qassi hintena awude gakanaw danda7anee? Na7aa taako haa eki yiite” yaagis." 
Mark9:20 Enti na7aa iyako ehidosona; he tuna ayyaanay Yesuusa be7ida mela na7aa kokorsis; na7ay sa7an kundidi, doonara gopontoy toofu gishin gondoretis." 
Mark9:21 Yesuusi he na7aa aawako, “Haysi ne na7aa oykoosape ay mela wode gidanee?” yaagidi oychis. Na7aa aaway, “I guuthan de7ishin oykis." 
Mark9:22 Iya wodhanaw daro wode tamaninne haathan yeggees, shin ne danda7iko, nuus qadhetarki, nuna maaddarki” yaagis." 
Mark9:23 Yesuusi iya, “ ‘Neeni danda7iko gay?’ Ammaniya oodeska ubbabay danda7etees” yaagis." 
Mark9:24 Ellesidi na7aa aaway ba qaala dhoqu oothidi, “Taani ammanayis, shin guja ammananada tana maaddarki” yaagis." 
Mark9:25 Yesuusi asay dari dari beysa be7idi, tuna ayyaana, “Ha tullenne muume ayyaanaw, ha na7aape keya gada nena ta kiittayis; qassi nam7antho iyan gelopa” yaagis." 
Mark9:26 He tuna ayyaanay waassidi, na7aa daro kokorsidi, iyape keyis. Na7ay hayqida daanin, daro asay, “Na7ay hayqis” yaagidosona." 
Mark9:27 Shin Yesuusi na7aa kushiya oykidi denthin, na7ay dendi eqis." 
Mark9:28 Yesuusi soo gelidaysafe guye, iya tamaareti, “Nuuni he tuna ayyaana kessanaw ayis danda7ibooko?” yaagidi Yesuusa dumma oychidosona." 
Mark9:29 Yesuusi zaaridi, “Hessa melay woosapenne xoomape attishin, haraban keyanaw danda7enna” yaagis." 
Mark9:30 Enti he bessaafe dendidi, Galilara aadhidi bidosona; Yesuusi ba de7iyasuwa oonika erana mela koybeenna." 
Mark9:31 I ba tamaaretako, “Asa Na7aa, asi asas aathidi immananne wodhana; I heedzu gallasape guye, hayqope dendana” yaagidi tamaarsees." 
Mark9:32 Shin entaw I geysi gelibeenna; qassi iya oychanawuka yayyidosona. 
Mark9:33 Enti Qifirnahooma katamaa bidi soo gelidaysafe guye, Yesuusi entako, “Ogen ay odeteetii?” yaagidi oychis." 
Mark9:34 Shin enti, “Nu giddon ubbaafe aadhanay oonee?” yaagidi palamida gisho, si77i gidoosona." 
Mark9:35 Yesuusi uttidi, tammanne nam7u tamaareta xeegidi, “Oonika sinthe aadhanaw koyko, ubbaafe guye aadhidi, ubbaas aylle gidanaw bessees” yaagis." 
Mark9:36 Issi guutha na7aa ekidi, enta giddon essis; he guutha na7aa idimmidi entako," 
Mark9:37 “Haysa mela guutha naytape issuwa ta sunthan mokiya oonika tana mokees; qassi tana mokiya oonika tana kiittidaysaka mokeesipe attishin, ta xalaala mokenna” yaagis." 
Mark9:38 Yohaanisi, “Astamaariyaw, issi asi ne sunthan tuna Ayyaanata kessishin nuuni be7idi, nu bagga gidonna gisho, iya diggida” yaagis." 
Mark9:39 Shin Yesuusi, “Oonika ta sunthan Xoossay oothiya malaatata oothidi, ellesidi ta bolla iitabaa odetanaw danda7ey bayna gisho diggofite." 
Mark9:40 Nubaa ixonna uray nu bagga. 
Mark9:41 Taani hintew tuma odayis; hinte tabaa gidiya gisho, oonika hintew ta sunthan halo haathi uyanaw immikoka, ba woytuwa ekana." 
Mark9:42 “Tana ammaniya ha guuthatape issuwa balethiya oonika, gaacha wogga woxa ba qoodhen qachidi, abban wulliyako iyaw lo77o." 
Mark9:43 Ne kushey nena balethiko, qanxa hola. Neeni nam7u kushera to7onna gaanname taman yegeteysafe, duuxa kushera de7uwa geloy new lo77o." 
Mark9:44  
Mark9:45 Ne tohoy nena balethiko, qanxa hola. Neeni nam7u tohuwara gaanname taman yegeteysafe, wobbe gidada de7uwa geleysi new lo77o." 
Mark9:46  
Mark9:47 Ne ayfey nena balethiko, wooca kessa hola. Neeni nam7u ayfiyara gaanname taman yegeteysafe, issi ayfiyara Xoossaa kawotethaa geleysi new lo77o." 
Mark9:48 Yan enta miya guxuney hayqenna, tamayka to7enna." 
Mark9:49 “Yarshoy maxinen geeyeysa mela asi ubbay taman harqetana. 
Mark9:50 Maxiney lo77o, shin I mal7onna ixiko, zaaridi waati mal7ethanee? Hintenan maxiney de7o. Yaanidi, issoy issuwara sarotethan de7ite” yaagis." 
Mark10:1 Yesuusi hessafe dendidi, Yihuda biitta bidi Yordaanose Shaafa pinnis. Daro asay zaaridi iyako shiiqin, kaseysadaka he asaa tamaarsis." 
Mark10:2 Issi issi Farsaaweti paacanaw koyidi Yesuusa, “Issi asi ba machiw yeddana mela Muse higgey kiittii?” yaagidi iya oychidosona." 
Mark10:3 I zaaridi, “Musey hintena woygidi kiittidee?” yaagis." 
Mark10:4 Enti, “Musey, ‘Issi asi ba machees anjo worqate immidi yeddo’ gis” yaagidosona." 
Mark10:5 Yesuusi zaaridi, enta “Hinte odin si7onnayisata gidiya gisho, Musey ha kiitaa hintew xaafis." 
Mark10:6 Shin Xoossay koyro medhiya wode, addenne macca oothidi, enta medhis." 
Mark10:7 Hessa gisho, issi asi ba aawanne ba aayiw aggidi, ba machera issife de7ees." 
Mark10:8 Enti nam7ay issi ase gidoosona; hizape, enti issi ase gidoosonape attishin, nam7u asi gidokona." 
Mark10:9 Hessa gisho, Xoossay issife qachidaysa asi shaakofo” yaagis." 
Mark10:10 Enti soo simmida wode, iya tamaareti ha odabaa Yesuusa nam7antho oychidosona." 
Mark10:11 Yesuusi entako, “Ba machiw yeddidi hara ekiya oonika laymatees." 
Mark10:12 Qassi maccasiyaka ba azinaape keyada hara azina geliko laymatawusu” yaagis. 
Mark10:13 Yesuusi guutha nayta bolla ba kushiya wothana mela, issi issi asay nayta iyako ehoosona, shin iya tamaareti he asa hanqetidosona." 
Mark10:14 Yesuusi hessa be7idi, ba tamaareta hanqetidi; entako, “Guutha nayti taako yeysa diggofite; Xoossaa kawotethay haysata melasa." 
Mark10:15 Taani hintew tuma odayis; Xoossaa kawotethaa guutha na7ada ekonna uray oonika he kawotethaa ubbaraka gelenna” yaagis. 
Mark10:16 Guutha nayta idimmidi, ba kushiya enta issuwa issuwa bolla wothidi anjis." 
Mark10:17 Yesuusi baanaw keyda wode, issi uray woxi yidi, iya sinthan gulbatidi, “Keeha astamaariyaw, taani merinaa de7o laattanaw ay ootho?” yaagidi oychis." 
Mark10:18 Yesuusi, “Ayis tana keehaw gada xeegay? Xoossaa xalaalape attishin, hari keehi oonika baawa." 
Mark10:19 Xoossaa kiitaa, wodhopa; laymatopa; kaysotopa; wordo markatofa; inxarsan cimmofa; ne aawanne ne aayiw boncha yaageysa eraasa” yaagis." 
Mark10:20 Uray, “Astamaariyaw, taani hessa ubbaa na7atethafe doomada ha77i gakanaw naagayis” yaagis." 
Mark10:21 Yesuusi uraa tishshi oothi xeellidi dosis; “New issibay pacees; bada new de7iyaba ubbaa bayzada, he miishiya manqotas imma; neeni salon dure gidana. Yaata simmada tana kaalla” yaagis." 
Mark10:22 Shin uray hessa si7idi, I daro dure gidiya gisho, ba som7uwa kareethis, ufaytonna aggidi bis." 
Mark10:23 Yesuusi ba tamaareta yuushshi aathi xeellidi, “Dure asi Xoossaa kawotethaa gelanaysi waanidi metandeesha!” yaagis." 
Mark10:24 Iya tamaareti iya timirtiya si7idi malaaletidosona. Shin Yesuusi qassika entako, “Nayto, Xoossaa kawotethaa gelanaysi waanidi metandeesha!" 
Mark10:25 Dure asi Xoossaa kawotethaa gelanaysafe, gimaley narpe luhora aadheysi kawuyees” yaagis." 
Mark10:26 Iya tamaareti malaaletidi, “Yaatin, ooni attanee?” yaagidi, issoy issuwa oychidosona." 
Mark10:27 Yesuusi enta tishshi oothi xeellidi, “Haysi Xoossas danda7etesipe attishin, asas danda7etenna; Xoossas ubbabay danda7etees” yaagis." 
Mark10:28 Phexroosi Yesuusako, “Heko; nuuni nubaa ubbaa aggidi, nena kaallida” yaagis." 
Mark10:29 Yesuusi “Taani hintew tuma odayis; ta gishonne wongela gisho, keethe woyko ishata woyko micheta woyko aawa woyko aayo woyko machiw woyko nayta woyko gade aggida oonika," 
Mark10:30 ha77i ha wodiyan xeetu kushe keetha, ishata, micheta, aayeta, nayta, gadiya, goodetethara issife ekana. Sinthafe yaana wodiyanka merinaa de7uwa ekana." 
Mark10:31 Shin daroti ha77i dethan sinthe gididaysati guye gidana, qassi daroti ha77i guye gididaysati sinthe gidana” yaagis." 
Mark10:32 Yesuusaranne iya tamaaretara Yerusalaame bishin, Yesuusi ba tamaareta sinthan hemetees. Enti malaaletidosona. Iya kaalleysatika yayyidosona. Nam7antho, tammanne nam7u tamaareta gaxa kessidi, bana gakanaba dumma entaw haysada yaagidi odis." 
Mark10:33 “Heko, nuuni Yerusalaame ha77i keyoos. Yan Asa Na7ay, kahine halaqatasinne higge astamaaretas aadhidi imetana. Enti iya bolla hayqo pirdaa pirdana; qassi Ayhude gidonna deriyas iya aathidi immana." 
Mark10:34 Ayhude gidonna derey iya toochana, iya bolla cuttana, lisson garaafananne wodhana. I heedzu gallasape guye, hayqope dendana” yaagis." 
Mark10:35 Zabdiyoosa nayti Yayqoobinne Yohaanisi Yesuusako yidi, “Astamaariyaw, nuuni nena woossiyaba ubbaa nuus oothana mela koyoos” yaagidosona." 
Mark10:36 Yesuusi entako, “Taani hintew ay ootho?” yaagis." 
Mark10:37 Enti, “Neeni ne boncho kawotethan uttiya wode, nuupe issuwa ushacha baggara qassi issuwa haddirsa baggara utisarki” yaagidosona." 
Mark10:38 Shin Yesuusi entako, “Hinte ay woossiyako ereketa, ta uyanaw de7iya xuu7aa uyanaw danda7eetii? Qassi taani xammaqetanaw de7iya xinqatiya xammaqetanaw danda7eetii?” yaagis." 
Mark10:39 Enti zaaridi, “Ee danda7oos” yaagidosona. Yesuusi qassi, “Tumaka ta uyanaw de7iya xuu7aa hinte uyana, taani xammaqetanaw de7iya xinqatiya hinte xammaqetana." 
Mark10:40 Shin taape ushacha baggaranne haddirsa baggara uttanayisata dooranaw taw maati baawa, shin he bessay Xoossay immanaw giigisidi wothidaysatasa” yaagis." 
Mark10:41 Hanko tammu tamaareti hessa si7ida wode, Yayqoobanne Yohaanisa bolla hanqetidosona." 
Mark10:42 Yesuusi enta ubbaa baako xeegidi, “Ayhude gidonna asaa halaqati deriya haareyisata geetetidi xeegeteysanne haareysatas deriya bolla maati de7eysa hinte ereeta." 
Mark10:43 Shin hinte giddon hessa mela gidenna; hinte giddon gitatanaw koyey oonika hintew aylle gidanaw bessees. 
Mark10:44 Qassi hinte giddon ubbaafe bolla gidanaw koyey oonika hinte ubbaas aylle gidanaw bessees. 
Mark10:45 Hari attoshin, Asa Na7ayka, asaas oothanawunne darota wozanaw ba shempuwa aathidi immanaw ysipe attishin, asi iyaw oothana mela yibeenna” yaagis." 
Mark10:46 Enti Iyaarko katama bidosona. Yesuusi ba tamaaretaranne daro asaara Iyaarkofe keyishin, Ximoosa na7ay, qooqey, Barximoosa geeteteysi, oge gaxan woossishe uttis." 
Mark10:47 Barximoosi, yaara aadhey Naazirete Yesuusa gididaysa si7ida wode, ba qaala dhoqu oothidi, “Dawita na7aa Yesuusa, tana maararki!” yaagis." 
Mark10:48 Daro asay iya, “Hayza!” gidi hanqetidosona. Shin, I ba qaala kaseysafe daro dhoqu oothidi, “Dawita na7aw, tana maararki!” yaagis." 
Mark10:49 Yesuusi eqidi, “Iya haa xeegite” yaagis. Enti qooqiyako, “Aykoy baawa, denda eqa, nena xeegees” yaagidosona." 
Mark10:50 Qooqey ba ma7uwa holi yeggidi, gupi dendi eqidi, Yesuusako bis." 
Mark10:51 Yesuusi, “Taani new ay oothana mela koyay?” yaagis. Qooqey, “Astamaariyaw, ta xeellanaw koyayis” yaagis." 
Mark10:52 Yesuusi, “Ba, ne ammanoy nena pathis” yaagis. Iiraka iya ayfey xeellin, Yesuusa kaallis." 
Mark11:1 Enti Yerusalaame matishe, Shamaho zuma matan de7iya Beetefaagenne Bitaane katamata gakidosona. Yesuusi ba tamaaretape nam7ata sinthe kiittidi," 
Mark11:2 “Hintefe sinthan de7iya gutaa biite; yaa gelida mela oonika toggiboonna qashon de7iya hare mari hinte demmana, iya billidi, haa eki yiite." 
Mark11:3 Oonika hintena, ‘Haysa ayis oothetii?’ yaagidi oychiko, ‘Goday iya koyees, ellesidi haa yeddana’ yaagite” yaagis." 
Mark11:4 Enti bidi, hare mari kare bolla oge matan qashetidi de7eysa demmidi billidosona." 
Mark11:5 He bessan eqida issi issi asati entako, “Hare maraa waatanaw billeetii?” yaagidi oychidosona." 
Mark11:6 Iya tamaareti Yesuusi bantana kiittidaysa odin, asati yeddi aggidosona." 
Mark11:7 Enti hare maraa Yesuusako ehidi, banta ma7uwa iya zokon hiixin Yesuusi he hare maraa toggis." 
Mark11:8 Daro asay banta ma7uwa ogiyan hiixidosona; qassi harati mitha tashe tashidi, ogen hiixidosona." 
Mark11:9 Yesuusape sinthara hemetiya asaynne iya kaalliya asay banta qaala dhoqu oothidi, “Hosaana! Xoossay galatetto! Godaa sunthan yeysi anjetidaysa." 
Mark11:10 Godaa sunthan yaa nu aawa Dawita kawotethay anjetidaysa. Ubbaafe Bolla Salon de7iya Xoossay galatetto” yaagidosona. 
Mark11:11 Yesuusi Yerusalaame bidi, Xoossaa Keetha gelis. Qassi ubbaba yuuyi xeellidaape guye, sa7i qammiya gisho, tammanne nam7u tamaaretara Bitaane katama bis." 
Mark11:12 Wontetha gallas enti Bitaanepe keyidi bishin, Yesuusi koshatis." 
Mark11:13 Haahon issi balase mithiw haytha xalaala ma7a uttidaaro be7idi, I bolla ayfey bentiko gidi, be7anaw iiko bis, shin iiko I biya wode, haytha xalaalape attishin, issi ayfeka demmibeenna; ayis giiko, balasey ayfiya wodey gakibeenna." 
Mark11:14 Yesuusi he balasiw, “Hiza, asi neepe merinaw ayfe moopo” yaagis. Iya tamaareti I geysa si7idosona." 
Mark11:15 Enti Yerusalaame bidosona; Yesuusi Xoossa Keethi gelidi, yan bayzeysatanne shammeyisata kare goodo oykis; qassi miishe laammeyisata xarpheezanne holle bayzeyisata oydiya shiri yeggidi," 
Mark11:16 asi aybibaaka tookidi, xoossa keetha giddora aadhona mela diggis." 
Mark11:17 Yesuusi asaa haysada yaagidi tamaarsis: “Geeshsha Maxaafan, ‘Ta keethay asi ubbay Xoossaa woossiya keethi gidana’ geetetidi xaafetis. Shin hinte iya pangati qosetiya gongolo oothideta” yaagis." 
Mark11:18 Kahine halaqatinne higge astamaareti hessa si7idi, iya wodhanaw oge koydosona. Shin daro asay iya timirtiyan malaaletiya gisho, iyaw babidosona." 
Mark11:19 Sa7ay omarsiya wode Yesuusinne iya tamaareti katamaape gaxa keyidosona. 
Mark11:20 Enti wontetha gallas he ogiyara aadhishe, he balasiya xaphora melidaaro be7idosona." 
Mark11:21 Phexroosi akeekidi, “Astamaariyaw, Heko, neeni baaddida balasiya melasu” yaagis." 
Mark11:22 Yesuusi zaaridi, “Xoossaa ammanite." 
Mark11:23 Taani hintew tuma odayis; oonika ba wozanan sidhonna gidabay hananaysa ammanidi, ha zumaa, ‘Dendada abban kunda’ yaagiko iyaw hanana." 
Mark11:24 Hessa gisho, taani hintew odayis; Xoossaa hinte woossiyabanne oychiyaba ayba gidikoka ekidaada ammanite, hinte ekana." 
Mark11:25 Xoossaa woossanaw hinte eqiya wode, salon de7iya hinte Aaway hinte nagara atto gaana mela, oonika hintena naaqidabay de7iko, iyaw atto giite." 
Mark11:26 Shin asa nagara hinte atto goonna ixiko, salon de7iya hinte Aawayka hinte nagaraa hintew atto geenna” yaagis." 
Mark11:27 Enti zaaridi Yerusalaame bidosona. Yesuusi xoossa keethan hemetishin, kahine halaqati, higge astamaaretinne cimati iyako yidi," 
Mark11:28 “Neeni haysa oothanaw new ay maati de7ii? Woyko new ha maata immiday oonee?” yaagidosona. 
Mark11:29 Yesuusi zaaridi, “Ta hintena issiba oychana, taw odite. Ta qassi haysa ay maatan oothiyako, hintew odana." 
Mark11:30 Yohaanisa xinqatey Xoossafeye woyko asapee? Taw odite” yaagis. 
Mark11:31 Enti banta giddon palama doomidi, “Nuuni, ‘Xoossafe’ giiko, I nuuko, ‘Yaatin, Yohaanisi odidaysa ayis ammanibeketii?’ yaagana." 
Mark11:32 ‘Asape giiko’ asa ubbay Yohaanisi nabe gideysa eroosona.” Hessa gisho, asaas yayidosona." 
Mark11:33 Hessa gisho, enti Yesuusako, “Nuuni eroko” yaagidi zaaridosona. Yesuusi, “Taanika haysa ay maatan oothiyako, hintew odike” yaagis." 
Mark12:1 Yesuusi entaw leemison yaagidi odis: “Issi uray woyne tokidi, iya yuushon dirsi diris. Qassi he woyne gum7iya olla bookis. Iya naaganaw adussa shako shakis. Hessafe guye, kothe oothiya asas immidi, hara biitta bis." 
Mark12:2 Woyne ayfiya maxiya wodey gakin, bana gakiya gishuwa ehana mela, issi ba aylliya kothe aawatako yeddis." 
Mark12:3 Kothe aawati iya aylliya oykidi wadhidi, mela kushe yeddidosona." 
Mark12:4 Nam7antho hara aylle entako kiittin, enti he aylliya huuphiya qoo7idi kawushidi yeddidosona." 
Mark12:5 Woyne atakiltiya goday qassika hara aylle kiittis. He aylliya wodhidosona, qassi hara darota hessada oothidosona, issota issota wadhidi, harata wodhidosona." 
Mark12:6 “Woyne atakiltiya godaas kiittanaw ubbaafe wursethan I daro dosiya ba na7aa xalaali attis. I, ‘Enti ta na7aa bonchona aggokona’ gidi, ba na7aa entako kiittis." 
Mark12:7 “Shin kothe aawati banta giddon, ‘Laattanaysi haysa; yedhite iya wodhoos; iya laatay nubaa gidana!’ yaagidosona." 
Mark12:8 Na7aa oykidi wodhidi, iya aha woyne gadiya giddofe gaxa kessidi yeggidosona." 
Mark12:9 “Hiza, woyne gadiya goday waatanee? Yidi he kothe aawata wodhi ongidi, woyniya kothe oothiya hara asas immana." 
Mark12:10 “ ‘Gimbeysati boridi ixida shuchay godaa xaphuwa minthiya, ubbaafe aadhiya shuchu gidis. Haysi Goday oothidaba; qassi nu ayfiyaska malaalsiyaba’ yaageysa Geeshsha Maxaafape nabbabibeketii?” yaagis." 
Mark12:11  
Mark12:12 Kahine halaqati, higge astamaaretinne cimati Yesuusi he leemisuwa banta bolla leemisidaysa erida gisho, iya oykanaw koydosona, shin asaas yayyidi, aggidi bidosona." 
Mark12:13 Qassi iya odaape bala demmidi, iya oykana mela, Farsaawetapenne Herodiisa baggatape guutha asata iyako kiittidosona." 
Mark12:14 Enti iyako yidi, “Astamaariyaw, neeni tuma odeteysanne asape ase shaakonnaysa nuuni eroos. Neeni ase dummayaka; qassi Xoossaa ogiya tumatethan tamaarsaasa. Nuuni Roome biitta Kawa Qeesares giira giireysi wogeye woga gidennee? Giira giirane agganee?” yaagidosona." 
Mark12:15 Shin Yesuusi enta cubbotethaa eridi, “Tana ayis paacetii? Ane issi santime tana bessite” yaagis." 
Mark12:16 Enti iyaw ehidosona, “Ha misileynne sunthay oodebayee?” yaagidi enta oychis. Enti, “Roome Kawa Qeesareysa” yaagidosona." 
Mark12:17 Yesuusi zaaridi, “Yaatiko, Qeesareba Qeesares, Xoossaba Xoossaas immite” yaagin enti iyabaa malaaletidosona." 
Mark12:18 Hayqida asi dendenna giya Saduqaawetape issi issi asati Yesuusako yidi, haysada yaagidi, iya oychidosona." 
Mark12:19 “Astamaariyaw, Musey nuus higgiya xaafishe, ‘Macho ekida asi na7a yelonna hayqiko, he hayqidaysa ishay iya machiw ekidi, ba ishaas na7a yelanaw bessees’ yaagis." 
Mark12:20 Beni wode laapun ishati de7eysatape bayray macho ekidi, na7a yelonna hayqis." 
Mark12:21 Nam7anthoy iyo ekis, ika na7a yelonna hayqis. Heedzanthoyka hessada hanis." 
Mark12:22 Laapunatika hessatho iyo ekidi, na7a yelonna hayqidosona. Ubbaafe guye, qassi he maccasiya hayqasu." 
Mark12:23 Yaatin, laapunati iyo ekida gisho hayqida asay hayqope dendiya gallas, iya entafe awusas macho gidanee?” yaagidosona." 
Mark12:24 Yesuusi zaaridi, “Hinte baletey, Geeshsha Maxaafata woyko Xoossaa wolqaa eronna gishosa!" 
Mark12:25 Hayqida asay hayqope dendiya gallas, salon de7iya kiitanchota mela gidanaape attishin, ekokona; gelekona." 
Mark12:26 Shin hayqidaysata denduwaba gidiko, Muse maxaafan xaafetida xuugetiya tushiyaba odiya bessan, Xoossay Museko, ‘Taani, Abrahaame Xoossa, Yisaaqa Xoossa, Yayqooba Xoossa’ gidaysa nabbabibeketii?" 
Mark12:27 Hessa gisho, I, paxa de7eyisata Xoossaafe attishin, hayqidaysata Xoosse gidenna. Hinte daro balideta” yaagis." 
Mark12:28 Higge astamaaretape issoy enti palameysa shiiqidi si7is. Qassi Yesuusi entaw loythi zaaridaysa si7idi, “Kiita ubbaafe aadhiya kiitay awusee?” yaagidi Yesuusa oychis." 
Mark12:29 Yesuusi zaaridi, iya haysada yaagis: “Kiita ubbaafe aadhiya kiitaa si7ite; ‘Isra7eele asaw, Goday nu Xoossay issi Godaa." 
Mark12:30 Ne Godaa ne Xoossaa ne kumetha wozanape, ne kumetha shempuwafe, ne kumetha qofaape, ne kumetha wolqaafe dosa’ yaagees." 
Mark12:31 Qassi kiita ubbaafe aadhiya nam7antho kiitay haysa; ‘Ase ubbaa ne huuphiyada dosa’ yaageysa; haysatape aadhiya hara kiiti baawa” yaagis. 
Mark12:32 Higge astamaarey Yesuusako, “Astamaariyaw, tuma gadasa; neeni ‘Xoossay issi Xoossaa xalaala. Iyape attishin, hari baawa’ gidaysi tuma." 
Mark12:33 Xoossaa kumetha wozanape, kumetha qofaapenne kumetha wolqaafe doseysinne qassi ase ubbaa ba huuphiyada doseysi, xuussa yarshofenne hara yarsho ubbaafe aadhees” yaagis." 
Mark12:34 Yesuusi higge astamaariya zaaroy aadhida erancho asa zaaro gididaysa be7idi, “Neeni Xoossaa kawotethaafe haakabaaka” yaagis; hessafe guye, Yesuusa haraba oychanaw oonika minnibeenna." 
Mark12:35 Yesuusi xoossa keethan tamaarsishe, haysada yaagis: “Higge astamaareti Kiristoosa woygidi Dawita na7a goonna?" 
Mark12:36 Dawiti Geeshsha Ayyaanan kumidi, “ ‘Goday, ta Godaa, “Taani ne morketa ne tohoy yedhiyaso oothana gakanaw, haysan taape ushacha baggara utta” gis’ yaagis." 
Mark12:37 Dawiti ba huuphen Kiristoosa, ‘Godaa’ gidi xeegiko, yaatin, Kiristoosi waanidi, Dawita na7a gidi?” yaagis. Daro asay Yesuusi geysa ufaysan si7idosona." 
Mark12:38 Yesuusi tamaarsishe, haysada yaagis: “Higge astamaaretape naagetite; enti adussa ma7o ma7idi yuuyeysanne giyanka asay enta bonchidi sarotheysa dosoosona." 
Mark12:39 Enti ayhude woosa keethatan daro lo77iya oydiya dosoosona; qassi asi bantana mokiya bessan boncho bessi dosoosona. 
Mark12:40 Enti am7eta keethaa bonqidi, bantaw lo77o daananaw woosa adussosona; enti ubbaafe aadhiya pirdaa ekana” yaagis." 
Mark12:41 Yesuusi xoossa keethan muxaata yeggiya saaxiniya matan uttidi, asay ba miishiya he saaxiniyan yeggeysa be7is; daro dure asay daro miishiya he saaxiniyan yeggoosona." 
Mark12:42 Issi manqo am7iya yada, nam7u bakanna he saaxiniyan yeggasu." 
Mark12:43 Yesuusi ba tamaareta xeegidi, “Taani hintew tuma odayis; muxaata saaxiniyan yeggida asa ubbaafe ha manqo am7iya darsada yeggasu." 
Mark12:44 Ayis giiko, harati ubbay bantaw palahida miishiyape yeggidosona. Shin iya ba pacaape, baw de7iya aquwa kumethi immasu” yaagis." 
Mark13:1 Yesuusi Xoossa Keethafe keyishin, iya tamaaretape issoy, “Astamaariyaw, ha lo77o shuchaanne ha lo77o shucha keethaa be7ay!” yaagis." 
Mark13:2 Yesuusi zaaridi, “Ha gita shucha keethaa be7ay? Ha keethay shuchi shucha bolla gimbetida mela laaletonna attenna; issi shuchika attonna ubbay laaletana” yaagis." 
Mark13:3 Yesuusi Xoossa keethafe hini baggara Shamaho zuma bolla uttidashin, Phexroosi, Yayqoobi, Yohaanisinne Indiriyasi bantarka iyako yidi," 
Mark13:4 “Haysi awude hananeeko nuus oda; ha ubbay poletana wodiya erisiya malaatay aybee?” yaagidi oychidosona. 
Mark13:5 Yesuusi qassi entako haysada yaagidi odis. “Hintena oonika balethonna mela naagetite. 
Mark13:6 Daro asati ta sunthan, ‘Taani Kiristoosa’ yaagidi tamaarsishe yidi, daro asaa balethana." 
Mark13:7 Matan de7iya olaanne haahon de7iya ola wore hinte si7iya wode hirgofite. Hessa melabay hananaw bessees, shin wursethay buroona." 
Mark13:8 Issi biitta asay hara biitta asaara oletana; qassi issi kawotethay hara kawotethatara oletana; biitta qaaxoy ubba bessan hanana; koshay daana, shin hessi ubbay yelo iqethas zooke mela." 
Mark13:9 “Shin hinte, hinte huuphen naagetite. Ayis giiko, asi hintena oykidi, pirda keethas aathidi immana; qassi ayhude woosa keethatanka hintena lisson garaafana; deriya haareyisata sinthaninne kawota sinthan ta gisho hinte markatanaw eqana." 
Mark13:10 Wursethay gakanaape sinthe wongelay koyro dere ubbaas odetanaw bessees. 
Mark13:11 Enti hintena pirda keethi ehiya wodenne aathidi immiya wode, woygidi odaneko koyro hirgofite; he saatiyan Xoossay hintew immiyaba odite. Hintenan Geeshsha Ayyaanay odeteesipe attishin, hintena gideketa." 
Mark13:12 “Ishay ba ishaa, aaway ba na7aa wodhisana. Nayti bantana yelidaysata bolla dendidi, enta wodhisana." 
Mark13:13 Asa ubbay hintena ta suntha gisho ixana, shin wursethi gakanaw minniday attana." 
Mark13:14 “Shin dhayo tunatethay eqanaw bessonna bessan eqidashin hinte be7ana.” (Akeekiso: Hessi woy guusseko nabbabeysi akeeko!) “Yihuda biittan he wode de7eysati deriyako baqato. 
Mark13:15 Keetha huuphen de7iya urayka issiba ekanaw duge wodhidi, ba soo gelopo." 
Mark13:16 Gaden de7eysi ba ma7uwa ekanaw guye simmofo. 
Mark13:17 He wode qanthatida maccasatasinne dhanthiya maccasatas daro un7a gidana. 
Mark13:18 Shin haysi ubbay haniya wodey balgo gidonna mela, Xoossaa woossite." 
Mark13:19 Ayis giiko, Xoossay alamiya medhida wodiyape doomidi, ha77i gakanaw haniboonna metoynne sinthafeka hanonna metoy asa bolla he wode hanana." 
Mark13:20 Goday he gallasata taybuwa guuthonnaako, ase gidida oonika attenna. Shin I ba doorida asa gisho, he gallasata taybuwa guuthees." 
Mark13:21 “He wode oonika hintena, ‘Heko, Kiristoosi haysan de7ees woyko Kiristoosi hinin de7ees’ yaagiko, hessa ammanopite." 
Mark13:22 Wordancho Kiristoosatinne wordo nabeti dendidi bantaw danda7etiko, hari attoshin Xoossay dooridaysataka balethanaw malaatatanne malaalsiyabata bessaana." 
Mark13:23 Shin hinte naagetite; taani hintew ubbaba kasetada odas. 
Mark13:24 “Shin he wode he waayiyape guye, away dhumana; ageenay poo7uwa aggana." 
Mark13:25 Xoolintoti salope kundana; qassi salon de7iya wolqatika qaaxana. 
Mark13:26 He wode Asa Na7ay, gita wolqaranne bonchuwara shaara giddora yishin enti be7ana." 
Mark13:27 He wode I kiitanchota sa7a oyddu bagga kiittana; sa7a gaxape salo gaxa gakanaw, Xoossay doorida asaa shiishana." 
Mark13:28 “Leemisuwa balase mithafe akeekite; balasiya aaciya wodenne I haythay cil7iya wode, torchey matatidaysa hinte ereeta." 
Mark13:29 Hessadaka, hinte he ubbabay haneysa be7iya wode, I matidi penge gakidaysa erite." 
Mark13:30 Taani hintew tuma odayis; ha ubbabay hanana gakanaw haysan de7iya asa ubbay hayqenna. 
Mark13:31 Saloynne sa7i aadhana, shin ta qaalay aadhenna." 
Mark13:32 “Shin he gallasaanne he saatiya Aawa xalaalape attishin, hari attoshin salon de7iya kiitanchota gidin woyko Na7aa gidin oonika erey baawa." 
Mark13:33 He wodey awude gidaneeko, hinte eronna gisho, naagetitenne minnite." 
Mark13:34 Ta yuussay, ba keetha aggidi, oge biya asa mela. Uray ba aylletas huuphen huuphen ooso immidi enta ba oosuwa bolla aawa oothis; qassi naageysi minthidi naagana mela kiittis." 
Mark13:35 “Hessa gisho, minnite. Ayis giiko, goday omarsi gidin woyko giddi bilahe gidin woyko kutto waaso gidin woyko wonti maathe gidin awude yaaneko, hinte ereketa." 
Mark13:36 Hinte akeekona I yidi hinte dhiskidi de7ishin demmonna mela minnite. 
Mark13:37 Taani hintew odeysa asa ubbaas odayis; minnite” yaagis. 
Mark14:1 Paasika Ba7aale bonchiya gallasinne Uytha Ba7aale bonchiya gallasi gakanaw nam7u gallasi attis. Kahine halaqatinne higge astamaareti asi eronna Yesuusa oykidi wodhiya oge koyoosona. 
Mark14:2 “Asay ooshshi kessonna mela Paasika bonchiya gallasan hessa oothoko” yaagidosona. 
Mark14:3 Yesuusi Bitaane kataman baro hargancho gidida Simoona son gibira bolla uttidashin, issi maccasiya albasxiroosa shuchafe oosetida philqaaxe kumetha nardoose geetetiya daro al7o shitto ekada yasu. He philqaaxe menthada shittuwa Yesuusa huuphen tigasu." 
Mark14:4 He bessan de7iya asape issoy issoy hanqetidi, “Ha shittoy mela coo iitey aybisee?" 
Mark14:5 Ha shittuwa heedzu xeetu dinaaren bayzidi, miishiya manqotas immanaw danda7etees” yaagidi banta giddon odetidosona. Yaatidi, he maccasiw daro boridosona." 
Mark14:6 Shin Yesuusi “Ha maccasiw aykoka goopite; iyo ayis waaysetii? Iya taw lo77oba oothasu. 
Mark14:7 Manqoti ubba wode hintera de7oosona. Hinte koyida wode awudeka hinte enta maaddanaw danda7eeta, shin taani ubba wode hintera de7ike." 
Mark14:8 Iya ba danda7idaysa oothasu; qassi tana moogoos giigisanaw kasetada shitto tiyasu. 
Mark14:9 Taani hintew tuma odayis; sa7a ubban wongela odiya bessa awunka, asay iyo akeekana mela ha iya oothidaysi odetana” yaagis." 
Mark14:10 Tammanne nam7u tamaaretape issoy Asqoroota Yihuda geeteteysi Yesuusa kahine halaqatas aathidi immanaw entako bis. 
Mark14:11 Enti hessa si7ida wode ufaytidi, “Nuuni new miishe immana” yaagidosona; Yihudi Yesuusa aathidi immanaw inje wode koyees." 
Mark14:12 Uytha miya gallas bonchiya koyro gallas, Paasika katha maanaw maraze shukiya wode, Yesuusa tamaareti iyako, “Paasika bonchiya gallas neeni maana katha nuuni aw bidi giigisino?” gidi oychidosona." 
Mark14:13 Yesuusi ba tamaaretape nam7ata haysada yaagidi kiittis: “Katamaa biite; hinte bishin, otora haathe tookida issi uray hintera gahetana; iya kaallite." 
Mark14:14 I bidi geliya keetha godaa, ‘Astamaarey neeko, “Taani ta tamaaretara Paasika maanaw imatha kifiley awunee?” yaagees’ yaagite." 
Mark14:15 Goday hintena pooqiya bolla de7iya giigidi uttida dalga kifile bessaana; hessan giigisite” yaagis. 
Mark14:16 He nam7u tamaareti keyidi, katama bidosona; Yesuusi entaw odidaysada demmidi, Paasika kathi giigisidosona." 
Mark14:17 Sa7ay omarsiya wode Yesuusi tammanne nam7u tamaaretara yaa bis. 
Mark14:18 Enti uttidi kathi mishin, Yesuusi entako, “Taani hintew tuma odayis; hintefe issoy taara meysi, tana aathidi immana” yaagis." 
Mark14:19 Iya tamaareti dagammidi, banta huuphen huuphen, “Tuma taneshsha?” yaagidi iya oychidosona." 
Mark14:20 Yesuusi zaaridi, “He uray, hinte tammanne nam7atape issuwa; I taara issife tushanaw ba uytha shaaten yeddeysa." 
Mark14:21 Asa Na7ay, Geeshsha Maxaafay hayqana gidaysada hayqana, shin Asa Na7a, aathidi immiya ura ayye! He uray yeletonna attidaako iyaw lo77oshin” yaagis." 
Mark14:22 Enti mishin, Yesuusi uythaa ekidi, Xoossaa galatis; he uytha menthidi, ba tamaaretas immishe, “He7ite, haysi ta ashuwa” yaagis." 
Mark14:23 Xuu7a ekidi, Xoossaa galatidi, entaw immin ubbayka he xuu7ape uyidosona." 
Mark14:24 Yesuusi, “Haysi ooratha caaquwan daro asaa gisho gukiya ta suutha." 
Mark14:25 Taani hintew tuma odayis; taani Xoossaa kawotethan ooratha woyne uyana gallasi gakanaw zaarada ha woyniyape uyike” yaagis. 
Mark14:26 Mazmure yexidaape guye, Shamaho zuma bolla bidosona." 
Mark14:27 Yesuusi entako, “Hinte ubbay tana yeggi aggidi baqatana; Geeshsha Maxaafay, “ ‘Xoossay wude aawa shocana, dorsati ubbay laaletana’ yaagees." 
Mark14:28 Shin taani hayqope dendidaape guye, hintefe sinthatada Galila baana” yaagis." 
Mark14:29 Phexroosi zaaridi, “Enti ubbay nena yeggi aggidi baqatikoka, ta nena aggike” yaagis." 
Mark14:30 Yesuusi Phexroosako, “Taani new tuma odayis; hachi qamma kuttoy nam7u toho waassanaape sinthe neeni tana heedzu toho kaddana” yaagis." 
Mark14:31 Shin Phexroosi kaseysafe minthidi, “Taani hari attoshin, neera issife hayqiyakoka, nena kaddike” yaagis. Qassi harati ubbatika hessada gidoosona." 
Mark14:32 Geetasemaane geetetiya bessaa bidosona; Yesuusi ba tamaaretako, “Taani Xoossaa woossada simmana gakanaw hinte haysan uttishite” yaagis." 
Mark14:33 Yesuusi Phexroosa, Yayqoobanne Yohaanisa baara ekidi bis; daro waayetisinne un7etis." 
Mark14:34 Qassi entako, “Taani hayqana gakanaw azzanas, haysan gam7ishite; dhiskofite” yaagis." 
Mark14:35 Guuthi sinthe shiiqidi, sa7an gufannidi, danda7etiyaba gidiko, he waayiya saatey baape aadhana mela, Xoossa woossis." 
Mark14:36 Qassi, “Abba, ta Aawaw, ubbabay new danda7etees, ha waaye xuu7aa taape digga. Shin ne sheney hanope attishin, ta sheney hanopo” yaagis." 
Mark14:37 Yesuusi ba tamaaretako simmi yidi, enti dhiskidashin demmidi, Phexroosako, “Simoona, dhiskadii? Neeni issi saateka barkada naaganaw danda7abikii?" 
Mark14:38 Paacen hinte gelonna mela barkidi naagitenne Xoossaa woossite. Hintew lo77o amoy de7ees, shin hinte daaburancho asi” yaagis." 
Mark14:39 Qassika bidi kaseysada Xoossa woossis. 
Mark14:40 Ba tamaaretako guye simmidi yaa wode, dhiskidashin demmis. Enta ayfiya dhiskoy goozi wothida gisho, iyako ay odetiyakoka erokona." 
Mark14:41 Heedzantho entako yidi, “Ha77i gakanawuka dhisketinne shempetii? Hiza, gidana; saatey gakis; be7ite! Asa Na7ay, nagarancho asaas aadhidi imetana wodey gakis." 
Mark14:42 Dendidi yedhite; be7ite, tana aathidi immanaysi gakis” yaagis." 
Mark14:43 Yesuusi hessa buroo odishin, tammanne nam7u iya tamaaretape issoy, Yihudi, ellesidi gaki wodhis. Qassi kahine halaqati, higge astamaaretinne cimati kiittin, mashshanne xam7a oykida daro asay iyara issife yidosona." 
Mark14:44 Yesuusa aathidi immanaysi he daro asaas, “Taani yeeriya uray iya; iya oykidi, loythi naagidi efite” yaagidi malla odi wothis." 
Mark14:45 Yihudi gaki wodhida mela Yesuusako shiiqidi, “Astamaariyaw” yaagidi Yesuusa yeeri ekis." 
Mark14:46 He daro asay Yesuusa oykidosona. 
Mark14:47 Shin matan eqidaysatape issoy ba mashsha shoddidi kahine halaqaa aylliya shocidi, iya haytha qanxidi holis." 
Mark14:48 Yesuusi zaaridi, he shiiqida daro asaako, “Tana panga kessidi, panga oykeysada oykanaw mashshenne xam7a oykidi yidetii?" 
Mark14:49 Taani xoossa keethan tamaarsashe, gallas gallas hintera de7iya wode tana oykibeeketa, shin Geeshsha Maxaafay gidaysi poletanaw bessees” yaagis." 
Mark14:50 Iya tamaareti ubbay iya yeggi aggidi baqatidosona. 
Mark14:51 Laxana xalaala ma7ida issi na7atetha uray Yesuusa kaalleysa asay oykis. 
Mark14:52 Shin he uray laxana yeggi aggidi, xire kallo baqatis." 
Mark14:53 Asay Yesuusa kahine halaqaa soo efidosona. Yan kahine halaqati, cimatinne higge astamaareti shiiqidi de7oosona." 
Mark14:54 Phexroosi kahine halaqaa zabbaa gakanaw haahon iya kaalli bidi yan naageysatara uttidi tama kayees. 
Mark14:55 Kahine halaqatinne shiiqida asa ubbay Yesuusa wodhanaw iya bolla marka koydosona, shin aykoka demmibookona." 
Mark14:56 Daro asati iya bolla wordo markatidosona, shin enta markatethay issino gidibeenna." 
Mark14:57 Issi issi asati dendi eqidi Yesuusa bolla, “I, ‘Taani asi keexida ha Xoossa Keetha laallada, asa kushen keexetiboonna hara Xoossa Keetha heedzu gallasa giddon keexana’ gishin nuuni si7ida” yaagidi wordo markatidosona." 
Mark14:58  
Mark14:59 Gidoshin, enta markatethay hessanka issino gidibeenna." 
Mark14:60 Kahine halaqay asa ubba sinthan dendi eqidi, “Haysati nena mootiya mootuwas ne zaariyabay baawee?” yaagidi Yesuusa oychis." 
Mark14:61 Shin Yesuusi si77i gis; aykoka zaaribeenna. Kahine halaqay, “Anjetida Xoossaa Na7ay, Kiristoosi neneyee?” yaagidi zaari oychis." 
Mark14:62 Yesuusi zaaridi, “Ee tana, hinte Asa Na7ay, wolqaama Xoossaafe ushacha baggara uttidashin qassi saluwa shaarara yishin be7ana” yaagis." 
Mark14:63 Kahine halaqay ba ma7uwa peedhidi, “Nuna hara marka ay koshshii?" 
Mark14:64 Hinte iya cashsha si7ideta; hinte qofay aybee?” yaagis. Enti ubbay, “I hayqanaw bessees” yaagidi iya bolla pirdidosona." 
Mark14:65 Entafe issoti issoti iya bolla cutethi oykidosona. Iya ayfiya goozidi baqishe, “Nena dechiday oonee? Ane nuus oda!” yaagidosona. Naageysati iya eki efidi garaafidosona." 
Mark14:66 Phexroosi kahine halaqaa zabban garsa baggara de7ishin, kahine halaqa gadhindotape issiniya ya yasu." 
Mark14:67 Phexroosi tama kayeysa demmada, tishshi ootha xeellada, “Neka Naazirete Yesuusara de7aasa” yaagasu." 
Mark14:68 Shin Phexroosi, “Ne geysi aybeko ta erike, taw akeeketena” yaagidi kaddis. Yaagi simmidi, zago keyiya wode iiraka kuttoy waassis." 
Mark14:69 He gadhindiya Phexroosa be7ada, iya matan eqida asatako, “Ha urayka entara de7ees” gada zaara odasu." 
Mark14:70 Shin Phexroosi qassika kaddis. Guuthu gam7ishin, matan eqida asati nam7antho Phexroosako, “Neeni Galila biitta asi gidiya gisho tuma entara de7aasa” yaagidosona." 
Mark14:71 Shin Phexroosi, “Taani hinte giya uraa erike!” yaagidi bana baadethinne caaqo oykis." 
Mark14:72 Ellesidi kuttoy nam7antho waassi aggis. Phexroosi, Yesuusi iyako, “Neeni kuttoy nam7u toho waassanaape sinthe heedzu toho tana kaddana” gidaysa akeekidi daro yeekis." 
Mark15:1 Wonta guura ellesidi kahine halaqati, cimati, higge astamaaretinne Ayhude shangoti ubbay shiiqidi maqetidosona. Enti Yesuusa qachi efidi Philaxoosas aathidi immidosona." 
Mark15:2 Philaxoosi iyako, “Neeni Ayhude kawo?” yaagidi oychis. Yesuusi zaaridi, “Ne gadasa” yaagis." 
Mark15:3 Kahine halaqati Yesuusa daroban mootidosona. 
Mark15:4 Shin Philaxoosi zaaridi Yesuusako, “New zaariyabay baawee? Enti ne bolla ay mela mootuwa ehiyako be7ikii?” yaagis." 
Mark15:5 Shin Yesuusi haraba zaaronna ixin, Philaxoosi malaaletis." 
Mark15:6 Philaxoosas Paasika Ba7aale bonchiya gallasan asay koya issi asi qashope billiya meezey de7ees. 
Mark15:7 He wode issi Barbaana geetetiya uray ooshshu kessidi shempo wodhida asaara issife qasho keethan de7ees. 
Mark15:8 Shiiqida daro asay Philaxoosi kaseysada oothana mela iya oychidosona. 
Mark15:9 Philaxoosi asa zaaridi, “Taani hintew Ayhudeta kawa billanaysa koyeetii?” yaagidi oychis." 
Mark15:10 Hessa I giday, kahine halaqati Yesuusa qanaatidi aathidi immidaysa eriya gishosa." 
Mark15:11 Shin kahine halaqati Yesuusa gisho Barbaana billanaada, he shiiqida asay Philaxoosa woossana mela asaa maqidosona." 
Mark15:12 Philaxoosi zaaridi, “Yaatin, ha hinte Ayhude kawo geysa waato?” yaagis." 
Mark15:13 Asay Philaxoosa bolla waassidi, “Masqale bolla iya kaqa” yaagidosona." 
Mark15:14 Philaxoosi, “Ayis? I ay iitaba oothidee?” yaagis. Shin asay kaseysafe guji waassidi, “Masqale bolla iya kaqa” yaagidosona." 
Mark15:15 Philaxoosi asaa ufaysanaw koyidi, Barbaana billis. Yaatidi, lisson Yesuusa garaafisidi, masqaliya bolla kaqana mela entaw aathidi immis." 
Mark15:16 Hessafe guye, wotaadareti Yesuusa deriya haareysa ooso keethi efidi, hara wotaadareta ubbaa issife xeegidosona." 
Mark15:17 Qassi zo7o afila iya mayzidosona; aguntha kallacha giigisidi, iya huuphen wothidosona." 
Mark15:18 Hessafe guye, iyako, “Ayhudeta kawaw merinaw kawota” yaagidi, iyaw ziggidosona." 
Mark15:19 Iya huuphiya xam7an shocidosona; qassi iya bolla cuttidosona; gulbatidi iyaw goyinnidosona. 
Mark15:20 Iya toochidaape guye zo7o afila iyape qaari ekidi, iya afila iya mayzidi masqale bolla iya kaqanaw efidosona." 
Mark15:21 Enti bishe, Iskindirenne Rufoosa aawa, Simoona geetetiya Qereena biitta asi, gaxarepe katama yeysara gahetidi, Yesuusa masqaliya wolqan toossidosona." 
Mark15:22 Yaatidi Golgota geetetiya bessaa Yesuusa efidosona. “Golgota” guussay “Huuphe guugge” guussu. 
Mark15:23 Sakoy si7etonna mela karbera walaketida woyne uyo gidi iyaw immidosona; shin I uyonna ixis. 
Mark15:24 Enti masqale bolla iya kaqidosona. Oona aybi gakaneeko gidi iya afila shaakidi saama yeggidosona. 
Mark15:25 Enti masqale bolla iya kaqiya wode wontafe heedzu saate. 
Mark15:26 Enti, “Ayhude kawa” yaagidi iya mootiya xuufe xaafidi wothidosona." 
Mark15:27 Yesuusara nam7u pangata issuwa iyape ushacha baggara hankuwa iyape haddirsa baggara masqale bolla kaqidosona. 
Mark15:28 Geeshsha Maxaafay, “Iitabaa oothida asatara I paydetis” geetetidaysi poletis." 
Mark15:29 Ogera aadhiya asay Yesuusa kadhidi, banta huuphiya qaathidi cayidosona. “Heko! Xoossa Keetha laallada heedzu gallasa giddon keexana geyso," 
Mark15:30 ane masqaliya bollafe wodha; ne huuphiya ashsha” yaagidosona. 
Mark15:31 Hessadaka, kahine halaqati higge asatamaaretara issife Yesuusa toochidi, “Harata ashshis, shin bana ashshanaw danda7enna;" 
Mark15:32 nuuni be7idi ammanana mela Kiristoosi, Isra7eele Kawoy, ane masqale bollafe ha77i wodho” yaagidosona. Qassi hari attoshin, iyara masqale bolla kaqetidaysatika iya toochidosona." 
Mark15:33 Usupun saatepe doomidi, uddufun saate gakanaw biitta ubbay dhumis." 
Mark15:34 Uddufun saaten Yesuusi, “Elohe, Elohe, lama sabaqtanii?” yaagidi waassis. Hessa guussay, “Ta Xoossaw, ta Xoossaw, tana ayis aggadii?” guussu." 
Mark15:35 Hessan eqida asape issoy issoy hessa si7idi, “Heko, Eeliyaasa xeegees” yaagis." 
Mark15:36 He asape issoy woxidi, isponjen caala woyne kunthis; hessa xam7a xeeran wothidi, “Naagite; Eeliyaasi masqale bollafe iya wodhisanaw yaaneko ane be7oos” yaagidi, Yesuusa doonako ushshanaw shiishis." 
Mark15:37 Hessafe guye, Yesuusi waassis; hayqis." 
Mark15:38 Xoossa keethan kaqetida magaraajoy qommofe duge gakanaw, nam7u keyidi daaketi wodhis." 
Mark15:39 Masqaliyape sintha baggara yan eqida issi mato halaqay, Yesuusi waanidi hayqidaako be7ida wode, “Ha uray tuma Xoossa Na7a” yaagis." 
Mark15:40 Hessa haahon eqidi be7iya guutha maccasati de7oosona. Enta giddon Magdela Mayraama, kaaluwa Yayqoobanne Yoosa aayiya Mayraamanne Salooma de7oosona." 
Mark15:41 He maccasati Yesuusi Galilan de7iya wode iya kaallidaysatanne iya mokidaysata qassi Yesuusara issife Yerusalaame bida hara daro maccasati yan de7oosona. 
Mark15:42 Sa7i omarsida wode, shiiqida asan bonchetida Ayhude shangotape issoy, Yoosefa geetetiya uray, Xoossa kawotethay yaanaysa naagishe de7eysi, Armaate katama asi de7eysi yis. Wontethe Sambaatas giigetiya gallas gidida gisho, Yoosefi minnidi Philaxoosako bidi, Yesuusa aha ekanaw woossis." 
Mark15:43  
Mark15:44 Philaxoosi, Yesuusi hayqidaysa si7ida wode malaaletis; mato halaqa xeegidi, “I hayqidi gam7idee?” yaagidi oychis." 
Mark15:45 Philaxoosi, Yesuusi hayqidaysa mato halaqaape si7idi, iya aha Yoosefas immis." 
Mark15:46 Yoosefi moogo afila shammis; Yesuusa aha masqaliyape wothidi, afilan xaaxidi, shuchafe woocetida duufon iya aha moogis. Qassi he duufuwa doonan gita shuchu gondorsidi wothis." 
Mark15:47 Magdela Mayraamanne Yoosa aayiya Mayraama Yesuusa aha enti awun moogidako be7oosona. 
Mark16:1 Sambaati aadhidaape guye, Magdela Mayraama, Yayqooba aayiya Mayraamanne Salooma bidi, Yesuusa aha tiyanaw shitto shammidosona." 
Mark16:2 Wogga wode wonta daro guura xalqey caarishin, duufo bidosona." 
Mark16:3 Enti banta giddon issoy issuwara, “Duufuwa doonape nuus shuchaa oonee gondorsidi digganay?” yaagidi odetidosona." 
Mark16:4 Enti xeelliya wode he daro gita shuchay gondoretidi kichidaysa be7idosona. 
Mark16:5 Yesuusi moogetida duufuwa giddo geliya wode issi pantha addey bootha ma7o ma7idi, ushacha baggara uttidaysa be7idi dagammidosona." 
Mark16:6 Shin I entako, “Dagammofite; masqaliya bolla kaqetida, Naazirete Yesuusa hinte koyeysa taani erayis. I haysan deenna, hayqope dendis. Enti iya moogida bessa haysa be7ite." 
Mark16:7 Ha77i bidi Yesuusa tamaaretasinne Phexroosas, ‘Yesuusi hintefe sinthatidi Galila bees. I, hintew odidaysada hinte iya yan be7ana’ yaagidi odite” yaagis." 
Mark16:8 Maccasati yashshan kokorishe duufope keyidi baqatidosona. Qassi enti yayyida gisho, hessa oodeska aykoka odibookona." 
Mark16:9 Yesuusi hayqope dendidaape guye, wogga gallas wonta, laapun tuna ayyaanata kessida Magdela Mayraamis koyrottidi bentis." 
Mark16:10 Iya bada kase iyara de7eysatas, enti azzanishenne yeekishe de7ishin odasu." 
Mark16:11 Shin Yesuusi paxa de7eysanne iw bentidaysa enti si7ida wode iya geysa ammanibookona. 
Mark16:12 Hessafe guye, entafe nam7ati katamaape keyidi bishin, oge bolla Yesuusi kasepe dummatidi entaw bentis." 
Mark16:13 Enti guye simmidi, haratas odidosona, shin haratika enta odaa tuma gibookona." 
Mark16:14 Guyepe tammanne issi iya tamaareti kathi mishin, Yesuusi entaw bentis. Entaw ammanoy bayna gishonne hayqope I dendidaysa be7ida asay odin, enti ammanonna ixida gisho I enta boris." 
Mark16:15 I entako, “Biitta ubbaa bidi asa ubbaas wongela odite." 
Mark16:16 Ammaneynne xammaqetey attana, shin ammanonay pirdetana." 
Mark16:17 Ammaneysatas ha malaatati imetana. Enti ta sunthan tuna ayyaanata kessana, ooratha doonan odetana." 
Mark16:18 Enti shooshu oykikoka woyko wodhiyaba uyikoka enta qohenna. Qassi enti banta kushiya harganchota bolla wothidi enta pathana” yaagis. 
Mark16:19 Goday Yesuusi tamaaretara odetidaape guye, pude salo keyis; Xoossafe ushacha baggara uttis." 
Mark16:20 Iya tamaareti bida bessa ubban qaala odidosona. Godayka entara issife oothees. Enti odiya qaalay tuma gididaysa Xoossay entaw immiya malaatatan erisis. 
Luke1:1 Boncho Tewofloosa, nu giddon poletidabas daroti, bantaw danda7etida mela xaafidosona." 
Luke1:2 He taarikiya enti xaafiday koyrope doomidi ayfe markatinne qaala haggaazeysati nuus odidaysa. 
Luke1:3 Taka ta baggara koyrope akeeka xeellidaape guye, he taarikiya hanota maarayada new xaafoy lo77o gididi bentis." 
Luke1:4 Hessika, ne tamaaridabay tuma gideysa erisanaasa." 
Luke1:5 Yihuda kawa Herodiisa wode Abiya yaraape gidida Zakaryaasa geetetiya Ayhude kahiney de7ees. Iya machiyaka Aarona sheeshape. I sunthayka Elsabeexo. 
Luke1:6 Nam7ayka Godaa wogaanne kiita ubbaa naagidi borey bayna Xoossaa sinthan xillotethan de7idosona. 
Luke1:7 Hanope attishin, Elsabeexa maynthi gidida gisho entaw na7i baawa; nam7ayka qassi cimidosona." 
Luke1:8 Issi gallas Zakaryaasi ba gishuwa maaran Xoossaa sinthan kahinetethan haggaazees. 
Luke1:9 Kahinetetha wogan Xoossa Keethi gelidi ixaane cuyisanaw iya saami gakis. 
Luke1:10 Ixaaney cuyaa wode asay karen woossees. 
Luke1:11 Godaa kiitanchoy yarsho yarshiya bessaafe ushacha baggara eqidi bentis. 
Luke1:12 Zakaryaasi iya be7ida wode dagammidi daro yayyis. 
Luke1:13 Shin kiitanchoy iyako, “Zakaryaasa yayyofa; ne woosay si7etis. Ne machiya Elsabeexa adde na7a yelana, iya Yohaanisa gada ne sunthana." 
Luke1:14 I new injenne ufaysi gidana; daroti iya yeletethan ufaytana. 
Luke1:15 Godaa sinthan I gita gidana; woyne ushshi gidin hara mathoyiya ushsha uyenna. Ba aaye ulon de7ishe Geeshsha Ayyaanan kumana. 
Luke1:16 Isra7eele asatape darota banta Godaa, Xoossaako zaarana." 
Luke1:17 Aawata wozana naytako zaarana, kiitetonayisata xillota cincatethaako zaarana mela, Godaas bessiya dere giigisanaw Eeliyaasa ayyaananinne wolqan Godaa sinthan baana” yaagis." 
Luke1:18 Zakaryaasi kiitanchuwako, “Ta hessa aybin eranee? Taaranne ta machera cimida” yaagis." 
Luke1:19 Kiitanchoy zaaridi, “Taani Xoossaa sinthan eqiya Gabreele. Ha mishiraachuwa new odanaw Xoossaafe kiitetas." 
Luke1:20 Heko, wodiya naagidi poletiya ta qaala ne ammanonna ixida gisho, haysi poletana gakanaw neeni muume gidana, odetanawuka danda7aka” yaagis." 
Luke1:21 He wode Zakaryaasi Xoossa Keethi gelidi gam7ida gisho, aybi hanide gidi asay karen naagishe gam7is." 
Luke1:22 I kare keyidi entana odisanaw danda7ibeenna. Malli besope attishin, odetanaw danda7onaysa be7ida wode qoncethi be7idaysa eridosona." 
Luke1:23 Zakaryaasi ba haggaazuwa polidi soo simmis. 
Luke1:24 Hessafe guye, iya machiya Elsabeexa qanthatasu. Ichashu ageena kumethi bana genthada gam7asu." 
Luke1:25 Iya, “Goday ba maarotan ta boriya asaa giddofe digganaw be7idi ha wodiyan haysa oothis” yaagasu." 
Luke1:26 Elsabeexa qanthatin usupuntho ageenan, Xoossay kiitanchuwa Gabreele Galila biittan de7iya Naazirete katamaa kiittis." 
Luke1:27 Kawa Dawita sheeshape gidida Yoosefa geetetiya uraas oyshetida geela7eeko kiittis. He geela7iya Mayraamo geetetawusu. 
Luke1:28 Kiitanchoy iiko bidi, “Daro dosetidaare, saroy new gido, Xoossay neera de7ees; neeni anjetidaaro” yaagis." 
Luke1:29 Mayraama iya odan daro dagammada, “Haysi aybi sarotho” gada heetasu." 
Luke1:30 Kiitanchoy zaaridi, “Mayraame, babofa; neeni Xoossa sinthan saba demmadasa." 
Luke1:31 Heko neeni qanthatana adde na7a yelana, iya sunthaa Yesuusa gada sunthana." 
Luke1:32 I gita gidana, Ubbaafe Bolla Xoossaa na7aa geetetidi xeegetana. Godaa Xoossay iya aawa Dawita araata iyaw immana." 
Luke1:33 I Yayqooba sheesha bolla merinaw kawotana; iya kawotethaas zawi baawa” yaagis. 
Luke1:34 Mayraama kiitanchuwako, “Hessi waanidi hananee? Ta adde erike” yaagasu." 
Luke1:35 Kiitanchoy zaaridi, “Geeshsha Ayyaanay ne bolla wodhana, Ubbaafe Bolla Xoossaa wolqay ne bolla kuyatana. Hessa gisho, yeletiya geeshsha na7ay Xoossaa Na7aa geetetana." 
Luke1:36 Heko, ne dabiya Elsabeexa ba cimatetha laythan adde na7a qanthatasu. Iya maynthi geetetidaaro, shin ha77i usupuntho ageena oykasu." 
Luke1:37 Xoossaa xooniyabay baawa” yaagis. 
Luke1:38 Mayraama, “Heko, taani Godaa aylliw, ne qaalada taw hano” yaagasu. Hessafe guye, kiitanchoy iipe shaaketis." 
Luke1:39 Mayraama he saamintan dendada Yihuda biittan de7iya issi derey dariya katama basu. 
Luke1:40 Zakaryaasa soo gelada Elsabeexo sarothasu. 
Luke1:41 Elsabeexa Mayraami sarothuwa si7ida wode I uluwan de7iya na7ay ufaysan gupis. Elsabeexa Geeshsha Ayyaanan kumada," 
Luke1:42 ba qaala dhoqu oothada, “Neeni maccasa giddofe anjetidaaro, ne qanthatida na7ayka anjetidaysa." 
Luke1:43 Hanoshin, ta Godaa aaye, neeni taako yaana mela taani oonee?" 
Luke1:44 Heko ne sarothuwa ta si7ida wode ta uluwan de7iya na7ay ufaysan gupis. 
Luke1:45 Goday polana gidi immida qaala ammanidara, iya anjetidaaro” yaagasu." 
Luke1:46 Mayraama haysada yaagasu: “Ta shempiya Godaa bonchawusu," 
Luke1:47 ta Ayyaanay dhaliya Xoossan ufaytees. 
Luke1:48 I ba aylle kawushatethaa be7is. Hachife doomidi yeletethi ubbay tana anjetidaaro gaana. 
Luke1:49 Ayis giiko, wolqaama gidida I, taw gitaba oothis. Iya sunthay Geeshshaa." 
Luke1:50 Iya boncheyisata bolla, iya maarotethay merinaape merinaa gakanaasa." 
Luke1:51 Ba qesiyan minoba oothis, banta wozanan otorteyisata laallis." 
Luke1:52 Wolqaama kawota araatape kawushis; bantana kawushidaysata kaaboyis. 
Luke1:53 Koshatidaysata lo77oban kalsis, shin dureta mela kushe yeddis." 
Luke1:54 Ba maarota qopidi, Ba aylliya Isra7eele maaddis." 
Luke1:55 Hessika nu aawatas odida qaala, Abrahaamesinne iya sheeshas gidaysa merinaw polanaasa” yaagasu." 
Luke1:56 Mayraama Elsabeexi matan heedzu ageena mela gam7ada ba soo simmasu. 
Luke1:57 Elsabeexis yelo qammay gakin adde na7a yelasu. 
Luke1:58 I shoorotinne I dabboti Goday gita maarota oothidaysa si7idi, iira issife ufaytidosona." 
Luke1:59 Hospuntha gallasan yooga na7aa qaxaranaw yidosona. Iya aawa sunthan Zakaryaasa gidi sunthanaw koydosona. 
Luke1:60 Shin aayiya, “Akay, Yohaanisa geetetanaw bessees” yaagasu." 
Luke1:61 Entika, “Ne dabbotape ha sunthan xeegetiday oonika baawa” yaagidosona." 
Luke1:62 Iya aaway oona gidi sunthaneko eranaw koyidi iya malla oychidosona. 
Luke1:63 I xaafiyabaa oychi ekidi, “Iya sunthay Yohaanisa” gidi xaafis. Ubbay I xaafidaysa be7idi malaaletidosona." 
Luke1:64 Iira Zakaryaasa inxarsay biletis, Xoossaa galatishe odetethi oykis." 
Luke1:65 Shooroti ubbay yashshan kumidosona. Ha hanidabay derey dariya Yihuda biittan odetis. 
Luke1:66 Hessa si7ida ubbay, “Ha na7ay ay hanandesha” gidi banta giddon odetidosona. Godaa kushey iyara de7ees." 
Luke1:67 Yohaanisa aaway Zakaryaasi Geeshsha Ayyaanan kumidi haysada yaagidi tinbite odis. 
Luke1:68 “Isra7eele Goday galatetto, yidi ba asaa wozis." 
Luke1:69 Ba aylliya Dawita keethan atotetha kaciya denthis. 
Luke1:70 Hessika beni wode geeshsha nabeta doonan odetidaysa mela," 
Luke1:71 Iya ashoy nu morketapenne nuura eqetiya ubbaa kushiyape. 
Luke1:72 Hessa I oothiday nu aawatas ba maarota bessanaasinne, ba geeshsha caaquwa naaganaassa." 
Luke1:73 Nu aawa Abrahaames caaqida caaquwa qopanaasinne 
Luke1:74 nu morketa kushepe kessidi yashshi bayna iya haggaazana melasa. 
Luke1:75 Nu laytha ubban geeshshatethaninne xillotethan ba sinthan nuna essanaasa. 
Luke1:76 Qassi la na7aw, neeni Ubbaafe Bolla Xoossaa nabe geetetana. Godaa ogiya loythanaw ne iya sinthan baana." 
Luke1:77 Enta nagaray qushetin, enti atotethi demmanaysa ne Godaa deriyas odana." 
Luke1:78 Nu Xoossaa lo77o maarotethaafe dendoysan wonta xalqey nuus saluwape keyis. 
Luke1:79 Hessika dhumaninne, hayqo kuya garsan de7eysatas poo7isanaasa, nu tohuwaka saro ogiyako zaaranaasa” yaagis." 
Luke1:80 Na7ay diccis, Ayyaanan minnis, Isra7eele asaas qoncana gakanaw mela biittan de7is." 
Luke2:1 He wode Roome biittan de7iya asa ubbay taybetana melanne sunthay xaafetana mela kawoy Awugisxoosi kiittis. 
Luke2:2 Hessika Qerenoosi Soore biitta aysiya wode oosetida koyro taybuwa. 
Luke2:3 Hessa gisho, issi issi asi ba sunthaa xaafetanaw ba yeletida biitta bis." 
Luke2:4 Yoosefika Dawita keethaafenne yaraape gidida gisho, Galila Naazirete katamaape dendidi Dawita katama gidida Yihuda Beeteleme bis." 
Luke2:5 Bishe, yelanaw wodey wurida I oychi wothida, Mayraamira wolla xaafetanaw bis." 
Luke2:6 Enti yan de7ishin iw yelo wodey gakis. 
Luke2:7 Ba bayra na7aa yelasu. Curqara xaaxada imathi aqiya keethan bessi dhayida gisho daran mehe muziya gongen zin7isasu. 
Luke2:8 He gadiyan qamma dorsa wudiya naagishe karen aqiya henthanchoti de7oosona. 
Luke2:9 Godaa kiitanchoy hassayonna yidi enta matan eqis. Godaa bonchoy enta yuushuwan poo7is; entika wolqaama yashshi yayyidosona. 
Luke2:10 Shin kiitanchoy, “Yayyofite! Heko, asaa ubbaas gidiya gita ufaysaa mishiraachuwa ekada yas." 
Luke2:11 Hessika, Dawita kataman ashsheysi hintew hachi yeletis. I Godaa Kiristoosa." 
Luke2:12 Zoqale na7i curqara xaaxetidi gongen zin7idaysa hinte demmana; hessika hintew malla gido” yaagis. 
Luke2:13 Qoponna daro salo kiitanchoti kiitanchuwara issife qoncidi," 
Luke2:14 “Bonchoy Xoossaas dhoqa saluwan, saroy biitta bolla Xoossay dosiya asaas gido” yaagidi galatidosona." 
Luke2:15 Kiitanchoti entafe shaaketidi saluwa keydaape guye henthanchoti, “Ane Goday nuus qoncisidabaanne hanidaba be7anaw Beeteleme boos” yaagidosona." 
Luke2:16 Entika ellesidi bidosona. Mayraamo, Yoosefanne zoqale na7aa gongen zin7idaysa be7idosona." 
Luke2:17 Be7i simmidi na7aba entaw odetoysa, qoncisidi he bessan de7iya asaas markatidosona." 
Luke2:18 Hessa si7ida ubbay henthanchoti odidaysan malaaletidosona. 
Luke2:19 Mayraama hanidaba ubbaa ba wozanan qopashe de7asu. 
Luke2:20 Henthanchoti entaw odetidaysada hanin be7idosona. Hessa gisho, banta si7idabaasinne be7idaba ubbaas Xoossaa bonchishenne galatishe simmidosona." 
Luke2:21 Hospuntha qamman, qaxaro wodey gakin, I qanthatanaape sinthe kiitanchoy wothida sunthan Yesuusa geetetis." 
Luke2:22 Muse woga mela enta geeshshatetha wodey poletidaape guye Yoosefaranne Mayraamira yooga na7aa banta Godaas immanaw Yerusalaame bidosona. 
Luke2:23 Hessika, Godaa wogan, “Adde gidida bayra na7i ubbay Godaas dummatidaysa gido” geetetidi xaafetidaysa polanaasa." 
Luke2:24 Qassi Godaa wogan, nam7u kuraacho woyko holle yarshanaw efidosona." 
Luke2:25 He wode geeshshinne ammanora mino gidida Simoona geetetiya asi Yerusalaamen de7ees. I Isra7eeleta atotetha naagishe de7ees. Geeshsha Ayyaanayka iya bolla de7ees. 
Luke2:26 Qassi Kiristoosa be7onna hayqonnaysa Geeshsha Ayyaanay iyaw qoncisin eridi de7ees. 
Luke2:27 I he gallas Ayyaanay kaalethin Xoossa Keethi bis. Na7aa aayeranne aawara wogaa polanaw yooga na7aa Yesuusa ekidi gelida wode," 
Luke2:28 Simooni moki ekidi na7aa idimmidi," 
Luke2:29 “Godaw ne taw gelida qaala mela, ha77i ne aylliya saron moyza." 
Luke2:30 Ta ayfey asaa ubbaa sinthan ne giigisida," 
Luke2:31 ne ashuwa be7is. 
Luke2:32 Hessika kawotethata ubbaas, Xoossaa ogiya qoncisiya poo7o, ne asaa Isra7eeleska boncho” yaagidi Xoossaa galatis." 
Luke2:33 Yoosefaranne Mayraamira iyaw odetidaban malaaletidosona. 
Luke2:34 Simooni enta anjis. Aaye Mayraamiko, “Heko daro asaa wozanaa qofay qoncana mela, Isra7eelen de7iya darotas enta kundethaasinne denduwas Xoossan dooretis." 
Luke2:35 Qassi eqeteysatas malla gidana. Ne shempuwaraka qassi mashshi aadhana” yaagis. 
Luke2:36 Qassi Aseera yaraape gidida Faanu7ela na7iya Haanna geetetiya nabey de7awusu. Iya daro cimasu; iya ba koyro azinaara laapun laythi de7asu. 
Luke2:37 I azinay hayqin hospun tammanne oyddu laythi gidana gakanaw qammanne gallas pacey bayna woosaninne xooman xoossa keethan haggaazasu. 
Luke2:38 Iya he saatiyan bada Xoossaa galatasu; Yerusalaame wozetetha naagiya ubbaas yooga na7aba markatasu. 
Luke2:39 Yoosefaranne Mayraamira Godaa higgiyan kiitetida woga ubbaa polidaape guye Galila biittan de7iya banta katama Naazirete simmidosona. 
Luke2:40 Na7ay diccishenne minnishe bis. Cincatethan kumis; Xoossaa aadho keehatethay iya bolla de7ees. 
Luke2:41 Yoosefaranne Mayraamira Paasika Ba7aale bonchanaw laythan laythan Yerusalaame boosona. 
Luke2:42 Yesuusas tammanne nam7u laythi gidiya wode kase meezetidaysada ba7aale bonchanaw bidosona. 
Luke2:43 Baaliya bonchidaape guye soo simmiya wode na7ay Yesuusi Yerusalaamen attis. Shin Yoosefaranne Mayraamira I Yerusalaamen attoysa eribookona. 
Luke2:44 I soo simmiya asaara wolla de7iya daanin enti issi gallasa oge bidosona. I baynaysa eridaape guye banta dabbotanne laggeta matan koydosona. 
Luke2:45 I yan dhayin koyishe guye Yerusalaame gakanaw bidosona. 
Luke2:46 Heedzu gallasape guye xoossa keethan astamaareta giddon uttidi entaba si7ishenne enta oychishe de7ishin demmidosona. 
Luke2:47 Iya si7iya ubbay iya akeekaninne zaaruwan malaaletidosona. 
Luke2:48 Soo asay iya demmida wode malaaletidosona. Iya aayaka, “Ta na7aw, ayis nuna haysada oothadii? Ne aawaranne taara nena koyishe un7etida” yaagasu." 
Luke2:49 Yesuusi entako, “Tana ayis koyeetii? Ta, ta aawa keethan daanaw besseysa ereketi” yaagis." 
Luke2:50 Shin I entako gidaba enti akeekibokona. 
Luke2:51 Hessafe guye, entara issife Naazirete katama bis. Entaw kiitetishe de7is. Iya aayiya he ubbaa ba wozanan wothada naagasu." 
Luke2:52 Yesuusi, cincatethan, geesaninne teeman Xoossaa sinthaninne asa sinthan diccis." 
Luke3:1 Kawoy Xibaryoosi Roome biittan kawotin, tammanne ichashantho laythan, Phenxe Philaxoosi Yihuda haariya wode, Herodiisi Galila haariya wode, iya ishaa Filphoosi Ixuuriyasanne Xirakondoosa haariya wode, Lisaniyoosi Ablaanisa haariya wode," 
Luke3:2 Haannaranne Qayyaafara kahine halaqa gidi de7ishin, Xoossaa qaalay Zakaryaasa na7aa Yohaanisako mela biitta yis." 
Luke3:3 Yohaanisi, “Hinte nagaraape simmitenne xammaqetite. Xoossay hinte nagaraa atto gaana” yaagidi tamaarsishe Yordaanose Shaafa heeran de7iya biitta ubbaa bis." 
Luke3:4 Hessika nabey Isayaasi ba maxaafan, “Mela biittan ba qaala dhoqu oothidi, waassiya uraa qaalay, ‘Godaa ogiya giigisite, horogaaka piddi oothite." 
Luke3:5 Aafo ubbay kumana, zumaynne derey ziqi gaana. Wobbe ogey luulana, giigonna horogay qinxi gaana." 
Luke3:6 Asho ma7ida ubbay, Xoossaa ashuwa be7ana’ ” gidi xaafidaysada hanis." 
Luke3:7 Yohaanisi, ba kushen xammaqetanaw yida asaako, “Hinteno, shoosha nayto yaanaw de7iya hanquwafe attana mela hintena zoriday oonee?" 
Luke3:8 Hiza, hinte simuwa qoncisiya lo77o ooso oothite, hinte wozanan, ‘Nuus, nu aaway Abrahaamey de7ees gidi ceeqetofite.’ Haa si7ite, ha shuchatape Xoossay Abrahaames na7a kessanaw danda7ees." 
Luke3:9 Heko, beexey mithaa xaphon de7ees. Hiza, lo77o ayfe ayfonna mitha ubbay qanxetidi taman yegetana” yaagis." 
Luke3:10 Asay, “Yaatin nuuni ay oothinoo?” yaagidi oychidosona." 
Luke3:11 Yohaanisi zaaridi, “Nam7u afili de7iya asi baynaysas immo. Kathi de7eysi baynaysas immo” yaagis." 
Luke3:12 Qaraxa qanxiseysati xammaqetanaw yidi, “Astamaariyaw, nuuni ay oothinoo?” yaagidosona." 
Luke3:13 I zaaridi, “Hinte qanxisanaw kiitetoysafe aathidi ekofite” yaagis." 
Luke3:14 Qassi wotaadareti yidi, “Nuuni ay oothinoo” yaagidi oychidosona. Yohaanisi, “Oodebaaka wolqan dafidi ekofite, oonaka wordon mootopite, hinte damoozey hintew gido; ufaytidi de7ite” yaagis." 
Luke3:15 Asay Kiristoosa naagishe de7iya gisho, Yohaanisa, “I Kiristoosa gidandesha?” gidi qopidosona." 
Luke3:16 Yohaanisi ubbaas zaaridi, “Taani hintena haathan xammaqayis, shin taape aadhidi wolqaameysi yaana. Taani iya caammaa wodoruwa billanaw bessonna asi. I hintena Geeshsha Ayyaananinne taman xammaqana." 
Luke3:17 Wudumman de7iya kathaa polo geeshshanaw pithey iya kushen de7ees. Geeshsha kathaa ba shaaliyan qolana; kaliya dhayonna taman xuuggana” yaagis. 
Luke3:18 Qassi Yohaanisi asaa daro zore zoridi Wongela odis. 
Luke3:19 Shin Yohaanisi Herodiisi ba ishaa machiw, Herodiyada, ekida gishonne haraa iita oosota gisho hanqeetida wode," 
Luke3:20 Herodiisi kaseysa bolla haraba ubbaa gujidi Yohaanisa woyne gelsis. 
Luke3:21 Yohaanisi qashetanaape sinthe asaa ubbaa xammaqidi simmin, qasi Yesuusika xammaqetis. I woossishin saloy dooyetis." 
Luke3:22 Geeshsha Ayyaanay holleda bentishe iya bolla uttis. Salope “Taani dosiya na7ay nena; ne tana ufaysaasa” giya qaalay yis. 
Luke3:23 Yesuusi tamaarso oykiya wode iyaw hastamu laythi gidishin, asay iya Yoosefa na7a gidi qopis. Yoosefi Eele na7a," 
Luke3:24 Eeley Mata na7a, Mati Leewe na7a, Leewey Malka na7a, Malki Yoona na7a, Yooni Yoosefa na7a," 
Luke3:25 Yoosefi Mataata na7a, Mataati Amoxe na7a, Amoxey Nahoome na7a, Nahoomey Asiliime na7a, Asiliimey Naage na7a," 
Luke3:26 Naagey Ma7aate na7a, Ma7aatey Mataata na7a, Mataati Samaye na7a," 
Luke3:27 Samayey Yihuda na7a, Yihudi Yonaana na7a, Yoonaney Rase na7a, Rasey Zarubaabela na7a, Zarubaabeli Salatiyaala na7a, Salatiyaali Neera na7a," 
Luke3:28 Neeri Malka na7a, Malki Hade na7a, Hadi Qoosama na7a, Qoosami Elmodaana na7a, Elmodaani Era na7a," 
Luke3:29 Eri Yoose7a na7a, Yoose7i Alaazara na7a, Alaazari Yoraame na7a, Yoraamey Mata na7a, Mata Leewe na7a," 
Luke3:30 Leewey Simoona na7a, Simooni Yihuda na7a, Yihudi Yoosefa na7a, Yoosefi Yonaana na7a, Yoonaney Eliyaqeeme na7a," 
Luke3:31 Eliyaqeemi Maliya na7a, Maliyi Maynaane na7a, Maynaaney Mata na7a, Mati Naatana na7a, Naatani Dawita na7a," 
Luke3:32 Dawiti Isseye na7a, Isseyey Iyobeeda na7a, Iyobeedi Boo7eza na7a, Boo7ezi Salmoona na7a, Salmoona Na7asoona na7a," 
Luke3:33 Na7asooni Amnadaabe na7a, Amnadaabey Raame na7a, Raamey Arne na7a, Arney Asroome na7a," 
Luke3:34 Asroomey Faaresa na7a, Faaresi Yihuda na7a, Yihudi Yayqooba na7a, Yayqoobi Yisaaqa na7a, Yisaaqi Abrahaame na7a, Abrahaamey Taara na7a," 
Luke3:35 Taari Nakoora na7a, Naakorey Saruga na7a, Sarugi Rehu na7a, Rehuy Faleqa na7a, Faleqi Ebeera na7a, Ebeeroy Seela na7a," 
Luke3:36 Seeli Qaynama na7a, Qaynami Arfakisaade na7a, Arfakisaadi Seema na7a, Seemi Nohe na7a, Nohey Laameha na7a," 
Luke3:37 Laamehi Matusaala na7a, Matusaali Heenoke na7a, Heenokey Yaareda na7a, Yaaredi Malal7eela na7a, Malal7eeli Qaynana na7a," 
Luke3:38 Qaynani Henoosa na7a, Henoosi Seeta na7a, Seeti Addaame na7a, Addaamey Xoossaa na7a." 
Luke4:1 Yesuusi Geeshsha Ayyaanan kumidi Yordaanose Shaafape simmida mela Ayyaanay iya mela biitta efis. 
Luke4:2 Yan oytamu gallasinne qamma xalahen paacetis. He gallasatan aykoka moonna gam7ida gisho wursethan koshatis. 
Luke4:3 Xalahey iyako, “Neeni Xoossaa na7a gidiko ane haysi shuchay uythu gido gada kiitta” yaagis." 
Luke4:4 Yesuusi zaaridi, “Asi uytha xalaalan deenna geetetidi xaafetis” yaagis." 
Luke4:5 Hessafe guye, Xalahey Yesuusa adussa dere bolla kessidi ha alamiya kawotethata ayfe qiphi zaaranaw bessis." 
Luke4:6 Xalahey, “Ha ubbaas maataynne bonchoy taw imetis. Taani dosida oodeska immiya gisho new immana." 
Luke4:7 Hessa gisho, neeni taw goyinniko ubbay new gidana” yaagis." 
Luke4:8 Yesuusi zaaridi, “Ne Godaa, ne Xoossaa, iya xalaala goyinna geetetidi xaafetis” yaagis." 
Luke4:9 Wursethan Xalahey Yesuusa Yerusalaame efidi Xoossa Keethas huuphiya bolla essidi, “Neeni Xoossaa na7a gidiko ane duge sa7an nena yegga." 
Luke4:10 Ayis giiko, “ ‘Nena naagiya Kiitanchota Xoossay ne gisho kiittana." 
Luke4:11 Enti ne tohoy shuchan dhubetonna mela, banta kushiyan dhoqu oothidi nena denthana’ geetetidi xaafetis” yaagis." 
Luke4:12 Yesuusi zaaridi, “Ne Godaa Xoossaa paacofa geetetidi xaafetis” yaagis." 
Luke4:13 Xalahey Yesuusa paaciya wursidaape guye hara inje wode demmana gakanaw iyape shaaketis. 
Luke4:14 Yesuusi Ayyaana wolqan kumidi Galila simmis. Iya sunthay heeran de7iya biitta ubban keyis. 
Luke4:15 I ayhude woosa keethi gelidi tamaarsis; asa ubbay iya galatidosona. 
Luke4:16 Yaape I diccida katamaa Naazirete yis. Kase meezetidaysada Sambaata gallas ayhude woosa keethi gelis. Nabbabanawuka dendi eqis. 
Luke4:17 Nabiya Isayaasa maxaafay iyaw imetin, dooyidi, haysada yaagidi xaafetidaysa demmis:" 
Luke4:18 “Godaa Ayyaanay ta bolla de7ees, manqotas Wongela odana mela Xoossay tana dooris. Qashetidaysatas biletethi, qooqidaysata xeelisanaasinne un7etidaysata birshana mela," 
Luke4:19 Xoossay keehanaw qopida laytha odana mela tana kiittis” yaagis. 
Luke4:20 Hessafe guye, maxaafaa xaaxidi haggaazeysas immidi tamaarsanaw uttis. Ayhude woosa keethan de7iya asati ubbay caddi xeelloosona." 
Luke4:21 I, “Haysi hinte haythan hinte si7iya ha maxaafaa qaalay hachi poletis” yaagis." 
Luke4:22 Ubbay iyabaa darsidi odetoosona. Qassi iya doonape keyiya aadho keehatethan kumida qaalan malaaletishe, “Haysi Yoosefa na7aa gidenneyee?” yaagidosona." 
Luke4:23 I, “ ‘Neno dhale aawaw nena ashsha, Qifirnahooman ne oothidaba nu si7oysa qassi haysan ne kataman ootha’ giya leemisuwan hinte tana gaanaysas sidhey baawa” yaagis." 
Luke4:24 Qassi, “Tuma odayis; nabey ba yeletida biittan bonchetenna." 
Luke4:25 “Ta hintew tuma odayis; saloy heedzu laythinne bagga gordetin mino koshi biitta ubban de7iya Eeliyaasa wode daro am7eti Isra7eelen de7oosona. 
Luke4:26 Eeliyaasi entafe issinnekoka kiitetibeenna. Shin Saraptan de7iya am7eeko kiitetis. 
Luke4:27 Nabiya Elsa wode Isra7eelen daro baro harganchoti de7oosona. Shin Soore uraa Ni7imaanepe attishin, oonika paxibeenna” yaagis." 
Luke4:28 Ayhude woosa keethan de7iya asa ubbay hessa si7ida wode daro yilotidosona. 
Luke4:29 Banta uttida bessaafe dendidi dere bolla keexetida katamaape gaxa kessidi sugi yeddanaw aafo doona efidosona. 
Luke4:30 Shin I enta giddora kanthidi aadhis. 
Luke4:31 Yaape Galila biittan de7iya Qifirnahooma katamaa bis. Yan Sambaata gallas asaa tamaarsis. 
Luke4:32 I tamaarsey maatara gidiya gisho ubbay iya timirtiyan malaaletidosona. 
Luke4:33 Ayhude woosa keethan tuna ayyaanay oykida uray de7ees. 
Luke4:34 I, “Naazirete Yesuusa nuna ayis waaysay nuupe haaka; neeni yiday nuna dhaysanaseyee? Neeni ooneko taani erayis. Neeni Xoossaafe yida Geeshsha” yaagidi waassis." 
Luke4:35 Yesuusi tuna ayyaanako, “Si7i gada ha uraape keya” yaagidi hanqis. Tuna ayyaanay uraa asaa ubbaa sinthan holi yeggidi aykoka qohonna yeddidi keyis." 
Luke4:36 Asa ubbay malaaletidosona. Woliko, “Hanos, haysi aybi timirtee? Tuna ayyaanata maataninne wolqan kiittees; entika keyoosona” yaagidosona." 
Luke4:37 Iya sunthay heera ubban keyis. 
Luke4:38 Hessafe guye, Yesuusi ayhude woosa keethafe keyidi Simoona soo gelis. Simoona mache aayiya mino qoxo misha hargen saketasu. Iyo pathana mela Yesuusa woossidosona." 
Luke4:39 I hiixako shiiqi hokidi I hargiya hanqis. Mishay aggin ellesa dendada enta mokasu. 
Luke4:40 Away wullana hanishin dumma dumma hargiyan oyketida asaa iyako ehidosona. I issuwa issuwa bolla ba kushiya wothidi pathis. 
Luke4:41 Tuna ayyaanati qassi, “Neeni, Xoossaa na7aa” gidi waassishe daro asaape keyidosona. Shin I entana hanqis. I Kiristoosa gideysa enti eriya gisho, issibaaka odetonna mela diggis." 
Luke4:42 Buroo wontiya wode Yesuusi issi geema bessi bis. Asay koyishe I de7iya bessaa yidosona. Entafe I shaaketidi boonna mela digganaw koydosona. 
Luke4:43 Shin I, “Taani hara katamata bada Xoossaa kawotethaa Wongela markatanaw bessees. Ta kiitetiday hessasa” yaagis." 
Luke4:44 Yihuda biittan de7iya ayhude woosa keethan sabbakis. 
Luke5:1 Issi gallas Yesuusi Gensareexe Abbaa matan eqidashin daro asay iya yuushuwa un7ethidi, I tamaarsiya Xoossaa qaala si7oosona." 
Luke5:2 Yan haatha gaxan de7iya nam7u wogolota be7is. Molo oykiya asati wogolotape wodhidi banta gitiya meeccosona. 
Luke5:3 He wogolotape Simoonaysan gelidi biittafe guuthi giddo shiishana mela oychis. Yaatidi, he wogoluwa bolla uttidi asaa tamaarsis." 
Luke5:4 Ba timirtiya ongidaape guye Simoonako, “Gede ciimmuwako shiishada moluwa oykanaw hinte gitiya yeggite” yaagis." 
Luke5:5 Simooni zaaridi, “Astamaariyaw, qamma kumethi daaburishe aqidi aykoka oykibooko, shin ne giiko gitiya yeggana” yaagis." 
Luke5:6 Enti gitiya yeggida wode gitey daaketana gakanaw daro molo oykidosona. 
Luke5:7 Hara wogolon de7iya banta laggeti yidi, bantana maaddana mela wuttidi xeegidosona. Enti yidi nam7u wogoloti, haathan mitettana gakanaw molon kunthidosona." 
Luke5:8 Simoon Phexroosi hessa be7ida wode, Yesuusa sinthan kundidi, “Godaw, taani nagarancho asi gidiya gisho, taape shaaketa” yaagis." 
Luke5:9 I hessa giday, inne iyara de7eysati oykida moluwa darotethan malaaletida gishosa." 
Luke5:10 Qassi Simoona lagge gidida Zabdiyoosa nayti Yayqoobaranne Yohaanisara malaaletidosona. Yesuusi Simoonako, “Babofa! Hizape neeni ase oykiya asi gidana” yaagis." 
Luke5:11 Enti wogolota gaxa shiishidaape guye ubbaa aggidi Yesuusa kaallidosona. 
Luke5:12 Yesuusi katamatape issuwan de7ishin issi baro hargen oyketida asi he kataman de7ees. He uray Yesuusa be7idi iya sinthan gufannidi, “Godaw, ne shene gidiko tana geeshshanaw danda7aasa” gidi woossis." 
Luke5:13 Yesuusi ba kushiya yeddi bochidi, “Ee, ta shene; geeyiya” yaagis. Iira baro hargey uraape kichis." 
Luke5:14 Yesuusi, “Haysa oodeska odopa, shin bada nenatethaa Ayhude kahine bessa. Ne geeyidaysas marka gidana mela Musey kiitida yarsho yarsha” gidi kiittis." 
Luke5:15 Gidoshin, iya sunthay kasepe aadhidi eretishe bis. Daro asay I odiyaba si7anawunne banta hargiyafe paxanaw yoosona." 
Luke5:16 Shin Yesuusi daro wode geema bessi bidi woossees. 
Luke5:17 Issi gallas Yesuusi tamaarsishin Galilapenne Yihuda heera ubbaafe qassi Yerusalaamepe yida Farsaawetinne higge astamaareti yan uttidosona. Asaa pathiya Godaa wolqayka iyara de7ees. 
Luke5:18 He wode asay issi gunda asi halara tookidi ehidosona. Soo gelsidi iya sinthan wothanaw qopidosona. 
Luke5:19 Shin asaa darotethaafe dendoysan soo gelsanaw xoonetidi keethaa bolla keyidi, kaara qawuxidi, harganchuwa halara asaa shaakidi Yesuusa sinthan yeggidosona." 
Luke5:20 Yesuusi enta ammanuwa be7idi, “La addiyaw, ne nagaray atto geetetis” yaagis." 
Luke5:21 Higge astamaaretinne Farsaaweti, “Haysi Xoossaa bolla yaagidi odetey oonee? Issi Xoossafe attishin, hari nagara atto gaanaw danda7ey oonee?” yaagidi qopidosona." 
Luke5:22 Yesuusi enta qofaa erida gisho entako, “Hinte wozanan hessatho ayis qopeetii?" 
Luke5:23 ‘Ne nagaray qushetis geysafenne dendada ba geysafe awusi kawuyii?’ 
Luke5:24 Shin ta hessa giday Asa Na7i sa7a bolla nagara ato gaanaw maati de7eysa hinte erana melasa.” Hessafe kaallidi, gunda uraako, “Denda; ne algaa tookada ne soo ba” yaagis." 
Luke5:25 I ellesi dendidi enta sinthan eqis; I tooketidi yida algaa tookidi Xoossaa galatishe ba soo bis. 
Luke5:26 He wode ubbayka malaaletidosona. Xoossaa galatishe, “Hachi gita malaata be7ida” yaagidi yashetidosona." 
Luke5:27 Hessafe guye, Yesuusi yaape keyidi bis. Leewe geetetiya issi qaraxa qanxiseysi qaraxa qanxisiya bessan uttidaysa be7idi, “Tana kaalla” yaagis." 
Luke5:28 I ubbaba aggidi, dendidi iya kaallis."
