Luke5:29 He Leewey ba son gita gibira giigisis. Daro qaraxa qanxiseysatinne hara asati katha bolla uttidosona. 
Luke5:30 Farsaawetinne higge astamaareti, “Qaraxa qanxeysataranne nagaranchotara ayis meetinne uyeetii?” yaagidi Yesuusa tamaareta bolla zuuzumidosona." 
Luke5:31 Yesuusi entako, “Harganchotasafe attishin, paxatas aakime koshshenna." 
Luke5:32 Taani nagaranchota maarotako zaaranaasafe attishin, geeshshata xeeganaw yabiike” yaagidi zaaris." 
Luke5:33 Enti Yesuusako, “Yohaanisa tamaareti daro wode xoomosona, woossosona; qassi Farsaaweta tamaaretika hessatho oothosona. Shin neysati ubba wode moosonanne uyoosona” yaagidosona." 
Luke5:34 Yesuusi entako, “Machiw ekeysi entara de7ishin xeegetida asay xoomana mela oothanaw danda7eetii?" 
Luke5:35 Shin mushuray entafe shaaketana gallasay yaana, he wode enti xoomana.”" 
Luke5:36 Qassi yaagidi leemiso odis; “Ooratha ma7ope peedhidi gal7a ma7o bolla sikey oonika baawa. Hessatho oothiko ooratha ma7uwa peedhees, oorathay gal7aas giigenna." 
Luke5:37 Mal7anto woyne gal7a ogoron qoliya oonika baawa. Hessa oothiko, ooratha woyney gal7a ogoruwa dhusees; woyney gukees ogoroyka maaddonnaba gidees." 
Luke5:38 Hessa gisho, ooratha woyney ooratha ogoron qolettanaw bessees." 
Luke5:39 Hiza, caalay lo77o giya gisho, caala woyne uyi simmidi mal7anto koyey oonika baawa” yaagis." 
Luke6:1 Issi Sambaata gallas Yesuusi giste gade giddora aadhees. Yesuusa tamaareti tiya banga duuthidi banta kushen shirkidi moosona. 
Luke6:2 Shin Farsaaweta giddofe issoti issoti, “Sambaata gallas oothanaw bessonnaba ayis oothetii?” yaagidosona." 
Luke6:3 Yesuusi entako zaaridi, “Dawiti koshatida wode baara de7eysatara issife oothoysa nabbabibeketii?" 
Luke6:4 Xoossa Keethi gelidi Ayhude kahineta xalaalas bessiya daabbuwa mis; baara de7eysataska immis” yaagis. 
Luke6:5 Qassi Yesuusi, “Asa Na7ay Sambaata Godaa” yaagis." 
Luke6:6 Hara Sambaata gallas Yesuusi ayhude woosa keethi gelidi tamaarsees. He bessan ushacha kushey silida issi asi de7ees. 
Luke6:7 Higge astamaaretinne Farsaaweti iya mootanaw gaaso koyidi Sambaata gallas pathiko be7ana gidi naagoosona. 
Luke6:8 Shin Yesuusi enta qofaa eridi kushey silida uraako, “Dendada asaa giddon eqa” yaagis. Urayka dendi eqis." 
Luke6:9 Yesuusi, “Ane ta hintena issiba oychayis; Sambaata gallas oothanaw bessey lo77obayeye iitabayee? Shempo ashoye woyko dhayso?” yaagis." 
Luke6:10 Qassi Yesuusi iya yuushuwan de7iya asaa yuushshi xeellidi uraako, “Ne kushiya piddi ootha” yaagis. Urayka I gidaysada oothin kushey paxis." 
Luke6:11 Shin higge astamaaretinne Farsaaweti daro yilotidosona. Yesuusa bolla ay oothino gidi banta giddon maqetidosona. 
Luke6:12 He wode gallasatape issuwan Yesuusi woossanaw zuma bolla keyis. Qamma kumethi woossishe aqis. 
Luke6:13 Wontethe ba tamaareta xeegidi enta giddofe tammanne nam7ata dooridi, entana, “Hawaareta” gidi sunthis." 
Luke6:14 Entika, Phexroosa gidi sunthida Simoona, iya ishaa Indiriyasa, Yayqooba, Yohaanisa, Filphoosa, Bartelemoosa," 
Luke6:15 Maatosa, Toomasa, Ilfiyoosa na7aa Yayqooba, ba biittas mishetiya Simoona," 
Luke6:16 Yayqooba na7aa Yihudanne Yesuusa aathidi immida Asqoroota Yihuda. 
Luke6:17 Yesuusi entara issife zumaape wodhidi demba bessan eqis. Iya tamaaretape daroti he bessan de7oosona. Yihuda biitta ubbaafe Yerusalaamepe, Xiroosapenne Sidoona abba gaxape yida daro asay de7ees." 
Luke6:18 Enti yiday, I tamaarsiyaba si7anawunne banta hargiyafe paxanaasa. Tuna ayyaanan waayetiya asatika paxidosona." 
Luke6:19 Wolqi iyape keyidi asa ubbaa pathiya gisho asay iya bochanaw koyoosona. 
Luke6:20 Ba tamaareta xeellidi haysada yaagis: “Hinteno, manqoto, hinte anjetidaysata; Xoossaa kawotethay hintesa." 
Luke6:21 Hinte ha77i koshateysati anjetidaysata, hinte kallana. Hinte ha77i yeekeysati anjetidaysata hinte miicana." 
Luke6:22 Asay hintena Asa Na7aa gisho, ixiya wode, hintena hiliya wode, hintena enti toochiya wodenne, iita sunthu enti hintew immiya wode hinte anjetidaysata." 
Luke6:23 “Heko, hinte woytoy salon gita gidiya gisho he wode ufaysan gupite. Ayis giiko, beni enta aawati nabeta bolla hessada oothidosona.”" 
Luke6:24 “Shin dureto hintena ayye! hinte ha77i lo77o duussaa ekideta. 
Luke6:25 Ha77i kallidaysato hintena ayye! hinte koshatana. Ha77i miiceysato hintenosho hinte kayotananne yeekana. 
Luke6:26 Asi ubbay hinte lo77otetha xalaala odiya wode hintena ayye! Enta aawati beni wordancho nabeta bolla hessada oothidosona. 
Luke6:27 “Shin tana si7iya hintew ta odayis; hinte morketa dosite; hintena ixeysatas lo77oba oothite. 
Luke6:28 Hintena baaddeyisata anjite, hintena naaqeysatas woossite." 
Luke6:29 Issi bagga shakala baqeysas hanko bagga bessa. Ne laxana ekana geysas ne shamziya gujada imma. 
Luke6:30 Nena woossiya ubbaas imma; neepe ekida oonaka zaaro gada oychofa. 
Luke6:31 Asay hintew oothana mela hinte koyaba ubbaa hinteka asaas oothite. 
Luke6:32 “Hinte, hintena dosiya asata xalaala dosiko, ay galati hintew de7ii? Hari attoshin, nagaranchotika bantana doseyisata dosoosona." 
Luke6:33 Hintew lo77oba ootheyisata xalaalas lo77oba oothiko hintew ay galati de7ii? Nagaranchotika hessada oothosona. 
Luke6:34 Tal7e zaarana asa xalaalas hinte tal7iko ay dumma galatetetii? Nagaranchotika guye zaarana asi be7idi tal7oosona.” 
Luke6:35 “Shin hinte morketa dosite; entaw lo77oba oothite. Guye ekanaw qoponna tal7ite. Hessan hinte ekana woytoy gita gidana. Hinte Ubbaafe Bolla Xoossaa nayta gidana. I bana galatonaysatasinne iitatas keeha. 
Luke6:36 Hinte aaway keeha gidoysada hinteka keeha gidite. 
Luke6:37 “Asa bolla pirdofite; hinte bolla pirdetenna. Hinte boretonna mela oonaka boropite. Atto giite; Xoossay hintew atto gaana. 
Luke6:38 Immite; hintew imetana. Hinte makidaban hintew zaari maketana, ubbaraka lo77o makiyaban baqidi, suuddi kunthidi, laaletana gakanaw hintew maketi imetana” yaagis." 
Luke6:39 Qassika Yesuusi yaagidi entaw leemiso odis; “Qooqey qooqe kaalethanaw danda7ii? Kaalethiko nam7ayka woli ekidi aafon wullokonayee? 
Luke6:40 Tamaarey astamaarepe aadhenna. Shin loythi tamaarida uray ba astamaariyatho hanees. 
Luke6:41 “Ne ishaa ayfen de7iya buuriya ayis be7ay? Ne ayfen de7iya tuussu daaneysa ayis be7ikii? 
Luke6:42 Ne ayfen de7iya tuussu daaneysa be7onna ne ishaako, ‘Ta ishaw, ne ayfen de7iya buuriya kesso’ gaanaw waana danda7ey? Neno cubbuwaw, koyrottada ne ayfen de7iya tuussu daaneysa kessa. Hessafe guye, ne isha ayfen de7iya buuriya kessanaw geeshshada xeellana." 
Luke6:43 “Lo77o mithi iita ayfe ayfena; hessadaka iita mithi lo77o ayfe ayfena. 
Luke6:44 Ayfe ayfiya mithi ubbay ba ayfen eretees. Agunthafe balase ayfey maxetenna qassi laadepe woyne ayfey maxetenna. 
Luke6:45 Lo77o asi ba wozanan kumida lo77obaape lo77oba kessees. Iita asi ba wozanan kumida iitabaape iitabaa kessees. Asi ba wozanan kumidi palahidabaape ba doonan odetees. 
Luke6:46 “Ta geysa ootheketa, shin yaatin ayis tana, ‘Godaw, Godaw, geetii?’" 
Luke6:47 Taako yeynne ta qaala si7idi poliya ubbay oona daaniyako ta hintena bessaana. 
Luke6:48 I keethe keexanaw ziqi oothi, olla bookidi, garsan de7iya zaalla bolla keethe essida cinca ura daanees. Di7oy di77idi he keetha sugis, shin minthidi keexida gisho, qaaxanaw danda7ibeenna." 
Luke6:49 Shin ta qaala si7idi oothonay ba keetha shafe bolla keexida ura daanees. Di7oy di77idi he keethaa sugida wode ellesidi kundis. He keethay wolqaama kundethi kundis” yaagis. 
Luke7:1 Yesuusi hessa ubbaa asaa sinthan tamaarsidi ongidaape guye, Qifirnahooma katamaa bis." 
Luke7:2 He bessan issi mato halaqay de7ees. I daro dosiya aylley hargetidi hayqos gakis. 
Luke7:3 I Yesuusaba si7ida wode ba aylliya pathana mela iya woosso gidi issi issi Ayhude cimata Yesuusako kiittis. 
Luke7:4 Kiitetidaysati, Yesuusako bidi, “Ne iyaw haysa oothanaw bessees." 
Luke7:5 Ayis giiko, ha uray nu asaa dosees, ayhude woosa keethaaka keexis” gidi minthi woossidosona" 
Luke7:6 Yesuusika entara bis. Mato halaqaa sooko matiya wode ba laggeta iyako kiittidi, “Godaw, ta kaarape garsan ne gelanaw ta bessonna gisho, daaburopa." 
Luke7:7 Taka tana ne sinthe shiiqanaw bessiya asi gada qopike. Shin ne issi qaala oda; ta aylley paxana. 
Luke7:8 Taw taape bollara halaqay de7ees, taape garsan ta kiittiya wotaadareti de7oosona. Issuwa, ‘Ba’ giiko bees, hankuwa, ‘Haaya’ giiko yees. Ta aylliyako, ‘Hanno ootha’ giiko oothees” yaagis." 
Luke7:9 Yesuusi hessa si7ida wode malaaletis. Guye simmidi baara yaa asaako, “Taani hintew tuma odayis; hari attoshin Isra7eelenka haysa mela gita ammano demmabike” yaagis." 
Luke7:10 Kiitetida asati soo simmiya wode aylley paxin demmidosona. 
Luke7:11 Guutha wodepe guye Yesuusi Nayne katamaa bis. Iya tamaaretaranne hara daro asati iyara bidosona. 
Luke7:12 I katamaa gelana haniya wode aha tookida daro asati katamaape keyoosona. Hayqida na7ay ba aayes issuwa, iyaka am7o gidada de7awusu. Katama asaape daroti iira de7oosona." 
Luke7:13 Goday iyo be7ida wode qadhetidi, “Yeekofa” yaagis." 
Luke7:14 Shiiqidi hala bochin tookida asati eqidosona. Yesuusi, “La, yalagaw denda” yaagis." 
Luke7:15 Hayqidaysi dendi uttidi oda oykis. Yesuusi na7aa ekidi aayes immis. 
Luke7:16 Asa ubbay yashetidi, “Gita nabey nu giddon dendis; Xoossay ba asaa be7is” yaagidi Xoossaa galatidosona." 
Luke7:17 Iya sunthay Yihudaninne he heeran de7iya biitta ubban si7etis. 
Luke7:18 Xammaqiya Yohaanisa tamaareti hessa ubbaa Yohaanisas odidosona. I enta giddofe nam7ata xeegidi," 
Luke7:19 “Yaana geetetiday neneyee? Woyko haraa naagino?” yaagidi oychite gidi Godaako kiittis. 
Luke7:20 Asati “Yesuusako bidi, Xammaqiya Yohaanisi, ‘Yaana geetetiday neneyee? Woyko haraa naagino?’ giite gidi nuna neeko kiittis” yaagidosona." 
Luke7:21 He saatenka Yesuusi daro asaa hargiyafe pathis. Tuna ayyaanata kessis, qooqida ayfiyaka xeelisis." 
Luke7:22 Yohaanisa matape kiitetidi yidaysatako, “Bidi hinte be7idaysanne si7idaysa Yohaanisas odite. Ayfe qooqeti xeelloosona, gundati birshetidi hemetoosona, baro harganchoti geeyosona, tulleti si7oosona, hayqidaysati hayqope dendoosona, manqotas Wongelay sabbaketees." 
Luke7:23 Tanan dhubetonna oonika anjetidaysa.” 
Luke7:24 Yohaanisi kiittidaysati bidaape guye Yesuusi asaas Yohaanisaba yaagidi odis: “Hinte ay be7anaw mela biitta keydetii? Carkoy qaathiya maata be7anaseyee? 
Luke7:25 Yaatin, ay be7anaw keydetii? Koyse ma7o ma7ida asaa be7anaseyee? Koyse ma7o ma7idaysatinne sa7i injetida asay kawo gadhon de7oosona." 
Luke7:26 Yaatin, ay be7anaw keydetii? Nabiya be7anaseyee? Ee, ta yaagayis: hinte be7anaw keyday nabepe aadheysa." 
Luke7:27 “ ‘Ne ogiya ne sinthan giigisiya ta kiitanchuwa neepe sinthe ta kiittana’ geetetidi xaafetiday iyassa. 
Luke7:28 Ta hintew odayis; maccasape yeletidaysata giddofe Yohaanisape aadhey baawa. Xoossaa kawotethan ubbaafe guuxeysi, I ubbaafe gita gidana” yaagis." 
Luke7:29 Hari attoshin, Yesuusa qaala si7ida qaraxa qanxiseysati ubbay Yohaanisa kushen xammaqetidi Xoossay xillo gideysa qoncisidosona." 
Luke7:30 Shin Farsaawetinne higge astamaareti Yohaanisa kushen xammaqetonna ixidi Xoossaa zoriya leqsidosona. 
Luke7:31 Yesuusi kaallidi haysada yaagis: “Hiza, ha wodiya yeletethaa aybira daaniso? Entika oona daanonna?" 
Luke7:32 Giya giddon uttidi woli xeegidi, ‘Nu hintew suusul7e punnin, hinte yexeketa. Nu sabbidi zeleelin, hinte yeekeketa’ giya nayta daanosona." 
Luke7:33 Xammaqiya Yohaanisi moonnanne uyonna yin, ‘Iita ayyaanara de7ees gideta.’" 
Luke7:34 Asa Na7ay mishenne uyishe yin, ‘Yarambanne ushshancho, qaraxa qanxiseysatanne nagaranchota dabbo’ gideta." 
Luke7:35 Hiza, cincatethaa tumatethay iya nayta ubbaa matan eretis” yaagis." 
Luke7:36 Issi Farsaawey Yesuusa kathi muzanaw ba soo xeegis. I Farisaawiya soo bidi gayta bolla uttis. 
Luke7:37 He kataman issi nagarancho maccasi, Yesuusi Farisaawiya son gibira bolla de7eysa si7ida wode daro al7o philqaaxe shitto ekada yasu." 
Luke7:38 Yesuusape guye baggara, iya tohuwa matan eqada yeekashe iya tohuwa ba afuthaara laakothawusu. Ba binaanara iya tohuwa quchashenne yeerashe shitto tiyasu." 
Luke7:39 Gibira giigisida Farsaawey hessa be7ida wode ba wozanan, “Haysi nabe gidiyako ha maccasiya, iya bochiyara ooneko qassi iya nagarancho gideysaka I eranashin” yaagis." 
Luke7:40 Yesuusi, “Simoona, ta new odiyabay de7ees” yaagis. I, “Astamaariyaw, taw oda” yaagis." 
Luke7:41 Yesuusi iyako, “Nam7u asati issi uraape miishe tal7idosona. Issoy ichashu xeetu bira hankoy qassi ishatamu bira tal7idosona." 
Luke7:42 Nam7ayka tal7iya cigganaw xoonetin, nam7ataska tal7iya maaris. Hiza, ha nam7atape he uraa daro dosanay new oona daani” yaagis." 
Luke7:43 Simooni, “Daro acoy maaretida uray daro dosana daanees” yaagis. Yesuusi, “Ne tuma pirdadasa” yaagis." 
Luke7:44 Hessafe guye, Yesuusi maccaseeko simmi xeellidi, Simoonako, “Hanno maccasiw be7ay? Taani ne soo gelin hari attishin, ne taw toho haathe immabaaka, shin iya ta tohuwa ba afuthan laakothada ba binaanan quchasu." 
Luke7:45 Neeni tana yeera ekabaaka, shin iya ta ne soo gelosape doomada ta tohuwa yeero aggabuku." 
Luke7:46 Neeni ta huuphiyan zayte tiyabaka, shin iya ta tohuwa shitto tiyawusu." 
Luke7:47 Iya tana daro dosida gisho, I daro nagaray atto geetetis. Guutha nagari atto geetetida uray guuthara dosees.”" 
Luke7:48 Yesuusi maccaseeko, “Ne nagaray atto geetetis” yaagis." 
Luke7:49 Iyara issife gaytan uttidi miya imathati, “Nagara atto yaagey, I haysi oonee?” yaagidi banta wozanan qopidosona." 
Luke7:50 Yesuusi maccaseeko, “Ne ammanoy nena ashshis; saro ba” yaagis." 
Luke8:1 Hessafe guye, Yesuusi Xoossaa kawotethaa Wongela sabbakishe katamaaranne gutaara aadhis. He wode tammanne nam7u hawaareti iyara de7oosona." 
Luke8:2 Qassi tuna ayyaanapenne dumma dumma hargiyafe paxida issi issi maccasati iyara de7oosona. Entika, laapun tuna ayyaanati keyida Magdela Mayraamo," 
Luke8:3 Herodiisa shuuma Kuuza machiw Yohaana, Soosinaranne qassi hara daroti entana miishen maaddeysati de7oosona." 
Luke8:4 Daro asay dumma dumma katamaape iyako shiiqin leemison entaw odis. 
Luke8:5 “Issi goshshanchoy zerethi zeranaw keyis. I zerishin issi issi zerethay oge gaxan wodhidi yedhetis, salo kafoti maxidosona." 
Luke8:6 Harati shaalloy garsan de7iya biitta bolla wodhidosona. Buroo dolida mela biittan laahoy bayna gisho miccidosona. 
Luke8:7 Hara zerethay qassi aguntha giddon wodhis. Agunthaara wolla diccida gisho agunthay cuullidi bessan ashshis. 
Luke8:8 Harati lo77o biitta bolla wodhidosona. Dolida wode xeetu kushe ayfidosona.” Hessa odi ongidi, ba qaala dhoqu oothidi, “Si7iya haythi de7iya ubbay si7o” yaagis." 
Luke8:9 Iya tamaareti, “Ha leemisuwa birshethay aybee?” yaagidi oychidosona" 
Luke8:10 I, “Xoossaa kawotethaa xuuraa erana mela hintew imetis. Shin harati be7ishe demmonna mela, si7ishe akeekona mela leemison odayis." 
Luke8:11 “Hiza, ha leemisuwa birshethay haysa: koche yaagetiday Xoossaa qaala." 
Luke8:12 Oge gaxan wodhida zerethay qaala si7eyisata. Gidoshin, enti ammanidi attonna mela Xalahey qaala enta wozanaape maxi diggees." 
Luke8:13 Shaalloy garsan de7iya biitta bolla wodhida zerethay qaala si7idi ufaysan ekeyisata. Enti ha77is ammanoosonape attishin, xaphoy bayna gisho paacey gakiya wode ellesidi kaddoosona." 
Luke8:14 Aguntha giddon zeretida zerethay qaala si7eyisata. Entika alamiya qofan, duretethaninne sa7a duussaa miikotethan cuuletidi besseysada ayfibookona." 
Luke8:15 Lo77o biittan wodhida zerethay lo77o wozanan qaala si7idi naageysatanne danda7an minnidi ayfe ayfeyisata. 
Luke8:16 “Xompe oythidi, daacho kammey woyko arsafe garsan wothey deenna. Geliya asi be7ana mela dhoqa bessan wothees." 
Luke8:17 “Hessa gisho, qonce keyonna qosetidi attiyabay, eretonna geemmidi attiyabay deenna." 
Luke8:18 “Hiza, hinte qaala waati si7iyako akeekite. De7iya ubbaas guzhetidi imetana, baynaysas hari attoshin iyaw de7iya guuthiyaka iyape eketana” yaagis." 
Luke8:19 Yesuusa aayeranne ishatara iyako yidosona. Shin asaa darotethaafe dendoysan iya demmanaw danda7ibookona. 
Luke8:20 Issi asi Yesuusako, “Ne aayeranne ne ishatara nena koyidi karen naagoosona” yaagis." 
Luke8:21 Yesuusi zaaridi, “Xoossa qaala si7idi ooson peesheysati ubbay, taw aayonne taw isha” yaagis." 
Luke8:22 Issi gallas Yesuusaranne iya tamaaretara issife wogolon gelidi, “Abbaa pinnoos” yaagis. Entika baanaw dendidosona." 
Luke8:23 Abbaa bollara enti pinnanaw bishin Yesuusi dhiskis. Qoponna mino carkoy abba bolla dendis. Haathi wogoluwan gelin wogoloy mitetethi oykiya wode ubbay babidosona. 
Luke8:24 Iya tamaareti iyako shiiqidi, “Godaw! Godaw! nu dhayos” yaagidi Yesuusa denthidosona. Yesuusi dendidi carkuwanne gotiya hanqis. Ellesidi carkoynne gotey wopu gis; sarotethi simmis." 
Luke8:25 Yesuusi ba tamaaretako, “Hinte ammanoy awunee?” yaagis. Entika, yayyishenne malaaletishe issoy issuwako, “Carkoynne haathay kiiteteysi, I haysi oonee” yaagidosona." 
Luke8:26 Abba pinnidi Galila baggara de7iya Gergesoone biitta gakidosona. 
Luke8:27 Yesuusi wogolope keyidi sa7an wodhishin tuna ayyaanan oyketida uray katamaape keydi iyara gahetis. Daro laythi ma7o ma7onna kallo duufon de7eesipe attishin, soo gelenna." 
Luke8:28 Yesuusa be7ida wode iya sinthan gufannidi, ba qaala dhoqu oothidi, “Ubbaafe Bolla Xoossaa na7aw Yesuusa neera taw aybi issifetethi de7ii? Hayyana tana ha77i un7ethofarki” yaagis." 
Luke8:29 Hessa I giday, tuna ayyaanay uraape keyana mela Yesuusi hanqida gishosa. Daro wode tuna ayyaanay iya haarida gisho santhalaataninne toho qachiya biratan qashetidi naagetees. Shin qashuwa duuthidi tuna ayyaanan laagetidi mela biitta gelis." 
Luke8:30 Yesuusi, “Ne sunthay oone” yaagidi oychis. I, daro tuna ayyaanati iya oykida gisho bana, “Leegiyona” gis." 
Luke8:31 Tuna ayyaanati bantana Si7oole kiittonna mela woossidosona. 
Luke8:32 He bessan zooze bolla miya guduntho wudey hemetees. Hini gudunthotan gelino gidi woossidosona, ika “Gelite” gis." 
Luke8:33 Tuna ayyaanati uraape keyidi gudunthotan gelidosona. Wudey deriyape duge gurguxidi abban gelis. 
Luke8:34 Henthanchoti hanidaysa be7ida wode woxi bidi, katamaninne guta ubban odidosona." 
Luke8:35 Asay hanidaba be7anaw keyidi Yesuusako yidosona. Tuna ayyaanay keyida uray ma7o ma7idi, iya wozanay simmin, Yesuusa toho matan uttidaysa demmidi yayyidosona." 
Luke8:36 Iya be7ida asay tuna ayyaanan oyketida uray waanidi paxidaako odidosona. 
Luke8:37 Gergesoone yuushon de7iya asay gita yashshi yayidi, Yesuusi banta matape baana mela woossidosona. I wogoluwan gelidi guye simmis." 
Luke8:38 Tuna ayyaanay keyida uray Yesuusara daanaw woossis. 
Luke8:39 Shin Yesuusi iyako, “Ne soo simma, Xoossay ay mela gitaba new oothidaako oda” yaagidi moyzis. Urayka Yesuusi ay mela gitaba iyaw oothidaako katama ubban markatishe bis." 
Luke8:40 Asay naagidi gam7ida gisho Yesuusi simmiya wode moki ekidosona. 
Luke8:41 Ayhude woosa keetha halaqa gidida Iyaroosa geetetiya uray ba soo yaana mela Yesuusa tohuwa bolla wodhidi woossis. 
Luke8:42 Iyaw tammanne nam7u laythi gidida macca na7i saketada hayqos gakada de7awusu. Yesuusi biya wode asay iya un7ethees. 
Luke8:43 Tammanne nam7u laythi suuthi goggishe gam7ida maccasi de7awusu. Iya baw de7iya miishiya aakimetas immada ongasu. Shin paxanaw danda7abuku. 
Luke8:44 Iya Yesuusas guye baggara shiiqada, iya afilaa macaraa bochasu, iiraka goggiya suuthay eqi aggis." 
Luke8:45 Yesuusi, “Tana bochiday oonee?” yaagis. Ubbay, “Nu bochibooko” yaagin, Phexroosi, “Astamaariyaw, daro asay kaallishininne un7ethishin be7ashe waanada, ‘Tana bochiday oonee?’ gay” yaagis." 
Luke8:46 Shin Yesuusi, “Issi asi tana bochis; ayis giiko, wolqi taape keyoysi taw eretis” yaagis." 
Luke8:47 Maccasiya, ibay qoncidaysa erida wode kokorashe yada Yesuusa tohuwa bolla kundasu. Ayis bochidaakonne waanada ellesada paxidaako asaa ubbaa sinthan markatasu." 
Luke8:48 I, “Ta naate, ne ammanoy nena pathis; saro ba” yaagis." 
Luke8:49 Yesuusi oda ongonna de7ishin, ayhude woosa keetha halaqaa, Iyaroosa soope issi asi yidi, “Iyaroosa, ne na7iya hayqasu; astamaariya mela daabursofa” yaagis." 
Luke8:50 Shin Yesuusi hessa si7idi Iyaroosako, “Babofa! Ammana, ne na7iya paxana” yaagis." 
Luke8:51 Yesuusi Iyaroosa soo gakida wode Phexroosape, Yohaanisape, Yayqoobape, na7e aawapenne aayepe attishin, hari gelana mela koybeenna." 
Luke8:52 He bessan de7iya asa ubbay na7ees mishetidi yeekishin, Yesuusi, “Yeekofite Na7iya dhiskasupe attishin, hayqabuuku” yaagis." 
Luke8:53 Asay na7iya hayqidaysa eriya gisho, iya oda leqidi miicidosona." 
Luke8:54 Shin Yesuusi na7e kushiya oykidi, “Naatte denda” yaagis." 
Luke8:55 Na7ees shempoy simmin denda eqasu. Yesuusi entako, “Iwu miyaba immite” yaagis." 
Luke8:56 Na7ee aawaranne aayera malaaletidosona. Shin Yesuusi haysa, “Oodeska odopite” yaagis." 
Luke9:1 Yesuusi tammanne nam7u hawaareta baako xeegidi, tuna ayyaanata kessana melanne harge ubbaa pathana mela wolqanne maata immis." 
Luke9:2 Xoossaa kawotethaaba markatanaadanne harganchota pathanaada kiittis. 
Luke9:3 I entako, “Xam7a gidin ogoro gidin kathi gidin miishe gidin laammidi ma7iya afila gidin oges gidi aykoka oykofite." 
Luke9:4 He katamaape hinte keyana gakanaw imathatethan hinte gelida keethan gam7ite. 
Luke9:5 Oonika hintena mokonna ixiko he katamaape keyishe entaw marka gidana mela hinte tohuwan de7iya baana pitidi keyite.” 
Luke9:6 Entika kiitetidaysada keyidi wongela odishenne dumma dumma gutatan harganchota pathishe aadhidosona. 
Luke9:7 Galila biitta haariya Herodiisi Yesuusi oothidaba ubbaa si7ida wode dagammis. Ayis giiko, issi issi asati Yohaanisi hayqope dendonna aggenna yaagosona." 
Luke9:8 Baggati, “Eeliyaasi qoncis” goosona; harati qassi, “Beni nabetape issoy hayqope dendis” yaagidi odetoosona." 
Luke9:9 Shin Herodiisi, “Taani Yohaanisa qoodhiya qanxisada wodhas. Yaatin, haysatho yaagetidi iyabaa odetey, I oonee?” yaagidi ba ayfen be7anaw koyees." 
Luke9:10 Tammanne nam7u hawaareti guye simmi yidi, enti oothidaba ubbaa Yesuusas odidosona. I entana ekidi Beetesayda katamaape gaxa efis." 
Luke9:11 Shin daro asay Yesuusa gideysa eridi iya kaallidosona. I enta moki ekidi Xoossaa kawotethaaba tamaarsis; paxanaw koyeysataka pathis. 
Luke9:12 Sa7i omarsiya wode tammanne nam7u hawaareti iyako shiiqidi, “Nu de7ey mela biitta gidiya gisho asay dumma dumma gutatanne katamata bidi, kathinne aqiya bessi koyana mela asaa moyza” yaagidosona." 
Luke9:13 Shin I, “Entaw miyaba hinte immite” yaagis. Enti, “Nuus de7ey ichashu uythinne nam7u molo gidiya gisho, ha asaas gidiya kathi nuuni bidi shammonna ixiko gidenna” yaagidosona." 
Luke9:14 He bessan ichashu mukulu gidiya addeti de7oosona. Yesuusi ba tamaaretako, “Ishataman ishataman shaaki shaaki asaa utisite” yaagis." 
Luke9:15 Iya tamaareti, I kiitidaysada asaa utisidosona." 
Luke9:16 I ichashu uythaanne nam7u molota ekidi, salo xeellidi, Xoossaa galatidi, menthidi asaa ubbaa gathana mela ba tamaaretas immis." 
Luke9:17 Ubbay midi kallidosona. Entafe attida tiifey tammanne nam7u gayta kumethi gidis. 
Luke9:18 Yesuusi ba xalaala woossishin, iya tamaareti iyako yidosona. I, “Asay tana oona goonna?” gidi oychis." 
Luke9:19 Enti zaaridi “Issoti issoti, ‘Xammaqiya Yohaanisa, baggati Eeliyaasa, harati qassi, beni nabetape issoy hayqope dendis’ yaagosona” yaagidosona." 
Luke9:20 I zaaridi, “Yaatin hinte tana oona geetii?” yaagis. Phexroosi, “Neeni Xoossaafe kiitetida Kiristoosa” yaagidi zaaris." 
Luke9:21 Yesuusi haysa oodeska odopite gidi minthidi odis. 
Luke9:22 Qassika Yesuusi, “Asa Na7i daro metuwa ekana. Biitta cimata, kahine halaqatanne higge astamaareta kushen aadhidi imetana. Enti iya wodhana, shin I heedzantho gallas hayqope dendana” yaagis." 
Luke9:23 Yesuusi asaa ubbaako, “Tana kaallanaw koyey oonika de7iko bana kaddo, ba masqaliya gallas gallas tookidi tana kaallo." 
Luke9:24 Ba shempiw ashshanaw koya ubbay iyo dhaysees, ba shempiw ta gisho gidi dhaysiya oonika iyo ashshees." 
Luke9:25 Asi alame ubbaa haaridi, gidoshin, ba shempiw dhaysiyaba woyko qohiyaba gidiko iya ay maaddii?" 
Luke9:26 Oonika tananinne ta qaalan yeellatiko, Asa Na7i ba bonchuwara hessadaka aawa bonchuwaranne Geeshsha kiitanchota bonchuwara yaa wode iyan yeellatana." 
Luke9:27 Ta hintew tuma odayis; haysan eqidaysata giddofe Xoossaa kawotethaa be7onnashin hayqonna asati de7oosona” yaagis. 
Luke9:28 Yesuusi he oda odin, hospun gallasape guye, Phexroosa, Yayqoobanne Yohaanisa baara ekidi woossanaw zuma bolla keyis." 
Luke9:29 I woosa bolla de7ishin iya ayfe karey laametis; afilayka booxidi, awa mela phoolis." 
Luke9:30 Nam7u asati, entika Museranne Eeliyaasara bonchon qoncidi," 
Luke9:31 Yerusalaamen poletanaw de7iyaba, hessika, I ha alamiyape shaaketanaba iyara odetoosona." 
Luke9:32 Phexroosanne iyara de7eyisata dhiskoy efin, enti dhiskofe barkiya wode iya bonchuwanne iyara eqida nam7u asata be7idosona." 
Luke9:33 Asati Yesuusape shaaketidi baana hanishin, Phexroosi Yesuusako, “Godaw, nu haysan gidiko nuus ay mela lo77o! Issino new, issino Muses, issino Eeliyaasas oothidi, heedzu shaqara shaqaroos” yaagis. Shin I ay gidaako erenna." 
Luke9:34 I yaagidi odetishin shaaray yidi entana kammis. Enti he shaara giddo gelishe babidosona. 
Luke9:35 Shaara giddofe, “Ta doorida na7ay haysa iya si7ite” giya qaali si7etis." 
Luke9:36 Qaali si7etidaape guye, Yesuusi barka de7ishe bentis. He wode enti be7idaba oodeska odonna, banta wozanan oykidi si77i gidoosona." 
Luke9:37 Wontethe enti zuma bollafe wodhiya wode daro asay yidi iyara gahetidosona. 
Luke9:38 He wode asaa giddofe issi asi, “Astamaariyaw, ta issi na7aa yada be7arki." 
Luke9:39 Tuna ayyaanay qoponna oykidi waasisees; goponto yegisidi qakerethees, asatethaa qohidi un7ethidi yeddees." 
Luke9:40 Ne tamaareti kessana mela woossas, shin enti danda7ibookona” yaagidi woossis." 
Luke9:41 Yesuusi, “Ammanoy bayna geella yeletato, awude gakanaw ta hintera daane, hintena danda7anee? Ne na7aa bada haa ekaya” yaagis." 
Luke9:42 Na7aa ekidi yaa wode tuna ayyaanay sa7an holi yeggidi kokorsis. Shin Yesuusi tuna ayyaana hanqidi na7aape kessis. Na7aaka na7aa aawas immis. 
Luke9:43 Asa ubbay Xoossaa gita wolqan malaaletidosona. Enti I oothidaban malaaletishin, Yesuusi ba tamaaretako," 
Luke9:44 “Haysa ta hintew odeysa loythi si7ite; Asa Na7i morketa kushen aadhidi imetana” yaagis. 
Luke9:45 Shin I gidabay entafe geemmida gisho, akeekibokona. Hessa gisho, zaaridi oychanaw babidosona." 
Luke9:46 Yesuusa tamaareti, “Nu giddon gita gidanay oonee?” gidi palama oykidosona." 
Luke9:47 Yesuusi enta wozanaa qofaa eridi yooga na7aa ba matan essidi," 
Luke9:48 “Ha yooga na7aa ta sunthan mokiya oonika tana mokees, tana mokey tana kiittidaysa mokees, hinte ubbaafe guuxeysi, I gita gidana” yaagis." 
Luke9:49 Yohaanisi, “Godaw, issi asi ne sunthan tuna ayyaanata kessishin be7idi, I nuura gidonna gisho diggida” yaagis." 
Luke9:50 Yesuusi zaaridi, “Hintera eqetonnaysi, I hinte bagga. Hessa gisho, iya diggofite” yaagis." 
Luke9:51 Yesuusi salo biya wodey matatida gisho, Yerusalaame baanaw qanxidi dendis." 
Luke9:52 Samaare biittan de7iya issi gutaa bidi, ubbaba iyaw giigisana mela ase yaa kiittis." 
Luke9:53 Shin I bey Yerusalaame gidiya gisho, enti iya moki ekibookona." 
Luke9:54 Yesuusa tamaareti Yayqoobaranne Yohaanisara hessa be7idi, “Godaw, salope tami wodhidi enta mo gaana mela ne koyay” yaagidosona." 
Luke9:55 Shin Yesuusi guye simmi enta hanqetidi, “Hinte garsan aybi ayyaani de7iyako hinte ereketa. Asa Na7i ase ashshanaw yisipe attishin, dhaysanaasa gidenna” yaagis." 
Luke9:56 Yaape dendidi hara guta bidosona. 
Luke9:57 Enti ogera bishin, issi asi, “Ne biya soo ubba ta kaallana” yaagis." 
Luke9:58 Yesuusi zaaridi, “Workanatas olli, salo kafotas keethi de7ees, shin Asa Na7i ba huuphe shempisiya bessi baawa” yaagis." 
Luke9:59 Hankuwako, “Neeni tana kaalla” yaagis. Shin uray, “Godaw, koyrottada ta aawa moogada yaana” yaagis." 
Luke9:60 Shin Yesuusi, “Hayqidaysati hayqidaysata moogana mela entaw aggaaga; neeni bada Xoossaa kawotethaa sabbaka” yaagis." 
Luke9:61 Qassi hara asi, “Godaw, ta nena kaallana, shin koyrottada ta soo asa sarothada yaana” yaagis." 
Luke9:62 Yesuusi zaaridi, “Koxe oykidi guye xeelliya oonika Xoossa kawotethas bessenna” yaagis." 
Luke10:1 Hessafe guye, Goday hara laapun tammanne nam7u asata dooris. I baanaw qopida katamanne guta ubba sinthatidi baana mela nam7a nam7a oothidi kiittis." 
Luke10:2 Yesuusi entako, “Heko, shiiqana kathay daro shin oosanchoti guutha. Yaaniya gisho, katha goday oosanchota kiittana mela woossite." 
Luke10:3 Hiza, biite, taani hintena dorsatada suudhumeta giddo yeddana." 
Luke10:4 Hinte biya ogiyas aykoka oykofite, miishe gidin kathi gidin caamma oykofite. Oge bolla oonaka sarothofite." 
Luke10:5 Hinte geliya keethe ubbaa koyrottidi, ‘Saroy ha keethaas gido’ yaagite." 
Luke10:6 Saro dosiya asi he bessan de7iko, hinte saroy yan shempana; ixas giiko hinte saroy hintew simmana." 
Luke10:7 Oosanchos damooze bessiya gisho, hinte gelida keethan hintew shiishidaba ubbaa mishenne uyishe yan gam7ite. Issuwa soope issuwa soo yuuyopite." 
Luke10:8 Ay katamaka hinte geliya wode asay hintena mokidi, hintew shiishidaba ubbaa miite." 
Luke10:9 He kataman de7iya harganchota pathishe, ‘Xoossaa kawotethay hinteko matis’ yaagidi odite." 
Luke10:10 Shin issi katamaa geliya wode asay hintena mokonna ixiko dabaaba keyidi haysada giite: 
Luke10:11 ‘Nu tohuwa bolla de7iya hinte katamaa baana pittoos, shin Xoossaa kawotethi hinteko matatidaysa erite.’" 
Luke10:12 Pirda gallasan, ha katamaape Soodome katamaas pirdi kawushe gidanaysa ta hintew odayis” yaagis." 
Luke10:13 Kaallidika, Yesuusi, “Neno Korazine, neno Beetesayda, ayye! Hintenan oosetida malaatati Xiroosaninne Sidoonan oosetidaako yan de7iya asay kayo ma7o ma7idi, bidintha bolla uttidi, beni maarotan geli agganashin." 
Luke10:14 Hessa gisho, hintefe aathidi Xiroosasinne Sidoonas Xoossa pirdi kawuyana." 
Luke10:15 Neka Qifirnahooma, salo gakanaw nena dhoqu oothanaw koyay? Ne duge Si7oole holetana” yaagis." 
Luke10:16 Qassika Yesuusi ba tamaaretako, “Hintena si7ey tana si7ees, hintena ekonnay tana ekenna, tana ekonnay tana kiittidaysa ekenna” yaagis." 
Luke10:17 Laapun tammanne nam7u tamaareti kiitetida bessaafe daro ufaytishe simmidosona. Yesuusako shiiqidi, “Godaw, ne sunthan tuna ayyaanatika nuus kiitetidosona” yaagidosona." 
Luke10:18 Yesuusi entako, “Xalahey salope wol7anthada wodhishin ta be7as." 
Luke10:19 Heko, shooshinne korne yedhana melanne morkiya wolqa zaarana mela maata hintew immas. Hintena qohanabay aykoyka deenna." 
Luke10:20 Gidoshin, hinte sunthay salo mazgaben xaafetida gisho, ufaytitepe attishin, tuna ayyaanati kiitetida gisho ufaytofite” yaagis." 
Luke10:21 He wode, Yesuusi Geeshsha Ayyaanan ufaytidi, “Saluwa sa7aa Godaw, haysa cincatapenne eranchotape genthada yalagatas qoncisida gisho galateta. Ee, ta aawaw, hessa ne oothanaw lo77o shene gidis." 
Luke10:22 “Ubbabay ta aawape taw imetis. Na7ay ooneko aawape attishin, hari woyko na7ay qoncisanaw koyeysafe hari oonika aawa erey baawa” yaagis." 
Luke10:23 Kaallidika, Yesuusi ba tamaaretas dumma, “Hinte be7eysa be7eysati anjetidaysata." 
Luke10:24 Tuma daro nabetinne kawoti hinte be7eysanne si7eysa be7anawunne si7anaw amotidosona, shin be7ibookona, si7ibookona” yaagis." 
Luke10:25 Heko, issi gallas Muse woga eriya issi uray dendidi Yesuusa yaagidi paace oysho oychis. “Astamaariyaw, merina de7o laattanaw taani ay ootho?” yaagis." 
Luke10:26 Yesuusi, “Muse maxaafan xaafetidaysi woygii? Ne waata nabbabay?” yaagis." 
Luke10:27 Addey zaaridi, “ ‘Ne Godaa ne Xoossaa, ne kumetha wozanape, ne kumetha shempofe, ne kumetha wolqaafenne ne kumetha qofaape dosa. Qassi ne shooruwa ne huupheda dosa’ yaagees” yaagis." 
Luke10:28 Yesuusi iyako, “Neeni like zaaradasa, neka hessada ootha. Neeni merinaw de7on daana” yaagis." 
Luke10:29 Shin uray bana xillo oothanaw koyidi, “I ta shooroy oonee?” yaagis." 
Luke10:30 Iya oyshaas Yesuusi yaagidi zaaro immis; “Issi ase de7eysi Yerusalaame katamape duge Iyaarko katama bishin, oge bolla pangati keyidi shocidosona. Iya ma7uwa qaari ekidi hayqopenne paxape giddon yeggidi bidosona." 
Luke10:31 Guyepe, Ayhude kahine issoy he ogiyara ba buussu bishe uraa be7idi deshshi gidi aadhis." 
Luke10:32 Qassi issi Leewe de7eysi he bessaa gakishe uraa be7idi, hara soora aadhidi bis." 
Luke10:33 Shin, issi Samaare biitta ase de7eysi he ogiyara yishe uraa be7idi iyaw qadhetis" 
Luke10:34 Iyako shiiqidi, iya maduntha bolla zaytenne woyne tigidi qachis. Ba hariya bolla utisidi imathi aqiya keethe efis. He bessan iyaw koshshiyaba ubbaa oothis." 
Luke10:35 Wontethe nam7u dinaare kessidi imatha keetha aawas immidi, ‘Hayyana ha uraa loytha xeella. Taani new immidaysafe bollara ne kessiyaba ubbaa ta new ciggana’ yaagis." 
Luke10:36 “Hiza, ha heedzu asatape pangati shocida uraas shoorotey new oona daanii?”" 
Luke10:37 Uray zaaridi, “Iyaw qadhetidaysaka” yaagis. Yesuusi, “Neka bada hessada ootha” yaagis." 
Luke10:38 Yesuusi ba tamaaretara oge bishe issi guta gakis. Yan Marta geetetiya issi maccasiya, iya ba son mokasu." 
Luke10:39 Iwuka Mayraamo geetetiya michiya de7awusu, Mayraama qaala si7ashe Godaa tohuwa matan uttasu." 
Luke10:40 Shin Marta daro ooson un7etada Yesuusako shiiqada, “Godaw, ta michiya oosuwa ta xalaalas yeggada utta aggin ta daaburiya wode neeni be7ashe si77i gay? Iya tana maaddana mela odikii” yaagasu." 
Luke10:41 Shin Goday zaaridi, “Marta, Marta, neeni daroban un7etasaanne metootasa." 
Luke10:42 Gidoshin, koyetey issiba xalaala. Mayraama lo77oba doorasu, hessika iipe eketenna” yaagis." 
Luke11:1 Issi gallas Yesuusi issi bessan woossees. Woosaa wursida wode iya tamaaretape issoy, “Godaw, Yohaanisi ba tamaareta woosa tamaarsida mela neka nuna woosa tamaarsa” yaagis." 
Luke11:2 Yesuusi, “Haysada yaagidi woossite: “ ‘Salon de7iya nu aawaw ne geeshsha sunthay anjeto; ne kawotethay yo." 
Luke11:3 Nu gallasa kathaa hachi hachi nuus imma. 
Luke11:4 Nuna qoheyisata nuuni atto geysada, nu nagara atto ga; paacen nuna gelsofa’ yaagite” yaagis." 
Luke11:5 Kaallidika, Yesuusi ba tamaaretako yaagis: “Leemisos hintefe issuwas laggey de7ees. I giddi bilahe ba laggiya soo bidi, ‘Ta laggiyaw, miyabay de7iko taw immarki." 
Luke11:6 Taw lagge gidida issi asi ogepe yin, iyaw aathiyaba dhayas’ yaagiko," 
Luke11:7 “Iya laggey keetha giddon gididi, ‘Hayyana tana waaysopa, pengey gordetis. Ta naytika taara arsa bolla zin7idosona. Yaaniya gisho, dendada ne koyaba immanaw danda7ike’ yaagiyee?" 
Luke11:8 Ta hintew odayis; laggetetha gisho dendidi immanaw koyonna ixikoka woosan salethida gisho, dendidi koshshiyaba ubba immees." 
Luke11:9 “Hessa gisho, taani hintew odayis; woossite hintew imetana; koyite hinte demmana; kare yidi xeegite hintew dooyetana." 
Luke11:10 Gaasoyka, woossiya ubbay ekees; koyey demmees; kare yidi xeegeysas dooyetees." 
Luke11:11 “Hinteno, aawato hinte giddofe na7i uythi woossin, shuchu immey oonee? Molo woossin shooshi immey oonee?" 
Luke11:12 Woyko phuuphulle woossiko korne immii? 
Luke11:13 Hinte iitata gidishe hinte naytas lo77oba immo eriko, salon de7iya hinte aaway woosseysatas Geeshsha Ayyaana waatidi aathidi immennee?” yaagis." 
Luke11:14 Issi gallas Yesuusi, doona muumisida tuna ayyaana issi uraape kessis. Tuna ayyaanay keyida mela muume uray odetis. Asayka malaaletis." 
Luke11:15 Shin issoti issoti, “Tuna ayyaana halaqa, Bi7eel-Zebuula wolqan tuna ayyaanata kessees” yaagidosona." 
Luke11:16 Harati qassi paacees salope malla bessaana mela koydosona. 
Luke11:17 Shin Yesuusi enta qofaa eridi entako, “Woli giddon shaaketiya kawotethi ubbay dhayees; woli giddon shaaketiya keethi kundees." 
Luke11:18 Xalahey woli giddon shaaketiko iya kawotethay waanidi minnidi eqanee? Hinte tana, ‘I tuna ayyaanata Bi7eel-Zebuula wolqan kessees’ yaageeta." 
Luke11:19 Hiza, taani tuna ayyaana Bi7eel-Zebuula wolqan kessiyaba gidiko hinte nayti oodde wolqan kessonaasha? Hessa gisho, enti hinte bolla pirdeyisata gidana." 
Luke11:20 Shin taani tuna ayyaanata Xoossa biradhen kessiyaba gidiko, hiza, Xoossaa kawotethay hinteko matidaysa erite." 
Luke11:21 “Mino asi tooranne gondalle oykidi, ba keetha naagiyaba gidiko, iya shaloy boshetenna." 
Luke11:22 Hanoshin, iyape aadhidi mino gidida asi yidi, iya qohidi xooniko, ammanetida tooranne gondalle wosisi ekidi, iya shaluwa bonqidi haras shaakees." 
Luke11:23 “Taara gidonaysi tana ixees; taara shiishonnaysi laallees. 
Luke11:24 “Tuna ayyaanay asape keyda wode shempiya bessi koydi haathi bayna soora yuuyees. Shempiya bessi dhayda wode, ‘Ta keydasuwa simmana’ yaagees." 
Luke11:25 I simmiya wode keethay pitetidi lo77idi de7ishin demmis. 
Luke11:26 Hessafe guye, bidi iyape aadhidi iitida hara laapun tuna ayyaanata ekidi yees. Iyan gelidi duussu oykees. He uraas koyroysafe aadhidi guyeysi iita gidees” yaagis." 
Luke11:27 Yesuusi hessa oda bolla de7ishin, issi maccasi asaa gaathafe dendada, ba qaala dhoqu oothada, “Nena tookida uloynne neeni dhammida dhanthati anjetidosona” yaagasu." 
Luke11:28 Shin I, “Anjetidaysati Xoossaa qaala si7idi kiiteteyisata” yaagis." 
Luke11:29 Daro asay shiiqida wode Yesuusi, “Ha yeletethay iita yeletethi; ooratha malla koyees. Shin Yoonasa malaatape attishin, hari entaw imetenna." 
Luke11:30 Yoonasi Nanawe asaas malla gidida mela Asa Na7ika ha yeletethaas malla gidana. 
Luke11:31 Dugeha kawiya pirda gallas ha yeletethaara dendada pirdana. Gaasoyka, iya Solomone cincatethaa si7anaw biitta gaxape dendada yasu. Heko Solomonepe aadhey haysan de7ees" 
Luke11:32 Nanawe asati pirda gallas ha yeletethaara dendidi enta bolla pirdana. Gaasoyka, Yoonasa sibkatiyan maarota gelidosona. Heko, Yoonasape aadhey haysan de7ees” yaagis." 
Luke11:33 “Xompe oythidi qosa bessan woyko oto giddon wothiya asi deenna. Asi poo7uwa be7ana mela dhoqa bessan wothees. 
Luke11:34 Ne asatethaas poo7oy ne ayfiya. Ne ayfey lo77o gidiko, ne kumetha asatethay poo7ees. Nena ayfey sakiko ne asatethay ubbay dhumees." 
Luke11:35 Hessa gisho, ne garsan de7iya poo7oy dhumonna mela naageta." 
Luke11:36 Hiza, ne kumetha asatethay poo7o gidiko, ne asatethanka hari dhuma bessi dhayiko, ne asatethaa kumethay wolile poo7o mela gidees” yaagis." 
Luke11:37 Yesuusi ba oda ongida mela issi Farsaawey baara kathi maana mela xeegis. Yesuusi, iyara issife gelidi gibira bolla uttis." 
Luke11:38 Farsaawey Yesuusi kathi maanape sinthe kushe meecconaysa be7idi malaaletis. 
Luke11:39 Goday iyako, “Hinte Farsaaweti quulesinne shaates bolla bagga meeceta. Shin hinte gaathay uuzetethaninne iitatethan kumis." 
Luke11:40 Hinteno, eeyato, kare bagga medhiday, gaatha bagga medhiday iya gidennee?" 
Luke11:41 Shin quuliyaninne shaatiyan de7eysa manqotas immite. He wode hintew ubbabay geeshshi gidana. 
Luke11:42 “Farsaaweto hintena ayye! Sawope, xalootepenne hessa melabaape asraata kesseeta. Shin xillotethinne Xoosse dosoy hintenan baawa. Harata aggonna haysataka oothanaw bessees, shin aggideta." 
Luke11:43 “Farsaaweto hintena ayye! Ayhude woosa keethan boncho oyde, giya giddon boncho sarotho doseeta." 
Luke11:44 “Mali dhayin, asay eronna bollara biya duufo daaneysato hintena ayye!” yaagis." 
Luke11:45 Higge astamaarey zaaridi, “Astamaariyaw, ne hessa gashe nuna cayaasa” yaagis." 
Luke11:46 Yesuusi, “Hinteno, higge astamaareto, hintenaka ayye! Asay tookanaw danda7onna deexo tooho toosseta, shin hinte hinte huuphes hari attoshin biradhe xeeranka bocheketa." 
Luke11:47 “Hinte aawati wodhida nabeta duufuwa hinte giigisiya gisho, hintena ayye!" 
Luke11:48 Hiza, hinte aawata oosuwa minthanaw enti wodhida nabeta duufuwa hinte loythiya gisho, enta iita oosuwas hinte marka." 
Luke11:49 Hessa gisho, Xoossay ba cincatethan, ‘Nabetanne hawaareta ta hintew kiittana, shin hinte baggata wodhana; harata gooddana’ yaagis." 
Luke11:50 Ha yeletethay alamey medhetoosape hanno gakanaw gukida nabeta ubbaa suuthas oyshetana. 
Luke11:51 Aabelape doomidi yarsho bessaasinne xoossa keethafe gidduwan gukida Zakaryaasa suutha gisho ha yeletethay oyshetana. 
Luke11:52 “Higge astamaareto, hintena ayye! Eratetha qulpiya hinte kushen oykideta, shin hintew geleketa harataka gelseketa” yaagis." 
Luke11:53 Yesuusi yaape baanaw keyiya wode, higge astamaaretinne Farsaaweti iyara eqetidi oyshon waaysosona." 
Luke11:54 Iya doonape keyiya qaalan iya oykanaw koydi hessa oothidosona. 
Luke12:1 He wode daro mukulun taybetiya asay woli bolla yedhetana gakanaw asi asa bolla shiiqidi de7ishin, Yesuusi ba tamaaretako, “Farsaaweta irshofe naagetite. Hessika enta cubbotethaa." 
Luke12:2 Qonconna qosetidi, eretonna geemmidi attiyabay aykoyka baawa." 
Luke12:3 Hiza, hinte dhuman odetidabay ubbay poo7on si7etana, qol7a gaathan kalkashidabay dabaaban odetana." 
Luke12:4 “Ta baggato, ta odeysa si7ite; ashuwa wodhoosonape attishin, haraa aykoka oothanaw danda7onaysatas babofite." 
Luke12:5 Hanoshin, hinte babanaw besseysa ta hintew qoncisana. Hessika wodhidaape guye Gaannamen yegganaw wolqay de7eysas iyaw babite. Ee, tuma odayis; iyaw babite." 
Luke12:6 Ichashu buubeti issi santimes bayzetokonayee? Hanoshin, entafe issinnaka Xoossaa sinthan dogetuku." 
Luke12:7 Hari attoshin, hinte huuphe binaanayka paydetidi de7ees. Hiza, babofite; daro buubetape hinte aadheta." 
Luke12:8 “Ta odeysa si7ite; asa sinthan taw markatiya ubbaas Asa Na7i Xoossa kiitanchota sinthan markatana. 
Luke12:9 Asa sinthan tana kaddeysas Xoossa kiitanchota sinthan ta iya kaddana. 
Luke12:10 Asa Na7a bolla kadhe qaala haasaya ubbay maarota demmana, shin Geeshsha Ayyaana bolla kadhe qaala odeteysi maaretenna." 
Luke12:11 “Asi hintena oykidi ayhude woosa keethan, daynnata sinthaninne kawota sinthan gooshechiya wode ay odanekonne woygi zaaraneko hirgofite." 
Luke12:12 He wode hinte odanaba Geeshsha Ayyaani hintena tamaarsana” yaagis. 
Luke12:13 Asaa giddofe issi asi Yesuusako yidi, “Ta ishay taw nu aawa laatape shaakana mela iyaw oda” yaagis." 
Luke12:14 Yesuusi zaaridi, “La addiyaw, hinte bolla tana daynnanne laata shaakiya cima oothiday oonee?” yaagis." 
Luke12:15 Gujidika, Yesuusi, “Asa de7oy shalo darotethan gidonna gisho yaare aggidi minthidi hintena naagite” yaagis." 
Luke12:16 Kaallidika leemison, “Gadey daro kathi immiya issi dure uray de7ees." 
Luke12:17 He uray, ‘Ta katha taani shiishanaw bessi guuxida gisho ay ootho?’ yaagidi ba wozanan qopis." 
Luke12:18 Hizape yaatana; kase de7iya shaaleta laallada haraa dalga shaaleta keexana. Kathinne taw de7iyaba ubbaa iyan yeggana. 
Luke12:19 Ba shempeko, ‘Ta shempete, daro laythas new gidiya shalo shiishas. Hiza, shempada ma, uya, ufayta’ yaagana." 
Luke12:20 “Shin Xoossay, ‘La, eeya uraw, hachi qamma ne shempiya neepe eketawusu. Hiza, ne shiishidabay ooddes gidanee?’ yaagis." 
Luke12:21 “Hessa gisho, baw duretethi sa7an shiishiya asas, Xoossaa matan dure gidonna asaas wursethay ha ura mela” yaagis." 
Luke12:22 Hessafe guye, Yesuusi ba tamaaretako, “Hiza, ta odiyaba si7ite, hinte shempuwas ay miino? Hinte asatethaas ay ma7ino? yaagidi un7etofite." 
Luke12:23 Shempoy kathafe, asatethi afilape aadhees." 
Luke12:24 Kafota be7ite zerokona, kiishokona, eleynne shaaley entaw baawa. Shin Xoossay entana muzees. Hinte kafotape daro aadheta." 
Luke12:25 Hanoshin, hintefe un7etidi ba laytha bolla issi qamma gujanaw danda7ey oonee?" 
Luke12:26 Hiza, ha guuthaba oothanaw danda7onna hinte, harabas ayis un7etetii?" 
Luke12:27 Ane ciishshati waanidi dicciyako be7ite. Waayokonanne suqokona. Hari attoshin, Solomoney ba de7iya boncho ubban entafe issuwa melaka ma7ibeenna." 
Luke12:28 Hinteno, ammanoy pacidaysato, hiza, Xoossay hachi bentidi wonto taman yegetana ciishshata haysada mayziko, hintena waati aathidi mayzennee?" 
Luke12:29 Hessa gisho, ay mino woyko ay uyino gidi un7etofite." 
Luke12:30 He ubbaas Xoossaa ammanonna asati un7etoosona. Shin hinte aaway Xoossay hessi ubbay hintew koshsheysa erees. 
Luke12:31 Ubbaafe aathidi Xoossa kawotetha koyite; hessi ubbay hintew guji imetana. 
Luke12:32 “Hinteno, guutha dereto, yayyofite; hinte aawa Xoossay kawotetha hintew immanaw ufaytees." 
Luke12:33 Hintew de7iyaba bayzidi manqotas immite. Kaysoy ekonnason, bili moonnason, cimonna karxiitan, wuronna shalo salon shiishite." 
Luke12:34 Hinte wozanay hinte shaloy de7iya bessan gidana. 
Luke12:35 “Qanthan dancidi giigetite; hinte xompey poo7o. 
Luke12:36 Banta goday yaaganope simmana gakanaw barkidi naageysatada, goday yidi xeegiya wode ellesidi dooyanaw giigida asata daanite." 
Luke12:37 Banta goday simmiya wode dhiskonna de7ishe naageysati anjetidaysata. Tuma gayis; goday qanthan dancidi gayta yuushon utisidi mokees. 
Luke12:38 Goday laade gidin, giddi bilahe gidin, woyko wonti maathe gidin yidi, hessa mela dhiskona naagishin demmiya he aylleti anjetidaysata." 
Luke12:39 Shin haysa erite; kaysoy awude yaaneko keetha aaway eriyako keethay boketiya wode si77i gidi be7enna. 
Luke12:40 Hinteka giigidi naagite; Asa Na7i hinte qoponna wode yaana” yaagis. 
Luke12:41 Phexroosika, “Godaw ha leemisuwa nu xalaalas odaye woyko asa ubbaasee?” yaagis." 
Luke12:42 Goday zaaridi, “Hiza, kathaa muzanaw bessiya wodiyan immana mela goday ba aylleta bolla shuumida ammantheysinne wozanaama halaqay oonee?" 
Luke12:43 Goday simmiya wode hessa mela oothishe bentiya aylley, I anjetidaysa" 
Luke12:44 Ta hintew tuma odayis; ba godaas de7iya shalo ubbaa bolla I, shuumetana." 
Luke12:45 Shin he aylley, ‘Ta goday elle yeenna’ yaagidi ba wozanan qopidi, macca aylletanne adde aylleta wadhiko, qassi baw koyda mela mishenne uyishe mathotiko," 
Luke12:46 he aylliya goday, I qoponna gallasaninne hirgonna wode yaana. Yidi iya qanxerethidi, iya qaada ammanonna asaara oothana." 
Luke12:47 “Godaa sheniyada giigonnaysinne iya goday ay dosiyako erishe oothonna aylley daro garaafetana. 
Luke12:48 Shin ba godaa sheniya eronna attidi garaafetanaw besseysa oothiday guuthara garaafetana. Gaasoyka daro imetidaysafe daro koyetees, daro hadara ekidaysafeka daro immana gidi naagetees." 
Luke12:49 “Taani yiday biitta bolla tama oythanaasa. Ha77i tamay oykiyako tana waanidi ufaysandesha! 
Luke12:50 Hanoshin, ta ha77i xammaqetey xinqatey de7ees. I poletana gakanaw ta daro un7etayis." 
Luke12:51 Sa7a bolla sarotethi ehanaw yida hintew daanii? Gidenna, ta yiday shaakanaasa." 
Luke12:52 Ha77ife doomidi woli giddon shaaketida ichashu keethaa asati issife de7oosona. Nam7ati heedzata bolla, heedzatika nam7ata bolla, dendidi shaaketoosona." 
Luke12:53 Aaway na7aa bolla, na7ayka aawa bolla, aayiya na7e bolla, na7iya aaye bolla, azinaa aayiya na7a mache bolla, na7a machiya azina aaye bolla, dendidi shaaketana.”" 
Luke12:54 Qassika asaako, “Wuloha baggara saloy shaaratiya wode be7idi, ellesidi, ‘Iri yaana’ yaageeta, hessadaka hanees." 
Luke12:55 Dugeha carkoy carkiya wode ‘Sa7i awana’ yaageeta, hessadaka hanees” yaagis." 
Luke12:56 Hinteno, cubboto, Salobanne sa7aba shaakidi ereetashin ha wodiya shaakidi eroy hintena waanidi xoonidee?" 
Luke12:57 “Yaatin, hinte huuphes ayis tuma pirdeketii?" 
Luke12:58 Ne morkiyara wolla daynna sinthan eqanaw bashe oge bolla giiganaw koya. Ne giigonna ixiko gooshechidi daynna sinthe nena efana. Daynnay nena qachiya asas aathidi immana. I nena woynen yeggana. 
Luke12:59 Si7ite, issi bakani attonna cigga ongana gakanaw ne yaape keyonnaysa era” yaagis." 
Luke13:1 He wode Yesuusako asay yidi Philaxoosi wodhidi enta suuthara enta yarshuwa walakida Galila asaaba odida asati he bessan de7oosona. 
Luke13:2 I haysada yaagidi zaaris; “Yaatin he Galila asati he iita hayqo hayqida gisho, Galilan de7iya asa ubbaafe aadhida nagarancho daanonna?" 
Luke13:3 Gidenna! Gidoshin, hinteka maarotan simmonna ixiko, ubbay hessada dhayana." 
Luke13:4 Woyko qassi Salihoome geetetiya bessan gimbey woddidi wodhida tammanne hospun asay Yerusalaamen de7iya asa ubbaafe aadhida nagarancho daanonna? 
Luke13:5 Gidenna! Shin hinteka maarotan simmonna ixiko ubbay hessada dhayana.” 
Luke13:6 Qassika Yesuusi haysada gidi leemiso odis: “Issi uraas woyne gaden toketida balase mithi de7awusu. I iipe ayfe demmanaw koydi aykoka demmibeenna. 
Luke13:7 Woyne gadiya goday woyne oosanchuwako, ‘Ayfe demmanaw koyada heedzu laythi simeretada aykoka demmabike. Hessa gisho, qanxa digga; ayis biitta melisay?’ yaagis." 
Luke13:8 “Shin oosanchoy, ‘Godaw, I yuushuwa oothada osha yeggana gakanaw ha laythas aggarki." 
Luke13:9 Ha laythi ayfiko lo77o, ixiko qanxa agga’ ” yaagidi zaaris." 
Luke13:10 Yesuusi Sambaata gallas ayhude woosa keethan tamaarsees. 
Luke13:11 He bessan tammanne hospun laythi tuna ayyaani zoko kuunisida issi maccasiya de7awusu. Iya kuunape dendoysan suure eqanaw danda7uku. 
Luke13:12 Yesuusi iyo be7ida wode xeegidi, “Ha maccasete, ne hargiyafe paxadasa” yaagis." 
Luke13:13 Ba kushiya I bolla wothin, iya ellesada, suurada eqasu. Xoosse galatasu." 
Luke13:14 Shin ayhude woosa keetha halaqay yilotidi asaako, “Ooso oothiya usupun gallasati de7oosona. Hessa gisho, he gallasatan yidi paxitepe attishin, Sambaata gallas gidenna” yaagis." 
Luke13:15 Goday, “Cubboto, hinte giddofe boori woyko hare Sambaata gallas zadalope billidi haathe ushshanaw efonnay oonee?" 
Luke13:16 Yaatin, ha maccasiya Abrahaame na7a gidashe xalahen qashetada tammanne hospun laythi kumethi de7idaaris Sambaata gallas birshetethi koshshennee?” yaagidi oychis." 
Luke13:17 I hessa odida wode eqeteysati ubbay yeellatidosona. Shin asa ubbay I oothida malaalsiya ooso ubban ufaytidosona. 
Luke13:18 Hessafe guye, Yesuusi haysada yaagis, “Xoossa kawotethi ay daanii? Iya aybira daaniso?" 
Luke13:19 Xoossa kawotethi issi asi ba goshshan tokida wola ayfe mela. I diccidi mithi gidis. Salo kafoti iya tashiya bolla shempidosona.” 
Luke13:20 Qassi, “Xoossaa kawotetha aybira daaniso?" 
Luke13:21 Issi maccasiya daro dhiillera walakada munuqida guutha irsho daanees” yaagis. 
Luke13:22 Hessafe guye, Yesuusi Yerusalaame bishe I kanthiya ogiyan de7iya katamataninne gutatan tamaarsishe aadhis." 
Luke13:23 Issi asi Yesuusako, “Godaw, attanay guutha asa xalaalee?” yaagidi oychis. Yesuusi entako," 
Luke13:24 “Si7ite, xuuntha wulara gelanaw baaxetite. Daroti gelanaw koyoosona shin entaw hanenna." 
Luke13:25 Keetha aaway dendidi wulaa gordidaape guye, ‘Nuus dooyarki’ yaagishe karen eqidi xeessi oyketa. Shin I, ‘Hinte oonekonne awupe yidaako ta erike’ gidi zaarana." 
Luke13:26 He wode hinte, ‘Neera wolla mida, uyida, nu dabaabanka tamaarsadasa’ yaagana." 
Luke13:27 “I zaaridi, ‘Hinte oonekonne awupe yidaako erike. Hinteno, geellato taape haakite’ yaagana." 
Luke13:28 Abrahaame, Yisaaqa, Yayqoobanne nabeta ubbaa Xoossa kawotethan be7ana, shin hinte karen wodhidi attiya wode hintew yeehonne ache garcethi gidana." 
Luke13:29 Asay dolohape, wulohape, pudehapenne dugehape yidi Xoossaa kawotethan gibira bolla uttana." 
Luke13:30 Hessa gisho, ha77i dethan guye gididaysatape sinthe gidanaysati, sinthe gididaysatape guye gidanaysati de7oosona” yaagis." 
Luke13:31 He wode Farsaawetape issoti issoti yidi, “Herodiisi nena wodhanaw koyiya gisho ha bessaafe dendada ba” gidoosona." 
Luke13:32 I zaaridi, “Bidi, he workanaas, ‘Heko, hachinne wonto tuna ayyaanata kessana, harganchota pathana, heedzantho gallasan kuushsha bolla gakana’ yaagis giite." 
Luke13:33 Hanope attishin, nabey Yerusalaamepe karen hayqanaw bessenna. Hessa gisho, hachi, wontonne wonti pee7in he bessa baanaw dendas." 
Luke13:34 “Yerusalaame, Yerusalaame, nabeta wodhiyare, neeko kiitetidaysata shuchan caddiyare, kuttoy ba nayta ba qefiyape garsan shiishiyada ne nayta ta qesiyape garsan aapun toho shiishanaw koyadina, shin hinte ixas gideta." 
Luke13:35 Ta hintew odayis; hinte keethay kaysatana. Godaa sunthan yeysi anjetidaysa hinte gaana gakanaw tana demmeketa” yaagis. 
Luke14:1 Issi Sambaata gallas Yesuusi issi Farsaaweta halaqa soo kathi maanaw geliya wode asay caddi xeelloosona. 
Luke14:2 He bessan shawuhe hargen waayetiya issi asi iyaw sintha baggara zin7is. 
Luke14:3 Yesuusi Farsaawetanne higge astamaareta, “Sambaata gallas hargancho pasoy wogeye woga gidennee?” yaagidi oychis." 
Luke14:4 Enti si77i gidoosona. Yesuusi hargetiya uraa bochi pathidi moyzis. 
Luke14:5 “Qassika hintefe issuwas na7i woyko boori Sambaata gallas aafon wulliko, ellesidi kessonnay oonee?” yaagidi oychis." 
Luke14:6 Enti issibaaka zaaranaw danda7ibookona. 
Luke14:7 Yesuusi imatuwas xeegetidaysati boncho bessi doorishin be7idi, ha leemisuwa odis:" 
Luke14:8 “Issi asi nena yaagano xeegiko boncho bessan uttofa. Neepe aadhidi bonchetiya asi xeegetanaw danda7ees. 
Luke14:9 Hintena nam7ataka xeegidaysi yidi, ‘Ne bessa ha imathas yedda’ giya wode neeni yeellatashe ziqa bessi wodhaasa." 
Luke14:10 Gidoshin, ne xeegetida wode koyrottada ziqa bessi be7ada utta. Xeegoysi yidi, ‘Ta laggiyaw, ha boncho bessan utta’ yaagana. He wode neera issife xeegetida asa ubbaa sinthan ne bonchetana." 
Luke14:11 Bana dhoqu dhoqu oothiya ubbay kawuyana; bana ziqi ziqi oothiya ubbay dhoqu dhoqu gaana.” 
Luke14:12 Qassi Yesuusi iya mokida keetha aawako, “Quma woyko kaho imato xeegiya wode, neeni kushe zaaro xeegonna mela ne laggeta woyko ne ishata woyko ne dabbota woyko ne dure shoorota imato xeegopa." 
Luke14:13 Gidoshin, ne imato giigisida wode manqota, wobbeta, gundatanne qooqeta xeega; neeni anjetana." 
Luke14:14 Haysati kushe zaaranaw danda7onna gisho kushe zaaroy geeshshata dendo gallasan new simmana” yaagis. 
Luke14:15 Yesuusara wolla imato bolla uttoyisata giddofe issoy, hessa si7idi, “Xoossa kawotethan imato bolla utteysi anjetidaysa” yaagis." 
Luke14:16 Yesuusi, “Issi asi gita imato giigisidi daro asata xeegis." 
Luke14:17 Imatoy moketiya saatey gakiya wode, xeegetida imathata, ‘Heko ubbabay giigis, haa yiite’ yaagidi xeeganaada ba aylliya kiittis." 
Luke14:18 “Shin ubbayka banta gaaso gaaso medhidosona. Issoy, ‘Ha77i buroo gade shammida gisho, bada be7anaw koshshees; hayyana tana aggarki yaaga’ yaagis." 
Luke14:19 Hankoy, ‘Ichashu waatha boori shammas; entana waaxa be7ana gisho hayyana tana lancofa’ yaagis." 
Luke14:20 Qassi haray, ‘Taani buroo meddan de7iya gisho, yaanaw danda7ike’ yaagis." 
Luke14:21 “Aylley simmi yidi he ubbaa ba godaas odis. He wode yaagano aaway hanqetidi aylliyako, ‘Ellesada kataman de7iya wogga ogetanne daggalata bada, manqota, wobbeta, qooqetanne gundata haa eha’ yaagis." 
Luke14:22 “Aylley, ‘Ta godaw, ne kiittidaysi ubbay poletis, shin ha77ika bessi de7ees’ yaagis." 
Luke14:23 “Goday aylliyako, ‘Horogata bollanne, gade giddo ogeta keya, ta keethay kumana gakanaw demmida ubba yaana mela ootha." 
Luke14:24 Ta hintew odayis; imato xeegetidaysatape oonika ta gibiraape moonnaysa erite’ gis” yaagis. 
Luke14:25 Daro asay iyara wolla bishin, Yesuusi entako guye simmidi," 
Luke14:26 “Taako yaa ubbay ba aawanne ba aayiw, ba machiwnne ba nayta, ba ishatanne ba micheta, hari attoshin ba de7uwa ixonnay ta tamaare gidanaw danda7enna." 
Luke14:27 Ba masqaliya tookidi tana kaallonnay ta tamaare gidanaw danda7enna. 
Luke14:28 “Hintefe issi asi shucha keethi keexanaw koyko, keetha keexidi onganaw ay mela miishe koshshiyako koyrottidi eranaw qopi be7onnay oonee?" 
Luke14:29 Hessa gidonna ixiko, ha uray baaso shuchu hiixin qustethi xooniko," 
Luke14:30 be7iya ubbay, ‘Ha uray gimbethi oykin qustanaw iya xoonis’ yaagidi boroosona." 
Luke14:31 “Woyko issi kawoy hara kawora oletanaw dendishe laatamu mukulu olanchota eki yaa kawuwara tammu mukulu olanchotara eqetanaw danda7anaysanne danda7onaysa uttidi zorettonay oonee? 
Luke14:32 Eqetanaw danda7etonaba gidiko, he kawuwara haahon de7ishin giiganaw koyrottidi cima yeddidi oychees." 
Luke14:33 Hessadaka, hintefe oonika baw de7iyaba ubba aggonna ixiko, ta tamaare gidanaw danda7enna." 
Luke14:34 “Maxiney lo77o, shin maxiney ba mal7uwa aggiko, waanidi maxine geetetanaw danda7ii?" 
Luke14:35 Biittatethasinne araddatethas maaddona gisho wora yegetees. Hiza, si7iya haythi de7iya asi si7o” yaagis." 
Luke15:1 Issi gallas qaraxa qanxeysatinne nagaranchoti Yesuusa timirtiya si7anaw iya yuushon shiiqidosona. 
Luke15:2 Shin Farsaawetinne higge astamaareti, “Haysi uray nagaranchota shiishidi ekees, entara issife mees” yaagidi zuuzumidosona." 
Luke15:3 Yesuusi ha leemisuwa entaw yaagidi odis: 
Luke15:4 “Hinte giddofe issuwas xeetu dorsati de7iyaba gidiko entafe issoy dhayiko uddufun tammanne uddufunata bazzon aggidi dhayoysa demmana gakanaw koyonnay oonee? 
Luke15:5 Demmida wode ufaytidi ba gannan tookidi," 
Luke15:6 ba soo simmees. Ba laggetanne shoorota xeegidi, ‘Dhayida ta dorsa demmas, taara issife ufaytite’ yaagees." 
Luke15:7 Hessadaka, maaroti koshshonna uddufun tammanne uddufun xillotape aathidi, maarotan geliya issi nagaranchuwa gaason salon gita ufaysi gidees." 
Luke15:8 “Woyko tammu biri de7iya issi maccasiya tammaafe iissiya dhayiko demmana gakanaw xompe oythada keetha pittada mintha koyonnay oonee? 
Luke15:9 Demmida wode ba laggetanne ba shoorota xeegada ‘Dhayida ta issi bira demmida gisho taara ufaytite’ yaagawusu. 
Luke15:10 Si7ite, hessa mela issi maarotethan geliya nagaranchuwan Xoossaa kiitanchota sinthan ufaysi gidees” yaagis." 
Luke15:11 Zaaridi Yesuusi, “Issi uraas nam7u nayti de7oosona." 
Luke15:12 Entafe kaalo na7ay ba aawako, ‘Ta aawaw, ne shaluwape ta gishuwa taw imma’ yaagis. Aaway ba shaluwa ba naytas shaakis." 
Luke15:13 Guutha gallasape guye, kaalo na7ay ba gishuwa ubbaa, qachi ekidi haaho biitta bis. Yan altacan shaluwa toochidi ongis." 
Luke15:14 I baw de7iyaba ubba wursidaape guye he biitta ubban mino koshi keyin metootis. 
Luke15:15 Hessa gisho, he biitta asaape issuwa soo gaata gelis. Uray iya guduntho heemmana mela ba moothu yeddis." 
Luke15:16 Gudunthoti miya harquwafe maanaw amottis, shin iyoka iyaw immiya asi bentibeenna." 
Luke15:17 I ba wozanaako simmidi, ‘Aapun ta aawa aylletas kathi wora wodhin ta haysan koshara hayqanaw gakadina?’" 
Luke15:18 Dendada ta aawako bada, ‘Ta aawaw, salon Xoossa, sa7an nena qohas." 
Luke15:19 Hizape ne na7a geetetada xeegetanaw taw bessonna gisho, ne son de7iya aylletape issuwada tana payda’ yaagana” yaagis." 
Luke15:20 Hessa gisho, dendidi ba aawako bis. “Hanoshin, I buroo haahon de7ishin aaway qadhetidi, iyako woxi bidi, idimmidi yeeris." 
Luke15:21 Na7ayka, ‘Ta aawaw salon Xoossa, sa7an nena ta qohas. Hizape ne na7a geetetada xeegetanaw bessike’ yaagis." 
Luke15:22 “Iya aaway aylleta xeegidi, ‘Ellesidi ubbaafe lo77o gidida ma7o ehidi iya mayzite; iya biradhen sagaayo, iya tohon caamma aathite." 
Luke15:23 Modho gatarmentho ehidi shukite, moos, ufaytoos." 
Luke15:24 Ta na7ay haysi hayqis, shin ha77i paxis; dhayis, shin bentis’ yaagis. Hessafe guye, ufaysi doomidosona." 
Luke15:25 “He wode bayra na7ay goshsha gaden de7ees. Yaape yishe soo matishin yethinne gufa girsi si7is. 
Luke15:26 I, aylletape issuwa xeegidi haniyabay aybeko eranaw oychis." 
Luke15:27 Aylley, ‘Ne ishay saro yida gisho ne aaway modho gatarmentho iyaw shukis’ yaagis." 
Luke15:28 “Bayra ishay yilotidi soo gelanawuka koybeenna. Aaway kare keyidi soo gelana mela iya woossis. 
Luke15:29 Shin I ba aawako, ‘Heko, haysa mela laythi ta new aylletada ne kiitaape issuwaka pacisonna new kiitetin, taani ta laggetara ufaytana mela hari attoshin issi laaqa deeshe immabaaka." 
Luke15:30 Hanoshin, haysi ne na7ay ne shaluwa laymatara dhaysidi yin, modho gatarmentho shukadasa’ ” yaagis." 
Luke15:31 “Aawayka, ‘Ta na7aw, neeni ubba wode taara de7aasa, taba ubbay neesa." 
Luke15:32 Haysi ne ishay hayqis, shin paxis; dhayis, shin bentis. Hessa gisho, daro ufaytanaw bessees’ yaagana” yaagis." 
Luke16:1 Yesuusi ba tamaaretako, “Issi dure uraas iyape garsara issi shuumi de7ees. He shuumay ba godaa shaluwa toochees giya worey keetha aawa gakis." 
Luke16:2 Keetha aaway shuuma xeegisidi, ‘Taani woygiyaba si7adina? Hizape neeni ta keethas shuuma gidada oothanaw danda7onna gisho, ta shaluwa taw sheedha’ yaagis." 
Luke16:3 “He shuumay ba wozanan haysada yaagidi qopis: ‘Ta goday tana shuumatethaafe wothana hanees, goya aqanaw wolqi baawa, woossa maanaw yeellayees; yaatin ta waano?" 
Luke16:4 Shuumatethaafe ta wodhiya wode asay tana mokana mela oothanaba ta erayis’ yaagis. 
Luke16:5 “Hessa gisho, iya godaa acoy de7iya asaa issuwa issuwa xeegi ehidi koyro uraako, ‘Ne bolla ta godaa acoy ay meli de7ii?’ yaagidi oychis." 
Luke16:6 “I, ‘Laatamu barmeele zayte acoy de7ees’ yaagis. “Shuumay, ‘Wule warqatiya he7e, ellesada, tammu barmeele zayte acoy de7ees gada xaafa’ yaagis." 
Luke16:7 “Hessafe kaallidi nam7anthuwako, ‘New aapuni de7ii?’ yaagis. “I, ‘Heedzu xeetanne laapun tammu kuntaale giste acoy de7ees’ yaagis. “Shuumay, ‘Ne wule warqatiya he7e, ellesada, 296 kuntaale yaagada xaafa’ yaagis." 
Luke16:8 Keetha aaway ammanetibona shuuma iya cincatethaas nashshis. Ha alamiya nayti ase oythan poo7o naytape aadhida wozanaamata. 
Luke16:9 “Hessa gisho, ta hintew odayis; ha alamiya miishey wuriya wode merinaa keethan moketana mela ha miishiyara hintew laggeta shammite." 
Luke16:10 Ubbaafe guuthaban ammanetiday daroban ammanetidaysa gidees. Qassi ubbaafe guuthaban ammanetonaysi daroban ammanetena. 
Luke16:11 Hiza, ha alame miishen hinte ammanetona ixiko, tuma miishe hintew ooni hadara immanee?" 
Luke16:12 Hinte hara asa miishen ammanetona ixiko, hinte buzo miishe hintew ooni immanee?" 
Luke16:13 “Issi aylley nam7u godatas haaretanaw danda7enna. Issuwa ixiko hankuwa dosees woyko issuwako shiiqiko hankuwa kadhees. Hessadaka, hinte Xoossasinne miishes haaretanaw danda7eketa.”" 
Luke16:14 Miishe dosiya Farsaaweti hessa si7ida wode Yesuusa qelqisidosona. 
Luke16:15 I, “Hinte, hintena asa sinthan xilliseeta, shin Xoossay hinte wozana erees. Asa sinthan bonchetidaysi Xoossa sinthan boretidaysa." 
Luke16:16 “Muse higgeynne nabeta kiitay Yohaanisa gakanaw hintew odetishe gam7is. Hessafe guye, Xoossaa kawotethaa Wongelay sabbaketishe gam7is. Asi ubbay yaa gelanaw dafetees." 
Luke16:17 Gidoshin, higgiyafe issi laafa pidaley attanaape saloynne sa7i aadheysi kawuyees." 
Luke16:18 “Ba machiw yeddidi haraa ekiya ubbay laammees. Ba azinaape anjetidaaro ekeysika laammees” yaagis. 
Luke16:19 “Al7onne alleeqo afila ma7iya, sa7i injetin gallas gallas ufaysan de7iya issi dure asi de7ees." 
Luke16:20 Hari qassi asatethay kumethi madunxida issi Alaazara geetetiya manqoy he dure uraa karen yegetidi attidaysi de7ees. 
Luke16:21 Koshape dendoysan dure ura gaytape wodhiya tiifiya maanaw amotishe de7ees. Hari attoshin, kanati yidi iya maduntha laacosona." 
Luke16:22 “He manqoy hayqis; kiitanchoti iya Abrahaame ki7o efidosona. Qassi dure urayka hayqidi moogetis. 
Luke16:23 Si7oolen un7etidi de7ishe dhoqu gidi haahon Abrahaamenne iya ki7on de7iya Alaazara be7is. 
Luke16:24 I, ‘Aawaw Abrahaame, taw qadhetarki; ha tama lacon un7etada de7iya gisho Alaazari ba biradhiya haathan yeddidi ta inxarsa laakothana mela hayyana iya yeddarki’ yaagidi waassis." 
Luke16:25 “Shin Abrahaamey iyako, ‘Ta na7aw, ne sa7an de7iya wode lo77obata ekidaysa, qassi Alaazari iitabata ekidaysa akeeka. Shin ha77i I haysan ufaytees, qassi neeni waayetashe de7aasa’ yaagis." 
Luke16:26 Ha ubbaafe aadhidi, ‘Haape hinteko, hinipe haa nuuko aadhanaw koyeysati pinnonna mela nuusinne hintew giddon gita aafoy de7ees’ yaagis." 
Luke16:27 “Dure uray, ‘Aawaw, yaako Alaazara ta aawa soo kiittana mela ta nena woossayis." 
Luke16:28 Taw ichashu ishati de7idosona, entika ha waaye bessaa yoonna mela entaw bidi markato’ yaagis." 
Luke16:29 “Shin Abrahaamey, ‘Entaw Museranne nabetara de7oosona; enti odiyaba si7onna’ yaagis." 
Luke16:30 “Dure uray, ‘Aawaw Abrahaame, hessatho gidenna; issi asi hayqope dendidi biiko enti maarotan gelana’ yaagis." 
Luke16:31 “Abrahaamey, ‘Musenne nabeta si7onna ixiko, hari attoshin hayqope issi asi dendi odikoka ammanokona’ yaagis.”" 
Luke17:1 Yesuusi ba tamaaretako, “Ase dhubethidi nagaran gelsiyabay yoonna aggenna. Gidoshin, nagaran gelana mela oothiya ura ayye!” yaagis." 
Luke17:2 He uray kaalotape issuwa balethanaape woxa ba qoodhen qachidi abban wulliko iyaw lo77o. 
Luke17:3 Hessa gisho naagetite. “Ne ishay nagara oothiko hanqeta; qiirotidi maarotethan simmiko, iyaw atto yaaga." 
Luke17:4 Issi gallasan laapun toho qohidi, laapun toho, ‘Taani ta nagaraa eras tana maara’ yaagidi neeko yiiko iyaw atto ga.”" 
Luke17:5 Hawaareti Godaako, “Ammano nuus gujarki” yaagidosona." 
Luke17:6 Goday, “Gaashe ayfe mela ammanoy hintew de7iko ‘Haysa wolaa shodetada abba giddon toketa’ yaagiko hintew kiitetana” yaagis." 
Luke17:7 Gujidika Yesuusi, “Hinte giddofe issuwas goshshanchoy woyko dorse heemmiya aylley de7iko ooso gadepe woyko wudepe soo simmiya wode, ‘Elle haayada kathi maanaw utta’ yaagey de7ii?" 
Luke17:8 Deenna, ‘Taw kaho giigisa; taani mada, uyada aggana gakanaw eqada muza. Hessafe guye, neeni qassi maasanne uyaasa’ yaageneyee?" 
Luke17:9 Hiza, goday, aylley kiita polida gisho anjiyee?" 
Luke17:10 Hessa gisho, hinteka kiitetoysa ubbaa polida wode, ‘Nu pathonna aylleta; oothanaw bessiya oosuwa polida’ yaagite” yaagis." 
Luke17:11 Yesuusi Yerusalaame bishe Samaarisinne Galilas giddora kanthidi aadhis. 
Luke17:12 Issi gutaa geliya wode baro hargen oyketida tammu asati iya demmidosona. Entika haahon eqidi," 
Luke17:13 “Godaa Yesuusa, nuus qadhetarki” yaagidi waassidosona." 
Luke17:14 I enta be7ida wode, “Bidi hintenatethaa Ayhude kahine bessite” yaagis. Enti ogiya bolla bishe paxidosona." 
Luke17:15 Entafe issoy ba paxuwa be7ida wode dhoqu gida qaalan Xoossa bonchishe Yesuusako simmis. 
Luke17:16 I, Samaare biitta asi, shin Yesuusa toho bolla gufannidi iya galatis." 
Luke17:17 Yesuusi, “Paxiday tammu asata gidokonaayee? Yaatin, uddufunati aw bidonaa?" 
Luke17:18 Ha allaga uraape attishin, hari simmidi Xoossa galatey deenna guusseyee?” yaagidi oychis." 
Luke17:19 Uraako, “Ne ammanoy nena pathis; dendada ba” yaagis." 
Luke17:20 Farsaaweti, “Xoossa kawotethay awude yaanee?” gidi Yesuusa oychidosona. I, “Xoossaa kawotethay bentiya mallan yeenna." 
Luke17:21 Qassika iya, ‘Hannina woyko hinina yaaganaw danda7enna. Ayis giiko, Xoossa kawotethay hinte giddon de7ees’ ” yaagidi zaaris." 
Luke17:22 Yesuusi ba tamaaretako, “Asa Na7a gallasatape issuwa be7anaw hinte amotiya wodey yaana, shin hinte be7eketa." 
Luke17:23 Asay, ‘I yan de7ees’ woyko, ‘Haysan de7ees’ yaagana, shin entana kaallidi boopite." 
Luke17:24 Wol7anthi wol7amidi salo gaxape gaxa poo7isiya mela Asa Na7aa yuussaa gallasay hessada hanana. 
Luke17:25 Shin hessi hananaape sinthe Asa Na7ay daro waayanawunne ha yeletethan ixetanaw bessees. 
Luke17:26 Nohe wode hanidaysa mela Asa Na7a woden hessada hanana. 
Luke17:27 Nohey Markabiyan gelida qamma gakanaw asay mishenne uyishe, ekishenne gelishe de7ishin dhayo haathay yidi ubbaa dhaysis." 
Luke17:27 Nohey Markabiyan gelida qamma gakanaw asay mishenne uyishe, ekishenne gelishe de7ishin dhayo haathay yidi ubbaa dhaysis." 
Luke17:28 Looxe laythanka hessatho hanis. Asay mishenne uyishe, shammishenne bayzishe, tokishenne keexishe, gam7idosona." 
Luke17:29 Looxey Soodomepe keyida gallas diinne geetetiya xuuggiyabay salope bukidi ubbaa dhaysis. 
Luke17:30 Asa Na7ay qonciya wodeka hessada hanana. 
Luke17:31 “He gallasan karen de7iya oonika keetha giddon de7iyaba ekanaw soo gelopo. Hessadaka, gaden de7iya asi aykoska soo simmofo." 
Luke17:32 Looxe machiw akeekite; 
Luke17:33 ba shempiw ashshanaw koyiya asi oonika dhaysana; ba shempiw aathidi immiya oonika I ashshana. 
Luke17:34 Ta hintew odayis; he gallasan nam7u asati issi arsan zin7ana; issoy eketana, hankoy attana." 
Luke17:35 Nam7u maccasati wolla gaaccishin iissiya eketana, hankiya attana." 
Luke17:36 Nam7u asati wolla gaden goyeysatape issoy eketana, hankoy attana” yaagis." 
Luke17:37 Enti, “Godaw aw eketanee?” yaagidi oychidosona. I, “Bawuti de7iya bessan ankoti shiiqoosona” yaagis." 
Luke18:1 Yesuusi ba tamaareta azallonna ubba wode woossana mela tamaarsanaw koyidi yaagidi leemiso odis: 
Luke18:2 “Issi kataman Xoossas yashetonna, asas yeellatonna issi daynni de7ees" 
Luke18:3 He kataman issi am7iya de7awusu. Iyaka, ‘Ta giddoninne ta morkiya giddon de7iya mootuwa pirda’ yaagada ubba wode he daynnaako simeretawusu." 
Luke18:4 Daynnay guutha wodes I odaa si7onna ixis, shin guyepe ba wozanan, ‘Taani Xoossas yayyonna, asas yeellatonna ixikoka," 
Luke18:5 ha am7iya tana waaysiya gisho iw pirdana; yaatonna ixiko ubba wode yada tana salethana’ ” yaagidi qopis. 
Luke18:6 Godayka, “Geella daynnay gidaysa si7ideta;" 
Luke18:7 Xoossay qammanne gallas iyako waassiya ba dooridaysatas pirdeneyee? Entana maaddanaw gam7iyee? 
Luke18:8 Ta hintew odeysa si7ite, ellesidi pirdana. Gidoshin, Asa Na7i yaa wode sa7a bolla ammano demmandesha?” yaagis." 
Luke18:9 Qassi zaaridi, Yesuusi, bantana xillo asada oothidi ceeqeteysatasinne harata kadheysatas haysada yaagidi leemiso odis:" 
Luke18:10 “Nam7u asati woossanaw Xoossa Keethi bidosona. Issoy Farsaawe hankoy qassi qaraxa qanxisiya asi. 
Luke18:11 Farsaawey eqidi baw woossishe, ‘Xoossaw taani harata mela bonqancho, geellanne laymatiya asi, aadhada qassi ha qaraxa qanxisiya uraa mela gidonna gisho nena galatayis." 
Luke18:12 Saamintafe nam7u toho xoomayis, ta demmiyaba ubbaafe asraata kessayis’ yaagis." 
Luke18:13 “Shin qaraxa qanxiseysi haahon eqidi hari attoshin salo dhoqu gidi xeellanawka yayyidi ba tiraa iccishe ‘Xoossaw, tana nagaranchuwa maararki’ gidi woossis." 
Luke18:14 Ta hintew odeysa si7ite; Farsaawiyape haysi qaraxa qanxiseysi Xoossaa sinthan xillo gididi ba soo simmis. Ayis giiko, bana dhoqu dhoqu oothiya asi kawuyana, bana kawushiya asi dhoqu dhoqu gaana” yaagis." 
Luke18:15 Yesuusi yooga nayta bolla ba kushiya wothidi anjana mela asay iyako ehoosona. Yesuusa tamaareti hessa be7idi “Ayis Yesuusako eheetii?” yaagidi kaccidosona. 
Luke18:16 Shin Yesuusi nayta baako xeegidi, “Yooga nayti taako yaanaysa diggofite; yo giite. Ayis giiko, Xoossa kawotethay entada hanidaysatasa." 
Luke18:17 Taani hintew tuma odayis; Xoossa kawotetha yooga naytatho ekonnay oonika yaa gelenna” yaagis. 
Luke18:18 Ayhude halaqatape issoy, “Keeha astamaariyaw, merina de7o demmanaw ay ootho?” yaagidi oychis." 
Luke18:19 Yesuusi iyako, “Ayis tana keehaw yaagada xeegay? Issi Xoossafe attishin, hari keehi baawa." 
Luke18:20 Laammofa, wodhopa, kaysotopa, wordo markatofa, ne aawanne ne aayiw boncha” giya kiita eray gidi oychis." 
Luke18:21 Urayka, “Hessata ubbaa taani na7atethafe doomada naagashe gam7as” yaagis." 
Luke18:22 Yesuusi hessa si7ida wode, “Hiza, new issibay pacees; new de7iyaba ubbaa bayzada manqotas imma; salon nena shaloy naagees. Yaata simmada, tana kaalla” yaagis." 
Luke18:23 Shin uray hessa si7ida wode iyaw daro shaloy de7iya gisho daro qiirotis. 
Luke18:24 Yesuusi uraa be7idi, “Dure asas Xoossa kawotethi geloy waanidi un7andesha?" 
Luke18:25 Durey Xoossa kawotethi gelanaysafe gimaley narpe luhora kantheysi kawuyees” yaagis. 
Luke18:26 Hessa si7ida asay, “Hessa gidiko ooni attanee?” yaagidosona." 
Luke18:27 Yesuusi, “Asas danda7etonabay Xoossas danda7etees” yaagis." 
Luke18:28 Phexroosi, “Heko nuuni nubaa ubbaa aggidi nena kaallida” yaagis." 
Luke18:29 “Yesuusi tuma ta hintew odayis; Xoossaa kawotethaas gidi ba keethaa woyko ba machiw woyko ba ishata woyko ba aawanne ba aayiw woyko ba nayta aggiday; 
Luke18:30 ha wodiyan dako daro, yaana alamen merina de7o ekonnay oonika baawa” yaagis." 
Luke18:31 Yesuusi tammanne nam7ata baako xeegidi, “Ane Yerusalaame boos, nabeti Asa Na7aba xaafidaba ubbay yan poletana." 
Luke18:32 I Ayhude gidonna asaas aadhidi imetana. Enti iya toochana, cayananne iya bolla cuttana." 
Luke18:33 Iya garaafidaape guye, wodhana, shin heedzantho gallasan I hayqope dendana” yaagis." 
Luke18:34 Shin iya tamaareti he ubbaafe issibaaka akeekibokona. Iya xuuray entaw qosetida gisho I woygidaako eribookona. 
Luke18:35 Yesuusi Iyaarko matiya wode issi qooqe uray oge gaxan uttidi woossees. 
Luke18:36 Qooqe uray asay he bessaara aadhishin si7idi, “I aybee?” gidi oychis." 
Luke18:37 Enti, “Naazirete Yesuusi haysara aadhees” yaagidosona." 
Luke18:38 I, “Dawita na7aw, Yesuusa, tana maararki” yaagidi waassis." 
Luke18:39 Sinthe sinthe biya asati, “Si7i ga” gidi hanqetidosona. Shin I, “Dawita na7aw, tana maara” yaagidi darsidi waassis." 
Luke18:40 Yesuusi eqidi uraa baako ehana mela kiittis. Urayka, iyako shiiqin," 
Luke18:41 “Ta new ay oothana mela koyay?” yaagidi oychis. Qooqey, “Godaw ta xeellanaw koyayis” yaagis." 
Luke18:42 Yesuusi, “Xeella, ne ammanoy nena pathis” yaagis." 
Luke18:43 Uray ellesidi xeelli aggis. Xoossaa bonchishe Yesuusa kaallis. Asa ubbay hessa be7idi Xoosse galatidosona. 
Luke19:1 Yesuusi Iyaarko gelidi aadhees. 
Luke19:2 Yan Zakiyoosa geetetiya qaraxa qanxiseyisata halaqay de7ees. I daro dure. 
Luke19:3 I Yesuusi ooneko be7anaw koyis. I qanthi gidiya gisho asaa darotethaafe dendoysan Yesuusa be7anaw danda7ibeenna. 
Luke19:4 Yesuusa be7anaw koyidi I biya ogiyas sinthe woxi bidi issi boobba mitha bolla keyis. 
Luke19:5 Yesuusi he bessaa gakishe dhoqu gidi be7idi, “Zakiyoosa, hachi ta ne son pee7anaw bessiya gisho elle wodha” yaagis." 
Luke19:6 I ellesi wodhidi ufaysan Yesuusa mokis. 
Luke19:7 He bessan de7iya asaa ubbay hessa be7idi, “Nagaranchuwa soo gelidi moketaniw hanees” yaagidi zuuzumidosona." 
Luke19:8 Gidoshin, Zakiyoosi eqidi Godaako, “Godaw, Heko taw de7iya shalo ubbaafe baggaa manqotas immana. Asape aybaka wordon balethada ekidaba gidiko oyddu kushe zaarana” yaagis." 
Luke19:9 Yesuusi qassi, “Ha uray Abrahaame na7a gidida gisho hachi atotethay ha soo yis." 
Luke19:10 Asa Na7ay yiday dhayidaysa koyanaasanne ashshanaasa” yaagis. 
Luke19:11 Asay hessa si7iya wode, Yesuusi Yerusalaame matatida gishonne Xoossaa kawotethay ha77i matara qoncana daanida gisho entaw leemiso odis." 
Luke19:12 Hessa gisho, Yesuusi, “Issi gita asi de7eysi baw kawotethi ekidi yaanaw hara biitta bis." 
Luke19:13 Iyaw oothiya aylletape tammata xeegidi issuwas issuwas tammu minaane immidi ‘Ta simmada yaana gakanaw ha miishiyara zal7ite’ yaagis. 
Luke19:14 “He biitta asay iya ixiya gisho, ha uray nu bolla kawotana mela nu koyoko yaagidi ase iya guyera kiittidosona." 
Luke19:15 “Gidoshin, he uray kawo gididi ba biitta simmis. He tammu aylleti I immida miishiyan ay mela zal7idi wodhisidaako eranaw koyidi entana xeegisis." 
Luke19:16 “Koyroysi yidi, ‘Godaw, ne taw immida miishey haraa tamma wodhis’ yaagis." 
Luke19:17 “Iya Goday, ‘Neno ammanetida aylliyaw lo77o oothadasa. Neeni guuthaban ammanetida gisho new tammu katamata bolla maata immas’ yaagis." 
Luke19:18 “Nam7anthoy yidi, ‘Godaw, ne taw immida miishey haraa ichasha wodhis’ yaagis." 
Luke19:19 “Goday iyako, ‘Newuka qassi ichashu katamata bolla maata immas’ yaagis." 
Luke19:20 “Heko heedzanthoy yidi, ‘Godaw, ta curqan xaaxada naagida ne miishiya hannashu." 
Luke19:21 Ayis giiko, neeni nebaa gidonnaba ekeysanne ne zeronnaba cakiya iita asi gidiya gisho new yayyas’ yaagis." 
Luke19:22 “Iya goday zaaridi, ‘Neno iita aylliyaw ne doonatho ta nena pirdana. Ta wothonnaba ekeysanne zeronnaba cakiya asi gideysa ne eriko," 
Luke19:23 ta yada ta miishiya wodhera ekana mela zal7iya asaas ayis immabikii?’ 
Luke19:24 “Iya goday he bessan eqidaysatako, ‘Iyara de7iya miishiya ekidi tamma wodhisidaysas immite’ yaagis." 
Luke19:25 “Enti, ‘Godaw, iyaw kaseka tammu minaaney de7ees’ yaagidosona." 
Luke19:26 “Goday, ta hintew odayis; ‘De7iya ubbaas hari guzhetana, shin baynaysafe haray atto iyaw de7iyaraka eketana." 
Luke19:27 Gidoshin, ta enta bolla kawotonna mela koydaysata he ta morketa ha ta sinthe ehidi gora7ite’ gis” yaagis." 
Luke19:28 Yesuusi hessa odidaape guye, entafe sinthe hemetidi Yerusalaame bis." 
Luke19:29 Shamaho zuma bolla de7iya Beetefaagenne Bitaane matida wode ba tamaaretape nam7ata kiittidi," 
Luke19:30 “Hinte sinthan de7iya gutaa biite, hinte yaa gakiya wode oonika toggonna qashetidi de7iya hare mari demmana. Iya billidi haa eki yiite." 
Luke19:31 Oonika, ‘Ayis billeetii?’ gidi oychiko, ‘Goday iya koyees’ yaagite” yaagis." 
Luke19:32 Kiitetidaysati bidi I gidaysada hanin be7idosona. 
Luke19:33 Enti hare maraa billishin godati be7idi, “Hare maraa ayis billeetii?” yaagidosona." 
Luke19:34 Enti zaaridi, “Goday iya koyees” yaagidosona." 
Luke19:35 Yaape hare maraa Yesuusako ehidosona. Banta ma7uwa hare maraa zokon yeggidi Yesuusa hare maraa bolla utisidosona. 
Luke19:36 Asayka I biya ogiya bolla banta ma7uwa hiixidosona. 
Luke19:37 Shamaho zuma dugethe wodhisiya ogiyako matiya wode, taybon keehi daro asay enti be7ida malaalsiyaban ufaytidi banta qaala dhoqu oothidi," 
Luke19:38 “Godaa sunthan yaa kawoy anjetidaysa saluwan saroy ubbaafe dhoqa saluwan bonchoy Xoossaas gido” yaagidi Xoossaa galatidosona. 
Luke19:39 Asaa giddofe issi issi Farsaaweti Yesuusako, “Astamaariyaw, ne tamaareta hayzite gada hanqeta” yaagidosona." 
Luke19:40 I entako, “Enti si77i giiko shuchati waassana” yaagis." 
Luke19:41 Yesuusi Yerusalaame matishe katamaa be7idi iyaw yeekis. 
Luke19:42 “New saro gidanaysa hachi ne eridaba gidiyakoshin, ha77i ne ayfiyape geemmis." 
Luke19:43 Ne morketi ne yuushuwa diridi dumma dumma ogiyara nena teqidi un7ethiya wodey yaana. 
Luke19:44 Nenanne ne dirsaa garsan de7iya ne nayta dhaysana. Issi issi shuchu denthidi laallana, ayis giiko Xoossay nena ashshanaw yaa wodiya erabaaka” yaagidi iw yeekis." 
Luke19:45 Hessafe guye, Yesuusi Xoossa Keethi gelidi zal7eyisata yaape goodis." 
Luke19:46 Qassi, “ ‘Ta keethay Xoossaa woossiya keethi gidana’ gidi xaafetis, shin hinte ta keethaa pangata gongolo oothideta” yaagis." 
Luke19:47 Gallas gallas xoossa keethan tamaarsees. Kahineta halaqati, higge astamaaretinne deriya cimati iya wodhanaw oge koyoosona." 
Luke19:48 Gidoshin, asa ubbay iya timirtiya banta wozana yeggidi si7iya gisho, entaw oothanabay dhayis." 
Luke20:1 Issi gallas Yesuusi xoossa keethan asaa tamaarsishininne Wongela markatishin, kahine halaqati, higge astamaaretinne deriya cimati issife iyako yidi," 
Luke20:2 “Neeni haysata aybi maatan oothiyako nuus oda. Ha maata new immiday oonee?” yaagidi oychidosona. 
Luke20:3 I entako, “Taka hintena issiba oychana, ane taw zaarite." 
Luke20:4 Xammaqiya Yohaanisa xinqatey Xoossafeye asapee?” yaagis. 
Luke20:5 Enti woli giddon yaagidi zoretidosona: “Xoossafe giiko yaatin, ayis ammanibeketii?” yaagana." 
Luke20:6 “Asape giiko, asa ubbay Yohaanisi nabe gideysa ammaniya gisho nuna shuchan caddana.”" 
Luke20:7 Yaaniya gisho, “Awupeko nu eroko” yaagidi zaaridosona." 
Luke20:8 Yesuusi zaaridi, “Hiza, taka ay maatan haysata oothiyako hintew odike” yaagis." 
Luke20:9 Hessafe guye, Yesuusi yaagidi ha leemisuwa asaas odis: “Issi asi woyne tokis. Goshshanchotas kera immidi daro wode gam7idi yaanaw hara biitta bis." 
Luke20:10 Woyne ayfiya maxiya wodey gakin woyne ayfiyape iyaw yeddana mela goshshanchotako ba aylliya kiittis. Shin goshshanchoti he aylliya oykidi wadhidi mela kushe yeddidosona. 
Luke20:11 Kaallidika hara aylliya kiittis. Qassi goshshanchoti iya wadhidi, kawushidi mela kushe yeddidosona." 
Luke20:12 Ha77ika zaaridi heedzantho aylliya kiittis. Goshshanchoti iyaka madunxisidi woyne gadiya giddofe gaxa kessidi yeggidosona. 
Luke20:13 “Woyne gadiya goday, ‘Yaatin ta ay ootho? Ane qassi ta dosiya ta na7a yeddana; ooni eri enti iya bonchona aggokona’ yaagis." 
Luke20:14 “Shin goshshanchoti uraa na7a be7ida wode, ‘Haysi iya laattanaysa, haa yiite iya wodhana, yaatiko laatay nuus gidana’ yaagidi zoretidosona." 
Luke20:15 Woyne gadiya giddofe gaxa kessidi wodhidosona. Yaatin, woyne gadiya goday he asata waatanee?" 
Luke20:16 Yidi he goshshanchota dhaysana, woyne gadiya hara asatas immana. Asay hessa si7ida wode ‘Shinchalle hessa melaba gathofo’ yaagidosona." 
Luke20:17 “Yesuusi enta caddi xeellidi, “ ‘Yaatin, gimbe keexiya asati borida shuchay, keethaas malanne minotethi immiya ubbaafe aadhiya shuchi gidis’ geetetidi xaafetidaysa birshethay aybee?" 
Luke20:18 He shuchaa bolla kundiya ubbay qoxettana, shuchay iya bolla wodhiya ubbay liiqana” yaagis." 
Luke20:19 Higge astamaaretinne kahine halaqati ha leemisoy odetiday enta bolla gideysa eridi he wode iya oykanaw koydosona, shin asaas babidosona." 
Luke20:20 Hessa gisho, Yesuusa deriya haariya Roome kawa maatas aathidi immanaw koyidi iya doonape bala qaala naagoosona. Hessa polisanaw xillo daanidi cimmiya asata iyako kiittidosona." 
Luke20:21 Kiitetidi bida asati, “Astamaariyaw, neeni odeysinne tamaarseysi like gideysa, qassi Xoossaa ogiya tumatethan tamaarseysanne oonaka shaakonnaysa nu eroos." 
Luke20:22 Hanoshin, Roome kawas giira giiranaw bessi bessennee?” yaagidi iya oychidosona." 
Luke20:23 Shin I enta wozanaa iitatetha erida gisho," 
Luke20:24 “Ane tana issi santime bessite, Iya bolla de7iya misileynne sunthay oodebayee?” yaagis. Enti zaaridi, “Roome Kawa Qeesareysa” yaagidosona." 
Luke20:25 I zaaridi, “Yaatiko, Qeesareba Qeesares, Xoossaba Xoossaas immite” yaagis." 
Luke20:26 Hessa gisho, I zaarida zaaruwan asaa sinthan bala demmanaw danda7ibookona. Iya zaaruwan malaaletidi si77i gidoosona." 
Luke20:27 Hayqope dendoy baawa giya Saduqaawetape issoti issoti Yesuusako yidi,"
