James1:13 Oonika paacetiya wode, “Tana Xoossay paacees” goopo. Xoossay iitan paacetenna; qassi I oonaka paacenna." 
James1:14 Shin issi issi asi ba iita amuwan gooshetiya wodenne cimetiya wode paacetees. 
James1:15 Hessafe guye, amotethi qanthatidi nagara yelees; qassi nagari diccidi hayqo yelees." 
James1:16 Ta siiqo ishato, cimetofite." 
James1:17 Lo77o imoynne kumetha anjo ubbay salopenne saluwa poo7uwa medhida Xoossaa aawape yees. Xoossay kuyada ubba wode laametenna. 
James1:18 Nuuni, iya medhetethas koyro gidana mela nuna tuma qaalan ba shenen yelis." 
James1:19 Ta siiqo ishato, haysa akeekite. Asi ubbay si7anaw elleso, shin odetanawunne hanqetanaw ellesopo." 
James1:20 Asa hanqoy Xoossay koyiya xillotethaa ehenna. 
James1:21 Hessa gisho, tuna hanotanne iitatetha ubbaa diggidi, Xoossay hinte wozanan tokida hinte shempuwa ashshanaw danda7iya qaala aadatethan ekite." 
James1:22 Shin Xoossaa qaala ooson peeshshitepe attishin, sissa xalaalan hintena cimmofite." 
James1:23 Qaala si7idi oothonna asi, I ba som7uwa mastooten be7iya asa mela." 
James1:24 I ba som7uwa be7idi bees, shin I ay daaniyako ellesi dogees." 
James1:25 Shin oonika aylletethafe kessiya polo higgiya akeekan be7idi, kaallidi naagey, si7idaysa dogonna ooson peeshshiya uray, ba ooso ubban anjetana." 
James1:26 Ba inxarsaa naagonna ammanayis giya uray bana cimees; iya ammanoy hada. 
James1:27 Xoossaa Aawa sinthan borey bayna geeshsha ammanoy haysa: aayiya aawu bayna naytanne am7eta maadonne alamiya tunaape bana naago. 
James2:1 Ta ishato, hinte nu boncho Godaa Yesuus Kiristoosa ammaniyaba gidiko, asa som7o xeellidi ase bonchofite." 
James2:2 Leemisos, worqa migiddo aathidi, lo77o ma7o ma7ida dure asi hinte shiiquwa yis. Qassi curqa ma7o ma7ida manqo asika yis." 
James2:3 Lo77o ma7o ma7ida addiya hinte aathidi bonchidi, “Ne haysan lo77iya oydiyan utta” gidi, qassi manqo addiya, “Ne yan eqa woyko haysan ta tohuwa matan sa7an utta” geeta." 
James2:4 Yaatin, hinte, hinte giddon shaaketethi medheysatanne iita qofara de7iya daynnata mela gideketiyee?" 
James2:5 Ta siiqo ishato, si7ite. Ammanon dure gidana melanne bana siiqeysatas immana gida salo kawotethaa laattana mela ha sa7an de7iya manqota Xoossay dooribeneyee?" 
James2:6 Shin hinte manqota toocheta. Hintena un7etheysati dureta gidokonaayee? Hintena daynna sinthe goocheysati enta gidokonaayee? 
James2:7 Hinte xeegetida lo77o Godaa sunthaa cayeysati enta gidokonaayee? 
James2:8 Shin Geeshsha Maxaafan, “Ase ubbaa nena ne doseysada dosa” geetetidi xaafetida Xoossaa kawotethaa higgiya hinte poliko lo77o ootheeta." 
James2:9 Shin hinte asa som7o xeellidi bonchiko, nagara ootheeta qassi higgey hintena higge menthida asada pirdana." 
James2:10 Oonika higge ubbaafe issuwa menthidi, attida ubbaa naagiko ubbaa menthidaada taybetees." 
James2:11 “Laammofa” gida Goday, qassi “Wodhopa” gis. Shin neeni laammonna aggada wodhidaba gidiko, higgiya menthadasa." 
James2:12 Aylletethafe kessiya higgiya sinthan pirda ekanaw de7iya asada odetitenne oothite. 
James2:13 Ase maaronna oonaka Xoossay maaronna pirdana. Shin maarotethay pirdaa xoonees. 
James2:14 Ta ishato, hintefe issi asi taw ammanoy de7ees gidi, ba ammanuwa ooson bessonna ixiko iya ay maaddanee? Iya ammanoy iya ashshanaw danda7ii?" 
James2:15 Leemisos issi ishay woyko issi michiya kallotikonne entaw miyabay dhayiko," 
James2:16 hintefe issi asi entako, “Saro biite! Tama kayite! Kallidi miite!” gidi, koshshiyaba entaw immonna ixiko enta ay maaddii?" 
James2:17 Hessa gisho, oosoy bayna ammanoy barka hayqidaysa." 
James2:18 Shin issi asi, “New ammanoy de7ees; qassi taw oosoy de7ees. Neeni ne ammanuwa ne oosuwape shaakada tana bessa; taka ta ammanuwa ta oosuwan nena bessaana” gaana." 
James2:19 Neeni, issi Xoossay de7eysa ammanaasa; hessi lo77o. Tuna ayyaanatika ammanoosona; yashshan kokoroosona." 
James2:20 Neno eeyaw! Ammanoy oosope shaaketidi maaddonnaysa eranaw koyay? 
James2:21 Nu aawa Abrahaamey, ba na7aa Yisaaqa yarsho bessa bolla wothida wode ba oosuwan xillibeennee?" 
James2:22 Iya ammanoynne iya oosoy issife oothidaysa be7ikii? Iya ammanoy iya oosuwan poletis. 
James2:23 Geeshsha Maxaafay, “Abrahaamey Xoossaa ammanis. Xoossay hessa iyaw xillotethi oothidi taybis” gidaysi poletis. Qassi I Xoossaa dabbo geetetidi xeegetis." 
James2:24 Asi ammano xalaalan gidonashin, ooson xilleysa be7aasa." 
James2:25 Hessadaka, laymiya Ra7aaba Isra7eelepe kiitetidaysata mokada hara ogera enta moyzida wode ba oosuwan xillabeekee?" 
James2:26 Shempoy shaaketida asatethay hayqo gideysada, oosoy shaaketida ammanoyka hayqidaysa." 
James3:1 Ta ishato, hintefe daroti astamaare gidopo. Nu, astamaareti haratape aadhiya pirdaa ekanaysa hinte ereeta." 
James3:2 Nu ubbay daroban baletoos. Ba odan baletonna oonika banatetha naaganaw danda7iya polo asi. 
James3:3 Parati nuus kiitetana mela bixaala barsidi nuuni koyiya bessi ubbaa efoos. 
James3:4 Markabey hessa mela gita gidishe wolqaama carkuwan sugetikoka, enta laaggeysi ba koyiya bessi zaaridi laagiya guutha mithan laagetidi bees." 
James3:4 Markabey hessa mela gita gidishe wolqaama carkuwan sugetikoka, enta laaggeysi ba koyiya bessi zaaridi laagiya guutha mithan laagetidi bees." 
James3:5 Hessada inxarsi asatethaa giddon guutha gidikoka daro gitaban ceeqetees. Guutha tami daro gita wora xuuggees. 
James3:6 Inxarsi tama mela. Inxarsi nu asatethaa giddon iitan kumida alame; asatethaa ubbaa tunisees. Gaannamepe keyiya tamada nu de7uwa wotha ubbaa xuuggees. 
James3:7 Do7atanne kafota, ulora goosheteysatanne abban de7iya medhetethata ubbaa asi haarees; entika haaretidosona." 
James3:8 Shin oonika inxarsi haaranaw danda7ibeenna. Inxarsi wodhiya marzey kumida haaretonna iita medhetethi. 
James3:9 Nu inxarsan, nu, Godaanne Xoossaa galatoos. Qassi iyara Xoossaa leemison Medhetida asaa baaddoos." 
James3:10 Issi doonape galatinne baadethi keyees. Ta ishato, hessada hananaw bessenna." 
James3:11 Pultoy issi ollafe mal7iya haathinne cammiya haathi pultanaw danda7ii? 
James3:12 Ta ishato, balase mithi shamaho ayfanaw danda7ii? Woyko woyne mithi balase mitha ayfe ayfanaw danda7ii? Camo haathaafe mal7o haathi keyanaw danda7enna." 
James3:13 Hinte giddon cincinne akeekanchoy oonee? Ba lo77o de7uwa, ashketethaninne cincatethan oosetida ooson besso." 
James3:14 Shin hinte wozanan cammiya qinaateynne bana dosoy de7iko ceeqetofite; tumaa bolla wordotopite. 
James3:15 Hessa mela cincatethay salope yidaba gidonashin, hessi asaba, alameba, xalaheba." 
James3:16 Qinaateynne bana dosoy de7iya son ooshshinne iita ooso ubbay de7oosona. 
James3:17 Shin bollafe yaa cincatethay ubbaafe sinthe geeshshi. Qassi sarotethi, aadatethi, si7idi ekeysa, qadheteysa, lo77o ayfey kumidaysa, ase shaakonnaysanne cubbotethi baynaysa." 
James3:18 Sarotethaa doseysati sarotethi zeridi xillotethi buucosona. 
James4:1 Ooshshinne oli hinte giddo awupe yii? Enti yey hinte asatethaa haaranaw oletiya hinte asho amuwape gidenneyee? 
James4:2 Hinte amotteeta, shin demmeketa; hessa gisho, wodheeta. Minthi koyeeta, shin demmanaw danda7eketa; hessa gisho, ooyeteetanne oleteeta. Hinte Xoossaa woossonna gisho koyaba demmeketa." 
James4:3 Hinte woosseta, shin demmeketa. Hinte asho amuwa polanaw wobbe ogen woossiya gisho demmeketa." 
James4:4 Hinteno, laymateysato! Ha alamiya dosey Xoossara morke gideysa ereketii? Ha alamiyara dabbotanaw koyey oonika Xoossara morke." 
James4:5 Geeshsha Maxaafay, “Xoossay nunan daana mela oothida Ayyaanay, nuuni iyaw buzo gidana mela amottees” gidaysa coo gidaba daanii?" 
James4:6 Shin Geeshsha Maxaafay, “Xoossay otoranchota ixees, shin bantana ashketas maarotethi immees” giya gisho, Xoossay maarotethi darsidi immees." 
James4:7 Hessa gisho, Xoossaas haaretite; Xalahiyara eqetite; I hintefe haakana." 
James4:8 Xoossaako shiiqite; I hinteko shiiqana. Hinteno, nagaranchoto, hinte kushiya meecetite; nam7u qofi de7eysato, hinte wozanaa geeshshite." 
James4:9 Kayotite, yeekitenne afuxite. Hinte miichay yeehon, hinte ufaysay azzanon laameto." 
James4:10 Godaa sinthan hintenatethaa kawushite; hintena dhoqu dhoqu oothana. 
James4:11 Ta ishato, issoy issuwa zigiropite. Ba ishaa zigireynne iya bolla pirdey higge zigiresinne higge bolla pirdees. Neeni higge bolla pirdiko higge bolla pirdeysa gidaasape attishin, higge poleysa gidaka." 
James4:12 Higge immeynne pirdey Xoossaa xalaala. Ashshanawunne dhaysanaw danda7ey iya. Yaatin, ne asa bolla pirdey neeni oonee?" 
James4:13 Hinte, “Nuuni hachi woyko wonto ya katamaa woyko ha katamaa baana; yan laythi uttana; zal7idi wodhisana” yaageysato, si7ite." 
James4:14 Wonto aybi hananeeko hinte ereketa. Hinte de7oy waananeko erey oonee? Hinte guutha wode bentidi dhayiya aka mela. 
James4:15 Hessa aggidi, “Goday giiko nuuni daana; haysa woyko hessa oothana” yaaganaw bessees." 
James4:16 Shin hinte ha77i otortetanne ceeqeteta. Hessa mela ceeqo ubbay iita. 
James4:17 Hessa gisho, lo77oba oothanaw erishe oothonna uraas hessi nagara." 
James5:1 Hinteno, dureto, hinte bolla iita metoy yaa gisho yeekitenne zeleelite." 
James5:2 Hinte shaloy buuqis; hinte afilayka bilan meetetis. 
James5:3 Hinte worqaynne hinte biray shi7is. He shi7ay hinte bolla marka gidana. I hinte asatethaa tamada maana. Hinte ha wurida qammatan hintew shalo dagayeeta. 
James5:4 Hinte gaden oothi pee7ida asaa une miishiya qanxibeketa. Hessi hinte bolla waassees. He asata waasoy wolqaama Godaa haythan si7etis. 
James5:5 Ha sa7an hinte ulo xalaalas qopidi, injen de7ideta. Shukas giigetida meheda hintena dhiikideta." 
James5:6 Hintera eqetanaw danda7onna xillo asa bolla pirdideta iya wodhideta. 
James5:7 Ta ishato, Goday yaana gakanaw gencite. Goshshanchoy torche iraynne sila iray yaana gakanaw gencidi al7o kathaa naagidi waati gathi ekiyako qopite." 
James5:8 He goshshanchuwada hinteka gencite. Godaa yuussay matatida gisho ufaysan naagite. 
James5:9 Ta ishato, Xoossay hinte bolla pirdonna mela issoy issuwa bolla zuuzumofite. Pirdeysi pengen eqis." 
James5:10 Ta ishato, waayan gencida, Godaa sunthan odida nabeta leemiso oothidi ekite." 
James5:11 Danda7an gencidaysata nuuni anjetidaysata goos. Iyyobi waanidi gencidaako hinte si7ideta. Goday wursethan iya waati maaddidaako be7ideta. I maarotinne qadhey kumida Godaa gidiya gisho hessa oothis. 
James5:12 Shin ubbaafe sinthe, ta ishato, saluwan gidin woyko sa7an gidin woyko hara aybinka caaqofite. Xoossaa pirdan hinte gelonnaada hinte oday ee gidiko, “Ee” giite; akay gidiko, “Akay” giite." 
James5:13 Hinte giddon meto ekiya oonika de7iko Xoossaa woosso. Ufaytiya oonika de7iko galatan yexo. 
James5:14 Hintefe hargetiya oonika de7iko woosa keetha cimata xeego. Enti Godaa sunthan shamaho zayte tiyidi iyaw Xoossaa woosso. 
James5:15 Ammanon woossida woosay harganchuwa pathana. Goday iya, hargiyafe denthana; I nagara oothidaba gidikoka Goday iya maarana." 
James5:16 Hessa gisho, hinte paxana mela hinte nagara issoy issuwas paaxitenne issoy issuwas woossite. Xillo asa woosay wolqaama ooso oothees." 
James5:17 Eeliyaasi nu mela ase. Iri sa7an bukonna mela minthidi Xoossaa woossin heedzu laythinne usupun ageena sa7an iri bukibeenna. 
James5:18 Zaaridi I Xoossaa woossin salope iri bukis; sa7ika kathi dolisees. 
James5:19 Ta ishato, hintefe oonika tuma ogiyape buutiko, haray iya tumaako zaariko," 
James5:20 nagaranchuwa iya bala ogiyape zaariya oonika, iya shempuwa hayqope ashsheysanne iya daro nagaraas maarota immeysa ero." 
1Peter1:1 Taani, Yesuus Kiristoosa hawaarey Phexroosi; Phanxoosan, Galatiyan, Qaphadooqan, Iiseninne Bitaanen betanchoda laaletidi de7iya Xoossay doorida, asaas ha dabdaabiya xaafas." 
1Peter1:2 Yesuus Kiristoosas hinte kiitetana melanne iya suuthan geeyana mela, Xoossaa Aaway ba kase eran dooridaysatasinne Geeshsha Ayyaanan geeyida, hintew aadho keehatethaynne sarotethay gido." 
1Peter1:3 Yesuus Kiristoosa hayqope denthidi ba gita maarotethan nam7antho yeletethaanne dhayonna ufaysaa immida nu Godaa Yesuus Kiristoosa Aaway, Xoossay galatetto." 
1Peter1:4 Qassi Xoossay hintew dhayonna, iitonnanne buuqonna laata salon giigisis." 
1Peter1:5 He laatay wode wursethan qoncanaw de7iya atotethas Xoossaa wolqan ammanon hintew naagetidi de7ees. 
1Peter1:6 Ha77i guutha wodes hinte dumma dumma paacen un7etikoka hessan ufaytite. 
1Peter1:7 He paacey hintena gakiday, taman yeggin dhayiya worqafe hinte ammanoy aadhonne tuma gideysa bessanaasa. He paacetida ammanuwan Yesuus Kiristoosi qonciya wode galataa, bonchonne saba hinte ekana." 
1Peter1:8 Hinte Yesuusa be7ibeeketa, shin iya siiqeta. Hinte ha77i iya be7iboonaba gidikoka, iya ammaneta. Qassi odan qoncisanaw danda7etonna ufaysaninne bonchon kumideta." 
1Peter1:9 Hinte ammanon naagiya hinte shempuwa atotetha ekana. 
1Peter1:10 Aadho keehatetha baggara hintew giigida ha atotethaaba nabeti eranaw gita koshshaninne naagon koydosona. 
1Peter1:11 Entan de7iya Kiristoosa Ayyaanay iya waayabanne hessafe guye, yaana bonchuwaba kasetidi markatishe, awude woyko waanidi hananeeko akeekan pilgidosona." 
1Peter1:12 Nabeti odida tinbitey bantaw gidonashin, hintew gideysa Xoossay hintew qoncisis. Ha77i asay hintew odida Wongela salope kiitetida Geeshsha Ayyaana wolqan hintew odidosona. Kiitanchotika hessa be7anaw amotidosona." 
1Peter1:13 Hessa gisho, oosos hintena giigisite; hintena haarite. Yesuus Kiristoosi qonciya wode hinte ekana aadho keehatetha ufaysan naagite." 
1Peter1:14 Xoossaa naytada iyaw kiitetite; hinte kase eronna oothida iita amuwa kaallopite. 
1Peter1:15 Shin hintena xeegida Xoossay geeshshi gididaysada hinteka hinte duussa ubban geeshshi gidite. 
1Peter1:16 Geeshsha Maxaafan, “Taani geeshshi gidida gisho hinteka geeshshi gidite” geetetidi xaafetis." 
1Peter1:17 Asa som7o be7onna iya oosuwada pirdiya Xoossaa, “Nu Aawaw” gidi xeegiyaba gidiko, ha sa7aa imathatetha duussaa yashshan de7ite." 
1Peter1:18 Hinte, hinte aawatape laattida pathonna de7uwape wozetidaysi, dhayiya biran woyko worqan gidonnaysa ereeta." 
1Peter1:19 Borey woyko borsoy bayna dorsa suuthada al7o gidida Kiristoosa suuthan wozetideta. 
1Peter1:20 Xoossay alamey medhetanaape kase Kiristoosa dooris, shin ha wursetha wodiyan Kiristoosi hinte gisho qoncis." 
1Peter1:21 Hinte ammanoynne hinte ufaysay Xoossan gidana mela iya hayqope denthidi, bonchida Kiristoosa baggara Xoossan ammaneta." 
1Peter1:22 Hinte tumatethaas kiitetidi hintenatethaa geeshshideta. Hinte issoy issuwa wozanape siiqeta, shin ha77ika tuma wozanape minthidi siiqite." 
1Peter1:23 Hinte nam7antho yeletiday dhayiya zerethafe gidonashin, merinaw de7iya Xoossaa qaalan dhayonna kochaafe yeletideta." 
1Peter1:24 Xoossaa qaalay, “Asi ubbay maata mela; iya boncho ubbay ciishsha mela. Maatay melees, ciishshayka qoletees." 
1Peter1:25 Shin Godaa qaalay merinaw de7ees” yaagees. Hintew odetida Wongela qaalay haysa. 
1Peter2:1 Hiza, iitatethi ubbaa, cimo ubbaa, cubbotethi qanaatenne zigirsi ubbaa hintefe diggite." 
1Peter2:2 Goday keeha gideysa hinte eridi meezetidaysada ha77i yeletida guutha naytada hinte atotethan diccishe baanaw Xoossaa geeshsha qaala maatha ubba wode amotite. 
1Peter2:3  
1Peter2:4 Asan boretidi Xoossan dooretida al7o gidida de7o shuchaa, Godaa Yesuusako shiiqite." 
1Peter2:5 Hinte Ayyaana keethi keexetiya de7o shuchata. Hinte Yesuus Kiristoosa baggara Xoossaa ufaysiya ayyaana yarsho yarshiya geeshsha kahineta. 
1Peter2:6 Geeshsha Maxaafan, “Heko, taani Xiyoone kataman godaa xaphuwa minthiya, dooretida, al7o shuchaa wothas; iyan ammaniya oonika yeellatenna” yaagees." 
1Peter2:7 Ha shuchay hintew ammaneysatas al7o, shin ammanonaysatas, “Gimbeysati kadhidi ixida shuchay godaa xaphuwa minthiya, ubbaafe aadhiya shuchu gidis.”" 
1Peter2:8 Qassika, “Ha shuchay ase dhubiya shuchinne ase kundisiya zaalla” yaagees. Enti hessas qaadetida gisho Xoossaa qaala kiitetonna ixidi dhubetidosona." 
1Peter2:9 Shin Xoossay dhumape malaalsiya ba poo7uwako hintena xeegiday, hinte iya lo77otetha haratas odanaw dooretida koche, kawo kahine, geeshsha derenne Xoossaa dumma dere." 
1Peter2:10 Hinte kase Xoossaa dere gideketa, shin ha77i hinte iya dere. Hinte kase maarotethi demmibeketa, shin ha77i maarotethi demmideta." 
1Peter2:11 Ta ishato, hinte ha sa7an imathenne bete asi gididaysada hinte shempuwa oliya asho amope haakana mela taani hintena woossayis." 
1Peter2:12 Ammanonna asay hintena iita oothiya asada zigirya wode Xoossay nuna be7anaw yaa gallas, enti hinte lo77o oosuwa be7idi Xoossaa galatana mela hintew lo77o de7oy de7o." 
1Peter2:13 Godaa gisho gidi maatara de7iya asatas haaretite; ubbaafe bolla gidiya gisho kawuwasika haaretite. 
1Peter2:14 Enti iita ootheyisata seeranawunne lo77o ootheyisata sabbanaw kawuwape kiitetida gisho deriya ayseysatas haaretite. 
1Peter2:15 Hinte, hinte lo77o oosuwan eronna eeya asaa doona oythanaysi Xoossaa shene." 
1Peter2:16 Xoossaa aylle gididi la77atethan de7itepe attishin, hinte la77atetha iita oosos kama oothopite." 
1Peter2:17 Asa ubbaa bonchite; ammaniya asaa siiqite; Xoossaa yayyite; kawo bonchite. 
1Peter2:18 Aylleto lo77o godatasinne keeha godata xalaalas gidonashin, iitataska bonchon haaretite." 
1Peter2:19 Asi Xoossaa gisho gidi bessonna waaye waayetiko Xoossay iya anjana. 
1Peter2:20 Shin hinte nagara oothin hintena dechiya wode hinte danda7iko hintew ay galati de7ii? Shin lo77oba oothidi waaye danda7iko Xoossay hintena hessas anjana. 
1Peter2:21 Xoossay hintena xeegiday hessa gishosa; Kiristoosi hintew waayetis; hinte iya kaallana mela, hintew leemiso gidis." 
1Peter2:22 I nagara oothibeenna; iya doonan wordoy bentibeenna. 
1Peter2:23 Enti iya cayiya wode, zaaridi cayibeenna. Shin waaye ekishe xillo pirdiya Xoossaas ba pirda aggaagisipe attishin, mandibeenna." 
1Peter2:24 Nuuni nagaras hayqidi xillotethas daana mela Kiristoosi ba ashuwan nu nagaraa masqaliya bolla tookis; hinte iya madunthan paxideta. 
1Peter2:25 Kase hinte oge balidi dhayida dorsata mela, shin ha77i hinte shempuwa heemmeysakonne naageysako simmideta." 
1Peter3:1 Hessadaka, macheto, hinte azinatape Xoossaa qaalas kiitetonaysati de7ikoka aykoka odetonashin, hinte yashshatethaanne hinte geeshsha de7uwa be7idi ammanana mela entaw haaretite." 
1Peter3:2  
1Peter3:3 Hinte, hinte huuphe pixoninne worqa alleeqon woyko lo77o ma7on hinte bolla asatethaa loyson gidopo." 
1Peter3:4 Shin hinte wozanaa giddon de7iya yegelsatethay Xoossaa sinthan hintew daro al7o gididi dhayonna, ashkenne wopu gida ayyaana gido." 
1Peter3:5 Xoossay immana gidaysa ammanida geeshsha maccasati beni wode banta azinatas haaretidi, bantana hessada daro loythidosona." 
1Peter3:6 Hessada Saara Abrahaame, “Ta godaw” yaagada xeegashe, iyaw kiitetasu; hinteka aykoka yayyonna lo77oba oothiko I nayta." 
1Peter3:7 Azinatoo, hinte macheti hintefe daaburancho medheta gideysa eridi, entana bonchite; hinte woosa dhubonna mela Xoossay immida de7uwa enti hintera issife laattiya gisho enta bonchite." 
1Peter3:8 Wursethan, ubbay issi qofan de7ite. Issoy issuwas qadhetishe, ishada siiqetite; qassi issoy issuwas keehatanne ashketa gidite." 
1Peter3:9 Iita gisho iita woyko cashsha gisho cayidi zaaropite; hessa aggidi, Xoossay hintew anjuwa immanaw hintena xeegida gisho anjite." 
1Peter3:10 Ayis giiko, Geeshsha Maxaafay, “De7o doseynne lo77o wode be7anaw koyey oona gidikoka ba inxarsan iitabaanne wordo odeteysa aggo." 
1Peter3:11 Iitabaa ootheysa aggidi lo77oba ootho; sarotethaaka keehi koyonne kaallo. 
1Peter3:12 Godaa ayfey xillotako xeellees; qassi I ubba wode enta woosa hayzees. Shin Goday iitabaa ootheyisata ba hanqo som7uwan xeellees” yaagees. 
1Peter3:13 Hinte lo77oba oothanaw amotiko hintena qohanay oonee? 
1Peter3:14 Hari attoshin, xillotetha gisho hinte waayetiko anjetidaysata. Asas yayyofitenne hirgofite." 
1Peter3:15 Kiristoosa hinte wozanan bonchitenne godayite. Xoossay hintew immida ufaysas gaaso oychiya oodeska zaaro immanaw ubba wode giigidi uttite, shin hessa ashketethaninne yashshan oothite." 
1Peter3:16 Qassi Kiristoosan hinte de7iya lo77o de7uwa iitabaa oothidabaada, hintena cayiya asay zigiryaban yeellatana mela hinte kahay geeshshi gido." 
1Peter3:17 Xoossay gidaba gidiko iitabaa oothida gisho waaye ekeysafe lo77oba oothida gisho waaye ekeysi lo77o. 
1Peter3:18 Kiristoosi nuna Xoossaako shiishanaw baw xillo gididi de7ishe, nagaranchota gisho issi toho nagara ubbaas hayqis; I ba asatethan hayqis, shin ayyaanan paxis." 
1Peter3:19 Qassi he ayyaanan I bidi qashon de7iya shempotas qaala odis. 
1Peter3:20 Nohey markabiya keexiya wode he shempoti Xoossaas kiitetonna ixidosona, shin Xoossay entana danda7i gam7is. Hospun asa xalaali markabiyan gelidi, dhayo haathaafe attidosona." 
1Peter3:21 He dhayo haathay ha77i hintena ashshiya xinqate leemiso gidis. Ha xinqatey bolla qita meecco gidonashin, lo77o kaha Xoossaafe ekanaw iya woossiya oge gididi, Kiristoosa denduwa baggara hintena ashshees." 
1Peter3:22 I salo bidi Xoossaa ushachan uttidi, kiitanchota, maata aawatanne wolqaamata haarees." 
1Peter4:1 Hessa gisho, Kiristoosi ba ashuwan nuus waayetida gisho hinteka he qofan hintena dancisidi minnidi eqite. Kiristoosa gisho gidi ba ashuwan waaye ekida uray nagara oothike gidi qanxida asi." 
1Peter4:2 He uray ba attida laythan Xoossaa shene oothanaw koyeesipe attishin, iita asho amon deenna." 
1Peter4:3 Kase hinte ammanonna asay de7idaysada de7ideta. Hinte iita amon, laymatethan, mathon, tunatethi denthethiya yethan, pokiya eeqa goyinnon kase de7ida duussay gidana." 
1Peter4:4 Ammanonna asaara hinte shori bayna oosuwa oothonna gisho malaaletidi hintena cayoosona. 
1Peter4:5 Shin enti paxata bollanne hayqida asaa bolla pirdanaw de7iya Xoossaas zaaro immana. 
1Peter4:6 Hayqida asaas Wongelay sabbaketiday haysa gishosa. Enti asatho banta ashuwan pirdetana qassi banta ayyaanan Xoossaatho de7on daana. 
1Peter4:7 Hiza, ubbabaas wursethay matatis. Hessa gisho, woossanaw danda7etana mela wopu gida wozani de7o; maarara de7ite." 
1Peter4:8 Siiqoy daro nagara kammiya gisho, ubbaafe aathidi issoy issuwara wozanape siiqetite." 
1Peter4:9 Zuuzumonna issoy issuwa imathatethan mokite. 
1Peter4:10 Hinte Xoossaafe dumma dumma aadho keehatetha imota ekidaysada hinte issoy issoy he imuwa bessiyada oykidi issoy issuwa haggaazite. 
1Peter4:11 Yesuus Kiristoosa baggara ubbaban Xoossay galatetana mela oonika odiyaba gidiko Xoossaafe qaala ekidaada odo. Qassi oonika maaddiyaba gidiko Xoossay iyaw immiya wolqaada maaddo. Bonchoynne wolqi merinaape merina gakanaw iyaw gido. Amin7i. 
1Peter4:12 Ta ishato, hinte tamada xuuggiya waaye paaciya giddora aadhiya wode oorathabay hanidaada malaaletofite." 
1Peter4:13 Shin iya bonchoy qonciya wode hinte ufaysay gita gidana mela Kiristoosa waayiya hinte ekeysan ufaytite. 
1Peter4:14 Kiristoosa sunthaa gisho asi hintena cayiya wode, Xoossaa boncho Ayyaanay hinte bolla shempiya gisho hinte anjetidaysata." 
1Peter4:15 Hintefe waaye ekiya oonika shempo wodhidaada woyko kaysotidaada woyko iita oothidaada woyko gelsonnaban gelidaada hanidi waayetofo. 
1Peter4:16 Gidoshin, kiristaane gidiya gisho waayetiko Kiristoosa sunthaa gisho Xoossaa galatope attishin, yeellatopo." 
1Peter4:17 Pirdi Xoossaa asaa bolla doomiya wodey gakis. Hiza, he pirday koyro nu bolla doomiyaba gidiko, Xoossaa Wongelas Kiitetonna asaa wursethay ay gidanee?" 
1Peter4:18 Xilloy un7an attiyaba gidiko, makallanchoynne nagaranchoy yaatin waananee?" 
1Peter4:19 Hessa gisho, Xoossa sheneda waaye ekeysati banta shempuwa bantana medhida, ammanthiya Xoossas hadara immishe lo77oba ootho." 
1Peter5:1 Hiza, woosa keethaa cimatara cima gididaysi, Kiristoosa waayiya markateysinne qoncanaw de7iya bonchuwa shaaketanaw de7iya taani, hinte giddon de7iya cimata zorayis." 
1Peter5:2 Hinte aawatethafe garsan de7iya Xoossaa wudiya heemmite. Xoossay koyeysada dosanaape attishin, un7etidi heemmofite. Qassi miishe koshshan gidonashin, haggaazanaw de7iya lo77o qofan heemmite." 
1Peter5:3 Hinte aawatethafe garsan de7iya wudiyas leemiso giditepe attishin, godatopite." 
1Peter5:4 Heemmeyisata halaqay qonciya wode qolettonna boncho kallacha hinte ekana. 
1Peter5:5 Hessadaka, yalagato, cimatas haaretite. Hinte issoy issuwas ashke gidite. Geeshsha Maxaafan, “Xoossay otoranchota ixees, shin ashketas aadho keehatetha immees” yaagees." 
1Peter5:6 Xoossay ba wode hintena bonchana mela wolqaama Xoossaa kushiyape garsan hintena kawushite. 
1Peter5:7 I hintew qopiya gisho hintena hirgisiya ubbaa iya bolla yeggite. 
1Peter5:8 Hinte morkey Xalahey, mittiyaba koyidi, gaammoda gudishe hinte matara yuuyiya gisho hintena haaritenne barkite." 
1Peter5:9 Alamen de7iya hinte ishati hessada waaye ekeysa eridi, ammanon minnidi, Xalahiyara eqetite." 
1Peter5:10 Ba merinaa bonchuwas Kiristoos Yesuusa baggara hintena xeegida aadho keehatetha ubbaa Xoossay, guutha wodes hinte waayetidaape guye, I ba huuphen hintena shiishana, katisana, minthidi essana, xaalisana." 
1Peter5:11 Merinaape merinaa gakanaw Xoossay kawoto. Amin7i. 
1Peter5:12 Ammanetida ishaa gada ta ekiya Sillaase baggara ha dabdaabiya hintew qanthan xaafas. Ta hessa hintew xaafiday, hintena zoranawunne Xoossaa aadho keehatethay tuma gideysa markatanaasa. He aadho keehatethan minnidi eqite." 
1Peter5:13 Hintera issife dooretida Babiloonen de7iya woosa keetha asaynne ta na7aa Marqoosi hintena, “Saro saro” yaagees." 
1Peter5:14 Siiqo yeeretetha yeeretishe, issoy issuwa sarothite. Kiristoosan de7iya hinte ubbaas saroy gido. Amin7i." 
2Peter1:1 Yesuus Kiristoosa hawaareynne iya aylley, taani, Simooni Phexroosi, nu Xoossaanne nuna ashshiya Yesuus Kiristoosa xillotethaa baggara nuysa mela al7o ammano ekidaysatas ha dabdaabiya xaafas." 
2Peter1:2 Xoossaanne nu Godaa Yesuusa eron aadho keehatethaynne saroy hintew kumo. 
2Peter1:3 Ba bonchoninne lo77otethan nuna xeegida iya eron de7osinne Xoossaa daanidi daanaw koshshiyaba ubbaa Xoossay ba wolqan nuus immis. 
2Peter1:4 Hinte iita amo gaason medhetiya ha alamiyan de7iya dhayope kessi ekanaadanne Xoossaa xoossatethan shaaketanaada, ha imotata baggara daro al7onne gita ufaysaa nuus immis." 
2Peter1:5 Hessa gisho, minnidi, hinte ammanuwa bolla lo77otethi, lo77otetha bolla eratethi," 
2Peter1:6 eratetha bolla bana haaro, bana haaro bolla genca, genca bolla Xoossaa daano," 
2Peter1:7 Xoossaa daano bolla ishatetha keehatethi, ishatetha keehatetha bolla siiqo gujite." 
2Peter1:8 Haysati hintew daridi de7iyaba gidiko, Godaa Yesuus Kiristoosa eron maaddiya asinne ayfera de7iya asi oothana." 
2Peter1:9 Shin hessati bayna oonika matan de7iyaba xalaala be7iya qooqe. I ba kase nagaraape geeyidaysa dogis. 
2Peter1:10 Hessa gisho, ta ishato, hinte xeessanne hinte dooruwa minthanaw kaseysafe aathidi minnite. Hinte hessata oothiyaba gidiko, dhubeteketa." 
2Peter1:11 Hessan nu Godaanne nuna ashshiya Yesuus Kiristoosa merinaa kawotethaa geliya kumetha maatay hintew imetana. 
2Peter1:12 Hessa gisho, hinte haysata eriyabaanne he oykida tuman minnidi de7iyaba gidikoka, taani haysata ubba wode hintena hassayiso aggike." 
2Peter1:13 Taani shempora de7ida wode ubban hintena hassayisanaysi koshshiyaba gada qopayis. 
2Peter1:14 Nu Godaa Yesuus Kiristoosi taw qoncisadaysada taani ha hayqiya asatethaa gam7onna qaara yeggada baanaysa erayis. 
2Peter1:15 Taani hintefe shaaketikoka hinte haysata ubba wode akeekana mela taw danda7etiyaba ubbaa oothana. 
2Peter1:16 Nuuni Godaa Kiristoosa wolqaanne iya yuussaba hintew odey, iya gita bonchuwa be7idipe attishin, medhi kessida hayse gidenna." 
2Peter1:17 Daro wolqaama bonchuwafe, “Taani ufaytiya, ta dosiya na7ay haysa” giya qaalay yida wode, Xoossaa Aawape bonchonne galata ekis." 
2Peter1:18 Nuuni geeshsha zumaa bolla iyara de7iya wode he qaalay salope yishin si7ida. 
2Peter1:19 Nuus hessafe aadhiya ammanetida tinbite qaali de7ees. Sa7i wontana gakanawunne bakali hinte wozanan dolana gakanaw, dhuman poo7iya poo7o asi naageysada, hinte he qaala naagiko lo77o ootheeta." 
2Peter1:20 Ubbaafe kasetidi haysa erite. Geeshsha Maxaafan xaafetida tinbite qaala oonika ba dosidaada birshanaw danda7enna. 
2Peter1:21 Tinbite ubbaa, Xoossay kiitida asati Geeshsha Ayyaanay kaalethin, odidosonape attishin, asa shenen odibookona." 
2Peter2:1 Shin wordo nabeti kase asaa giddon de7eysa mela ha77ika wordo astamaareti hinte giddon dendana. Enti bantana wozida, Godaa kaddidi, dhaysiya wordo timirtiya ehana. Hessan enti banta bolla ellesidi dhayo ehoosona." 
2Peter2:2 Daro asay yeellayiya enta iita ogiya kaallana; enta gaason tuma ogey cayetana. 
2Peter2:3 Wordo astamaareti miishe yaaridi bantaw medhi kessida haysen hintena bonqana. Benipe doomidi enta pirday giigidi uttis; enta dhayoyka entana naagidi uttis. 
2Peter2:4 Nagara oothida kiitanchotas Xoossay qadhetonna, pirda gallas gakanaw gaanname dhuma ollan enta qachi yeggis." 
2Peter2:5 Hessadaka, Xoossay xillotethabaa odiya Nohenne hara laapun asata ashshidi, Xoossaa goyinnona asay de7iya beni alamiya qadhetonna dhayo haathan dhaysis." 
2Peter2:6 Geellatas leemiso gidana mela Xoossay Soodomenne Gamoora katamata bido oothidi xuuggidi dhaysis. 
2Peter2:7 Higges kiitetonna laymatiya asata giddon waayetishe de7ida xillo Looxe Xoossay ashshis. 
2Peter2:8 He xillo addey enta giddon de7ishe, enti oothiya iita oosuwa gallas gallas be7ida wodenne si7ida wode iya lo77o wozanay un7etees." 
2Peter2:9 Hessa gidiko, Goday, bana goyinniya asata paacepe waati ashshaneko, qassi nagaranchota pirda gallasaas gakanaw waatidi seerishe naagisaneeko erees." 
2Peter2:10 Ubbaafe aathidi tuna amon asho qofa kaalleysatanne maata aawata kadheyisata, pirda gallas gakanaw Goday naagisis. He asati ganje minonne otorancho gidiya gisho, salo medhetethata cayishe yayyokonna." 
2Peter2:11 Shin kiitanchoti wordo astamaaretape wolqaninne minotethan daro aadhosonashin Godaa sinthan salo medhetethata cayokona. 
2Peter2:12 Shin he asati banta eronnaban gelidi cayoosona. Enti oyketanawunne hayqanaw yeletida, wozani bayna do7a mela hanoosona; entika wora do7ada coo dhayana." 
2Peter2:13 Enti gathida metuwada zaari metootana. Seeta gallas yexishe gupeysa ufaysiyabaa gidi qopoosona. Enti kawushatanne tunata gidi de7ishe hintera shaaketiya siiqo imatuwan ufaytoosona. 
2Peter2:14 Laymatiya maccasi xeellidi aggonna ayfey entaw de7ees; qassi nagara ootheysa aggokona. Ammanon minniboonna asaa cimmoosona. Entaw ubba wode amotiya wozani de7ees; enti baadetidaysata. 
2Peter2:15 Enti suure oge aggidi, makalla miishe siiqidi balida, Bi7oora na7aa Balaama ogiya kaallidosona." 
2Peter2:16 I ba nagara gaason hanqetis; dooni bayna harey asada haasayidi nabiya gooshshatethaa teqis. 
2Peter2:17 He asati melida pultota melanne carkoy tookidi efiya shaara mela; enta naagey sakana dhumaa. 
2Peter2:18 Enti hadanne otoro oda odetishe balan de7iya asaa giddofe kessi ekidi buroo minniboonna asata laymatetha asho amon cimmidi balethoosona. 
2Peter2:19 Enti bantaw dhayo aylletethan de7ishe haratako, “Hinte aylletethafe keyana” yaagosona. Ayis giiko, asi ba xoonetidaba ubbaas aylle." 
2Peter2:20 Enti ashshiya nu Godaa Yesuus Kiristoosa eridi ha alamiya tunatethaafe kessi ekidaape guye, zaari qaxetidi xoonetiko kase de7iya de7uwape guyeysi entaw iita gidana." 
2Peter2:21 Enti xillotetha ogiya eri simmidi aggeysafe koyrottidi geeshsha kiitta eronnaako entaw lo77oshin. 
2Peter2:22 “Kani ba cooshshaako guye simmees” qassi, “Meecetida gudunthoy guye simmidi urqan gondoretees” giya leemisoy tuma gideysi enta bolla oothees." 
2Peter3:1 Ta siiqo ishato, haysi ta hintew xaafida dabdaabey nam7antho. Taani ha nam7u dabdaabetaka hintew xaafiday, hinte suure qofaa qopanaada hintena denthethanaasa." 
2Peter3:2 Qassi geeshsha nabeti beni odida qaalanne nuna ashshiya Goday, hawaareta baggara kiitida kiitta hinte hassayana mela koyayis." 
2Peter3:3 Ubbaafe kasetidi, wode wursethan banta amuwa kaallidi ase toocheysati, toochishe yaanaysa erite." 
2Peter3:4 Enti, “Ta yaana gidaysi awun de7ii? Nu aawati hayqidosona, shin ubbabay sa7i medhetoosape doomidi de7eysada de7ees” yaagosona." 
2Peter3:5 Daro wodepe kase saloy Xoossaa qaalan medhetidaysa; qassi sa7i haathafenne haathan medhetidaysa erishe kaddoosona. 
2Peter3:6 He wode de7iya sa7ay haathan mitetidi dhayis. 
2Peter3:7 Shin ha77i de7iya saloynne sa7i, geellati pirdetiya gallasaynne dhayiya gallasay gakanaw he qaalan tamas naagetidi de7oosona." 
2Peter3:8 Shin ta siiqo ishato, ha issiba dogopite. Godaa matan issi gallasi mukulu laytha mela gideysanne mukulu laythi issi gallasa mela gideysa dogopite." 
2Peter3:9 Issoti issoti gam7is gidi qopeysada, Goday ba ufaysa qaala gisho gam7enna. Shin oonika dhayonna mela koyidi, ubbay banta nagaraape simmana mela hinte gisho gidi gencees." 
2Peter3:10 Shin Godaa gallasay kaysoda yaana. He gallasan saloti wolqaama guunthan dhayana; salo medhetethati taman xuugetana; sa7inne iya bolla de7iya ubbay dhayana. 
2Peter3:11 Hiza, ubbabay hessada hanida dhayiyaba gidiko hinte ay mela asi gidanaw bessii? Hinte geeshshinne Xoossaa daaniya de7o daanaw bessees." 
2Peter3:12 Hinte sinthara yaa Xoossaa gallasaa naagishe hintew danda7etiyaba ubbaa oothidi he gallasaa eesoyite. He gallas salotinne iyan de7iyabay taman xuugetana; wolqaama suulan til7ana.
