Jude1:1 Taani Yihudi, Yesuus Kiristoosa aylley, Yayqooba ishay, Xoossay xeegidaysatas, Xoossa Aaway doseysatasinne Yesuus Kiristoosan naagetidaysatas ha dabdaabiya xaafayis." 
Jude1:2 Maarotethi, sarotethinne siiqoy hintew kumo." 
Jude1:3 Ta siiqo ishato, nuuni issife shaaketiya atotethaaba hintew xaafanaw taani daro amottas. Shin ammaniya asaas issitohonne wursethi gakanaw imetida ammanuwas oletana mela hintena zorashe xaafanaysi taw koshshiyaba gidis." 
Jude1:4 Enta pirday benipe xaafetidi uttida, issi issi asati oonika eronna hinte giddo gelidosona. Enti Xoossaa eronnayisata, nu Xoossaa aadho keehatetha laymatanaw go7etiya oge oothidi ekoosona. Ba xalaala kawo gidida, nu Godaa Yesuus Kiristoosa kaddoosona." 
Jude1:5 Shin hinte ha ubbaa eriyaba gidikoka, Goday Isra7eele asaa Gibxe biittafe waati kessidaako, qassi guyepe ammanonayisata dhaysidaysa ta hintena akeekisanaw koyayis." 
Jude1:6 Banta de7iyasuwa aggidi, bantaw imetida maata naagiboonna kiitanchota, gita pirda gallasay gakanaw Xoossay enta dhumape garsan merinaa santhalaatan qachi wothis." 
Jude1:7 Hessada, Soodomenne Gamoora asaynne enta matan de7iya katamatan de7iya asay laymatidosona; laymatethara gahetiya tunatethi oothidosona. Enti merinaa taman pirdetanaysatas leemiso gididosona." 
Jude1:8 Hessadaka, ha amuhanchoti banta asatethaa tunisoosona; maata aawata kadhoosona; salo medhetethata cayoosona." 
Jude1:9 Shin kiitanchota halaqay Mika7eeli Muse ahaas Xalahera palamida wode, “Goday nena seero” yaagisipe attishin, iya bolla cashsha qaala odidi mootanaw koybeenna." 
Jude1:10 Shin ha asati bantaw eronnabaa ubbaa cayoosona; qassi enti wozani bayna meheda medhon eriya eray, I entana dhaysana." 
Jude1:11 Entana ayye! Enti Qaayela ogiyan bidosona. Miishe koyidi Balaama balan kundidosona. Qore geetetiya addey Xoossaa bolla dendidaysada enti Xoossaa bolla dendidi dhayidosona. 
Jude1:12 Ha asati, hinte siiqo gibira miya bessan hintera uttiya wode yeelli bayna kawushata. Enti bantana xalaala heemmeyisata. Enti carkoy efiya iri bayna shaara mela. Qassi ayfe woden ayfe ayfonna, xaphora shodetidi, nam7u toho melida mitha mela." 
Jude1:13 Enti hanqetida abba zuliya mela banta pokuwa goponteyisata. Enti merinaw sakana dhumay naagiya toylatiya xoolintota. 
Jude1:14 Addaamepe doomidi, laapuntha yeleta gidida Heenokey, ha asataba tinbite odishe, “Heko, Goday, ba daro mukulu geeshshatara yaana." 
Jude1:15 Asa ubbaa pirdana; geellata ubbaa enti oothida iita ooso ubbaa gishonne makallatethan enti Xoossaa bolla odetida iita odaa ubbaa gisho pirdana” yaagis. 
Jude1:16 He asati ubba wode zuuzumeysatanne oda koyeyisata. Qassi banta iita amuwa kaalloosona; bantanan ceeqosonanne bantana go77iyabaa demmanaw harata sabboosona. 
Jude1:17 Shin ta ishato, nu Godaa Yesuus Kiristoosa hawaareti kase hintew odida qaala akeekite." 
Jude1:18 Enti, “Wursetha wodiyan, banta amuwa kaallidi toocheysati yaana” yaagidosona." 
Jude1:19 He asati asaa giddon shaahetethi medheyisata, banta asho amuwas haareteysatanne Geeshsha Ayyaanay baynayisata." 
Jude1:20 Shin ta ishato, geeshshi gidida hinte ammanuwan hintena dichanaw minnite; qassi Geeshsha Ayyaana wolqan woossite." 
Jude1:21 Hintena merinaa de7uwako gathiya nu Godaa Yesuus Kiristoosa maarotethaa naagishe hintena Xoossaa siiquwan naagite. 
Jude1:22 Sidhey de7iya asaas qadhetite. 
Jude1:23 Issi issi asata tamape kessi ekite. Qassi iita amon tunida enta ma7uwa ixishe haratas yashshan qadhetite. 
Jude1:24 Hinte kundonna mela naaganaw borey baynaysatanne gita ufaysan kumidaysata oothidi ba bonchuwa sinthan hintena shiishanaw danda7iya," 
Jude1:25 nuna ashshiya issi Xoossaas, nu Godaa Yesuus Kiristoosa baggara bonchoy, gitatethi, wolqinne maati, kaseka, ha77ika, merinawuka iyaw gido. Amin7i." 
Revelation1:1 Eeson hananaw de7iyaba ba aylleta bessaana mela Xoossay iyaw immida Yesuus Kiristoosa qoncethay haysa. Yesuusi ba kiitanchuwa kiittidi, ba aylliya Yohaanisas qoncisis." 
Revelation1:2 Yohaanisi Xoossaa kiitaa, Yesuus Kiristoosi oothidabaanne odidaba ubbaa markatis." 
Revelation1:3 Ha ubbay hananaw wodey matida gisho, ha tinbite qaala nabbabiya oonika anjetidaysa; qassi ha qaala si7eysatinne xaafetida kiitaa naagiya ubbay anjetidaysata." 
Revelation1:4 Ha dabdaabey, Yohaanisape, Iise biittan de7iya laapun woosa keethatas xaafetis. Kaseka, ha77ika de7iya, sinthafeka yaanaw de7iya Xoossaafe, qassi iya araata sinthan de7iya laapun ayyaanatape, hessadaka, hayqope dendon koyro gididaysafe, sa7aa kawota haariya ammanetiya marka gidida Yesuus Kiristoosape, aadho keehatethaynne sarotethay hintew gido. Yesuusi nuna siiqees, qassi ba suuthan nagara aylletethaafe nuna la77a kessis." 
Revelation1:5  
Revelation1:6 Nuuni Xoossaa iya Aawas oothana mela nuna kawotethaa kahine oothis. Iyaw merinaape merinaa gakanaw bonchoynne wolqay gido. Amin7i. 
Revelation1:7 Heko, Yesuusi shaarara yees. Asa ubbay hari attoshin, iya caddida asayka iya be7ana. Sa7an de7iya asa ubbay iya gisho yeekana. Hessi tuma hanana! Amin7i." 
Revelation1:8 “Kaseka, ha77ika de7eysi, sinthafeka yaana Goday, Ubbaafe Wolqaama Xoossay, Alfanne Omegi tana” yaagees Godaa Xoossay." 
Revelation1:9 Taani, Yohaanisi, hinte ishay, hintera issife Yesuusan waayiya, iya kawotethaanne iya danda7aa be7as. Taani Xoossaa qaala gishonne Yesuusaba markatida gisho, yuushoy abban teqetida biittan, Paximon de7ayis." 
Revelation1:10 Godaa gallasan ta Geeshsha Ayyaanan haaretada de7ayis; taape guyera moyze puno mela gita girsi si7as. 
Revelation1:11 He girsay tana, “Ne be7eysa maxaafan xaafada, Iisen de7iya laapun woosa keethatas, Efesoona, Samirneesa, Phargamoona, Tiyatiroona, Sardeesa, Filadelfiyanne Loodoqe yedda” yaagis." 
Revelation1:12 Taani taw odiya girsaa be7anaw guye simmada xompe wothiya laapun worqa kocata be7as. 
Revelation1:13 He kocata giddon asa na7a daaneysa be7as. I adussa afila ba tohuwa gathi ma7is, worqa dancon ba tiraa dancis." 
Revelation1:14 Iya huupheynne iya binaanay bootha dorsa ikise mela woyko shacha mela boothi; iya ayfey tama laco daanees. 
Revelation1:15 Iya tohoy taman seeridi zo77ida naase birata daanees; iya girsayka gita shaafa kooshincha mela. 
Revelation1:16 I ba ushacha kushen laapun xoolintota oykis. Iya doonape nam7u baggara qaratida mashshay keyees. Iya som7oy seeta gallasa awa ayfe daanees. 
Revelation1:17 Taani iya be7ida wode hayqida asada hanada iya tohuwa matan kundas. I ba ushacha kushiya ta bolla wothidi, “Yayyofa; Koyroynne Wursethay tana." 
Revelation1:18 Taani de7on de7ayis; taani hayqas, shin Heko meri merinawuka de7on de7ayis. Hayqonne Si7oole qulpey ta kushena." 
Revelation1:19 Hiza, ha77i haniyabanne sinthafe hananaba ne be7idaba xaafa." 
Revelation1:20 Neeni ta ushacha kushen be7ida laapun xoolintotanne laapun worqa kocata birshethay haysa: Laapun xoolintoti laapun woosa keethata kiitanchota; laapun worqa kocati laapun woosa keethata.” 
Revelation2:1 “Efesoona woosa keetha kiitanchuwas haysada yaagada xaafa. Ba ushacha kushen laapun xoolintota oykidaysinne laapun worqa kocata giddora hemeteysi haysada yaagees: 
Revelation2:2 Taani ne oosuwa, ne daaburanne ne gencaa erayis. Neeni iita asataba gencanaw danda7aboonaysa erayis. Qassi hawaare gidonashin bantana, hawaare geyisata pilga erada enti wordancho gideysa demmidaysa ta erayis." 
Revelation2:3 Neeni gencadasa; ta sunthaa gisho meto danda7adasa; xoonetabaaka. 
Revelation2:4 Gidoshin, ha77i ta nena boriyabay de7ees; hessika neeni, ne koyro siiquwa aggadasa." 
Revelation2:5 Hiza, ne ay mela dhoqa bessaafe kundidaako akeeka! Ne nagaraape simma; neeni kase oothiya oosuwa ootha. Neeni ne nagaraape simmonna ixiko, ne xompe wothiya kocaa iya bessaafe ekana." 
Revelation2:6 Ha77i ta nena nashshiya issibay de7ees; ta ixiya Niqolaweeta oosuwa neka ixadasa. 
Revelation2:7 Geeshsha Ayyaanay woosa keethatas giyaba si7anaw haythi de7iya oonika si7o. Xooniya oonika Xoossaa gannatiyan de7iya de7o mithee ayfepe maana mela maata immana.” 
Revelation2:8 Samirneesa woosa keethaa kiitanchuwas haysada yaagada xaafa. “Koyroynne wursethay, hayqidaysinne hayqope dendidaysi haysada yaagees:" 
Revelation2:9 Taani ne waayanne ne manqotetha erayis; gidoshin neeni dure. Ayhude gidonashin bantana Ayhude geysati cayiya cashshaa ta erayis, shin enti Xalahe maabaran de7oosona." 
Revelation2:10 Neeni ekanaw de7iya waayiya babofa. Xalahey hintefe issota issota paacanaw qasho keethan yeggana; tammu gallas gakanaw hinte waayetana. Hayqana gakanaw ammanetidaysa gida; ta new de7o kallacha immana.” 
Revelation2:11 “Geeshsha Ayyaanay woosa keethatas giyaba si7anaw haythi de7iya oonika si7o. Xooniya oonika nam7antho hayquwan qohetenna.” 
Revelation2:12 “Phargamoona woosa keethaa kiitanchuwas haysada yaagada xaafa. Nam7u baggara qaratida mashshay de7eysi haysada yaagees: 
Revelation2:13 Taani ne de7iya bessaa erayis; neeni Xalahe araatay de7iya bessan de7aasa; ta sunthaa mintha naagadasa. Hari attoshin, Xalahey de7iya hinte kataman hayqida ta ammanetida markay, Antiphaasi, de7iya wodeka ammanuwa aggabaaka." 
Revelation2:14 Gidoshin, ta nena boriya guuthabati de7oosona. Hessika Isra7eele asay eeqas yarshetida kathaa midi tunana melanne laymatetha nagara oothana mela Balaaqa tamaarsida Balaama timirtiya ekida issi issi asati neera de7oosona." 
Revelation2:15 Hessadaka, Niqolaweeta timirtiya tamaariya asati neera de7oosona." 
Revelation2:16 Hessa gisho, neeni ne nagaraape simma. Hessi hanonna ixiko, ta neeko ellesa yada he asata ta doonape keyiya mashshan olana.”" 
Revelation2:17 Geeshsha Ayyaanay woosa keethatas giyaba si7anaw haythi de7iya oonika si7o. Xooniya oodeska qosetidi de7iya mannafe immana. Qassi ekiya uraape attishin, hara asi eronna ooratha sunthay xaafetida bootha shuchu taani iyaw immana." 
Revelation2:18 “Tiyatiroona woosa keethaa kiitanchuwas haysada yaagada xaafa. Tama laco daaniya ayfey de7eysi, qassi taman seerida naase birata daaniya tohoy de7eysi, Xoossaa na7ay, haysada yaagees:" 
Revelation2:19 Taani ne oosuwa, ne siiquwa, ne ammanuwa, ne oosuwanne ne gencaa erayis. Neeni koyro ootheysafe ha77i aathada ootheysaka erayis." 
Revelation2:20 Gidoshin, ta nena boriya issibay de7ees; bana nabe giya maccasiw, Elzabeelo, aykoka gabaaka. He maccasiya eeqas yarshetida kathaa midi tunanaadanne laymatanaada oothada ta aylleta balethasu." 
Revelation2:21 Iya ba nagaraape simmana mela ta iw wode immas, shin iya simmanaw koyabuku." 
Revelation2:22 Enti I bala ogiyape simmonna ixiko, ta iyo iita hargen yeggana; iira laymateysatika iita waaye waayetana." 
Revelation2:23 Taani I nayta wodhana; qassi woosa keetha ubbay ta asa qofanne asa wozana ereysa gideysa erana. Ta issuwas issuwas hinte oosuwada oosuwada immana.” 
Revelation2:24 Shin Tiyatiroonan de7iya harata, he iita timirtiya ekiboonaysatanne, “Xalahe gita xuura” geetetiya ha timirtiya tamaariboonna hintena hara deexo tooho toossike." 
Revelation2:25 Gidoshin, ta yaana gakanaw hintew de7iyaba minthi naagite." 
Revelation2:26 Xooneysasinne wursethi gakanaw taw kiitetiya oodeska kawotethata haarana mela maata immana. 
Revelation2:27 “I enta birata xam7an haarana; meqa miishedaka mentherethana.” He maatay taani ta aawape ekida maata mela. 
Revelation2:28 Qassi ta iyaw bakala xoolinto immana. 
Revelation2:29 Geeshsha Ayyaanay woosa keethatas giyaba si7iya haythi de7iya oonika si7o. 
Revelation3:1 “Sardeesa woosa keetha kiitanchuwas haysada yaagada xaafa. Laapun Xoossaa ayyaanatanne laapun xoolintota oykidaysi haysada yaagees: Taani ne oosuwa erayis; asi nena paxa de7ees giikoka, ne hayqadasa." 
Revelation3:2 Barka; attida guuthabanne hayqanaw matidaba mintha. Ne oosoy Xoossaa sinthan polo gidonnaysa demmas. 
Revelation3:3 Hiza, ne ekidabaanne si7idaba akeeka; naaga; ne nagaraape simma. Neeni barkonna ixiko ta kaysoda yaana; ta ay wode yaaneko ne eraka." 
Revelation3:4 Shin banta ma7uwa qitayonna guutha asati Sardeesan de7oosona. Entaw bessiyaba gidiya gisho bootha ma7o ma7idi enti taara hemetana. 
Revelation3:5 Xooniya oonika entaysada bootha ma7o ma7ana. Taani iya sunthaa de7o maxaafape quchike. Taani ta Aawa sinthaninne iya kiitanchota sinthan I tabaa gideysa markatana. 
Revelation3:6 Geeshsha Ayyaanay woosa keethatas giyaba si7iya haythi de7iya oonika si7o. 
Revelation3:7 “Filaadelfiya woosa keetha kiitanchuwas haysada yaagada xaafa. Geeshshaynne tumanchoy, Dawita qulpiya ba kushen oykidaysi, haysada yaagees: I gordin oonika dooyanaw danda7enna; qassi I dooyin oonika gordanaw danda7enna." 
Revelation3:8 Taani ne oosuwa eras; Heko ta ne sinthan oonika gordanaw danda7onna dooya penge wothas. Ne wolqay guutha gidikoka, ta qaala naagadasa; tana kaddabaaka." 
Revelation3:9 Ayhude gidonashin, bantana Ayhude giya wordotanne Xalahe baggata neeko ehananne ne sinthan gulbatisana. Ta nena doseysa entana erisana." 
Revelation3:10 Neeni, ‘Genca’ gada ta kiitida kiitaa naagida gisho, kumetha alamiya paacanaw yaa waaye wodiyape taani nena naagana." 
Revelation3:11 Taani ellesada yaana; oonika ne kallachaa ekonna mela new de7iyaba minthada oyka. 
Revelation3:12 Xoonidaysa ta xoossa keethan tuussu oothana; I yan merinaw daana. Taani ta Xoossaa sunthaanne ta Xoossaa katamaa sunthaa iya bolla xaafana; iyaka ta Xoossaa matape wodhiya ooratha Yerusalaame. Qassi taani ta ooratha sunthaaka I bolla xaafana. 
Revelation3:13 Geeshsha Ayyaanay woosa keethatas giyaba si7iya haythi de7iya oonika si7o. 
Revelation3:14 “Loodoqe woosa keetha kiitanchuwas haysada yaagada xaafa. Amin7i gidida ammanetida tuma markay, Xoossaa medhetetha haareysi haysada yaagees:" 
Revelation3:15 Taani ne oosuwa ubba erayis; neeni irxa woyko misha gidaka; neeni nam7aafe issuwa gidiko lo77o! 
Revelation3:16 Neeni irxa woyko misha gidonashin, bol7o gidiya gisho ta nena ta doonape cuttana hanayis." 
Revelation3:17 Hiza, neeni, ‘Taani dure, shallora de7ayis, taw aybibayka pacibeenna’ yaagasa. Shin neeni metootancho, manqo, qooqenne kallotida asi gideysa eraka." 
Revelation3:18 Hessa gisho, ne duretanaw taman geeyida worqaa, ne yeella kalluwa kammanaw bootha ma7onne loytha xeellanaw danda7isiya ayfe dhale taape shammana mela nena ta zorayis." 
Revelation3:19 Ta doseysa seeraysinne hanqayis; hiza minna; ne nagaraape simma. 
Revelation3:20 Heko, ta karen eqada xeegayis. Oonika ta xeessaa si7idi, wulaa dooyiko, iyako gelana; iyara issife kathi maana; ika taara issife maana." 
Revelation3:21 Ta xoonada ta Aawara iya araatan uttidaysada xooniday taara ta araatan uttana mela maata immana. 
Revelation3:22 Geeshsha Ayyaanay woosa keethatas giyaba si7iya haythi de7ey oonika si7o” yaagis. 
Revelation4:1 Hessafe guye, taani salo xeelliya wode dooyetida penge be7as. Qassi ta kase si7ida moyze girsaa melay taako, “Ha keya; haysafe guye, hananaw de7iyaba ta nena bessaana” yaagis." 
Revelation4:2 He wode ta Ayyaanan haaretada de7ayis. Heko, saluwan araata bolla issoy uttidaysa be7as." 
Revelation4:3 He uttidaysa malay yasphedenne sardiyoone al7o shucha mela. Iya araata yuushuwan al7o margide shuchi daaniya zuulli de7ees. 
Revelation4:4 He araata yuushuwan laatamanne oyddu araatati de7oosona; enta bolla bootha ma7o ma7idi, huuphen worqa kallachaa wothida laatamanne oyddu cimati uttidosona." 
Revelation4:5 Araatape wol7anthi, guunthinne deshoy keyees. Araata sinthan laapun poo7iya xompeti de7oosona; enti laapun Xoossaa ayyaanata." 
Revelation4:6 Araata sinthan birille daaniya phooliya burcuko abbay de7ees. Sintharanne guyera ayfey de7iya oyddu de7ora de7iya medhetethati araata yuushuwaninne araata giddon de7oosona. 
Revelation4:7 Koyro medhetetha medhoy gaammo daanees; nam7anthoy boori daanees; heedzanthoy ase daanees; qassi oyddanthoy piradhiya arganthi daanees. 
Revelation4:8 Oyddu medhetethata ubbaas usupun qefey de7ees; enta asatethaa ubbay ayfen kumis. Enti qammanne gallas qanxonna, “Geeshshaw, geeshshaw, geeshshaw, Godaw, Ubbaafe Wolqaama Xoossaw, Kaseka, ha77ika de7eyso, sinthafe yaanayso” yaagosona." 
Revelation4:9 He medhetethati araatan uttidaysasinne merinaw de7eysas saba, bonchonne galata immida wode," 
Revelation4:10 laatamanne oyddu cimati araatan uttidaysanne merinaw de7eysa sinthan gufannidi goyinnidosona; banta kallachaa araata sinthan wothidi," 
Revelation4:11 “Nu Godaw, nu Xoossaw, neeni boncho, sabanne wolqaa ekanaw bessaasa. Neeni ubbaa medhadasa; ubbabay ne sheniyada hanis, medhetis” yaagidosona." 
Revelation5:1 Hessafe guye, araata bolla uttidaysa ushacha kushen giddoranne karera xaafetida laapun maatamen gordetida xaatha maxaafaa be7as." 
Revelation5:2 Issi mino kiitanchoy ba qaala dhoqu oothidi, “Maatamiya billanawunne maxaafaa dooyanaw bessey oonee?” yaagidi awaajishin be7as." 
Revelation5:3 Shin salon gidin sa7an woyko sa7ape garsan gidin he xaatha maxaafaa billanawunne gidduwa be7anaw danda7ey oonika bentibeenna. 
Revelation5:4 Xaatha maxaafaa billanawunne iya gidduwa be7anaw bessiya asi dhayida gisho ta daro yeekas. 
Revelation5:5 Yaatin, cimatape issoy taako, “Yeekofa! Heko, Yihuda koche gidiya gaammoy, Dawita sheeshay, laapun maatameta billanawunne maxaafaa dooyanaw danda7is” yaagis." 
Revelation5:6 Hessafe guye, shuketida Dorsay araatas, oyddu de7on de7iya medhetethatasinne cimatas giddon, eqidaysa be7as. Iyaw laapun kacetinne laapun ayfeti de7oosona. Hessati sa7a ubbaa kiitetida Xoossaa laapun ayyaanata." 
Revelation5:7 He Dorsay bidi, araata bolla uttidaysa ushacha kushepe xaatha maxaafaa ekis." 
Revelation5:8 I he xaatha maxaafaa ekida wode, de7on de7iya oyddu medhetethatinne laatamanne oyddu cimati Dorsa sinthan kundidosona. Enti issoy issoy diithinne geeshshata woosa gidida ixaaney kumida worqa shaate oykidosona." 
Revelation5:9 Enti, “Xaatha maxaafaa ekanaw, maatameta billanaw new bessees. Ayis giiko, neeni shuketadasa; koche ubbaafe, dumma dumma doonape, yaratapenne kawotethata ubbaafe ne suuthan Xoossaas wozadasa." 
Revelation5:10 Enti iya Xoossaa Aawas oothana mela entana kahine kawotethi oothadasa. Entika biitta ubbaa haarana” yaagidi ooratha mazmure yexidosona. 
Revelation5:11 Ta be7iya wode mukulu toho mukulunne tammu mukulu toho tammu mukulu gidiya kiitanchota girsaa si7as. Entika araata, oyddu de7on de7iya medhetethatanne, cimata yuushuwan eqidosona." 
Revelation5:12 He kiitanchoti dhoqu gida qaalan, “Shuketida Dorsay wolqaa, duretethi, cincatethinne minotethi, boncho, sabanne galataa ekanaw bessees” yaagidosona." 
Revelation5:13 Hessafe guye, sa7an, salon, sa7ape garsaninne abba giddon de7iya medhetethi ubbay, “Araata bolla uttidaysasinne Dorsaas, galatay, bonchoy, sabinne wolqi, meri merinaw gido” yaagidi yexishin si7as." 
Revelation5:14 Oyddu de7on de7iya medhetethati, “Amin7i” yaagidosona; qassi cimati gufannidi goyinnidosona." 
Revelation6:1 Dorsay laapun maatametape issuwa dooyishin be7as. Qassi oyddu de7on de7iya medhetethatape issoy, dada desho daaniya girsan, “Haaya!” yaagishin si7as." 
Revelation6:2 Heko bootha para be7as. He para toggidaysi donge oykis; iya huuphen kallachi de7ees. Ika xoonishe xoonanaw keyis. 
Revelation6:3 Qassi dorsay nam7antho maatamiya dooyida wode de7on de7iya nam7antho medhetethay, “Haaya!” yaagishin si7as." 
Revelation6:4 Qassi hara siha zo7o pari keyis. He para toggidaysas sa7ape saro dhaysana melanne asay woli wursana mela maatinne gita mashshay imetis. 
Revelation6:5 Dorsay heedzantho maatamiya dooyida wode de7on de7iya heedzantho medhetethay, “Haaya!” yaagishin si7as. Heko kareetha para be7as; ika ba kushen mizaane oykis." 
Revelation6:6 Oyddu de7on de7iya medhetethata giddofe, “Issi gallasa oosos damooze, bagga kilo giste; qassi issi gallasa oosos damooze, issi kilonne bagga banga gido. Shin zaytiyanne woyniya qohopa” yaagishin si7as." 
Revelation6:7 Dorsay oyddantho maatamiya dooyida wode oyddantho de7on de7iya medhetethay, “Haaya!” yaagishin si7as." 
Revelation6:8 Heko wanco para be7as. He para toggidaysa sunthay hayqo; iya geedo Si7ooley kaallees. Entaw alamepe oyddantho kushiya olan, koshan, gadoninne do7an wodhisana mela maati imetis." 
Revelation6:9 Dorsay ichashantho maatamiya dooyida wode enti Xoossaa qaala odida gishonne banta markatethan ammanetida gisho shuketida asaa shempota yarsho bessaafe garsan be7as. 
Revelation6:10 Enti banta qaala dhoqu oothidi, “Ubbaa haariya Godaw, geeshshaw, tumanchuwaw, sa7an de7iya asaa bolla ne pirdanaynne nu suuthaa gisho halo keyanay awudee?” yaagidosona." 
Revelation6:11 Enta issuwas issuwas bootha ma7oy imetis. Entaysada hanidi hayqanaw bessiya enta laggeta tayboy kumana gakanaw guutha wode shempana mela entaw odetis. 
Revelation6:12 Dorsay usupuntho maatamiya dooyida wode ta be7as; wolqaama biitta qaaxoy hanis. Awa ayfey kareexidi kayo ma7o mela gidis. Ageenayka zo77idi suuthu daanis. 
Revelation6:13 Wolqaama carkoy carkidi balase mitha qawu7e ayfiya qoqofeysada saluwa xoolintoti sa7an qoqofetidosona. 
Revelation6:14 Saloy xaatha maxaafada xaaxetidi aadhis; zumaynne yuushoy abban teqetida biittati banta bessaafe dhaydosona. 
Revelation6:15 Biitta kawoti, deriya haareysati, olla kaaletheysati, dureti, wolqaamati, aylletinne, womaannoti gongoloninne dere bolla de7iya zaalla hom7on qosetidosona." 
Revelation6:16 Entika zumakonne zaallako, “Nu bolla wodhite; nuna qosite; araatan uttidaysa ayfiyapenne Dorsa hanquwafe nuna genthite." 
Revelation6:17 Hiza, gita hanqo gallasay gakis; danda7idi eqanay oonee?” yaagidosona." 
Revelation7:1 Hessafe guye, oyddu kiitanchoti oyddu sa7aa gaxan eqidaysata be7as. He kiitanchoti sa7a bolla woyko abba bolla woyko ay mitha bolla carkoy oyddu sa7aa gaxape carkonna mela teqidosona." 
Revelation7:2 Qassi de7o Xoossaa maatamiya oykida hara kiitanchoy doloha baggafe keyeysa be7as. He kiitanchoy ba qaala dhoqu oothidi, sa7aanne abba qohanaw wolqi imetida oyddu kiitanchota," 
Revelation7:3 xeegidi, “Nuuni Xoossaa aylleta som7on maatamiya wothana gakanaw biitta woyko abba woyko mithaa qohopite” yaagis." 
Revelation7:4 Yaatin, taani Xoossaa maatamey som7on wosetidaysata payduwa si7as. Isra7eele mayzata ubbaafe 144000 asaas som7on maatame wothis." 
Revelation7:5 Yihuda kochaafe tammanne nam7u mukulu, Robeela kochaafe tammanne nam7u mukulu, Gaade kochaafe tammanne nam7u mukulu," 
Revelation7:6 Aseera kochaafe tammanne nam7u mukulu, Niftaaleme kochaafe tammanne nam7u mukulu, Minaase kochaafe tammanne nam7u mukulu," 
Revelation7:7 Simoona kochaafe tammanne nam7u mukulu; Leewe kochaafe tammanne nam7u mukulu, Yisakoora kochaafe tammanne nam7u mukulu," 
Revelation7:8 Zabloona kochaafe tammanne nam7u mukulu, Yoosefa kochaafe tammanne nam7u mukulu, Biniyaame kochaafe tammanne nam7u mukulu, asaa som7on maatame wothis." 
Revelation7:9 Hessafe guye, koche ubbaafe, kawotetha ubbaafe, yara ubbaafenne dumma dumma doonape zawi bayna daro asaa be7as. He asay bootha ma7o ma7idi, zamba haythi banta kushen oykidi, araata sinthaninne Dorsa sinthan eqidosona." 
Revelation7:10 Enti banta qaala dhoqu oothidi, “Atotethay araatan uttida nu Xoossaafenne Dorsaafe yees” yaagidosona." 
Revelation7:11 Kiitanchoti ubbay araata, cimatanne oyddu medhetethata yuushuwan eqidosona. Enti araata sinthan gufannidi Xoossaa goyinnidosona." 
Revelation7:12 “Amin7i! Anjoy, bonchoy, cincatethi, galati, sabi wolqi, minotethi meri merinaw nu Xoossaas gido. Amin7i!” yaagidosona." 
Revelation7:13 Cimatape issoy taako, “Ha bootha ma7uwa ma7ida asati oonantee? Enti awupe yidona?” yaagidi oychis." 
Revelation7:14 Taani zaarada, “Godaw, ne eraasa” yaagas. Ika taako, “Haysati daro waaye waaydi aadhidaysata. Enti banta ma7uwa Dorsa suuthan meeccidi geeshshidosona." 
Revelation7:15 Hessa gisho, enti Xoossaa araata sinthan gididi qammanne gallas iya keethan oothosona; araata bolla uttidaysi entaw kuya gidana." 
Revelation7:16 Hizape guye, enti koshatokona, saamotokona. Awi woyko mishi enta meenna." 
Revelation7:17 Araata giddon uttida Dorsay enta heemmana. De7o pulto haathaako enta kaalethana. Xoossay enta ayfepe afutha ubbaa quchana” yaagis. 
Revelation8:1 Dorsay laapuntha maatamiya dooyida wode bagga saate gideysa mela saloy si77i gis. 
Revelation8:2 Hessafe guye, taani laapun moyzeti imetida laapun kiitanchota Xoossaa sinthan eqidaysata be7as." 
Revelation8:3 Ixaane cuyisiya worqa shaate oykida hara kiitanchoy yidi, yarsho bessa matan eqis. I araata sinthan de7iya worqa yarsho bessa bolla geeshshata ubbaa woosaara gujidi yarshana mela iyaw daro ixaaney imetis." 
Revelation8:4 Ixaaniya cuyay geeshshata woosaara issife kiitanchuwa kushepe pude Xoossaako keyis. 
Revelation8:5 Hessafe guye, kiitanchoy ixaane cuyisiya shaatiya ekidi, iyan yarsho bessaafe bonqo tama kunthidi sa7a duge holis. Yaatin deshoy, wol7anthi, girsinne biitta qaaxoy hanis." 
Revelation8:6 Hessafe guye, laapun kiitanchoti banta moyziya punnanaw giigetidosona." 
Revelation8:7 Koyro kiitanchoy ba moyziya punniya wode shachinne suuthara walaketida tami salope bukis. Sa7aape sikoy xuugetis; mithafe sikoy xuugetis; cil7o maata ubbay xuugetis. 
Revelation8:8 Nam7antho kiitanchoy ba moyziya punnida wode wolqaama zuma daaniyabay taman eexishe abban yegetis. Yaatin, abbaafe sikoy suuthu gidis." 
Revelation8:9 Abban de7on de7iya medhetethaafe sikoy hayqis; markabetape sikoy dhayis. 
Revelation8:10 Heedzantho kiitanchoy ba moyziya punnida wode xompeda eexiya wolqaama xoolintoy shaafape sikuwa bollanne pultota bolla salope wodhis. 
Revelation8:11 He xoolintuwa sunthay Camo geetetees. Haathaafe sikuwa camisis; haathay cammida gisho, daro asay he haatha uyidi hayqidosona." 
Revelation8:12 Oyddantho kiitanchoy ba moyziya punnis. Awape, ageenapenne xoolintotape sikuwa dechis; enta poo7uwape sikoy dhumis. Gallasaape sikoy, qammaafeka sikoy dhumis." 
Revelation8:13 Issi arganthi salo dhoqu gidi, piradhishin be7as. He arganthay ba qaala dhoqu oothidi, “Attida heedzu kiitanchoti banta moyziya punnanaw de7iya gisho, sa7an de7iya asaa ayye! Ayye! Ayye!” yaagishin si7as." 
Revelation9:1 Hessafe guye, ichashantho kiitanchoy ba moyziya punnin salope duge sa7a kundida xoolinto be7as. He xoolintuwas wolqaama ollaa qulpey imetis." 
Revelation9:2 Xoolintoy ollaa dooyida wode dalga coocepe keyiya cuyaa mela cuyay he ollaafe keyis. He ollaafe keyida cuyan awinne saloy dhumidosona. 
Revelation9:3 He cuyape booley keyidi sa7an wodhis. Sa7an de7iya kornetas de7iya wolqaa mela wolqay booletas imetis. 
Revelation9:4 Xoossaa maatamey som7on bayna asaa xalaalape attishin, sa7an de7iya maata woyko mithi woyko ay cil7oba gidin qohonna mela booletas odetis." 
Revelation9:5 Booleti asaa ichashu ageena gakanaw paxa kaa7ana mela maati imetisipe attishin, asaa wodhana mela gidenna. Korney ase dukin zaameysa mela booley dukidi zaamisees." 
Revelation9:6 He gallasatan asay hayqo koyana, shin demmenna. Enti hayqanaw amottana, shin hayqoy entafe haakana." 
Revelation9:7 Booley olas giigidi uttida para daanees. Booliya huuphen worqa kallachi de7ees; enta som7oyka asa som7o daanees. 
Revelation9:8 Iya binaanay maccasa binaana mela adusse. Enta achayka gaammo achi daanees. 
Revelation9:9 Entaw tira bolla wothiya birata xururey de7ees; enta qefiya girsay oletanaw gaallabiya paranne para gaariya girsaa mela. 
Revelation9:10 Entaw korne goyna daaniya goyninne dukiya yiishshi de7ees. He goynan ichashu ageena asaa qohana mela maati imetis. 
Revelation9:11 Entana haariya kawoy de7ees; he kawoy olla kiitanchuwa. Iya sunthay Ibraawetho doonan Abdoona; qassi Girike doonan Apholiyoona geetetees. Iya sunthaa birshethay “Dhayseysa” guussu. 
Revelation9:12 Koyro ayyey aadhis; Heko, buroo hara nam7u ayyeti eeson hanana." 
Revelation9:13 Usupuntho kiitanchoy ba moyziya punnis. Xoossaa sinthan eqida, worqa yarsho bessan de7iya oyddu kacetape issi girsi si7as." 
Revelation9:14 He girsay moyze oykida usupuntho kiitanchuwako, “Efraxiisa geetetiya gita shaafan qashetida oyddu kiitanchota birsha” yaagis." 
Revelation9:15 Biitta bolla de7iya asaape sikuwa wodhana mela he saatiyas, he gallasaas, he ageenasinne he laythas giigidi uttida oyddu kiitanchoti birshetidosona." 
Revelation9:16 Ola para toggiya olanchota paydoy daro xeetu miloone gideysa si7as. 
Revelation9:17 Qassi ta qoncethan paratanne he parata toggida asaa be7as. He asay tiran wothiya birata xururey tama bonqo mela zo7o, yaakinte mela, kareetha kaalose melanne diinne mela ciliilo. Parata huuphey gaammo huuphe mela; enta doonape tami, cuyinne diinney keyis." 
Revelation9:18 Parata doonape keyida taman, cuyaninne diinniyan he heedzu gadotan sa7an de7iya asaape sikoy hayqis." 
Revelation9:19 He parata wolqay enta doona giddoninne goynan de7ees. Enta goynayka shoosha huuphe mela; enti iyara asaa qohoosona. 
Revelation9:20 Ha gadotape attidaysati banta kushe oosuwape simmibokona. Enti tuna ayyaanan worqafe, birape, naase biratapenne shuchafe oosetida eeqas goyinnoosona. Xeellanaw, si7anaw, hemetanaw danda7onna eeqatas goyinneysa aggibokona." 
Revelation9:21 Asay wodheysa, biteysa, laymateysanne kayseysa aggidi maarota oychibookona." 
Revelation10:1 Hessafe guye, ta hara wolqaama kiitanchoy salope sa7a wodhishin be7as. I shaara ma7is; iya huuphiya bolla zuulli de7ees. Iya som7oy awa mela; iya tohoy tama tuussa mela." 
Revelation10:2 He kiitanchoy dooya de7iya issi guutha xaatha maxaafaa ba kushen oykidi, ba ushacha tohuwa abba bolla, ba haddirsa tohuwa biitta bolla essis." 
Revelation10:3 Gudiya gaammoda ba qaala dhoqu oothidi waassis. I waassida wode laapun dadati banta guuntha sissidosona. 
Revelation10:4 Laapun dadati odetida wode ta xaafanaw giigetas. Shin salope, “Laapun dadati odidaysa maatamen gordafe attishin, xaafopa” giya girsaa si7as." 
Revelation10:5 Yaatidi, abba bollanne biitta bolla eqida, ta be7ida kiitanchoy, ba ushacha kushiya salo pude miccis." 
Revelation10:6 I miccidi saloninne iya giddon de7iya ubbaa, sa7aninne iya giddon de7iya ubbaa, abbanne iya giddon de7iya ubbaa medhida, merinaw de7iya Xoossaa sunthan caaqidi, “Hizape guye, Xoossay gam7enna." 
Revelation10:7 Shin laapuntha kiitanchoy ba moyziya punniya wode Xoossay ba aylle gidida nabeta baggara qoncisida xuura qofay poletana” yaagis. 
Revelation10:8 Hessafe guye, abba bollanne biitta bolla eqidi, “Iya kushen dooyetidi de7iya xaatha maxaafaa kiitanchuwa kushepe eka” yaagidi nam7antho taw odishin si7as." 
Revelation10:9 Taani he kiitanchuwako bada, guutha xaatha maxaafaa imma gada oychas. I taako, “Ekada ma; I ne ulon cammana, shin ne doonan eessada mal7ana” yaagis." 
Revelation10:10 Taani kiitanchuwa kushepe he guutha xaatha maxaafaa ekada mas; ta doonan eessada mal7is, shin ta ulon cammis." 
Revelation10:11 Hessafe guye, taako, “Neeni yara ubbaas, dere ubbaas, dumma dumma doonan odeteysatasinne kawotas tinbite zaara odanaw bessees” yaagis." 
Revelation11:1 Hessafe guye, taw wadha xam7a immidi, “Bada xoossa keethaanne yarsho bessa wadha; yan goyinniya asataka payda." 
Revelation11:2 Shin Xoossa Keetha kare dabaabay Ayhude gidonna asaas imetida gisho wadhonna aggaaga. Ayhude gidonna asay geeshsha katamaa oytamanne nam7u ageena haarana. 
Revelation11:3 Taani kayo ma7o ma7ida ta nam7u markata kiittana; enti 1,260 gallas tinbite odana” yaagis." 
Revelation11:4 He nam7u markati alamiya Godaa sinthan eqiya nam7u shamaho mithatanne nam7u xompe wothiya kocata. 
Revelation11:5 Oonika enta qohanaw koyko enta doonape tami keyidi, enta morketa dhaysees. Enta qohanaw koyiya oonika hessada hayqana." 
Revelation11:6 Enti tinbite odiya wode iri bukonna mela saluwa gordanaw entaw maati de7ees. Entaw haathe suuthi kessanaw, qassi enti koyida mela biitta dumma dumma gadon dhaysanaw entaw maati de7ees." 
Revelation11:7 Enti banta markatethaa ongidaape guye, ollaafe keyiya do7ay entana olana. He do7ay enta xoonana; wodhana." 
Revelation11:8 Enta Goday masqaliya bolla kaqetida gita katamaa ogiya bolla enta ahay yegetana. He katamay leemison Soodome woyko Gibxe geetetidi xeegetees. 
Revelation11:9 Qassi koche ubbaafe, yara ubbaafe, dumma dumma doonapenne kawotethi ubbaafe yida asay enta aha heedzu gallasinne bagga gakanaw be7ana. Enta ahay moogetonna mela asay diggana." 
Revelation11:10 Ha nam7u nabeti sa7an de7iya asaa waaysida gisho asay enta hayquwan ufaytana. Banta ufaysaa bessanaw issoy issuwas imota immana. 
Revelation11:11 Heedzu gallasinne baggafe guye, de7o ayyaanay Xoossaa matape yidi entan gelin, enti dendi eqidosona. Enta be7ida ubbay gita yashshi yayyidosona." 
Revelation11:12 Hessafe guye, he nam7u nabeti, “Haa pude keyite” giya qaala salope si7idosona. Enta morketi entana be7ishin, enti shaaran gelidi pude salo bidosona." 
Revelation11:13 He saatiyan biittay wolqaama qaaxo qaaxin, katamaape tammantho kushey dhayis. Qassi biitta qaaxon laapun mukulu asay hayqis. Attida asay daro kokoridi babidi; salo Xoossaas boncho immidosona." 
Revelation11:14 Nam7antho ayyey aadhis, shin Heko heedzantho ayyey eeson yaana." 
Revelation11:15 Laapuntha kiitanchoy ba moyziya punnis. Salope, “Sa7aa kawotethay nu Godaasinne Kiristoosas gidis; I merinaape merinaa gakanaw haarana” giya wolqaama qaalay si7etis." 
Revelation11:16 Yaatin, Xoossaa sinthan, banta araatan uttida laatamanne oyddu cimati gufannidi, Xoossas goyinnidi," 
Revelation11:17 “Ha77ika kaseka de7eyso, Godaw, Ubbaafe Wolqaama Xoossaw, neeni gita wolqaa oykadasa. Neeni haaranaw doomida gisho, nuuni nena galatoos." 
Revelation11:18 Ayhude gidonna asay hanqetidosona, shin ne hanqoy yis. Hayqidaysata bolla ne pirdiya wodey gakis; neeni ne aylleta, nabetas geeshshatasinne ne sunthaas yayyeysatas, guuthatasinne gitatas, enta oosuwada immiya wodey gakis. Alamiya dhayseysata dhaysiya wodey yis” yaagidosona." 
Revelation11:19 Salon de7iya Xoossa Keethay dooyetis; iya giddon Xoossaa caaqo Taabotey bentis. Qassi wol7anthi wol7amis, deshoy dechis; daday dhuuqis; biitti qaaxis; shachi bukis." 
Revelation12:1 Hessafe guye, salon wolqaama malaati bentis. Awa ma7ada, ageena bolla eqada, tammanne nam7u xoolinto kallacha ba huuphen wothida de7iya, issi maccasiya bentasu." 
Revelation12:2 He maccasiya qanthe; shin iyo iqethi oykin un7etada waassasu. 
Revelation12:3 Qassi hara malaati salon bentis. Laapun huuphetinne tammu kaceti de7iya gita zo7o dawey bentis. I ba huupheta bolla laapun kallacha wothis. 
Revelation12:4 He dawey ba goynan xoolintotape sikuwa salope dafidi sa7an yeggis. He dawey na7ay yeleti wodhida mela mittanaw koyidi, yelanaw eqetiya maccase sinthan eqis." 
Revelation12:5 He maccasiya kawotethaa ubbaa birata xam7an haaranaw de7iya adde na7a yelasu. Na7ay Xoossaakonne iya araatako pude eketis. 
Revelation12:6 Maccasiya 1,260 gallas gakanaw iyo naagana mela Xoossay iw giigisi wothida bessaa mela biitta baqatasu." 
Revelation12:7 Salon oli medhetis. Mika7eeli ba kiitanchotara dawiyara oletis; dawey ba kiitanchotara gididi zaari oletis. 
Revelation12:8 Shin dawey xoonetidi salon entaw de7iya bessi dhayidosona. 
Revelation12:9 Gita dawey, beni shooshay, sa7an yegetis. Ika Daabuloosa woyko Xalahe geetetiya alamiya baletheysa. I ba kiitanchotara issife duge alamiya yegetis." 
Revelation12:10 Hessafe guye, salon haysada giya qaala si7as. “Ha77i atotethay, wolqaynne kawotethay, nu Xoossasa; maatay Kiristoosas gidis. Hiza, qammanne gallas Xoossaa sinthan, nu ishata mooteysi salope duge holetis." 
Revelation12:11 Enti dorsa suuthaaninne banta markatethaa qaalan, iya olidi xoonidosona. Enti banta shempuwas mishetonna bantana hayqos aathidi immidosona." 
Revelation12:12 Hessa gisho, saloninne iya giddon de7eysato ufaytite. Shin biittanne abba ayye! Hiza, Xalahey baw guutha wodey attidaysa erida gisho, wolqaama hanqon hinteko wodhis” yaagis." 
Revelation12:13 Qassi dawey bana sa7a yeggidaysa be7ida wode adde na7a yelida maccasiw goodis. 
Revelation12:14 Maccasiw shooshay qohonna mela heedzu laythinne bagga mashenne uyashe iya naagetiya bessi mela biitta piradhada baana mela nam7u wolqaama argantha qefey iw imetis. 
Revelation12:15 Yaatidi, maccasiw di7oy di77idi efana mela dawey shaafa haatha mela ba doonape maccase guyera cooyis." 
Revelation12:16 Shin biittay maccasiw maaddis; biittay ba doona dooyidi dawiya doonape keyida haatha mittis. 
Revelation12:17 He dawey maccase bolla daro hanqetidi, I kochata, Xoossaa kiitaa naageysatanne Yesuusi qoncisida tumaas ammanetidaysata olanaw bidi." 
Revelation12:18 Abba gaxan de7iya shafiyan eqis. 
Revelation13:1 Hessafe guye, issi do7ay abbaafe keyishin be7as. Iyaw tammu kaceynne laapun huuphey de7ees. He tammu kaceta bolla tammu kallachati de7oosona. He huupheta bolla Xoossaa cashsha sunthati xaafetidi uttis." 
Revelation13:2 Ta be7ida do7ay maahe daanees; iya tohoy babantha toho mela; iya doonayka gaammo doona daanees. Dawey ba wolqaa, ba araatanne ba gita maata he do7aas immis." 
Revelation13:3 He do7aa huuphiyape issuwa bolla hayqos gathiya madunthi be7as, shin he madunthay paxis. Alamiya asa ubbay malaaletidi he do7aa kaallis." 
Revelation13:4 Dawey ba maata do7aas immida gisho asa ubbay dawiya goyinnidosona. Qassi asay, “Do7aa meli oonee? Iyara oletanaw danda7ey oonee?” yaagidi do7aas goyinnidosona." 
Revelation13:5 He do7aas otortana melanne cayana mela dooni imetis; oytamanne nam7u ageena haarana mela maati iyaw imetis. 
Revelation13:6 He do7ay Xoossaa, iya sunthaa, I de7iya bessaanne salon de7iya ubbaa baadethi oykis." 
Revelation13:7 He do7ay geeshshatara oletidi, entana xoonana mela wolqi iyaw imetis. Yara ubbaa, dere ubbaa, dumma dumma doona ubbaa bollanne koche ubbaa bolla maati iyaw imetis." 
Revelation13:8 Alamey medhetoosape doomidi, shuketida Dorsaa de7o maxaafan enta sunthay xaafetonna ha sa7an de7iya asa ubbay he do7aas goyinnana." 
Revelation13:9 Si7iya haythi de7iya asi si7o. 
Revelation13:10 Oonika di7etanaw de7ey di7etees. Mashshan hayqanaw de7ey mashshan shuketana. Hessanka geeshshata danda7aynne ammanoy eretana. 
Revelation13:11 Qassika, hara do7i sa7ape keyishin be7as. Iyaw dorsa kace daaniya nam7u kacey de7ees; iya oday dawe oda mela." 
Revelation13:12 He do7ay koyro do7aa bessan, iya maatan oothees. Ika hayqos gathiya madunthaafe paxida koyro do7aas; biittan de7iya asa ubbay goyinnana mela oothees." 
Revelation13:13 He nam7antho do7ay hari attoshin, tama salope asa ubbaa sinthan wodhisana gakanaw gita malaatata oothis." 
Revelation13:14 Koyro do7aa bessan oothana mela, iyaw imetida malaatatan sa7an de7iya asa ubbaa I balethis. Mashshan madunxidi paxida do7aa bonchoos misile giigisana mela entana kiittis." 
Revelation13:15 Nam7antho do7ay koyro do7aa misiliyas shempo immidi odetana melanne iyaw goyinnonaysati hayqana mela oothiya maati imetis. 
Revelation13:16 He nam7antho do7ay gitinne guuthi, manqoynne durey, womaanoynne aylley ba ushacha kushen woyko ba som7on malla wothana mela oothis." 
Revelation13:17 He do7aa sunthay woyko iya sunthaa payduwa mallay bayna asi oonika bayzanawunne shammanaw danda7enna. 
Revelation13:18 Cincatethi koshshey hessana. Eratethi de7iya oonika he do7aa payduwa birshethaa ero; he paydoy asa sunthi. He paydoy usupun xeetanne usupun tammanne usupuna. 
Revelation14:1 Hessafe guye, Dorsay Xiyoone zuma bolla eqidaysa be7as. Iyara iya sunthaynne iya Aawa sunthay enta som7on xaafetida, 144,000 asay de7ees." 
Revelation14:2 Salope gita haatha guunthunne dada guunthu daaniya wolqaama girsi si7as. Qassi ta si7ida girsay diithi diixishin si7etiya girsaa mela. 
Revelation14:3 144,000 asay araata sinthan, oyddu de7on de7iya medhetethata sinthaninne cimata sinthan eqidi entafe hara oonika tamaaranaw danda7onna ooratha mazmure yexidosona." 
Revelation14:4 Haysati maccasara bantana tunisonna naagida geeshshata. Enti dorsay biya bessi ubbaa kaalloosona. Enti Xoossaasinne Dorsaas bayra gididi, shiiqanaw sa7a asaa giddofe wozetidosona." 
Revelation14:5 Enti wordoynne borey bayna asata. 
Revelation14:6 Hessafe guye, merinaa Wongela sa7a bolla de7iya kawotethaa ubbaas, koche ubbaas, yara ubbaasinne dumma dumma doona ubbaas markatanaw salora piradhiya hara kiitancho be7as." 
Revelation14:7 He kiitanchoy ba qaala dhoqu oothidi, “Xoossay alamiya pirdiya saatey gakida gisho Xoossaas yayyite; iya bonchite. Salo, sa7aa, abbanne pulto haatha medhida Xoossaa goyinnite” yaagis." 
Revelation14:8 Koyroysa kaallidi hara nam7antho kiitanchoy, “Dere ubbaa tunanne mathoyiya woyne ushshida, gita Babilooney kundasu! Kundasu!” yaagidi waassis." 
Revelation14:9 Heedzantho kiitanchoy enta kaallidi, ba qaala dhoqu oothidi, “Do7aanne iya misiliya goyinniya qassi iya malla ba som7on woyko ba kushen wothiya oonika de7iko," 
Revelation14:10 iya hanqo xuu7an kumida Xoossaa hanqo woyniya uyana. Enti geeshsha kiitanchota sinthaninne Dorsa sinthan eexiya diinne taman waayetana. 
Revelation14:11 Enta waayiya cuyay meri merinaw cuyishe daana. Do7aanne iya misiliya goyinney qassi he do7aa suntha mallay de7iya oonika qammanne gallas shempoy bayna kaa7etana” yaagis. 
Revelation14:12 Xoossaa kiitaa naageysatinne Yesuusa ammaneteysati genciya minotethay qonciya wodey hessa. 
Revelation14:13 Hessafe guye, “Hizape Godan hayqeysati anjetidaysata” giya qaala salope si7as. Ayyaanay, “Ee tuma, enta oosoy enta kaalliya gisho, enti banta daaburaape shempana” yaagees." 
Revelation14:14 Hessafe guye, bootha shaara bolla uttida Asa Na7a daaneysa be7as. I ba huuphen worqa kallacha wothis; qassi ba kushen baaca oykis." 
Revelation14:15 Hara kiitanchoy Xoossa keethafe keyidi, shaara bolla uttidaysako ba qaala dhoqu oothidi, “Kathaa shiisho wodey gakida gisho ne baaca yeddada kathaa caka; sa7an de7iya kathay gakis” yaagis." 
Revelation14:16 Yaatin shaara bolla uttidaysi ba baaca sa7a yeddidi, sa7an de7iya kathaa cakis." 
Revelation14:17 Qassika salon de7iya Xoossa keethafe hara kiitanchoy keyis; iyawuka oco baaci de7ees. 
Revelation14:18 Tama bolla maati de7iya hara kiitanchoy yarsho bessaafe keyis. I ba qaala dhoqu oothidi oco baaca oykida kiitanchuwako, “Woyne ayfey teerida gisho neeni oco baaca yeddada, sa7an de7iya woyniyape qanxa” yaagis." 
Revelation14:19 He kiitanchoy ba baaca yeddidi, sa7an de7iya woyniyape qanxidi, Xoossaa gita hanquwa gum7iya bessan yeggis." 
Revelation14:20 Enti Katamaape gaxan de7iya woyne ayfe gum7iya bessan yedhetidosona. Suuthi woyne gum7iya bessaafe keyidi issi mukulunne usupun xeetu kilo mitire mela haakidi, para puulo gakidi, dhoqu gidi eellis." 
Revelation15:1 Taani salon hara gitanne malaalsiya malaata be7as. Xoossaa wursetha hanquwa qoncisiya laapun boshata oykida laapun kiitanchoti de7oosona. 
Revelation15:2 Qassi tamara walaketida burcuko abba daaneysa be7as. He abba gaxan do7aa, iya misiliyanne iya sunthaa taybuwa xoonidaysata be7as. Xoossay entaw immida diithaa oykidi eqidosona." 
Revelation15:3 Enti Xoossaa aylliya Muse mazmuriyanne Dorsa mazmuriya haysada yaagidi yexoosona. “Godaw, Ubbaafe Wolqaama Xoossaw, ne oosoy gitanne malaalsiyaba. Dere ubbaa kawaw, ne ogey xillonne tuma." 
Revelation15:4 Geeshshi ne xalaala gidiya gisho, Godaw, new yayyonnaynne ne sunthaa bonchonay oonee? Ne xillo oosoy asa ubbaas qonce gidiya gisho, kawotethi ubbay ne sinthe yidi goyinnana” yaagidi yexoosona." 
Revelation15:5 Hessafe guye, salon dooyetidi de7iya Xoossa Keethaa, ika Markatetha Dunkaaniya be7as." 
Revelation15:5 Hessafe guye, salon dooyetidi de7iya Xoossa Keethaa, ika Markatetha Dunkaaniya be7as." 
Revelation15:6 Laapun boshata oykida laapun kiitanchoti Xoossa keethafe keyidosona. Enti geeshshinne phooliya liino ma7o ma7idosona; banta tiran worqa danco dancidosona. 
Revelation15:7 Oyddu medhetethatape issoy, merinaw de7iya Xoossaa hanqoy kumida laapun worqa xuu7ata laapun kiitanchotas immis." 
Revelation15:8 Xoossaa bonchuwafenne iya wolqaafe dendoysan Xoossa Keethay cuyan kumis. Laapun kiitanchoti oykida laapun boshati poletana gakanaw Xoossa Keetha oonika gelanaw danda7ibeenna. 
Revelation16:1 Hessafe guye, Xoossa keethafe laapun kiitanchotako, “Bidi Xoossaa hanquwa laapun xuu7atape sa7an gussite” yaagidi, odiya wolqaama qaala si7as." 
Revelation16:2 Koyro kiitanchoy bidi, ba xuu7an de7eysa sa7an gussin, do7aa mallay de7eyisata bollanne iya misiliya goyinnidaysata bolla iitanne zaamiya madunthi keyis." 
Revelation16:3 Nam7antho kiitanchoy ba xuu7an de7eysa abban gussin, abbay hayqida asa suuthi daanis. Qassi abban de7iya medhetetha ubbay hayqis." 
Revelation16:4 Heedzantho kiitanchoy ba xuu7an de7eysa shaafataninne pulto haathatan gussin, haathati suuthi gididosona." 
Revelation16:5 Hessafe guye, haatha bolla maati de7iya kiitanchoy haysada yaagishin si7as. “Ha77ika benika de7iya geeshshaw, haysada ne pirdida gisho neeni xillo." 
Revelation16:6 Enti geeshshata suuthaanne nabeta suuthaa gussida gisho, enti suuthu uyana mela oothadasa. Enti bantaw bessiyaba ekidosona” yaagis." 
Revelation16:7 Yarsho bessaafe, “Godaw, Ubbaafe Wolqaama Xoossaw, ne pirday tumanne xillo” giya qaala si7as." 
Revelation16:8 Oyddantho kiitanchoy ba xuu7an de7eysa awa bolla gussin, away ba seelan asaa xuuggana mela awas wolqi imetis." 
Revelation16:9 Asay wolqaama seelan xuugetidi, he boshata bolla maati de7iya Xoossaa sunthaa baaddidosona; banta nagaraape simmidi Xoossaa bonchibookona." 
Revelation16:10 Ichashantho kiitanchoy ba xuu7an de7eysa do7aa araata bolla gussin, he do7aa kawotethay dhumis. Asay un7aa gisho, banta inxarsaa saxoosona." 
Revelation16:11 Qassi asay un7aa gishonne madunthaa gisho, salo Xoossaa baaddidosona; banta oothida nagaraape simmibokona." 
Revelation16:12 Usupuntho kiitanchoy ba xuu7an de7eysa gita Efraxiisa shaafan gussin, doloha baggafe yaana kawotas ogey giigana mela haathay melis." 
Revelation16:13 Hessafe guye, shodhe daaniya heedzu tuna ayyaanati dawiya doonape, do7aa doonapenne wordo nabiya doonape keyishin be7as." 
Revelation16:14 Enti malaatata oothiya tuna ayyaanata. He heedzu tuna ayyaanati Ubbaafe Wolqaama Xoossaa gita gallasan hananaw de7iya olas shiishanaw alame kawota ubbaako baana. 
Revelation16:15 “Heko, ta kaysoda yaana! Asa sinthan kallotonaadanne yeellatonnaada barkidi, ba ma7uwa naagiya uray anjetidaysa!” yaagis." 
Revelation16:16 He tuna ayyaanati kawota Ibraawetho doonan Armagedoone geetetiya bessan shiishidosona. 
Revelation16:17 Laapuntha kiitanchoy ba xuu7an de7eysa carko bolla gussin, xoossa keethan de7iya araatape, “Poletis” giya wolqaama qaalay yis." 
Revelation16:18 Hessafe wol7anthi wol7amis; daday dhuuqis, biittay qaaxis. Asi sa7an medhetoosape biitti hessa mela qaaxo qaaxibeenna. Hessi ubbaafe aadhida qaaxo." 
Revelation16:19 Gita katamay heedza keyidi shaaketis; biitta ubban de7iya katamati dhaydosona. Xoossay gita katamaa Babiloone qopidi, ba iita hanqo woyne ushshay kumida xuu7aa iw immis." 
Revelation16:20 Yuushoy abban teqetida biittati dhaydosona; deretika bentibookona. 
Revelation16:21 Asaa bolla oytamanne ichashu kilo giraame mela deexiya wolqaama shachi salope bukis. Boshay daro iita gidiya gisho asay shacha bosha gisho Xoossaa baaddidosona. 
Revelation17:1 Laapun xuu7ata oykida laapun kiitanchotape issoy taako yidi, “Haaya; daro haathata bolla uttida gita laymatiya maccase bolla yaanaw de7iya pirdaa ta nena bessaana." 
Revelation17:2 Alamiya kawoti iira laymatidosona; alamen de7iya asayka I laymatetha woyniya uyidi mathotidosona” yaagis. 
Revelation17:3 He kiitanchoy tana Geeshsha Ayyaanan mela biitta efis. Yan issi maccasiya cashsha sunthay I bolla ubban xaafetidi uttida, zo7o do7aa toggidaaro be7as; he do7aas laapun huupheynne tammu kacey de7ees." 
Revelation17:4 He maccasiya kaalose ma7onne zo7o ma7o ma7asu; iya worqan, boncho shuchaninne inqo geetetiya al7o shuchan alleeqetasu. Iya ba kushen borsiyabaanne laymatetha tunatethan kumida worqa xuu7a oykasu." 
Revelation17:5 I som7on xuura ooso birshethay de7iya sunthay, “Gita Babilooney, laymatethasinne sa7an de7iya tunabaa ubbaas aayo” giya xuufey xaafetidi uttis." 
Revelation17:6 Qassi he maccasiya geeshshata suuthaanne Yesuusas markatishe hayqidaysata suuthaa uyada mathotidaaro ta be7ada malaaletas. 
Revelation17:7 Kiitanchoy taako, “Neeni ayis malaaletay? Taani new maccase xuura odaanne iya tookida laapun huupheynne tammu kacey de7iya do7aa xuura odaa odana." 
Revelation17:8 Neeni be7ida do7ay koyro de7ees, shin ha77i baawa. He do7ay ciimmo ollafe keyidi dhayos baana. Sa7i medhetoosape doomidi, de7o maxaafan enta sunthay xaafetiboonna sa7an de7iya asay, do7aa be7idi malaaletana. Hiza, I kase de7ees; ha77i baawa, shin sinthafe yaana." 
Revelation17:9 “Haysi cincatethinne akeeka koyees. Laapun huupheti maccasiya uttiya laapun dereta; hessati qassi laapun kawota. 
Revelation17:10 Entafe ichashu kawoti kundidosona. Issoy ha77i gakanaw haarees; hanko Kawoy yibeenna. I yidi guutha wode takanaw bessees. 
Revelation17:11 Sinthe de7ida do7ay, ha77i baynaysi, I ba huuphen hospuntho do7aa. I laapun do7atape issuwa; I dhayanaw bees." 
Revelation17:12 “Neeni be7ida tammu kaceti haaro doomiboonna tammu kawota. Shin enti do7aara issife issi saate kawotidi haaranaw entaw maati imetana. 
Revelation17:13 Enta ubbaas issi qofay de7ees; enti banta wolqaanne banta maata do7aas immana. 
Revelation17:14 Enti Dorsaara oletana, shin dorsay godata Godaanne kawota Kawo gidiya gisho, I xeegidaysati, dooridaysatinne ammanetidaysati he kawota xoonana” yaagis." 
Revelation17:15 Kiitanchoy qassika taako, “Laymatiyara uttida he neeni be7ida haathati yarata, kawotethata, zerethatanne dumma dumma doonan odeteyisata." 
Revelation17:16 Qassi neeni be7ida tammu kaceynne do7ay laymatiyaro ixana. Enti iw de7iya ubbaba ekana. Qassi iyo kallo ashshananne I ashuwa midigana; yaatidi enti iyo taman xuuggana. 
Revelation17:17 Hiza, Xoossaa qaalay poletana gakanaw enta qofay issino gidana mela enti banta aysiya wolqaa do7aas immanaadanne Xoossay qopidaysa enti oothanaada enta wozanan Xoossay amo wothis." 
Revelation17:18 He neeni be7ida maccasiya sa7a kawota haariya gita katamiw” yaagis. 
Revelation18:1 Yaatidi, gita maati de7iya hara kiitanchoy salope wodhishin ta be7as. He kiitanchuwa bonchoy sa7a poo7isis." 
Revelation18:2 He kiitanchoy ba qaala dhoqu oothidi, “Iya kundasu! Gita Babilooney kundasu! Babilooney tuna ayyaanati aqiya bessi gidasu. Dumma dumma iitabatas keethe gidasu; tuna kafotinne do7ati shempiya bessi gidasu." 
Revelation18:3 Asa koche ubbaa ba laymatetha woyniya ushshasu. Sa7aa kawoti iira laymatidosona. I miikotethaafe dendoysan biittan de7iya zal7anchoti duretidosona” yaagis. 
Revelation18:4 Hessafe guye, ta salope haysada giya hara qaala si7as. “I nagaraa iira koxonna melanne, iya ekanaw de7iya seera hinte ekonna mela, ta deriyaw iipe keyite." 
Revelation18:5 Hiza, I nagaray salo gakanaw dooretis. Xoossay I naaquwa akeekis." 
Revelation18:6 Iya immidaysa mela zaaridi iw immite. Iya oothida oosuwas nam7u kushe iw zaarite. Iya giigisida ushsha bolla hinte nam7u kushe mathoyiya ushsha I xuu7an kunthite. 
Revelation18:7 Iya baw bonchetidaysadanne iw injetidaysa mela, iyo metoothitenne kayoyite. Iya ba wozanan, ‘Taani kaweeda uttas; ta azini bayna maccas gidike; taani ubbaka kayotike’ yaagasu." 
Revelation18:8 Hessa gisho, bosha ubbay, hargey, kayoynne koshi iyo issi gallas oykana. Qassi iya taman xuugetana; ayis giiko, I bolla pirdiya Xoossay wolqaama” yaagis." 
Revelation18:9 “Iira laymatidaysatinne I miikotethan de7ida, alamiya kawoti he katamiya xuugetin keyiya cuyaa be7ida wode iw waassidi yeekana." 
Revelation18:10 Enti he katame waayiya be7idi yayyida gisho, haaki eqidi, “ ‘Ha gita katame! Wolqaama katame! Babiloone, nena ayye! Neeni issi saate giddon ne pirda ekadasa’ yaagana." 
Revelation18:11 “Enta markabiya caana hizape shammiya asi bayna gisho, sa7an de7iya zal7anchoti he katamaas waassananne kayotana." 
Revelation18:12 Enta worqa, bira, boncho shuchu, al7o shucha, kaalose ma7o, liino ma7o, haare ma7o, zo7o ma7o, dumma dumma sawo mithi, dangarsa zaale, al7o mithi, naase birata, goole shuchu," 
Revelation18:13 qarafa, qimame, ixaane, karbe, shitto, woyne, zayte, lo77o dhiille, giste, mehe, dorse, para, para gaare, aylletanne hara asata shammiya oonika baawa." 
Revelation18:14 “Zal7anchoti maccaseeko, ‘Neeni amotida lo77oba ubbay neepe dhayis. Ne aqoynne alleeqetidaba ubbay neepe haakis. Neeni zaarada enta ubbaa demmaka’ yaagidosona." 
Revelation18:15 He kataman zal7idi duretida zal7anchoti I metuwa babidi iipe haakidi eqana. Enti yeekananne kayotana. 
Revelation18:16 Qassi, “ ‘Liino, kaalose ma7onne zo7o ma7o ma7ada, worqan, boncho shuchaninne inqo geetetiya al7o shuchan alleeqetida, he gita katamees ayye!" 
Revelation18:17 Haysa mela gita shalo ubbay issi saate giddon dhayis’ yaagidosona. “Markabiya laagiya ubbay, markabiyan biya ubbay, markabiya bolla oothiya ubbaynne abban zal7iya ubbay haaki eqidosona." 
Revelation18:17 Haysa mela gita shalo ubbay issi saate giddon dhayis’ yaagidosona. “Markabiya laagiya ubbay, markabiyan biya ubbay, markabiya bolla oothiya ubbaynne abban zal7iya ubbay haaki eqidosona." 
Revelation18:18 He katamiya xuugetin keyiya cuyaa be7ida wode, ‘Ha gita katamiw daaniya hara katami de7ishsha?’ yaagidosona." 
Revelation18:19 Enti banta huuphen baana qolidi, waassidosonanne kayotidosona. “ ‘Abbaa bolla markabeti de7iya ubbay, I shaluwan duretida ubbay, he katamiya issi saaten dhayida gisho, ayye! Ayye!" 
Revelation18:20 Saluwaw, I dhayuwan ufayta! Geeshshato, hawaareto, nabeto, Xoossay hinte gisho I bolla pirdida gisho ufaytite’ yaagidosona.”" 
Revelation18:21 Yaatin, mino kiitanchoy woxa daaniya gita shuchu denthidi abban holishe, “Gita katamiya Babilooney wolqan holettada haysada kundana; iya hachife guye ubbaka bentuku." 
Revelation18:22 Diithi diixeysatinne yexeysati, suusul7enne moyze punneysati, hizape guye ne giddon ubbaka si7etokona. Ay kocha zal7e zal7iya asika ne giddon bentenna. Woxa girsi hizape guye ne giddon si7etenna." 
Revelation18:23 Xompe poo7oy zaaridi ne giddon poo7enna. Macho ekeysinne azina geliyari qaali hizape guye ne giddon si7etenna. Ne zal7anchoti biitta ubban eretida wolqaamata. Ne bitan kawotethata ubbaa cimmadasa” yaagis. 
Revelation18:24 Nabeta suuthay, geeshshata suuthaynne biitta bolla hayqida asa ubbaa suuthay I giddon bentida gisho Babilooney pirdetasu." 
Revelation19:1 Yaatin, salon daro asay, “Xoossay galatetto! Atotethay, bonchoynne wolqay nu Xoossaas gido." 
Revelation19:2 Iya pirday tumanne xillo. Sa7aa tunisida iita laymiw Xoossay pirdis. Xoossay ba aylleta suuthaa iipe achis” yaagishin si7as. 
Revelation19:3 He asay zaaridi banta qaala dhoqu oothidi, “Xoossa galati gako. He katamiya merinaw cuyashe daana” yaagidosona." 
Revelation19:4 Laatamanne oyddu cimatinne de7on de7iya oyddu medhetethati araatan uttida Xoossaas gufannidi, “Amin7i! Xoossa galati gako” yaagidi goyinnidosona." 
Revelation19:5 Yaatin, “Xoossa aylleti, Xoosse yayiya guuthinne giti ubbay, nu Xoossaa galatite” giya qaalay araatape keyis." 
Revelation19:6 Yaatin, daro asada wocamiya, wolqaama shaafada guummiya, dadada dechiya girsay, “Xoossaa galati gako; nu Goday, Ubbaafe Wolqaama Xoossay kawotis." 
Revelation19:7 Dorsaa yaaganoy gakida gishonne iya geliyara giigida gisho, nu ufaytoos, galatoosinne Dorsaa bonchoos." 
Revelation19:8 Gelos giigidaara phooliyanne geeshshi gidida liino ma7ana mela iw imetis” yaagishin ta si7as. (Liino ma7oy geeshshata xillo ooso leemiso.) 
Revelation19:9 Hessafe guye, kiitanchoy taako, “Dorsa yaagano xeegetidaysati anjetidaysata” gada xaafa. He kiitanchoy gujidi, “Haysi Xoossaa tuma qaala” yaagis." 
Revelation19:10 He wode ta iya goyinnanaw iya tohuwa bolla kundas. Shin I, “Hessa oothofa! Taani Yesuusaba markatiya ne melanne ne ishata mela. Ne Xoossaa goyinna” yaagis. Hiza, Yesuusaba markatidaysatas nabetetha ayyaani de7ees." 
Revelation19:11 Yaatin, saloy dooyetin, yan bootha pari de7eysa be7as. He para toggidaysi Ammanetidaysanne Tumancho geetetees. I xillotethan pirdesinne oletees." 
Revelation19:12 Iya ayfey tama laco daanees; iya huuphen daro kallachi de7ees. Iya bolla I attishin, hari oonika eronna xaafetida sunthi de7ees." 
Revelation19:13 I suuthan muuketida ma7o ma7is; iya sunthayka Xoossaa Qaala. 
Revelation19:14 Phooliyanne geeshshi gidida liino ma7ida salo olanchoti bootha parata toggidi iya geedo kaalloosona. 
Revelation19:15 Kawotethata qanxiya qara mashshay iya doonape keyees. I birata xam7an asaa haarana. Ubbaafe Wolqaama Xoossaa hanqo woyne ushsha gum7iya bessaa I yedhana. 
Revelation19:16 Iya ma7uwa bollanne iya wodiriya bolla, “Kawota Kawuwanne godata Godaa” giya sunthay xaafetis." 
Revelation19:17 Hessafe guye, issi kiitanchoy awa bolla eqidaysa be7as. He kiitanchoy salora piradhiya kafo ubbaas ba qaala dhoqu oothidi, “Haa yiite! Xoossaa gibira maanaw issi bessi shiiqite." 
Revelation19:18 Yidi kawota ashuwa, shaalaqata ashuwa, wotaadareta ashuwa, parata ashuwa, parata toggeyisata ashuwa, asa ubbaa ashuwa, aylleta ashuwa, womaannota ashuwa, gitatanne guuthata ashuwa miite” yaagis." 
Revelation19:19 Do7ay, para toggidaysaranne iya olanchotara oletanaw sa7a kawotinne enta olanchoti issi bessi shiiqidashin be7as." 
Revelation19:20 Shin he do7aynne iya sunthan malaatata oothida wordo nabey iyara issife oyketis. He malaatatan do7aa mallay de7eysatanne iya misiliya goyinneyisata I balethis. Do7aynne wordo nabey nam7ayka diinnen eexiya tama abban paxa yegetidosona. 
Revelation19:21 Attidaysati para toggidaysa doonape keyiya mashshan hayqidosona. Kafoti ubbay enta ashuwa midi kallidosona. 
Revelation20:1 Zawi bayna olla qulpiyanne gita santhalaata ba kushen oykida issi kiitanchoy salope wodhishin be7as. 
Revelation20:2 I dawiya oykidi mukulu laythas qachis. He dawey koyro shoosha, Daabuloosa woyko Xalahe." 
Revelation20:3 Kiitanchoy zawi bayna ollan iya yeggidi, mukulu laythi wurana gakanaw kawotethata zaari balethonna mela qulpen gordidi attamis. Hessafe guye, dawey guutha wodes biletanaw bessees." 
Revelation20:4 Hessafe guye, araatatanne araatata bolla uttidi pirdana mela maati imetidaysata be7as. Yesuusas markatida gishonne Xoossaa qaala odida gisho banta qoodhiya goyretida asaa shempuwa be7as. Enti do7aa woyko do7aa misiliya goyinnibookona. Enti do7aa malla banta som7on woyko banta kushen wothibookona. Enti hayqope dendidi Kiristoosara issife mukulu laythi haaridosona." 
Revelation20:5 Haysi koyro denduwa; attida hanko hayqidaysati mukulu laythay wurana gakanaw hayqope dendibookona. 
Revelation20:6 Koyro denduwas qaadi de7eysati anjetidaysatanne geeshshata. Enta bolla nam7antho hayquwas wolqi baawa. Enti Xoossaasinne Kiristoosas kahine gidana; iyara issife mukulu laythi haarana. 
Revelation20:7 Mukulu laythay wuridaape guye Xalahey qashope biletana. 
Revelation20:8 I sa7aa gaxape gaxa gakanaw de7iya kawotethata, entika, Googenne Maagoge geeteteyisata balethidi olas shiishanaw keyana. Enta paydoy abba gaxan de7iya shafe mela." 
Revelation20:9 Enti biitta ubban laaletidi, geeshshata heeranne Xoossay dosiya katamaa teqidosona. Shin tami salope wodhidi entana mis." 
Revelation20:10 Enta balethida Xalahey, do7aynne wordo nabey yegetida eexiya diinne tama abban yegetis. Enti qammanne gallas merinaw paxa kaa7etana." 
Revelation20:11 Hessafe guye, gita bootha araata bolla uttidaysa be7as. Sa7inne saloy iya sinthafe baqatidosona; enti zaari bentibookona." 
Revelation20:12 Hayqidaysati, gitatinne guuthati araata sinthan eqidaysata be7as; maxaafati dooyetidosona; qassi de7o maxaafa gidida hara maxaafi dooyetis. Hayqidaysati maxaafan xaafetida banta oosuwada pirda ekidosona." 
Revelation20:13 Abbay ba giddon de7iya hayqidaysata immis; hayqoynne Si7ooley banta giddon de7iya hayqidaysata immidosona. Issi issi asi ba oosuwada pirda ekis. 
Revelation20:14 Yaatin, hayqoynne Si7ooley tama abban yegetidosona. He tama abbay nam7antho hayqo." 
Revelation20:15 De7o maxaafan iya sunthay xaafetiboonna asi oonika tama abban yegetis. 
Revelation21:1 Taani ooratha salonne ooratha sa7a be7as. Koyro saloynne koyro sa7i dhayis; abbayka dhayis. 
Revelation21:2 Geeshsha katamiya, ooratha Yerusalaamey, azina gelanaw alleeqetada giigada de7iya maccasada salope Xoossaa matape duge wodhishin be7as." 
Revelation21:3 Araatape haysada yaagidi, odiya gita qaala si7as; “Xoossa Keethay asaara de7ees; Xoossay ba bonchuwara asaara issife daana. Enti iya dere gidana; Xoossay ba huuphen entara daana; I enta Xoossaa gidana." 
Revelation21:4 Xoossay enta ayfepe afutha ubbaa quchana. Hizape hayqoy woyko kayoy woyko waasoy woyko waayey deenna. Gal77ay ubbay aadhis” yaagis. 
Revelation21:5 Araata bolla uttidaysi, “Taani ubbaa oorathi oothana” yaagis. Qassi zaaridi taako, “Taani odeysi ammantheysanne tuma gidiya gisho xaafa” yaagis." 
Revelation21:6 Qassi taako, “Poletis! Taani Alfanne Omega; Doomethinne Polo. Saamotida oonaka de7o haatha pultofe gate qanxonna coo ushshana." 
Revelation21:7 Xooniya oonika hessa ubbaa laattana; taani iyaw Xoossaa gidana; ika ta na7a gidana. 
Revelation21:8 Shin yashshanchota, ammanetonayisata, tunata, shempo wodheyisata, laymateyisata, biteyisata, eeqa goyinneysatanne wordanchota qaaday diinney eexiya tama abban gidana. Hessi nam7antho hayqo” yaagis." 
Revelation21:9 Laapun wursetha boshati kumida laapun xuu7ata oykida laapun kiitanchotape issoy taako yidi, “Haaya, taani nena gelos giigida Dorsaa machiw bessaana” yaagis." 
Revelation21:10 Kiitanchoy tana zuma huuphe Geeshsha Ayyaanan kessidi, geeshsha katamay, Yerusalaamey, salope Xoossaa matape duge wodhishin bessis." 
Revelation21:11 He katamay Xoossaa bonchon poo7ees. He katamaa poo7oy yasphide geetetiya al7o shuchaa mela; geeshsha birilleda phoolees. 
Revelation21:12 He katamaa dirsay wolqaamanne adusse. Iyaw tammanne nam7u pengetinne he pengeta naagiya tammanne nam7u kiitanchoti de7oosona. Pengeta bolla tammanne nam7u Isra7eele zerethata sunthay xaafetis. 
Revelation21:13 Doloha baggara heedzu pengeti, pudeha baggara heedzu pengeti, dugeha baggara heedzu pengetinne wuloha baggara heedzu pengeti de7oosona." 
Revelation21:14 Katamaa gimbe dirsay tammanne nam7u shucha baasota bolla eqis. Enta bolla tammanne nam7u Dorsaa hawaareta sunthay xaafetis. 
Revelation21:15 Taw odiya kiitanchuwas, katamaa, iya pengetanne iya dirsaa wadhiya worqa xam7ay de7ees." 
Revelation21:16 Katamaas oyddu maazaneti de7oosona; katamaa geesaynne gompay issi gina. Kiitanchoy katamaa ba xam7an wadhin, katamay tammanne nam7u mukulu kilo mitire gidis; katamaa geesay, gompaynne dhoqatethay issi gina." 
Revelation21:17 Kiitanchoy qassi dirsaa wadhin, kiitanchoy go7etiya asa kushen issi xeetanne oytamanne oyddu wadha gidis." 
Revelation21:18 Katamaa dirsay yasphide geetetiya shuchan diretis. Katamay mastooteda phooliya walahi bayna worqan oosetis. 
Revelation21:19 Katamaa dirsaa baasoy ubba qommo bonchetida shuchan alleeqetis. Koyro hiixetida shuchay yasphide, nam7anthoy sanpare, heedzanthoy kelqedoone, oyddanthoy baluure," 
Revelation21:20 ichashanthoy sardonkisa, usupunthoy sardiyoone, laapunthoy kiristiloobe, hospunthoy birille, uddufunthoy toophaze, tammanthoy kirisphiraasise, tammanne issinthoy yaakinte, tammanne nam7anthoy ametesxinoosa." 
Revelation21:21 Tammanne nam7u pengetas tammanne nam7u al7o shuchi de7ees. Issi issi pengey issi al7o shuchan oosetis. Katamaa wogga ogey mastooteda phooliya walahi bayna worqafe oosetis. 
Revelation21:22 Goday, Ubbaafe Wolqaama Xoossaynne Dorsay katamaas keethe gidiya gisho, ta he kataman Xoossa keethi be7abike." 
Revelation21:23 Xoossaa bonchoy he katamaas poo7iya gishonne Dorsay iyaw xompe gidiya gisho katamaas awa woyko ageena poo7o koshshenna. 
Revelation21:24 Kawotethati he katamaa poo7on hemetana; kawotika banta bonchuwa yaa ehana. 
Revelation21:25 Qammi yan bayna gisho katamaa pengeti ubba gallas dooya gidana; ubbaraka gordetokona. 
Revelation21:26 Kawotethata gitatethaynne bonchoy he katamaa yaana. 
Revelation21:27 Dorsaa de7o maxaafan sunthay xaafetidaysata xalaali attishin, tunabaa woyko yeellayaba oothey woyko wordotey oonika he katamaa gelenna." 
Revelation22:1 Yaatidi, kiitanchoy tana Xoossaa kawotetha araatapenne Dorsaa kawotethaa araatape goggiya mastooteda phooliya de7o haatha shaafa bessis." 
Revelation22:2 He shaafay katama ogiya giddora duge goggees. Shaafape hefintha baggaranne hafintha baggara ageenan issi toho; laythan tammanne nam7u toho ayfiya de7o mithi de7ees. He mitha boncoy kawotethata ubbaa hargefe pathees. 
Revelation22:3 He kataman aybi baadethika deenna. Xoossaa kawotetha araataynne Dorsaa kawotetha araatay he kataman daana. Xoossaa aylleti Xoossaas oothana. 
Revelation22:4 Enti iya som7uwa be7ana; iya sunthay enta som7on xaafetana. 
Revelation22:5 Hizape qammi deenna; Godaa Xoossay entaw xompe gidiya gisho entaw xompe woyko awa poo7o koshshenna. Enti meri merinaw kawotana. 
Revelation22:6 Kiitanchoy taako, “Ha ta odiya qaalay tumanne ammantheysa. Goday, nabeta ba Geeshsha Ayyaanan kiittiya Xoossay, matan hananaba ba aylleta bessanaw ba kiitanchuwa kiittis” yaagis." 
Revelation22:7 Yesuusi, “Heko ta ellesada yaana; ha maxaafan de7iya tinbite qaala naagiya oonika anjetidaysa” yaagis." 
Revelation22:8 Taani, Yohaanisi, he ubbaba si7as; be7as. Taani hessa si7ida wodenne be7ida wode hessa tana bessida kiitanchuwa goyinnanaw iya tohuwa bolla kundas." 
Revelation22:9 Shin kiitanchoy taako, “Hessa oothofa! Taani needa, nabetada ne ishatadanne ha maxaafan de7iya ubbaa kiitetiya aylleta mela; Xoossaa goyinna” yaagis." 
Revelation22:10 Kiitanchoy zaaridi, “Ha ubbay poletiya wodey matatida gisho ha maxaafan xaafetida tinbite qaala maatamen gordofa." 
Revelation22:11 Iita oothey gujidi iita ootho; tuney gujidi tuno. Lo77o oothey gujidi lo77o ootho; geeyey gujidi geeyo” yaagis. 
Revelation22:12 Yesuusi, “Heko, taani ellesada yaana. Issuwas issuwas iya oosuwada immanaw ta woytoy taara de7ees." 
Revelation22:13 Taani Alfanne Omega; Koyronne Wursethi; Doomethinne Polo. 
Revelation22:14 “Banta ma7uwa meeccidi geeshsheysati anjetidaysata. De7o mithee ayfiya maanawunne katamaa pengiyara gelanaw entaw maati imetis. 
Revelation22:15 Shin kanati, biteysati, laymateysati, shempo wodheysati, eeqa goyinneysati, wordo doseysatinne ootheysati karen de7oosona." 
Revelation22:16 “Taani, Yesuusi, ha markatethaa hintew, woosa keethatas odana mela ta kiitanchuwa kiittas. Taani Dawita sheeshinne koche. Taani poo7iya guura bakala” yaagis." 
Revelation22:17 Geeshsha Ayyaanaynne gelanaw giigida maccasiya, “Haaya” yaagosona. Qassi haysa si7iya oonika, “Haaya” yaago. Saamotida oonika haayo; de7o haatha koyiya oonika coo eko." 
Revelation22:18 Taani ha maxaafan xaafetida tinbite qaala si7iya oonaka zorayis. Oonika ha qaala bolla issiba gujiko, Xoossay ha maxaafan xaafetida bosha iya bolla gujana." 
Revelation22:19 Oonika maxaafan de7iya tinbite qaalape issiba pacisiko, Xoossay ha maxaafan xaafetida de7o mithaa ayfiyapenne geeshsha katamaape iya qaada pacisana." 
Revelation22:20 Ha ubbaa markateysi, “Tuma, taani ellesada yaana” yaagees. Amin7i; Godaa Yesuusa, haaya."
